| []() | [Elizabeth just made an AMAZING call to action to ABOLISH the Electoral College — and she needs 10,000 Democrats to stand with her RIGHT NOW and sign our urgent petition. Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240115_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20640%2E4449941%2ENkOphQ)
---
**Elizabeth Warren is 100% right** — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College._

**Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.**

But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!

**[__So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Elizabeth Warren & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away! »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240115_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20640%2E4449941%2ENkOphQ)**
[Sign my name now: Abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240115_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20640%2E4449941%2ENkOphQ)
---
Don’t forget to hit submit to record your signature. Thank you,

-Fight For Reform

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Debate prep
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I’ll be spending much of the next week in debate prep — learning my opponents’ potential lines of attack, questions about my record, and sharing my plans for California’s future.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5015%2E5257348%2EOmBvq3)
Derek, I have a quick campaign update after a busy week:
**We qualified for the _FOX 11 Los Angeles_ U.S. Senate debate with three other candidates, including celebrity Republican candidate Steve Garvey.**
Garvey is _surging_ to second place in recent polls, despite his total lack of political experience and very little campaigning.
He is a real wild card, and with Republicans preparing to vote in the GOP presidential primary on the same ballot, he stands a real chance of advancing to November.
I’ll be spending much of the next week in debate prep — sharing my plans for California’s future and preparing for Garvey’s attacks.
**I really need to spend this time preparing for the debate instead of worrying about our fundraising** , but unfortunately, it’s been a slow start to the year.
**[Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in any amount before midnight (and I mean any amount!) to help me catch up to my fundraising goal, so I can stay focused on preparing for this enormous moment for our campaign?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=jan2024_abs_em.jV4jRE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240115_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5015%2E5257348%2EOmBvq3)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240115_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=5015%2E5257348%2EOmBvq3)

---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240115_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=8&akid=5015%2E5257348%2EOmBvq3)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240115_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=9&akid=5015%2E5257348%2EOmBvq3)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240115_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=5015%2E5257348%2EOmBvq3)
---
We simply don’t have the time to spare to make the critical budget decisions necessary in the final few weeks of this primary campaign. We need the support _now_.
Every single donation — even just $3 — makes a real difference.
Thanks for your help,
Adam
**[P.S. Please sign up to make a $6 weekly recurring donation through Primary Day on March 5th. It’s the most impactful donation you can make, and your weekly donation will automatically turn off after the primary election.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3456?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240115_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=5015%2E5257348%2EOmBvq3)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse=20James=20Mullen?=
subject: Take Montana Back
body:
Jesse James is fighting for Montana and our public lands | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/take-montana-back?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=f6cf8a4661&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=dc35b68753&e=805e709ff8)
[ _Jesse’s New Video_](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c0785db2fa&e=805e709ff8)
Hey team, it’s Jesse James Mullen. We launched a new video today!
We get good traffic on social, but unpaid content only goes so far.
**We need a big push** to get our message in front of Montanans everywhere, from Alzada to Yaak.
We’re fighting to take Montana back from the far-right and MAGA election deniers. Our opponent already has the full support of the Republican Party and is outspending us five to one.
We don’t have a primary opponent, but the Montana Democratic Party won’t support non-incumbents until June -_Montana only has one statewide incumbent_.
**We hope that’s not too late!** You can make a difference and help Democrats win statewide races. Until June, we’re relying on hard work, smart campaigning, and the support of Montanans who care about the future of our beautiful state.
**Help us get our videos in front of every Montanan by chipping in a few bucks right now!**
Thank you,Jesse James Mullen

| [DONATE HERE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=eebf5a8c38&e=805e709ff8)

The GOP candidates share a disgusting agenda that would set our nation back decades. _Remember, each of these candidates wants to:_

❌ **Ban abortion nationwide,** stripping away a woman's right to choose.
❌ **Dismantle affordable health care,** leaving millions without vital coverage.
❌ **Create tax cuts for the ultra wealthy,** exacerbating income inequality.
❌ **Eliminate voter protections,** undermining the foundation of our democracy.
❌**Rollback rights on the LGBTQ community,** reversing years of hard-won progress.

This is not just another election year. This is a fight for the soul of our nation. As these candidates rally their base, we must rally ours – and show them that we have a _bigger_ and _better_ grassroots team.

[The time to act is now. clean_body: No matter who wins in Iowa, our rights are at stake! | | = Peter – The Iowa caucus is happening right now. Whether Trump, DeSantis, Haley, or another GOP contender wins, one thing is crystal clear: they all pose a grave threat to the progress we've fought so hard for. = | = The GOP candidates share a disgusting agenda that would set our nation back decades. Remember, each of these candidates wants to: ❌ Ban abortion nationwide, stripping away a woman's right to choose. ❌ Dismantle affordable health care, leaving millions without vital coverage. ❌ Create tax cuts for the ultra wealthy, exacerbating income inequality. ❌ Eliminate voter protections, undermining the foundation of our democracy. ❌Rollback rights on the LGBTQ community, reversing years of hard-won progress. This is not just another election year. This is a fight for the soul of our nation. As these candidates rally their base, we must rally ours – and show them that we have a bigger and better grassroots team. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. = = = = = Our name is our mission. \- Defeat Republicans Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
Fellow American- Senate Democrats' quarterly fundraising numbers just came out are we’re falling behind. Democrats pulled in 2x as many funds as we did, with an average gift of **$41.37.**

**Not only did they raise more per donation, but they also had more total contributions!**

**This is a fundraising crisis for the Republican Party and at the worst time imaginable.**

We have the best chance in living memory to take the presidency, take the Senate, and hold the House, giving us a united Republican Government that can act on the America First agenda.

We can’t afford to fall behind financially. Especially not now. We were so concerned when we reviewed our records and discovered that you had not yet contributed to our campaign to take back the Majority this quarter.

[**Your contribution is MISSING.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=25e32f7b3c9a4ee2b875af344bde7924&_e=LjcYkxXGsVzdDKzLiZFEVZzBnGcqqKbeNoRT3CJIxrPZ1rDX2pcxuZ5jTv8HAkw4ETOl5U5GlF8u_8Jd7QX_JH_gSiqork8ZuwT4u-_uIyKoERtHfqaGgJQHh6CbHUobu04YoBbNfxIrIvbqrkHr7MMkfRXhSXnbjd0r-VS5b--2tT9tChD1v-r05pKhWlEv769n51Qna816EBKLbutYFvs8QXbh9ucpiJ4-Z57Q1w-ZSLTyshBl6aCU9W6kxh3Z-dcG4CSL2FYFCCPzfOx8-1xoAmV0B6IN2ETDO8OnQCM7nYw25AUBf3pbyRGp18DCFALwKZsvYLNN5HeQBEW0cZsj0GA_wo3_pf8H6p-i7f7oiz7wtxBMd85rmiGX8NQ3O6r4V2V-AXstUXxdwS8ZhINUDAD6TRym01yFePrAokI%3D) Without your contribution, we cannot fund critical strategic elements of our campaign, and our Senate candidates could be abandoned to fight Chuck Schumer and the radical left alone.

This pattern can’t hold up like this, or all our candidates risk being drowned in a flood of Democrat false advertisements in the final months of the campaign.

Because you and I have both seen the Schumer Democrats playbook before, they will start running ads that spread all kinds of lies about our candidates, bogging them down with media inquiries and having to spread the truth to voters.

They will then double down on those lies with additional ads that spread more dishonesty to voters. And we will have to fight back with ads to spread the truth and cut through the false narrative Democrats are creating.

We know how to fight back. We have our plans. We need your support to execute them and take back the Majority.

Peter, by this time it’s no secret. **_Today is the day of the Iowa Caucuses and the OFFICIAL start of the 2024 election!_** I know today’s going to be a busy day for all of us, so I just wanted to tell you this one thing. **[**President Donald J. name: Josh Harder
subject: I’m asking personally, Peter.
body:
Can you help us out?

Hey Peter,
I’m reaching out personally to ask you to [make a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77143404/449529975/753479076?&refcode=E5962-20240113-PersonalAsk-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjljOTdmNDAtMGViNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iTx0db4E5LuQLm1X1YNaDJDnBUvgDRz83Ytm9v74Tn0=) to our campaign and help us hit our $10,000 goal by midnight.
Our election is coming up in less than 50 days and I’ll be on the same ballot against my GOP opponent and Donald Trump. We set this fundraising goal because it’s what we need to raise in order to kick off our get out the vote efforts and win this ultra-competitive race.
I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t urgent. Can you please make a donation to our goal? It’s so important, and you can have a direct impact on our campaign.
Here’s a personal link you can use: [_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Jan2024-FR-January_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77143405/449529976/753479076?&refcode=E5962-20240113-PersonalAsk-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjljOTdmNDAtMGViNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iTx0db4E5LuQLm1X1YNaDJDnBUvgDRz83Ytm9v74Tn0=)

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Could you help me strike out this liberal lineup
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |

| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=495bd042b30143099526b69e57ab0804&_e=yK4QGz7QMfHqBuXXhvr8RJy2ksofERYVGTcYFvGM597fb8AjnTUZCiL3UOiVx_evzWHLu49oo2705wlzXpGRSuc2yyceMybfLbqe4eX9wR3I0FTd1aE9jkydzrWp_W8oI0zsvHuc_2_V_QzDF3vgao7D3rqjjPmmmaZxd2elEUEGdEamOkwlv6e90x7sva7qDtKdxpKqW-6G7-fhR4L2Ri7LL2LKaXq1B7lrugZ7mfMhlE0Aig4WyL-UBf5VX4VDlzWr1NBo4rK1djUCgcw6v2JvMsNevYPpalMWO2toD97bGY3jpKNsvuRa1NgOv3qxCpKGHY99vx9klfVkn6gTQdz8itVikise7X0NmLlDon9L560GGq0D0tWJhXHgjmikzQ78oklqUdpcONYqAmepVw%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=495bd042b30143099526b69e57ab0804&_e=yK4QGz7QMfHqBuXXhvr8RJy2ksofERYVGTcYFvGM597fb8AjnTUZCiL3UOiVx_evzWHLu49oo2705wlzXpGRSuc2yyceMybfLbqe4eX9wR3I0FTd1aE9jkydzrWp_W8oI0zsvHuc_2_V_QzDF3vgao7D3rqjjPmmmaZxd2elEUEGdEamOkwlv6e90x7sva7qDtKdxpKqW-6G7-fhR4L2Ri7LL2LKaXq1B7lrugZ7mfO6A4Ti_WQ4T2BG3R0wfFGx7Dy2Hp5rmCbaK6iVPl_WPVfMAzegYq8VJulfLGtYHeZc88iU8yGJm-ef5nGKMR5OJmm2ytBSvrJm24vBDqh-S8YvqaI5tONm0PDvroWl4G1P52iQQQHfLC0qGKeeuPHGKajjKuEKSLGsxSiMYOfnKQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=495bd042b30143099526b69e57ab0804&_e=yK4QGz7QMfHqBuXXhvr8RJy2ksofERYVGTcYFvGM597fb8AjnTUZCiL3UOiVx_evzWHLu49oo2705wlzXpGRSuc2yyceMybfLbqe4eX9wR3I0FTd1aE9jkydzrWp_W8oI0zsvHuc_2_V_QzDF3vgao7D3rqjjPmmmaZxd2elEUEGdEamOkwlv6e90x7sva7qDtKdxpKqW-6G7-fhR4L2Ri7LL2LKaXq1B7lrugZ7mfMoNxwvxkWC8UDgkoi4eEDowqbx6ppD0t08cSwziB2LsqtoqRCkQJdzM5PIZHHP6NZEMYjz1JcmpYL59LgkprmiuuQc6mTRtkZ9KAE5exxjNHXz4gR2qmMHv88KF7bu2AB5ZVndSxl1VBINr-uTwY78MZcl3GW_HaBvKxlowRHI0w%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=495bd042b30143099526b69e57ab0804&_e=yK4QGz7QMfHqBuXXhvr8RJy2ksofERYVGTcYFvGM597fb8AjnTUZCiL3UOiVx_evzWHLu49oo2705wlzXpGRSuc2yyceMybfLbqe4eX9wR3I0FTd1aE9jkydzrWp_W8oI0zsvHuc_2_V_QzDF3vgao7D3rqjjPmmmaZxd2elEUEGdEamOkwlv6e90x7sva7qDtKdxpKqW-6G7-fhR4L2Ri7LL2LKaXq1B7lrugZ7mfPpuA_Vkv9PAP8I_2SnQ2emeRW-Z65InTbqFKT8Axux5XRSfDumwhhOpO6A8cZcdGxjy09lf0lWF9Y1JLtNYlWstX4ORaHCBBqK1sIreRLRFZdv8huE03sugkTAlPv87C2XdBjksEbc5on-ElXpPxol28NKfVtZLog8GQ6ZCdc8pQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=495bd042b30143099526b69e57ab0804&_e=yK4QGz7QMfHqBuXXhvr8RJy2ksofERYVGTcYFvGM597fb8AjnTUZCiL3UOiVx_evzWHLu49oo2705wlzXpGRSuc2yyceMybfLbqe4eX9wR3I0FTd1aE9jkydzrWp_W8oI0zsvHuc_2_V_QzDF3vgao7D3rqjjPmmmaZxd2elEUEGdEamOkwlv6e90x7sva7qDtKdxpKqW-6G7-fhR4L2Ri7LL2LKaXq1B7lrugZ7mfNo_y9qdneJp49wiKDUz3Hg7kDfEMX6QSHD8UPEJ7UCq1V5Vk2xoewJaV1cRgvXvLPiTse9iYCQtI5C7db9DFyngy7I1vH7FhQ7Yv9HrJpkQTzg9DIy8GHFtcyVkUqHn81FjuKqMgmi2_4-M_GcxKY8-lfh6_4nQlmtmpajsARG9w%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails ****_ |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jared=20Lovelace?=
subject: Did you know that your 20-year Congressman added $26 trillion to the National Debt?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texas for Jared Lovelace
body:
Here's breakdown of the National Debt issue and why it's a national security crisis. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/81752ff17f44/march-5th-is-maga-critical-6159857?e=d03ae83678)
---
|
---
[](https://jared2024.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=24ab0ae566056870479dadd16&id=97d4ef2f85&e=d03ae83678)
|
---
## It’s time for change.
Howdy Peter,

**This is a matter of national security for two reasons:**
1. We can’t even fund the defense of our own border.
2. Financial disaster will destroy our country while China watches with patient excitement.

**IF YOU RE-ELECT YOUR 20-YEAR CAREER CONGRESSMAN:**
1. **He’ll keep spending.**
2. **Inflation will continue to rise, and wages won’t be able to keep up.**
3. **The government will be forced to raise taxes to meet its future debt obligations and avoid defaulting on its debt.**
4. **You, your children, and every generation after them will be slaves to our government and its debt until our country collapses.**

**The debt was $8 trillion when your 20-year congressman got elected in 2004. Today the National Debt is**[**$34 trillion**](https://jared2024.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=24ab0ae566056870479dadd16&id=ea24d73fc3&e=d03ae83678)**.**
**The 2023 Budget Deficit (loss) was approximately**[**$1.70 trillion**](https://jared2024.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=24ab0ae566056870479dadd16&id=4e135495b4&e=d03ae83678)**.**
* U.S. Tax Revenues in 2023 = $4.44 trillion
* U.S. Expenditures in 2023 = $6.13 trillion
* 2023 addition to the debt = $1.70 trillion

**The 2023 interest payment on the National Debt was**[**$875 billion**](https://jared2024.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=24ab0ae566056870479dadd16&id=0b15c96a4d&e=d03ae83678)**.**
* That eats up 20% of U.S. Revenues before we spend a single dollar.
* This does not include the actual principal repaid on the loan.

[**Read here**](https://jared2024.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=24ab0ae566056870479dadd16&id=27b5b1ef1b&e=d03ae83678)**about how the budget works. You’ll notice that about 2/3 of our budget is required by prior laws and is not part of the annual appropriations process.**
* We start at about $4 trillion in MANDATORY spending (90% of our Revenue) on social programs before Congress even sits down to talk about the budget.
* Congress debates DISCRETIONARY spending on national defense and the border, not to mention funding the rest of the administration.
* In other words, our budget process has been set up to prioritize social welfare over national defense.

**SO, WHAT DO WE NEED TO DO?**
1. **Pass legislation that reverses our priorities so that national defense (including the border) is considered MANDATORY spending that doesn’t require the appropriations process each year.**
2. **Mark social programs as DISCRETIONARY or subject to available funding.**
3. **Retire every single member of Congress who has been in office longer than 8 years. They are accountable for this pending disaster.**
4. **Make some tough calls and be willing to sacrifice for the future of America.**

[On page 28 in this report](https://jared2024.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=24ab0ae566056870479dadd16&id=8ed2ecfb54&e=d03ae83678), the federal government admits that current spending habits are NOT SUSTAINABLE. **We must act now by firing our Congressman in the Texas Republican primary on March 5th.**
May God Bless America.
Jared Lovelace
|
---
| [Support Jared](https://jared2024.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=24ab0ae566056870479dadd16&id=763b3626e8&e=d03ae83678)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: MIGOP E-Newsletter January 15, 2024
body:
We have a lot to update you on. | | | |
---
| [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/newsletter-jan-15-2024?e=a2af77507c)
---
|
## Welcome to the MIGOP Newsletter!
Each Monday, the Michigan Republican Party sends important information about what is happening within the party, state, and nation and how you can get involved.
---
|
---
| | | Hello:

I am pleased to report that despite a severe snow storm, which brought with it hours of extra travel (and shovel) time, the Michigan Republican Party held its State Committee Special Meeting on Saturday, January 13, with an overwhelming number of members, delegates, and other guests present.

We quickly got to the business at hand and spent the day listening to detailed reports from committees. A key vote ruled that the January 6 gathering of _some_ State Committee members was an illegitimate MIGOP State Committee meeting and that none of the business conducted at the gathering had any legal standing.

I am truly heartened by the vote to remain your Chairwoman, and I look forward to working with a new co-chair—whoever that may be—and the six new State Committee members who will replace those removed from Districts 2, 5, 6, and 8.

So let us continue our work to make election security a reality in Michigan and, by doing so, take great strides in saving our state and our country.

Please help in every way you can.

In Liberty,
Kristina Karamo
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party

[Kristina Karamo reaffirmed as the MIGOP Chairwoman](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=c2627089f0&e=a2af77507c)
[MIGOP strength through perseverance](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6b0f03267f&e=a2af77507c)
[Update on the unauthorized January 6 gathering to remove Chairwoman Karamo](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f7a3611106&e=a2af77507c)
---
|
---
|
---
The [Questions, Answers & Facts](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=b6f933646a&e=a2af77507c) series with Chairwoman Karamo continues this month. She will deliver remarks as well as answer questions from Precinct Delegates on the following dates:
Wednesday, January 17 – District 3
Thursday, January 18 – District 4
Saturday, January 20 – District 8
Monday, January 22 – District 2

If you are a Precinct Delegate in one of these districts, please attend!
For more information about upcoming events, visit the [MIGOP events page](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=14cd43530b&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
|
---
The January 12 edition of _[Friday Lunch with Chair Karamo](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=48fadbe026&e=a2af77507c)_ is available on the MIGOP website. By Noon each Friday, a new interview with the Chairwoman will be posted. All previous interviews are also available.

**Check out these new Telegram channels:**

[Unshackle the Mitten](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=4f7eb3cd30&e=a2af77507c)
_Connecting the dots on the global-to-local RINO network bringing tyranny on your children and grandchildren. Together, let’s remove the shackles._

[I Stand with Kristina Karamo](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=47efa7220d&e=a2af77507c)
_The Coup is underway to remove Kristina Karamo as chair of the Michigan Republican Party. Do you Stand with Kristina and the America First Delegates?_

|
---
|
---

** SPECIAL ANNOUNCEMENT: Real versus Fake MIGOP **

In an effort to sabotage Chairwoman Karamo and her administration from making genuine and systemic election reforms in Michigan, malcontents have usurped the Michigan Republican Party name and branding and claim an authority they do not have. Their chaos is intended to discourage and divide. It is intended to lead to our defeat in November. _**Do not let that happen!**_ One way to tell the real MIGOP from the pretenders is very simple: they use a hyphen in their communications.

**#DontFallForTheHyphen**

**SIGN UP FOR ELECTION TRAINING**

The Election Security Operations team at the Michigan Republican Party is providing training to volunteers to help secure our elections, including the Presidential Primary on February 27, 2024. _You must be trained and receive your credentials to serve as a poll challenger._

Training dates: February 12 @ 7:00 pm
February 17 @ 10:00 am

To sign up for comprehensive poll challenger training, contact Braden Giacobazzi at **pollchallenger@migop.org**.
|

| [ ](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6aaa4dc173&e=a2af77507c)
---
_**The Good Neighbor Program is vital to winning in November.**_ To sign up and get engaged, visit the **[Good Neighbor Program webpage](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=0170ff8b1a&e=a2af77507c)** or contact coordinators Ken Beyer (District 4 Chair) at **kenbeyer@protonmail.com** and Ann Clark (Wayne County Republican Committee Chair) at **annpatriot@protonmail.com**.

clean_body: We have a lot to update you on. | | | | | | Welcome to the MIGOP Newsletter! Each Monday, the Michigan Republican Party sends important information about what is happening within the party, state, and nation and how you can get involved. | | | | Hello: I am pleased to report that despite a severe snow storm, which brought with it hours of extra travel (and shovel) time, the Michigan Republican Party held its State Committee Special Meeting on Saturday, January 13, with an overwhelming number of members, delegates, and other guests present. We quickly got to the business at hand and spent the day listening to detailed reports from committees. A key vote ruled that the January 6 gathering of some State Committee members was an illegitimate MIGOP State Committee meeting and that none of the business conducted at the gathering had any legal standing. I am truly heartened by the vote to remain your Chairwoman, and I look forward to working with a new co-chair—whoever that may be—and the six new State Committee members who will replace those removed from Districts 2, 5, 6, and 8. So let us continue our work to make election security a reality in Michigan and, by doing so, take great strides in saving our state and our country. Please help in every way you can. In Liberty, Kristina Karamo Chairwoman Michigan Republican Party | | The series with Chairwoman Karamo continues this month. She will deliver remarks as well as answer questions from Precinct Delegates on the following dates: Wednesday, January 17 – District 3 Thursday, January 18 – District 4 Saturday, January 20 – District 8 Monday, January 22 – District 2 If you are a Precinct Delegate in one of these districts, please attend! For more information about upcoming events, visit the . | | The January 12 edition of is available on the MIGOP website. By Noon each Friday, a new interview with the Chairwoman will be posted. All previous interviews are also available. Check out these new Telegram channels: Connecting the dots on the global-to-local RINO network bringing tyranny on your children and grandchildren. Together, let’s remove the shackles. The Coup is underway to remove Kristina Karamo as chair of the Michigan Republican Party. Do you Stand with Kristina and the America First Delegates? | | SPECIAL ANNOUNCEMENT: Real versus Fake MIGOP In an effort to sabotage Chairwoman Karamo and her administration from making genuine and systemic election reforms in Michigan, malcontents have usurped the Michigan Republican Party name and branding and claim an authority they do not have. Their chaos is intended to discourage and divide. It is intended to lead to our defeat in November. Do not let that happen! One way to tell the real MIGOP from the pretenders is very simple: they use a hyphen in their communications. #DontFallForTheHyphen SIGN UP FOR ELECTION TRAINING The Election Security Operations team at the Michigan Republican Party is providing training to volunteers to help secure our elections, including the Presidential Primary on February 27, 2024. You must be trained and receive your credentials to serve as a poll challenger. Training dates: February 12 @ 7:00 pm February 17 @ 10:00 am To sign up for comprehensive poll challenger training, contact Braden Giacobazzi at pollchallenger@migop.org. | | The Good Neighbor Program is vital to winning in November. To sign up and get engaged, visit the or contact coordinators Ken Beyer (District 4 Chair) at kenbeyer@protonmail.com and Ann Clark (Wayne County Republican Committee Chair) at annpatriot@protonmail.com. | | Congratulations, Wolverines! From Michigan Capitol Confidential : | | The presidential primaries kick off today in Iowa. Keep up . From The Conservative Treehouse : | | Get involved with the Michigan Republican Party! Learn more about your county, district, and state party leadership at . name: Iowa Caucus Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Tonight’s results in Iowa prove onething…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
Even though Trump prevailed – despite 91 felony charges across four criminal indictments – every single Republican running for president has spewed an extreme agenda. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Tonight’s results in Iowa prove what we’ve known all along: that this isn’t the Republican Party – **this is Trump’s party.** Even though Trump prevailed – despite 91 felony charges across four criminal indictments – _every single Republican running for president_ has spewed an extreme agenda rooted in exclusion, hate, and harm. As we look ahead to the rest of the Republican presidential primary, know this: **Democrats are fighting for inclusion, access, and a more equitable future, but we need your help.** [Will you make an urgent donation of $7 to help block Republicans at the state level from gaining power? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PjCogQnFGTjMOyWVqjdXp7AtXCDpBvjXk_edyJ4Q1zpIzSuXFhQ-M61seLNv2AwtQE0kKPBGrpr_e_fPW340mieABszV77WjDGRS-wHD_gF2pMlQjfmcVSuphZyUl5HSYR6QK5qiuZopwyztXwPTmiZFJRWdwnv1r8k34zv1-PjR7aAM3N7QI4rMPGyrfXKN1FN7kPDa7z--TGR5M8B0xJY-9lIr4Qtl204Ys3bjdcnUoa3lfa_E2nPnRuM-BvLpRgl5VJJRAlCdoLf03dsbGGHYF3OJ6yBArYc-dJJFOYeFaRxpD1lemZ1z0n8w9gP5dGCS1nzKQJwJ788HvC5ymem7UNGwuHcK8mNXwLFT-agmYkZpvc0mAOhyQdokAnk0gg/431/9YVI4f11Qh27ahAyidEbCg/h0/X7_2EZiOD03wtIur73E3TSG50pMNpbq_6aGezwgtJ58) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: The Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: Del. Sewell's Newsletter: Looking Back on Session Week 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/New%20Sewell%20Delegate%20Logo%20.png]
Session Week 1 Newsletter
Dear neighbors,
I wish each of you a Happy Martin Luther King, Jr. Day. As we reflect on Dr. King’s legacy, I am drawn to a statement that he made in 1957 in which he stated: “Life’s most persistent and urgent question is, ‘What are you doing for others?’” That question rings true to this day. If my colleagues and I ask ourselves “what are we doing for others” as we debate policies, craft legislation, and cast votes, I believe we’ll arrive at a stronger, more just Commonwealth. As we begin week two of the 2024 General Assembly session, I’m excited to get to work with my colleagues in the House of Delegates to continue to advocate on behalf of the issues that matter most to you.
Martin Luther King, Jr. Day is also the perfect moment to celebrate my friend Don Scott, the new Speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates. Last week, he became the first Black person in the 400-year history of the House to be elected Speaker. I’m honored to serve as Delegate during this milestone, and I’m also hopeful about what we can accomplish under Speaker Scott’s bold leadership and our new Democratic majorities.
As things start to speed up and we get to work addressing the many critical issues facing the Commonwealth, I want to make sure you are informed and that you know how to reach me with your comments, questions, and concerns. I want to hear from you!
Email me at DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov, call my office in Richmond at 703-261-4787, or visit me in person! Our address is 201 North 9th St., Suite 905, Richmond, VA 23219. I look forward to welcoming constituents to my office throughout the session, and I hope you’re one of them.
In line with keeping you informed, I will publish a weekly newsletter, of which this is the first. My newsletter is designed to keep you informed about what’s taking place in the House of Delegates, to include: policies being debated, the status of legislation, and how you can get involved.
My Committee Assignments for this session are:
(1) Counties, Cities, and Towns
(2) Education
(3) Transportation
(4) Appropriations
Meet the Staff
Jay Falk, my legislative assistant this session, is already hard at work and Team Sewell has hit the ground running. Meet the staff:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-01-15%20at%208.37.35%20PM.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-01-15%20at%208.37.43%20PM.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-01-15%20at%208.37.51%20PM.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-01-15%20at%208.38.00%20PM.png]
Prince William County Constituent Town Hall
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-01-15%20at%208.38.13%20PM.png]
On Saturday, December 30th, I had the privilege of co-hosting a virtual town hall [https://www.potomaclocal.com/2023/12/31/free-lunch-clean-energy-transparency-in-schools-are-priorities-for-prince-william-delegation/] alongside several of my esteemed colleagues from the Prince William County General Assembly Delegation. The purpose of this town hall was to provide a platform for open dialogue, where we could share our legislative priorities and hear your questions about what this legislative session will look like.
One of the highlights of the town hall was the opportunity to engage with many of you on the pressing issues that matter most to our community. I wanted to ensure that the discussion was centered around topics that are of the utmost importance to you, which is why we asked attendees to share their preferred issues for discussion.
The feedback we received was insightful and enlightening. It allowed us to gauge the key areas where our constituents seek change and improvement. I would like to share with you a breakdown of the issues that resonated most strongly with the attendees:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-01-15%20at%208.38.26%20PM.png]
These are just a few of the important topics that were discussed during our town hall. I want to express my gratitude to everyone who attended. Your engagement is invaluable as we work towards shaping policies that reflect the needs and aspirations of our community. If you missed the town hall, don’t worry! You can view the recording here [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DN_guNyD-eZgt5KYBRim2SQolNR8Sysu/view?usp=sharing] and hear about our delegation’s legislative priorities and share your views with our office.
General Assembly Overview
With the first week of session behind us, I wanted to give a quick overview of how things look this year and what the legislative process looks like in Virginia.The House of Delegates has 100 members who each serve two year terms (there are 40 members in the State Senate). On even numbered years (like this one) the General Assembly meets for 60 days, which includes debating and passing a statewide budget.
This session is different than last year because following the elections in November of 2023, Democrats won control of both chambers of the General Assembly. Democrats now hold a 51-49 seat majority in the House of Delegates, and a 21-19 majority in the State Senate. With legislators from across the commonwealth back together again in Richmond, our primary focus is to introduce, debate, and pass legislation. Here is how that process works:
(1) A bill is drafted and then filed. It receives a bill number and is published on lis.virginia.gov [https://lis.virginia.gov/] .
(2) The Speaker of the House assigns the bill to a committee (and usually a subcommittee).
(3) Once the bill is discussed in subcommittee and full committee, members vote on passing it out of committee and sending it to the floor of the House of Delegates. If a bill is not sent to the floor, it dies in committee.
(4) On the floor, the bill goes through three constitutional readings. On the third reading, the entire House of Delegates votes on the bill. If a majority of delegates vote yes, it is sent to the Senate for consideration in a process called crossover.
(5) Just like in the House, the bill is then assigned to a Senate Committee, debated, voted on, and passed out of committee to the Floor of the Senate.
(6) Once the full Senate votes on and passes the bill, it may go straight to the governor’s desk (if both the House and Senate bills are identical) or end up in a conference committee made up of members of both the House and the Senate to determine agreed upon language between the house and senate versions of the bill.
(7) Finally, a bill heads to the Governor’s desk, where he either signs it into law or vetoes it.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-01-15%20at%208.38.37%20PM.png]
Key Legislation To Keep An Eye On
Now, with Democrats in the majority, I want to direct your attention to three key pieces of legislation to pay attention to this session. They are:
HJ1 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HJ1] - An amendment to the state constitution that protects the fundamental right to reproductive freedom and enshrines access to reproductive care.
HJ2 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HJ2] - An amendment to the state constitution that would automatically restore the right to vote and further protect access to the ballot box.
HB2 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB2] - A bill to ban dangerous assault weapons.
Protecting our fundamental rights and ensuring a safer, more inclusive society are key priorities for Virginia Democrats.
These key priorities reflect our commitment to protecting individual rights, promoting public safety, and strengthening our democracy. As we advocate for these measures, we remain dedicated to building a Virginia where everyone has the opportunity to thrive, and where the values of equality, justice, and freedom are upheld.
Virginia’s Legislative Information System (or LIS) lists every bill that has been filed for the 2024 General Assembly Session. You can find that list here [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+lst+ALL] . You can also read more about the bills that have been filed for this session here [https://www.virginiamercury.com/2023/11/20/the-first-bills-of-the-2024-virginia-general-assembly-have-dropped-heres-what-they-would-do/] . There is also additional coverage here [https://richmond.com/news/state-regional/government-politics/assembly-dems-first-bills-abortion-amendment-assault-weapons-ban/article_fa9ad3c8-87d3-11ee-b423-cbe38b1b0c18.html] , focused specifically on these widely popular, common-sense efforts to protect reproductive healthcare and ban assault style weapons. I also want to share more about my own legislative agenda, including background on the different bills I’ve introduced.
My Legislative Agenda
I have introduced a wide variety of bills this session, primarily focused on advocating for our veterans, improving education, and serving our working families. Here are all my bills, including a brief description for each:
Investing in Our Children’s Futures
HB731: [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB731] A bill that works to fix the leaky teacher pipeline and increase teacher diversity through the elimination of a duplicative, expensive, and out-of-date testing requirement for teachers. This bill will help fill teacher vacancies by ensuring this obsolete testing requirement does not push prospective teachers out of high-quality teacher preparation pathways in favor of other fields.
HB732 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB732] : A bill that would require schools to stock and train staff on the administration of Naloxone, a life-saving medication, in case of an opioid overdose. This bill will help schools be prepared to recognize and respond to the tragic extent of the opioid epidemic and give our school staff the tools and training they need to save student and staff lives.
Advocating for Veterans and Service Members
HB736 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB736] : The Veterans' Services Protection Act would protect our veterans from exploitation by reining in predatory individuals who claim to provide paid guidance to veterans about their benefits but instead take advantage of those who have served. This law would crack down on these dangerous VA claim sharks.
HB738 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB738)] : A bill that would allow members serving in the U.S. Space Force to receive the same benefits and privileges as other members serving in other branches of the U.S. Armed Forces.
Helping Seniors Stay in Their Homes
HB733: [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB733] The Virginia Residential Landlord and Tenant Act would protect elderly Virginians living on fixed incomes against profit-motivated rent hikes and unfair evictions by allowing local governments to stabilize rent increases and tie them to inflation. This bill would specifically prevent predatory landlords from increasing rent on elderly tenants.
Supporting Working Families
HB737 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB737] : A bill that would finally establish a statewide, paid family and medical leave program. This bill would ensure that all Virginians have access to 12 weeks of paid leave when they need it to take care of their families or themselves. This bill would allow employees to take time off to care for a sick family member, recover from childbirth, take care of a new child, or recover from an illness themselves.
Investing in Environmental Sustainability and Local Government Efficiency
HJ36 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HJ36] : A bill this session directs the Virginia Department of Energy to conduct an in-depth study about what kind of barriers exist that make it difficult for local governments to directly purchase clean energy.
HB735 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB735] : A bill that will reduce bureaucracy and allow local governments to complete transportation projects without red tape.
Please reach out if you have any questions about my bills and the policies I’m advocating for this session! I look forward to sharing more with you in my email next week about the status of my bills, committee assignments, important legislation coming up for debate, and other important updates.
Stay in Touch!
Remember, you can email my office at DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov, call us at 703-261-4787, or visit my Richmond office (201 North 9th St., Suite 905, Richmond, VA 23219) in person. My team and I look forward to hearing from you.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/headingcommunitybill%20%281%29.png]
Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell.
Friends of Briana Sewell
PO Box 1849
Woodbridge, VA 22195
United States

As we reflect on Dr. King’s legacy, I am drawn to a statement that he made in 1957 in which he stated: “Life’s most persistent and urgent question is, ‘What are you doing for others?’” That question rings true to this day. If my colleagues and I ask ourselves “what are we doing for others” as we debate policies, craft legislation, and cast votes, I believe we’ll arrive at a stronger, more just Commonwealth. As we begin week two of the 2024 General Assembly session, I’m excited to get to work with my colleagues in the House of Delegates to continue to advocate on behalf of the issues that matter most to you. Martin Luther King, Jr. Day is also the perfect moment to celebrate my friend Don Scott, the new Speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates. Last week, he became the first Black person in the 400-year history of the House to be elected Speaker. I’m honored to serve as Delegate during this milestone, and I’m also hopeful about what we can accomplish under Speaker Scott’s bold leadership and our new Democratic majorities. body:
We almost can’t believe it ourselves, but with Trump’s victory in Iowa his march to the White House is on.
#
This is the first day of the presidential campaign, Derek.
We almost can’t believe it ourselves, but with Trump’s victory in Iowa his march to the White House is on. Trump will be the nominee for the Republican Party.
But we’re pushing a different rallying cry: **Trump for Leavenworth.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-c4-jan24-t4l?refcode=em240115-1-30&refcode2=23543_3013755_4iCIvY&akid=23543%2E3013755%2E4iCIvY)
We’re looking for our strongest supporters right now. The people who are willing to put it all on the line and fight from here until November to make sure that Trump doesn’t step foot in the Oval Office again.
**[**If that’s you, make a donation of $50 right now and we will send you our union printed, made in the USA, “Trump for Leavenworth” yard sign. Because the only office Trump has earned is a cell in Leavenworth Penitentiary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-c4-jan24-t4l?refcode=em240115-1-30&refcode2=23543_3013755_4iCIvY&akid=23543%2E3013755%2E4iCIvY)

Thank you.
The team at the VoteVets PX

The Iowa results are in, and it’s clear: **Donald Trump is the official frontrunner for the 2024 Republican presidential nomination.** Peter, we need to work even harder now. If Donald Trump is our opponent, we can expect vile attacks, endless lies, and massive spending. I know we ask a lot of you -- but I hope I can count on your support in a big moment like this. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Iowa
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I want you to think about the way you felt the morning after Donald Trump defeated Hillary Clinton in 2016?

Hi there.
A short while ago, Donald Trump won the Iowa Caucus. He is now one step closer to becoming the Republican nominee and having a chance to return to the White House.
Terrifying.
That is why I am asking you to make a $3 donation DIRECTLY to the Democratic National Committee today. If that's all you need to hear, use this link to donate:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/democrats**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-newsom?refcode=em240115&refcode2=1774_4767699_WtdR4v&akid=1774%2E4767699%2EWtdR4v)
I want you to think about the way you felt the morning after Donald Trump defeated Hillary Clinton in 2016? Do you remember it?
Now think about the relief you felt when it was clear Joe Biden won in 2020.
We all have a role to play in making sure we are feeling that relief once again. **And a fully-funded Democratic National Committee is esssential for victory in 2024.**
So please:
$3 because the DNC does important work, including critical ad campaigns, to defeat Trump.
$3 because the DNC can divert resources to state parties who need it to help keep Trump from winning again.
$3 because we simply cannot let Donald Trump return to the White House.
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute $3 directly to the Democratic National Committee right now? This is a huge moment for them and it will all add up fast when we're all chipping-in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-newsom?refcode=em240115&refcode2=1774_4767699_WtdR4v&akid=1774%2E4767699%2EWtdR4v)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-newsom?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em240115&refcode2=1774_4767699_WtdR4v&akid=1774%2E4767699%2EWtdR4v)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-newsom?express_lane=true&refcode=em240115&refcode2=1774_4767699_WtdR4v&akid=1774%2E4767699%2EWtdR4v)**
---
Thank you in advance for adding your contribution tonight. Especially right now.
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1774%2E4767699%2EWtdR4v).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

---
Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | This will set the tone for 2024... This is a big one, Friend. Our first major fundraising hurdle of the year – our January Mid-Month Deadline – wraps up at midnight. Here’s where we’re at so far: | | | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Team Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 \-

subject: Legislative Kick-Off
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=670cd922f6&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | A belated Happy New Year to you and yours!

Last week marked our first week of the 56th legislature – second regular session. My husband, son and his girlfriend joined me in the State Senate. My daughter had to miss the kick-off as she started her second semester of college last Monday, so she is laser-focused on her current pre-med classes.

Not only did I have to sit through a horrific State of the State, longing for the days with a Republican governor, but I also had to endure my first Senate Committee on Education meeting. I also serve as Vice Chair of the Senate Committee on Finance and Commerce, but we didn’t meet last week. I believe we will have our first committee meeting next week.

I have been busy putting final touches on legislation I will be sponsoring this term. I will be dropping most of these bills this week, including a ballot referral to send to the November 2024 general election voters to end trafficking of our minor children.

Tomorrow is the last day I can request a bill folder to be opened to draft legislation for this year. I think I am all set, and I look forward to sharing with you the different bills I am spearheading. I am sponsoring bills focused on victim’s rights to criminal justice reform to election integrity to school safety transparency, etc.

More than 700 bills have already been filed between the House and Senate. Let’s hope the budget we negotiate this year isn’t riddled with all the one-time pork projects negotiated before I returned to the Capitol last year. Then again, that joint effort put us into the red so the GOP leadership asked each of us last week for budget areas we wanted to protect. I let them know I will always support our school choice programs, our university’s freedom schools and our flat tax.

As the session picks up, I will continue to share some insights and highlights with you. Until then, I hope you are keeping those new year’s resolutions (if you made any) and you are thinking of ways to help me save our slim majority in the legislature. ;-)

Take care,
Shawnna
---

subject: TRUMP WINS! - Like Trump, Dan Cox is the ONLY Candidate who can win the General
body:
President Trump is our GOP Party. Only Dan Cox can win because no other candidate has the MAGA vote and can reach the swing voters of District Six. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TONIGHT TO HELP DAN WIN>>](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=edec0f9a91&e=5bb5efcda7 "CONTRIBUTE TONIGHT TO HELP DAN WIN>>")
---
|
#### Like President Donald J. Trump, only Dan Cox can win the General Election because no other candidate has the MAGA support, and can also win the swing vote.
# Congratulations Mr. President!
"Dan Cox needs your help to win today."
---
|
---
| Friend,

As the only candidate for Congress in Maryland's Sixth District to have endorsed my friend President Trump, I am thrilled to see what we always knew - that Trump won Iowa tonight overwhelmingly. Once again - those who listened to the RINOs in our Party to avoid Trump are not listening to the voices of the People. Only President Trump can win and only he deserves to win with how he has persevered to fight to save America.

We have 119 days until the Primary Election in Maryland where I hope to be elected as your nominee for Congress in the Sixth District.

Like President Trump, I am the only candidate who can win the general election because no other candidate has the MAGA support, and no other candidate can also win the swing vote.

But Biden has announced a war chest tonight to defeat President Trump and MAGA Republicans as myself, and destroy America.

Biden is actively destroying our nation in nearly every way. From the open Border to the spiking crime rates, to the deflated dollar and rising costs.

I remember the words of Ronald Reagan: "if we every forget that we are a nation under God, we will be a nation gone under."

Will you join with me in both praying for our nation and President Trump as he seeks to lead us out of disaster, and take action with me by helping me raise the necessary funds to fight the Biden machine coming to sink us?

[I need your contribution tonight to maintain my weekly fundraising goals.](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=69b15e4540&e=5bb5efcda7) [Will you chip in $47, $470, or $4700 to celebrate President Trump's victory tonight in Iowa and help me win in 119 days?](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=d01bd6b261&e=5bb5efcda7)

Thank you and God bless you. And may God continue to bless America.

Freedom and victory,

Fmr. Delegate Dan Cox
Candidate for U.S. Congress (R-MD-6)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680495%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DjjocOEifvYhEG1ROe67Ag&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680496%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IRODOpktgCGO6VBEXeOEdg&sysid=1) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource “The Major Characters of the End Times” as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DKueYCPIkA%2fH1P6bkurLcw&sysid=1)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2255%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2XTKwXcd1%2bCP2WE7RF5DDA&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ITnaB3pzY3JPAMjm%2bcTpzQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680499%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S8pjB7Kc45or1QFtCysAvw&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2255%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2XTKwXcd1%2bCP2WE7RF5DDA&sysid=1)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zajbbkgj508oqjnakhlrb9lm3refohsih7duki90_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5g64o71clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z511vbficpikjpphhs1fic14ijslnve35dd3kdg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5g64o71clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zahmc8liikqb62qbmmhokh9h2s61psfmn80j3f6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5g64o71clh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze3mboq5dm1ghfuio2o6to1mu6ku1pqnp7g6rqh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5g64o71clh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Your America
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38194%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qOdAOUBDnhovSoLnMeY6Ug&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38105%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9bYBRsvr%2fGZkqJv2g6WFOw&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38106%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WBDsuGBIkuG5rpsfTzW8Pw&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38107%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x5Bmt5j8kpHqbi%2fnxw6q%2fQ&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38108%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iNNzbOGk8txCNrgd9SfBMw&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.” What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives.

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zea46ef6nr3b8a7rq8e8btfdumvlmrljfmc2usdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5g66ob6c3h2bs)
