| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1o76ku9eek4642mht3i46qkpvajtkvlv9hd0gg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5g66ob6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zks9it4qjh0s3vftf76vvs697k65g2v2ib5fk4kg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5g66ob6c3h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zea97rpbflqaid1irq68gl8bb05t9m1pu7hg5un0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5g66ob6c3h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: | In the race for the GOP nomination, Donald Trump has shifted his attention towards the upcoming New Hampshire primary, following his record-setting victory in Iowa. However, the current governor of South Carolina, Nikki Haley, hopes to halt Trump’s momentum and emerge as a more centrist candidate in the primary scheduled for January 23. Haley was ......Click to read more Read More Boosie Badazz is no stranger to controversy. As someone once said, the question is not why bad things happen to good people, but the real mystery is rather why good things happen to anyone. Guess which Republican refuses to say men can't become women. Sen. Marco Rubio (R-Fla.) is a fan of Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis’ statewide policies but he believes that former President Donald Trump would be a better choice later this year to fix what ails the country under President Joe Biden. As such, Rubio endorsed Trump on Sunday instead of DeSantis for the 2024 presidential election, .. WASHINGTON, D.C. — The Secret Service announced that after a thorough investigation, none of the protesters outside of the White House this past week were wearing MAGA hats. P.O. Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.

Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong And Here’s Why>>

“Am I worried about this? Absolutely not.”

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

“Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years.” https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38114%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hIPbv8D%2fZ3yi9g8BWIbSxQ&sysid=1{transaction_id}&aff_sub3=010124&aff_sub4=RM-YAN-20240116&aff_sub5=celebrity_BRICS_2024_a

# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong

---
Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

“Am I worried about this? Absolutely not.”

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

[“Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years.”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1cajca3i5u1ke56tr6jcsgserin7r8ob3jril88_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5i6cor6c3h2bs)

name: Al Franken
subject: the jerk...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03650c5b-ac9f-4eee-bf9d-a0f21cf1e95d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I like to think I’ve got pretty thick skin, but I’m offended. [I’m so fired up that I’m going to ask you right at the top to help kick the jerk who’s pissing me off out of Congress. I’ll explain more below, but will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and Josh Riley’s campaign right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T366629d6-641f-42f7-ba73-5ab295abe32a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdec81758-4b86-4eaf-b113-bc38c2c6395c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Marc Molinaro, the MAGA Republican representing NY-19 in Congress, voted TWICE to make Jim Jordan the Speaker of the House. When that didn’t work, he found the one guy even crazier than Jordan to actually give the job to. And if putting an anti-abortion extremist in charge of the House wasn’t bad enough, when confronted about supporting these nutsos, this is what Molinaro said: “[Upstate New Yorkers] don’t give a sh*t who the Speaker of the House is... Most of the people I represent wouldn’t know the Speaker of the House if he backed over them with a pickup truck.” Does he think we’re dumb? [I, for one, do give a sh*t who’s running our government... and I know you do, too. If you’re as pissed off as I am, I hope you’ll split a contribution between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action today to fire both Marc Molinaro AND Mike Johnson.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d011707-e1cd-4eae-b7b3-e8d128bd983f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [CHIP IN NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d526872-4e4d-4181-96f7-faf8ccd7cd7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s clear Molinaro doesn’t think much of the people he represents. But you know who does care a hell of a lot about Upstate New Yorkers? My friend and former Senate counsel, Josh Riley. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83d5fbb9-6687-4a93-9529-d03ae72e54d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(I swear I’m not actually this short... Josh is just REALLY tall.) Josh grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Endicott, NY. When the local factories closed, Josh saw his community struggle – but he worked to put himself through school and graduated from Harvard Law. In the Senate, Josh and I brought Republicans and Democrats together to actually get stuff done (yes, it really is possible)! The bills we worked on together expanded rights for survivors of domestic abuse and provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. It wasn’t easy, but Josh got them signed into law. Josh DID learn how to drive on a pickup truck, so maybe Molinaro was right about that. But he’s dead wrong if he thinks we’re too stupid to know or care that he’s voting to screw us over at every turn. [This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Josh isn’t going to get to Congress without our help. Please join me by splitting a contribution between Josh and Blue Amp Action right now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c181718-8642-4272-a166-2668e3bb0322/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Truths from Revelation
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs7LFoGiFN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os7LFoGiFN

Hello
Friend,
Do you
ever despair that Jesus will never return?
When we
all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!
When we
all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory!
The words
of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ's return is going to
be glorious!
But
between now and then, how should we live? What does God's Word
say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ...
what should our response be?

When I
have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation,
which I've found helps provide answers and strength in these dark
days.
And
today, I'm pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the
book of Revelation entitled Final Conquest.
Final
Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It's
all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event
in human history.
This book
will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn't want
you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God's plan as
never before - you'll be encouraged!

With your
generous donation to Pathway to Victory-- to help keep our
ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and
viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of Final
Conquest for free!
You can
make your most generous donation here:
https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1
One day
soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings
and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.
Until
that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working
together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom.

Sincerely,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress
Senior
Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is7LFoGiFN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os7LFoGiFN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Discover how economics impacts our lives
body:
I’ve got two quick questions for you:

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=250b546ab2dd42e78d16e67de328bc21&_e=q_moNuAesTwhGVS5UFzZyFrVwSWlYMD2xR3IUqk-aQhKr58hjBJ-QyU70iLrKWzlusDuqzzIYi9XgAQz2kK0O_A_6-0foi1U1OI8s1GjObL0YQ3EXG52Ht_j3QO--PvoJ-7-EFy5lxE3hjp8npTBTJIXdH1gm3ZkB4EV7Li7ElJ_338xJAudFEhdZmYH8VWB7PbxaLxcfJBOdQ1x_ITU_QrfosP616qUrIWbqA357dcXzIUFYt6-SwRwzKhaiAKF1raRNJoFNv-yNR_3tRJUUKVo_MbHq8FCSq-ElJpPddCJqaOUUM4imMrATi3LDMC6lt0PsVF9QC-yaDvo-9pJSbanF9kuONPRncB94Ci97UEznm6ADFfvU0r_Ipy4ltAk-Rgty2J_v-WEoymeF00WYPbgm7ltWXHEoFQUDsMzyVS_KPL7maQHQjDvZTjr9wz-)

| | Dear Friend,

I've got two quick questions for you:
## 1\. Are you concerned about the American economy right now?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=250b546ab2dd42e78d16e67de328bc21&_e=q_moNuAesTwhGVS5UFzZyFrVwSWlYMD2xR3IUqk-aQhKr58hjBJ-QyU70iLrKWzlusDuqzzIYi9XgAQz2kK0O_A_6-0foi1U1OI8s1GjObL0YQ3EXG52Ht_j3QO--PvoJ-7-EFy5lxE3hjp8npTBTJIXdH1gm3ZkB4EV7Li7ElJ_338xJAudFEhdZmYH8VWB7PbxaLxcfJBOdQ1x_ITU_QrfosP616qUrIWbqA357dcXzIUFYt6-SwRwzKhaiAKF1raRNJoFNv-yNR_3tRJUUKVo_MbHq8FCSq-ElJpPddAhNxGaEycBmwofbyl-gBT_q3XgQKUns8ZNTcpsP1VDzWlGbWNSinuWAcuBLJr0OqxwbuqSOVDvEkoKekMi7etWBv_t9eEkGbw-bmNRTMJ399Y7KT_O8e95qtWOD5n_gH4CgUfxEyUEGk2wL7Wm4x7w) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=250b546ab2dd42e78d16e67de328bc21&_e=q_moNuAesTwhGVS5UFzZyFrVwSWlYMD2xR3IUqk-aQhKr58hjBJ-QyU70iLrKWzlusDuqzzIYi9XgAQz2kK0O_A_6-0foi1U1OI8s1GjObL0YQ3EXG52Ht_j3QO--PvoJ-7-EFy5lxE3hjp8npTBTJIXdH1gm3ZkB4EV7Li7ElJ_338xJAudFEhdZmYH8VWB7PbxaLxcfJBOdQ1x_ITU_QrfosP616qUrIWbqA357dcXzIUFYt6-SwRwzKhaiAKF1raRNJoFNv-yNR_3tRJUUKVo_MbHq8FCSq-ElJpPddBnXzW01Uz6V-qKsxAdNwT1k3xt63ulvKGHoxOx7ust1S0j57E0HYpQLmKP8BpTeHp4sKspx326ikAxfDa7yRKag20qYa7iZRr6f1Mfcx0V_2lCCMqIzmL8galIeBL7X5xauN7ljjEdWY5P9zd66Us1)
## 2\. Are you curious to learn how private citizens drive the economy?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=250b546ab2dd42e78d16e67de328bc21&_e=q_moNuAesTwhGVS5UFzZyFrVwSWlYMD2xR3IUqk-aQhKr58hjBJ-QyU70iLrKWzlusDuqzzIYi9XgAQz2kK0O_A_6-0foi1U1OI8s1GjObL0YQ3EXG52Ht_j3QO--PvoJ-7-EFy5lxE3hjp8npTBTJIXdH1gm3ZkB4EV7Li7ElJ_338xJAudFEhdZmYH8VWB7PbxaLxcfJBOdQ1x_ITU_QrfosP616qUrIWbqA357dcXzIUFYt6-SwRwzKhaiAKF1raRNJoFNv-yNR_3tRJUUKVo_MbHq8FCSq-ElJpPddB3DACoyD4gKO7KQvulRCbUCoOz6uLGUlPqcuQEQnU0bwgQah3OozlEYaQsxL3Xt0nijA6Ry7Wem31MKjqJzZlY_1JyvM1biyOOV59NC-b2_aNM0EkssfHMz9YDLyl1RI7bRj886PolmtuwIQw32N1e) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=250b546ab2dd42e78d16e67de328bc21&_e=q_moNuAesTwhGVS5UFzZyFrVwSWlYMD2xR3IUqk-aQhKr58hjBJ-QyU70iLrKWzlusDuqzzIYi9XgAQz2kK0O_A_6-0foi1U1OI8s1GjObL0YQ3EXG52Ht_j3QO--PvoJ-7-EFy5lxE3hjp8npTBTJIXdH1gm3ZkB4EV7Li7ElJ_338xJAudFEhdZmYH8VWB7PbxaLxcfJBOdQ1x_ITU_QrfosP616qUrIWbqA357dcXzIUFYt6-SwRwzKhaiAKF1raRNJoFNv-yNR_3tRJUUKVo_MbHq8FCSq-ElJpPddC7yCLTfDhx7q14Rz41hUVtJxh-Gtir5J_hPBxMVGexacV7gTHMVQ-R-H253jCSaXtf2IbRTID2oD4orBa9XMOheG44NMro9ACTnFbdIUuecos940IXRbD2jgC0M-m3l3QaizNOELvhtSiW_D_d05fm) If you answered YES to either of these questions, I hope you'll support our free online series, "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

In this series, viewers learn about the role freedom and incentives play in innovation, new jobs, and increased wealth and security. It promises to be an engaging and educational course--perhaps you'll even want to watch it with friends or family.

Friend, remember that this series--like every online course from Hillsdale College--is absolutely free to you, with no obligation or expectation on our part other than that you'll learn from us.

Because of this, we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you a beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the secure link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=250b546ab2dd42e78d16e67de328bc21&_e=q_moNuAesTwhGVS5UFzZyFrVwSWlYMD2xR3IUqk-aQhKr58hjBJ-QyU70iLrKWzlusDuqzzIYi9XgAQz2kK0O_A_6-0foi1U1OI8s1GjObL0YQ3EXG52Ht_j3QO--PvoJ-7-EFy5lxE3hjp8npTBTJIXdH1gm3ZkB4EV7Li7ElJ_338xJAudFEhdZmYH8VWB7PbxaLxcfJBOdQ1x_ITU_QrfosP616qUrIWbqA357dcXzIUFYt6-SwRwzKhaiAKF1raRNJoFNv-yNR_3tRJUUKVo_MbHq8FCSq-ElJpPddAqzEq4ohnsSE2qAenlTemPZ6imyDoDeY6h84reMnCwpPZROhJ2IVv95KoYyz66qjE_8Ql1iOqkMyyA2eIyk9eyLLz2wbt9H7aDrvjJh1pstw_uIOkF4a18G-kL2b2FwTJznN2L9Z95hZ6w_mblz51A)

So, if you said YES to either of those questions above, I hope you'll say "YES" again to supporting this course. Thank you so much for learning with us--we deeply appreciate you!

Gratefully,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24aee96a860d4f85aecf83bc4f619832&_e=HzvA9rVeCVsKBuPi8Uvf8zQkhrkvpLOWfKrq1K1SwcLWHDenro0ZH5Xm6l_a4cO73Rabel0e1S-EO1FUc5QujPb7USXhrgbhOTeff3jzmkYXrYlrK5RKjFC_tL_Uys2eunaNPd51BNGX5UZKFRuTX80rKYcsP897ZvWlpoRD7DXV0GSQOqAGM6N-oimspbfw6GMJoKKFLi7QXUqV0-DjbPIA-uJaLcLZ3ldND5yb-mYPVBRIe6I2niHx5C7HQ_JphnL2K6aSgRhERmaz_dswAePngbAUa7dxXanIZ5HyeoBMrxO3VuTPWkXDb38p_Koxv3wViqE5F8uK8r10ekB6c2yKwkmRaPmLpl24DYA1YNk%3D)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24aee96a860d4f85aecf83bc4f619832&_e=HzvA9rVeCVsKBuPi8Uvf8zQkhrkvpLOWfKrq1K1SwcLWHDenro0ZH5Xm6l_a4cO73Rabel0e1S-EO1FUc5QujPb7USXhrgbhOTeff3jzmkYXrYlrK5RKjFC_tL_Uys2eunaNPd51BNGX5UZKFRuTX80rKYcsP897ZvWlpoRD7DXV0GSQOqAGM6N-oimspbfw6GMJoKKFLi7QXUqV0-DjbBpSLKiLA73QCa2zRJnjJ7A0lhmoWgEzKlCtU4_NlJ07lSye9nI4293RzBYWOl74TVJa4vZN5cv2E6d1xLM__laOnTI_nBhR3-E2uYlc4eOI7vDca60sookaJTrDkXIL-0nqvJTXH-CSSAe0e6NVtcc%3D)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24aee96a860d4f85aecf83bc4f619832&_e=HzvA9rVeCVsKBuPi8Uvf8zQkhrkvpLOWfKrq1K1SwcLWHDenro0ZH5Xm6l_a4cO73Rabel0e1S-EO1FUc5QujPb7USXhrgbhOTeff3jzmkYXrYlrK5RKjFC_tL_Uys2eunaNPd51BNGX5UZKFRuTX80rKYcsP897ZvWlpoRD7DXV0GSQOqAGM6N-oimspbfw6GMJoKKFLi7QXUqV0-DjbHOIvlG_m8J8NPJvkCtoUH1paUbCzs_jyR1U4Fmv-ehNjht62b9TItSVMqz2X6pvT0r1Rl9Kw2O0xhTj4l5-c8XWvJyPI_yr7A4-gCf5cWxlaCv_w2MHAjmoYmdEvpy0CN_DeVUngZWj_K23Ts_SLiM%3D)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24aee96a860d4f85aecf83bc4f619832&_e=HzvA9rVeCVsKBuPi8Uvf8zQkhrkvpLOWfKrq1K1SwcLWHDenro0ZH5Xm6l_a4cO73Rabel0e1S-EO1FUc5QujPb7USXhrgbhOTeff3jzmkYXrYlrK5RKjFC_tL_Uys2eunaNPd51BNGX5UZKFRuTX80rKYcsP897ZvWlpoRD7DXV0GSQOqAGM6N-oimspbfw6GMJoKKFLi7QXUqV0-DjbBFoe2qOBWPcXEDTVl_ojxBr03cQl6YZXCGuRRrRejJEFW-BUiVXE36rgP1fxa1J82KdINsEfzddB9woje1dcPz26RvgQtE8xXOi0JMJ83WnCFTfbxdsyGppV-JtYOPAPNZjDcwuYCF9Y0_Pb5Vwrnc%3D)**

**If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends.**

**[So please don't delay - give your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24aee96a860d4f85aecf83bc4f619832&_e=HzvA9rVeCVsKBuPi8Uvf8zQkhrkvpLOWfKrq1K1SwcLWHDenro0ZH5Xm6l_a4cO73Rabel0e1S-EO1FUc5QujPb7USXhrgbhOTeff3jzmkYXrYlrK5RKjFC_tL_Uys2eunaNPd51BNGX5UZKFRuTX80rKYcsP897ZvWlpoRD7DXV0GSQOqAGM6N-oimspbfw6GMJoKKFLi7QXUqV0-DjbLhlA2Ugci2lq_SG1GItnNugLphpY12C1yv6VQIPjoQnnnl60Ut8fiYEvkPccT2ZyPyAufgMZDSppuFEEdXgKT8N9R-zxLjCoOkVoz1kUN0YngID3Y8bhvmP343Q9kZ1vrH-1ZRJQm8L47FQ0BrfKE8%3D)**

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. **They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant.

If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next.

**[Please support this critical lawsuit with your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24aee96a860d4f85aecf83bc4f619832&_e=HzvA9rVeCVsKBuPi8Uvf8zQkhrkvpLOWfKrq1K1SwcLWHDenro0ZH5Xm6l_a4cO73Rabel0e1S-EO1FUc5QujPb7USXhrgbhOTeff3jzmkYXrYlrK5RKjFC_tL_Uys2eunaNPd51BNGX5UZKFRuTX80rKYcsP897ZvWlpoRD7DXV0GSQOqAGM6N-oimspbfw6GMJoKKFLi7QXUqV0-DjbBTmwsszO8yD-uoanaCEPlg3N4zEeJIOwaCZwdWoPTCePAHmbLI4-P9GX8beWG3c6ipn0G8AAIcD3FRwskcK9g4xWcV7FsR2yQbyDgeoul07BfNuUvo4vFG1hsxez6mQnNPIXX1pghDvADCYmrmut8k%3D)**

Reclaiming American Freedom

subject: Trump Dominates in Iowa, Houthis Threaten American Ships, and Puppy Bowl Rosters are Set
body:
Donald Trump won the Iowa caucuses in the first vote of the 2024 election, projected to take [over 50% of the votes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFvwyAQRn8NbETcgbE7MHTJlq4dLXI54quwsWwSq_--Suau3ye9p_d9GS9Jiiz3rzRzbLmOiZo8eQQDwaAfvb7FzIzsNEfobefBOef0FAdC_Ai56zMRkA0E2XNOdIUEwQ1eS0SL3gIEsJ3H_pT6Lg_oBmfJDpms8pZv0up2-qmytIlz-a1P3k5UZ13i1Nq6K_ep8KzwnNaFj_11KTxPj-t7MlKPZLgwNamLefnMxvujtF1v8bYeUorsoVfe3uck5U1u_3b-BQAA__-AvFOJ). AP called the vote for him within 30 minutes, citing sizable leads among both men and women.

# TUESDAY, JANUARY 16, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 1917, the Zimmerman telegram, a coded message from Germany to Mexico, helped push the U.S. into World War I. The message promised Mexico it could regain Texas, Arizona, and New Mexico if it joined with Germany. ([See Telegram](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszz1u7CAQAODT4G6tYcDGDcVr3O1rU1oEBnsiflaG2EpOHyl1LvBJ39tzezpOXPb_LpPtsW7Od75okw85P1Bvegg2EiGpgaw0MGmplFLDYSfQDgBw1kvwSr4vNJtIRsugzYRqGdgioAYpZwmTRjM6M8UF1aLAwxI9CA0UuNdz_Khc-kExfdWLztHXPCR79P5qQv0TuApc7_se3ekPvqiNe70ErhQ-vetci8A1UWu1NIHrN-dMZ3alDKcNr5tT4jYboWHPjtMv3v-s_gQAAP__Bd1UzQ)) We asked if any readers are enjoying balmy weather while the rest of us freeze, and some of you certainly are. Readers Tom & Karen even sent in a picture as proof; [here they are](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQgOGnsTfQ-e6MyeChC0uVTpU6IhfOwZHBCNxEfftKXdv9l359H9fxGlJO2-0trOJrLGOYanrIaBrTNcgj69lHERTS4o0Dy4aISC_-Ekxno-16N1tr-UJCAVhYiNl-OtHJIyCDMZ0By-ja4GzskXqCCfo4gWKQOdVytPeStrpIzN_lIUc7lVVnv9S6n4peFA4Kh7-JwuG5N1PZqmxV4fC15xLmU-HwXtbmNRyytff9pg8_78-Uczo7pxhua0j5d1H_Bf8EAAD__zk3Vtg) enjoying a beach far, far away while the rest of us ponder the ice formations on our windows. Good for them! Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9OwzAQgPGnsbdWZ9_lz-IBqcpEWBmjS3JODpy4Sk0Rb48qRjp_v-l774eeNem-vPEmocQ88FT0LoM7ufrkaSA7hyjiBa0E10BFDhHRriGODDE2o3MeR4ccmRgAgflRaLQaPHgC52oHFfnmzE0VW48twgRtnMAQyKwlH-ePrHtZJaaffJfjPOXNprCWcr0ZfDG-M777T4zvel50etX982GwE4OX-fqtKemtbgzBsrGmP1t_lc3ghcAe4bmx5emA3wAAAP__Uy1bdw). ## Trump Wins Iowa Caucuses
Donald Trump won the Iowa caucuses in the first vote of the 2024 election, and he did it with the largest margin of victory in the history of the caucuses, [taking 51% percent of the vote](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFvwyAQRn8NbETcgbE7MHTJlq4dLXI54quwsWwSq_--Suau3ye9p_d9GS9Jiiz3rzRzbLmOiZo8eQQDwaAfvb7FzIzsNEfobefBOef0FAdC_Ai56zMRkA0E2XNOdIUEwQ1eS0SL3gIEsJ3H_pT6Lg_oBmfJDpms8pZv0up2-qmytIlz-a1P3k5UZ13i1Nq6K_ep8KzwnNaFj_11KTxPj-t7MlKPZLgwNamLefnMxvujtF1v8bYeUorsoVfe3uck5U1u_3b-BQAA__-AvFOJ). AP called the contest for him within 30 minutes, citing sizable leads among both men and women. Ron DeSantis grabbed 21.2% and [finished second](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtygzAQAL8GOjF68XBBkYbOaVMysjjBJUJHpLOJ_z7j1Kl3i539uM5XhxHT-u52GDnQ7DzjA2YlVCe0nW29jAFAg6lhVL1srTLGmHobLzcZwPkhgAu-vXRSBemgVe3tYhbrocZRS22lUp2SrdV94_o2DNoMRno5BC8rK2FBptx8EibeIMQnPSA3nvY6jhvzUSrzVump0tN5nk2gnwRnefFKTwdFZPSl0hPn-36I7zv6r_gUBfw9QxEP9Ez5KZBOJ4g3yEXcHHOEl0JpEQFzYbHSIY4MBRdIjC6KRDsmx5hWARE8I6U6j8txYoxYur6yct0dxr9Q_nfbbwAAAP__fIV0iA), beating Nikki Haley and her less-than-expected 19.1%. Vivek Ramaswamy finished 4th with 7.7%, and [he's suspended his campaign](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQRb8GdWhgQcivoHiNOqdNqVnDYm-ChEYQKf77jFOnvnfOmTnv1_mKnHm9v-FCvqUyY2h80KyldhLsbLvoExGQ6cjrUQ1WG2NM9_DjYG80oPsXwy2lAQ2mmJzVI0UXFGHHHhRYpbXTarAw9jgO6QLmYlRQlxSUsIoit7L3H4XX9qCUn-WgvQ9l6bJ_tLZVYf4LmARM53n2-M2lvlYB04stYFJawKSdgOnggz7ljgvWE5enrF91ozVW-XrKbafKkdbGmGXAZUO-r93u43ZyzlzdKKy6L8j5197-bPETAAD__2o2X_w) and endorsed Donald Trump. He's planning to attend a Trump rally in New Hampshire, where the next GOP primary is scheduled for Jan. 23 and Trump holds a commanding lead in the polls.
## White House Targeted by Protestors, False Alarm
A false 911 call claiming a fire at the White House [scrambled emergency crews](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwzAMhJ_G3hhQf3E8eOiSLV07GoxMWSxkK5DUBHn7IkHHTjd8wN3h-7rMF5Ik-_pJG08t5Jl8kzvPCtQRtJ1tv0yBWbPpeVIDOquMMaaPkyOHV7LBoRkoWGUXdKMfLS1Ejp3uZdKoLSp1VOisHg40uHDS5mTQ4yl47CzyIi2Xw3eWvUUO6ZnvXA4-b32aYmu32pmPTp87fW6Ro6T0Yp0-X1Ne61_CtQgH2Vco-Q2txdGhgVEp8JQSFwiUKqcn-ESyVXhEaQwx_1SGIIWBQuMClYtwhRygPqi1V6XsXhbe22usL9Nye0hKUo9DZ3HdSN6H-vavut8AAAD__2FBcOU) Monday before the Secret Service helped determine there was no fire. President Biden was at Camp David at the time. The number of "swatting" incidents against public officials, where police are called to a fake "emergency," has rocketed up in recent weeks against members of both political parties. This is the first time the White House has been targeted. Earlier this weekend, White House security was rattled by a pro-Palestinian protest that damaged the security gates as protesters rammed against it. [Here's video of the incident.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz72O6jAQQOGnsTvQeMZ_jQuadNDeMjLOGHxlYpTMgnj7lXbbrY90pO_feT7n1tt6u-QHJ6ljzkXai2dzMP6AdrZ6SZUZmTQnE8BZQ0Sk76kWBraQQ3URuRKBKYGugQAjQ7zqlhDQgjHegLMYjjm4GpEiQYFYCygLvDQZ2_H_aKvcufbPePF2LOOhe7qLPHdFJ4WTwkneTeS3KZzO22ldPpfbUDjtkuVrVziZYD05T2BddM4DBK-3tDzfrfe2-6As3B659Z-__Kn9DgAA__-u1lKZ)
## List: 57 U.S. Counties Where Homes Are Unaffordable
A new list of 57 counties shows where [housing has become unaffordable.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwU5nWUBMQZHG7tKmdDhclAThBrhzfPtMUqf_i3--z9tysyGGtH3Yg0zzebGuhRctvOdjj3KR3Wo8EZLoyHANSnIhhOh2A5575VCBAj6-rXK8Oz-hFJNyQmsNXTAIKIHzkYOSqAerlZ9QTAIcTN4Bk0BraLkMXzmktpOPV35RGVw-umj21h6ViXeGM8P5PM_hyImujej7t2A4H7m0zW7EcLbJxquGynB-Jut9Lqu9R-qftXf5mVqg2vtc-j0flM9Epe7hwXDuilkfZ4gx1FEzCdthQ_wbaP9y_AQAAP__PxpiSQ) Half are in the West, led by the Sacramento area. Several are Colorado and Idaho towns, and Boston is the most unaffordable in the East. The list, compiled by MoneyGeek, analyzes the rise in housing prices against median incomes across the country. One finding: outlying counties of high-growth cities are rapidly becoming unaffordable. Contra Costa County outside San Francisco has the nation's highest median home prices at $875,000. The full list, with a map of the 57 most unaffordable counties, [can be seen here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwU5nWUBMQZHG7tKmdDhclAThBrhzfPtMUqf_i3--z9tysyGGtH3Yg0zzebGuhRctvOdjj3KR3Wo8EZLoyHANSnIhhOh2A5575VCBAj6-rXK8Oz-hFJNyQmsNXTAIKIHzkYOSqAerlZ9QTAIcTN4Bk0BraLkMXzmktpOPV35RGVw-umj21h6ViXeGM8P5PM_hyImujej7t2A4H7m0zW7EcLbJxquGynB-Jut9Lqu9R-qftXf5mVqg2vtc-j0flM9Epe7hwXDuilkfZ4gx1FEzCdthQ_wbaP9y_AQAAP__PxpiSQ)

clean_body: Donald Trump won the Iowa caucuses in the first vote of the 2024 election, projected to take . AP called the vote for him within 30 minutes, citing sizable leads among both men and women. | | | | | | TUESDAY, JANUARY 16, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1917, the Zimmerman telegram, a coded message from Germany to Mexico, helped push the U.S. into World War I. The message promised Mexico it could regain Texas, Arizona, and New Mexico if it joined with Germany. () We asked if any readers are enjoying balmy weather while the rest of us freeze, and some of you certainly are. Readers Tom & Karen even sent in a picture as proof; enjoying a beach far, far away while the rest of us ponder the ice formations on our windows. Good for them! Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is sponsored by our good friends at . | Trump Wins Iowa Caucuses Donald Trump won the Iowa caucuses in the first vote of the 2024 election, and he did it with the largest margin of victory in the history of the caucuses, . AP called the contest for him within 30 minutes, citing sizable leads among both men and women. Ron DeSantis grabbed 21.2% and , beating Nikki Haley and her less-than-expected 19.1%. Vivek Ramaswamy finished 4th with 7.7%, and and endorsed Donald Trump. He's planning to attend a Trump rally in New Hampshire, where the next GOP primary is scheduled for Jan. 23 and Trump holds a commanding lead in the polls. White House Targeted by Protestors, False Alarm A false 911 call claiming a fire at the White House Monday before the Secret Service helped determine there was no fire. President Biden was at Camp David at the time. The number of "swatting" incidents against public officials, where police are called to a fake "emergency," has rocketed up in recent weeks against members of both political parties. This is the first time the White House has been targeted. Earlier this weekend, White House security was rattled by a pro-Palestinian protest that damaged the security gates as protesters rammed against it. List: 57 U.S. Counties Where Homes Are Unaffordable A new list of 57 counties shows where Half are in the West, led by the Sacramento area. Several are Colorado and Idaho towns, and Boston is the most unaffordable in the East. The list, compiled by MoneyGeek, analyzes the rise in housing prices against median incomes across the country. One finding: outlying counties of high-growth cities are rapidly becoming unaffordable. Contra Costa County outside San Francisco has the nation's highest median home prices at $875,000. name: Conservatives Give
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61d66272eed7407da02b20cf548ef13e&_e=embt5mw2WgLOi_2PBlFI-uEMrp2BKg9NAWLWUXQZrX2ULRVMcif8P0eiWplOSk3K65Xg7gUlvNFQKXOqC6hHEUmKYbezM7aG9FsG0zkx8JN2K11rFMQtlgzHfNwjhthk37HT2r9avM4xzOIaQyaKbb_qdFALvNcEgbvWgMA5iId44TAoto9nN3TrgaVmlO5EpWykR7Xv9o5mhcnfu8iLimEiGKZC05U1RATevtfZR1_EJNRoc674E1E_eaN9VuCrNqbK5xY_8QnFaj78-6dhoIm1IJr3FbOeAg4qsMKi1VAma6R6EJm9_J1kSHThMPxQ6bqkhUiqW6Z7HeHSg0FHoE6mWl51f0NfBNQv6e9ZEaK2jgLixFADpxu14m8w0rRBEIaXOnU3JkqFcWXIkYHC3g%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61d66272eed7407da02b20cf548ef13e&_e=embt5mw2WgLOi_2PBlFI-uEMrp2BKg9NAWLWUXQZrX2ULRVMcif8P0eiWplOSk3K65Xg7gUlvNFQKXOqC6hHEUmKYbezM7aG9FsG0zkx8JN2K11rFMQtlgzHfNwjhthk37HT2r9avM4xzOIaQyaKbb_qdFALvNcEgbvWgMA5iId44TAoto9nN3TrgaVmlO5EpWykR7Xv9o5mhcnfu8iLimEiGKZC05U1RATevtfZR1_EJNRoc674E1E_eaN9VuCrpXSyQVqlCCIdD4utJZtMdVYPs_T4dQ4ftTfiYR0xcnanuzaH8wew-4d5DNGO_WoXIM6nVbHH9WCLBWJp47CORzkp-yz92Jv09tLq5qSumCbwQpe61ByQf2iol9irapgUQpv2hKBWapmU5zY_jZHs7A%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61d66272eed7407da02b20cf548ef13e&_e=embt5mw2WgLOi_2PBlFI-uEMrp2BKg9NAWLWUXQZrX2ULRVMcif8P0eiWplOSk3K65Xg7gUlvNFQKXOqC6hHEUmKYbezM7aG9FsG0zkx8JN2K11rFMQtlgzHfNwjhthk37HT2r9avM4xzOIaQyaKbb_qdFALvNcEgbvWgMA5iId44TAoto9nN3TrgaVmlO5EpWykR7Xv9o5mhcnfu8iLimEiGKZC05U1RATevtfZR1_EJNRoc674E1E_eaN9VuCrbf9_N-8IW8p3Y3OqtAEG4qvcHRO89lR2Dp-u-S7lBQAgGHSNQSnIpadj66qLPIC0UleRDTfnJhlkUwD9bFdGvFywwPDCwvqmJt2el1ZsjeinJ1vit6HWUvwz4fgXiDJL681XLoo6SX65hId-b_R-yw%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61d66272eed7407da02b20cf548ef13e&_e=embt5mw2WgLOi_2PBlFI-uEMrp2BKg9NAWLWUXQZrX2ULRVMcif8P0eiWplOSk3K65Xg7gUlvNFQKXOqC6hHEUmKYbezM7aG9FsG0zkx8JN2K11rFMQtlgzHfNwjhthk37HT2r9avM4xzOIaQyaKbb_qdFALvNcEgbvWgMA5iId44TAoto9nN3TrgaVmlO5EpWykR7Xv9o5mhcnfu8iLimEiGKZC05U1RATevtfZR1_EJNRoc674E1E_eaN9VuCreBFd7ZJCgM7muBWl6DbpkPOiRDnAOiDeA51kDKDjaApHaqRU-mF0LWCN6xv7dYDsqeMmDp_UYWBZG7ZMKh4ME-O4CUazD-VN0KTvbK_CMIIbt7CelviCcLjwpR5iIFYgaYr-ILYGp-2tZ5mQAXabXA%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61d66272eed7407da02b20cf548ef13e&_e=embt5mw2WgLOi_2PBlFI-uEMrp2BKg9NAWLWUXQZrX2ULRVMcif8P0eiWplOSk3K65Xg7gUlvNFQKXOqC6hHEUmKYbezM7aG9FsG0zkx8JN2K11rFMQtlgzHfNwjhthk37HT2r9avM4xzOIaQyaKbb_qdFALvNcEgbvWgMA5iId44TAoto9nN3TrgaVmlO5EpWykR7Xv9o5mhcnfu8iLimEiGKZC05U1RATevtfZR1_EJNRoc674E1E_eaN9VuCrO4r2C2QhuDFrn3HTCAol8hcbsWN9nx2xxefaqUBPijukQszXBt-wLjbvd3H3y3l6UshwZ3xX1tkNsUzmHlCCC5clOhMAKqsDYwjcJkOlDffBsC1N0dPEvAa4-3u7sjI7n21pzcUO1YO3-tDEBRWZ8Q%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservatives Give

I've got two quick questions for you:
## 1\. Are you concerned about the American economy right now?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d48d682bdf274b6f94a9ec07fdbb399c&_e=X3VY6IrYG4dSx5XkbREXahKdh_MG_-ARKOcCm7l1hbYXbHEOB2k0IgbZJ3T2yIteQud5Xx1D_GDChHypXkib48kAFyuUwm39oqfYBEykXKAZPBv1ybSL48CLAunSAbq9M03rTBm69iT5BKXOxjT_5i41FFWWs2XjVzX6otG5OCTtIWJpIRmNDjN61LGzQUCIFWIWCBY_FSBXL6EJttSmU72zs8Mlm4gqA7WjUR50rNNyWymbiDxQDBq9ls3-aYnx3Kke-0sJ8K-2uUO9pMXPn2EUrF32GBAnn1-YIgL2rj1g55C9kAPJMmXHP9bfQ_2axihBKn8UkvaEg55Xaagaew1hmumdZb_Pv6-lqpYQY1vhMp0Ze9KU0eGxaRy6AAkE2BBwZYeDFYkr3ibWZ_uUmqsqv3QS23Ad5ovJQJVNxv8n75TXu7tDbNhFr72aZ5oX) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d48d682bdf274b6f94a9ec07fdbb399c&_e=X3VY6IrYG4dSx5XkbREXahKdh_MG_-ARKOcCm7l1hbYXbHEOB2k0IgbZJ3T2yIteQud5Xx1D_GDChHypXkib48kAFyuUwm39oqfYBEykXKAZPBv1ybSL48CLAunSAbq9M03rTBm69iT5BKXOxjT_5i41FFWWs2XjVzX6otG5OCTtIWJpIRmNDjN61LGzQUCIFWIWCBY_FSBXL6EJttSmU72zs8Mlm4gqA7WjUR50rNNyWymbiDxQDBq9ls3-aYnx3Kke-0sJ8K-2uUO9pMXPn2EUrF32GBAnn1-YIgL2rj2XA1rUtOlq2ftYMq5ixzLC0NLUmAlLicXZTHj0JgZVQZEGLA8JeIg9p9FtJJettoatWXkHCY3pFOCHME_VfR0oUcEHI1ArFc3KzUUfpwmXeGxHQ6U5sB0UA6v8sEGFBlYzoMNhB2ik0-X0t0M8z0UF)
## 2\. Are you curious to learn how private citizens drive the economy?

Friend, remember that this series--like every online course from Hillsdale College--is absolutely free to you, with no obligation or expectation on our part other than that you'll learn from us.

Because of this, we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you a beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the secure link below:**

So, if you said YES to either of those questions above, I hope you'll say "YES" again to supporting this course. Thank you so much for learning with us--we deeply appreciate you!

Gratefully,

Bill Gray, '01

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae69327dafe644cc8a03e8a0e3285445&_e=9Tl72bXvJJY0zhABOZbo1IPwtPZu03t-xd0jzgEP1X44lkf3m8CbX5qSLzGQ1Ml2cwlDTFQnHq3b8yB7jt8VkambkYAMcMnGYU9Qsmtr6_kjF5noi0pZiY2oPRTocXUXWOdDJOWChOjlpFnoVYgOWR1gZ-M7oBfxWHrMhVJ-4RIba54oU_tyAXgZvaRGN8M6xKwbb1cEJiro9jXTwPOrYK_Ohew1nmCXPSw7V-N5aiAJFcBloPNYfBbmd8eqfDcHHcDca4qh6EmbvqCu2DGUngVSahg8oO3Xe38g4_Yb-Ouz3ZE4OZPfEfZ2QXEyyujQIhb--oa0vehHPS4lQLeNItBufCRcifSEmppe-Um2s5V__JRp78qbdxHOsaUAmF69RZ217CVVq0M_reFKsntbZw%3D%3D)

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae69327dafe644cc8a03e8a0e3285445&_e=9Tl72bXvJJY0zhABOZbo1IPwtPZu03t-xd0jzgEP1X44lkf3m8CbX5qSLzGQ1Ml2cwlDTFQnHq3b8yB7jt8VkambkYAMcMnGYU9Qsmtr6_kjF5noi0pZiY2oPRTocXUXWOdDJOWChOjlpFnoVYgOWR1gZ-M7oBfxWHrMhVJ-4RIba54oU_tyAXgZvaRGN8M6xKwbb1cEJiro9jXTwPOrYK_Ohew1nmCXPSw7V-N5aiAJFcBloPNYfBbmd8eqfDcHAtBq-MvGQSRbJoYYsCFtAJiomFH-_VbmNB8GtTyqm-xEeB0K_6Ha_RAfl8RcQx8qF2iXdU8uLCnbBKbYWup5GxVNmjKuZYVJS1I7caw2c5pRkjQkHqkXKrmZj2iD-4RQNuLmUgy9ydrDKTzFntiaLQ%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae69327dafe644cc8a03e8a0e3285445&_e=9Tl72bXvJJY0zhABOZbo1IPwtPZu03t-xd0jzgEP1X44lkf3m8CbX5qSLzGQ1Ml2cwlDTFQnHq3b8yB7jt8VkambkYAMcMnGYU9Qsmtr6_kjF5noi0pZiY2oPRTocXUXWOdDJOWChOjlpFnoVYgOWR1gZ-M7oBfxWHrMhVJ-4RIba54oU_tyAXgZvaRGN8M6xKwbb1cEJiro9jXTwPOrYK_Ohew1nmCXPSw7V-N5aiAJFcBloPNYfBbmd8eqfDcHtaz8GP4uKnCdhbBRkIXqq_oFI84bcS0aWeg47DhL885BA8oyDDZxVPNwQJB2mo0Uvmikg-Gq3CdYeZLMFpfb_wSV0s1lTXHX7gcfaQoWB0J-CF03GbW507BsojFr3ak017sIF_ZX2ues2DCuaitKrQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae69327dafe644cc8a03e8a0e3285445&_e=9Tl72bXvJJY0zhABOZbo1IPwtPZu03t-xd0jzgEP1X44lkf3m8CbX5qSLzGQ1Ml2cwlDTFQnHq3b8yB7jt8VkambkYAMcMnGYU9Qsmtr6_kjF5noi0pZiY2oPRTocXUXWOdDJOWChOjlpFnoVYgOWR1gZ-M7oBfxWHrMhVJ-4RIba54oU_tyAXgZvaRGN8M6xKwbb1cEJiro9jXTwPOrYK_Ohew1nmCXPSw7V-N5aiAJFcBloPNYfBbmd8eqfDcHxw7oyS1KchowaYNEjMY6l4_81WO9-Nz3fdJYWEVJbxKmoHtCDqKbPKhM958DY3yqudo8ZZHM5Ys7nZxLGudHvwNs76fXUveSaoaHxXMoah2Cn-1lHl2RbCVgr0qLSYd7ug20OjcLkZey-raSsj1TBA%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae69327dafe644cc8a03e8a0e3285445&_e=9Tl72bXvJJY0zhABOZbo1IPwtPZu03t-xd0jzgEP1X44lkf3m8CbX5qSLzGQ1Ml2cwlDTFQnHq3b8yB7jt8VkambkYAMcMnGYU9Qsmtr6_kjF5noi0pZiY2oPRTocXUXWOdDJOWChOjlpFnoVYgOWR1gZ-M7oBfxWHrMhVJ-4RIba54oU_tyAXgZvaRGN8M6xKwbb1cEJiro9jXTwPOrYK_Ohew1nmCXPSw7V-N5aiAJFcBloPNYfBbmd8eqfDcHqqgRmS7qzcNOpHvmRowVzaaf-8nLCjXPPvAZ1um44rNO4tcWdty9W4HqAVyHnCD_b5QMMqvnzHkL1UHYWCmrMop1Vg_o9IREQQQ_Qw3yu-DUFaphgIeGZSnGewGX1XqmOIgyEuu4f8rguSURWvZhLA%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Maria Montero

body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
|
---
| What's an entrepreneur to do when Bidenomics is in town?
On Friday, January 12, Joe Biden and his failed economic policy tour caused major traffic jams in Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District. It seems a path of disarray ensues wherever his policies go. So, what's a pro-small business advocate to do? WE RALLY! Maria met with and was endorsed by a strong contingency of small business owners through PA-7 who are at end of their rope because of the devastating effects of Bidenomics. In speaking with everyday business owners it is clear:

1. Costs of doing business have risen over 40%
2. Crime is rampant
3. Filling job openings is a pervasive challenge

These entrepreneurs and small business owners are supporting Maria because she has been working in private sector over 20 years, has been an advocate of small businesses her entire career, and they understand we must elect more small business people and advocates who know first-hand the challenges that must overcome to be prosperous.
Small businesses play a vital role in Pennsylvania's economy accounting for 99.6% of businesses in the Commonwealth, employing over 2.5 million individuals. Everyday people are struggling and Bidenomcs is not the answer to our economic woes. Maria believes lowering taxes, eliminating overregulation, and maintaining safe environments where businesses can thrive is the jump start needed to create a fertile environment for small businesses to thrive and grow.
"The American dream of human progress through freedom and equality of opportunity in competitive enterprise is still the most revolutionary idea in the world today. It's also the most successful." -Ronald Reagan
---
| |
---
| Upcoming Events
Please join us on Wednesday, February 7 at 5:30 P.M. for a Galantine's Reception at beautiful Harry Packer Mansion in Jim Thorpe!

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: My Opponent
body:
Peter,

If you're an affluent professional with a rent-stabilized apartment in Manhattan or Brownstone in Brooklyn, Kevin Thomas is the politician you want subsidizing your beach or country home.

But if you're a Long Island family trying to make ends meet in an unforgiving economy rigged for the connected and the privileged, Kevin Thomas is nothing but bad news.

Help me defeat him. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=My+Opponent+Email]

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=My+Opponent+Email] My opponent is an unquestioning vote for his Democratic State Senate colleagues representing Manhattan, Brooklyn Heights, Park Slope, and Williamsburg. He's a vote for the New York City rich who always expect more, and that'll never change. The rent laws he passed and protected in Albany were designed to be abused. HELP DEFEAT HIM → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=My+Opponent+Email]

body:
Sadly, this is causing students to fall behind in their education.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa4c76fd3948e8adbe1a9144e3e8b4&_e=94pkthOv4pQxEtdjZY8glKeOf1n9PnqNIDQm6zW0lAHHgiHtvpG83prwA6CJjdufz7w1h4evcYSEolu3hQhS5EDzi-V-gpuCMlt7m1kQB2PnOHB6EsZ-ZnZy6QCCoFx6DZmhsQuOR44R0l63az-x5FOoXJe6ZAKZ1HtJymn-cH4HoKtEuz7o3kI3OkhQGs0_avGCHa9f8MMDCqLobllwmNksPMTdwp1tltQsrRvfXieFuC3pC-8OMmUuYqXL8CDE2PDPt6d843QX1iOMw29UR2AI90BSQRLZy3tRP7RKPJ4%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

Public schools are often more focused on indoctrinating students with woke ideas than teaching them the skills they need to succeed.

Sadly, this is causing students to fall behind in their education.
* Only 31% of 8th graders are proficient in reading.
* 30% are "below basic" readers - functionally illiterate
* Only 13% of 8th graders are proficient in American history!

Government schools get a failing grade no matter how you slice the data. If only there was some way for parents to provide their children with an alternative to the dumbed-down indoctrination in public schools.

**Luckily, I have a solution for parents: the Tuttle Twins!**

My name is Connor Boyack, the author of the Tuttle Twins books series. The Tuttle Twins teach children the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government.

Today, especially in the next sixty minutes, I want to reach as many people as I can with this request. I set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Every $10 we raise allows us to send a copy of a Tuttle Twins book to a school, library, or family to help turn the tide of woke indoctrination.

**If that is all you need to hear, please contribute $10 or whatever you can afford using this button:**
[Donate Today](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa4c76fd3948e8adbe1a9144e3e8b4&_e=94pkthOv4pQxEtdjZY8glKeOf1n9PnqNIDQm6zW0lAHHgiHtvpG83prwA6CJjdufz7w1h4evcYSEolu3hQhS5EDzi-V-gpuCMlt7m1kQB2PnOHB6EsZ-ZnZy6QCCoFx6fiwyMA2NPqf98Q1PihBuGJzJ3b_q5V_AFhvkBnU03N-oqmQGHW12ylTGlcPcNwUuwltx-2qpBGuIpnpLNoyKZC9aY9TriquhH4Bsxf4qc0fiLzCB6O_G3CBBXP_9vLdQCSq5ZdgzXrcvwAiFDJREIosCzlli-ekMPvA2pFZyr_0%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I am asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because every book that finds its way into a public school provides an alternative to woke indoctrination.

$10 because the Tuttle Twins books inspired Jaiden, the kid in Colorado who was kicked out of class for wearing a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack, to stand up for his beliefs.
$10 because these books are creating a new generation of kids who are excited about the values of free markets, individual rights, liberty, true history, and personal responsibility.

[$10 because we can distribute a total of 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books this year!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa4c76fd3948e8adbe1a9144e3e8b4&_e=94pkthOv4pQxEtdjZY8glKeOf1n9PnqNIDQm6zW0lAHHgiHtvpG83prwA6CJjdufz7w1h4evcYSEolu3hQhS5EDzi-V-gpuCMlt7m1kQB2PnOHB6EsZ-ZnZy6QCCoFx6TAYWd9Psie-IQMzr-AjFdh1iA4RkTpsK43hiSERYbzkb_tYfz7Xs1ts0RnLWAX3ZWFsl3nZ7hzoUKTN5gKnSW5mUWmjy1_d_ob6xuZMb19-37vchGG0DW64N1WKYJO1n2ty01qXDDblRAXDMoQE1_c5PF7GMKd7ftlCHJVGs2ok%3D)

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa4c76fd3948e8adbe1a9144e3e8b4&_e=94pkthOv4pQxEtdjZY8glKeOf1n9PnqNIDQm6zW0lAHHgiHtvpG83prwA6CJjdufz7w1h4evcYSEolu3hQhS5EDzi-V-gpuCMlt7m1kQB2PnOHB6EsZ-ZnZy6QCCoFx6dWjMrvIYuMUkO94K_BD_aFPHZCwgpoqRTqznJwjavHimejcSvZrLc1m4uONB3vaoA3ZVpcSIVSUq5xoh1x5DvX94itiZkCCAjuMI0c61bcSOcw7qYIAvrYPGaJj9CCIvsAHf3WD8mrwFpUkj02kREhM3Q04FyB2WqM-QKbHUcdQ%3D)

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Hey - can we talk?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress ](http://links
body:
Finstad for Congress

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDkzMjg2NTkS1&r=MTYyNDE1OTk1MzM1OAS2&j=MjYyMTY3OTIwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
| | Friend, What issues are most important to you? I am confident they’re important to me too, but since you’re a dedicated Minnesota Republican and loyal supporter, I want to make sure I have a clear understanding of your priorities. And I want to make sure you know what I stand for, what my values are, and why I want to serve another term in office. [**_I know some of you have gotten to know me well, but some of you may_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/rZeNBzLyxNC9/MXpZUnRhNUhXMGxseUNGd0xBUWZMckpJNHdnRmxlQWJUbkRjKzRDWGtVOEc1NFBWRVhaN0JqUlVwNFBGajFWMzYzNk1kaEhhUVFPTnYxUEo0LzNiTEM0Z2VtZTk4UnZBQWlFa25ibnc4WjlOUmh5L3BDaHhiZz09S0/)[** _still be learning about me. You may not know that:_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/AEKpM9kjP~SL/MXpZUnRhNUhXMGxseUNGd0xBUWZMckpJNHdnRmxlQWJUbkRjKzRDWGtVOEc1NFBWRVhaN0JqUlVwNFBGajFWMzYzNk1kaEhhUVFPTnYxUEo0LzNiTEM0Z2VtZTk4UnZBQWlFa25ibnc4WjlOUmh5L3BDaHhiZz09S0/)
* I’m a fourth-generation Minnesotan who grew up on a Brown County farm – the same farm my wife Jackie and I help operate today;
* My first experience in public office was the state legislature, where I focused on issues important to rural families;
* During the Trump administration, I served as Minnesota Director for USDA Rural Development;
* Despite the partisan gridlock in DC, I’ve delivered victories for Minnesota farmers, veterans, and parents; and,
* Jackie and I are the proud parents of seven children, and every decision I make in Congress is rooted in my concern for the next generation. I want everyone’s kids and grandkids to inherit a country that is strong, free, and proud!

During the election year, I’ll be talking with Minnesotans about all this and more. But like most farmers, I’m more interested in listening than talking. I want to know what’s important to you, what you want your government to focus on, and what your hopes are for Minnesota’s future.
If you have a moment, please [**_click here_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/j_69tP6Y3Ecv/MXpZUnRhNUhXMGxseUNGd0xBUWZMckpJNHdnRmxlQWJUbkRjKzRDWGtVOEc1NFBWRVhaN0JqUlVwNFBGajFWMzYzNk1kaEhhUVFPTnYxUEo0LzNiTEM0Z2VtZTk4UnZBQWlFa25ibnc4WjlOUmh5L3BDaHhiZz09S0/) and let me know your top priority in 2024, and [**_please also chip in a special campaign gift_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/~dXNF9ZPw7Sk/MXpZUnRhNUhXMGxseUNGd0xBUWZMckpJNHdnRmxlQWJUbkRjKzRDWGtVOEc1NFBWRVhaN0JqUlVwNFBGajFWMzYzNk1kaEhhUVFPTnYxUEo0LzNiTEM0Z2VtZTk4UnZBQWlFa25ibnc4WjlOUmh5L3BDaHhiZz09S0/) to fuel my fight against the socialist Democrats. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6d0d9692f5d43e7aaef592677b8d43d&_e=ccn8007OO6Gulz-E_yLuyyJhhUQ5bdY4GgcaEYTkczKt5SN5mvK4RT4AISqRXpYcM--ZVRwCq_qpLL1vwzNoaZWqY8h49TSF-OYgSJ8SxySkeY7lu3ivq8YYhhla6n6e9x_HQ3JPSYHFeSd40FcdCDKVxPSGVeqltdbUToFpIZ5fCmBsv3MDw3PbtNx8OmD9xB5J1rLUN_8VNmYUPX1b_g1OSmeCsqr8rPSuf9UEHo3sv8ZY_d-RDa8-KATHnX_X5QP3tr7IhIO-eoXV_cVUt_NwNo8Iz-DR1JUGTuHl3hR-iYkXqburIwPpatUWmE4cp_qCDDQhaxOOyoJAWhP6L9uOEJh63Aeov4WsbHBpr0DRvA1VuQk5V5CKkR2E5tqUeXJYUt_0ip4qbq28Gk9sWXzNo96-wExq2mYLdamMZwcdBBg900DZutxKoA3rO9qT)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6d0d9692f5d43e7aaef592677b8d43d&_e=ccn8007OO6Gulz-E_yLuyyJhhUQ5bdY4GgcaEYTkczKt5SN5mvK4RT4AISqRXpYcM--ZVRwCq_qpLL1vwzNoaZWqY8h49TSF-OYgSJ8SxySkeY7lu3ivq8YYhhla6n6e9x_HQ3JPSYHFeSd40FcdCDKVxPSGVeqltdbUToFpIZ5fCmBsv3MDw3PbtNx8OmD9xB5J1rLUN_8VNmYUPX1b_g1OSmeCsqr8rPSuf9UEHo3sv8ZY_d-RDa8-KATHnX_X5QP3tr7IhIO-eoXV_cVUtwtwB4G63bNJEzyBBOh9oh2zLr4lQjtTBafoINsAIzSI3lgad_Q1ng0AQa-GHt7WD2VeZ9j82sTWOpMvJ2sN4cVR0PackZi4a_XhT99MUn-wfvMrdLpvYz1OZPw_oCdT8g6hn3_6e7eqnl4_aFpiL2IyfYq-HL9ybOVkwp_9gfnA)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6d0d9692f5d43e7aaef592677b8d43d&_e=ccn8007OO6Gulz-E_yLuyyJhhUQ5bdY4GgcaEYTkczKt5SN5mvK4RT4AISqRXpYcM--ZVRwCq_qpLL1vwzNoaZWqY8h49TSF-OYgSJ8SxySkeY7lu3ivq8YYhhla6n6e9x_HQ3JPSYHFeSd40FcdCDKVxPSGVeqltdbUToFpIZ5fCmBsv3MDw3PbtNx8OmD9xB5J1rLUN_8VNmYUPX1b_g1OSmeCsqr8rPSuf9UEHo3sv8ZY_d-RDa8-KATHnX_X5QP3tr7IhIO-eoXV_cVUtx3fJaq9xH65s-dXc0cUYQBavA1K4Uu2IgMVZGlnvkBmwADNZd0Dk0dVQO6HcL7sXhPKszBWeiYeobboy73CVVvErSqtSzAw9W5EsZHdLlUs0hO3NDfpPrtOVcgS3jWtF1CT5bb1Jwo3jckOi5teHBN7yhh1GwaMeRsY3Ohg0T8m)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Freedom Nation Today

name: Steve Scalise
subject: BREAKING: Trump wins Iowa!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: TRUMP is the right man for the job.

| |

---
| | | _BREAKING: TRUMP WINS IOWA _
**This is my first time emailing you since President Trump WON the Iowa Caucuses.**

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: _TRUMP is the right man for the job._

Joe Biden can’t hold a candle to the winning message of our America First movement. Even though he just bragged about having more money in his warchest than any Democrat in American history, he is failing and Conservatives are WINNING on the issues.

_**[President Trump and I share a vision for the future of America- and now that he’s won Iowa, I’d like to know if you agree:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38127%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bn0XlfbxHAqLws2rzRPqBA&sysid=1 "President Trump and I
share a vision for the future of America – and now that he’s won Iowa, I’d
like to know if you agree:")**_
**WE BELIEVE:** Strong voter ID laws should be mandated nationwide.

**WE BELIEVE:** Building The Wall is the best way to secure our borders.

**WE BELIEVE:** Our schools should educate, not indoctrinate.

**WE BELIEVE:** Every American should stand for our flag.

**WE BELIEVE:** America must never become a socialist country.

**WE BELIEVE:** Sex change surgeries for minors should be banned in all 50 states.

**WE BELIEVE:** Illegal immigrants should never be prioritized over U.S. citizens - especially our veterans.
We fully understand that not everyone agrees with us. The Radical Left is plowing ahead with their plot to make America a socialist country, leave our borders open, and indoctrinate our kids and grandkids.

But no matter how hard they push, we will always hold the line when the future of America hangs in the balance.

_**[My friend, Donald J. Trump, just won Iowa and I can’t wait until he’s inaugurated as our President once again. Do you stand with us? If you believe in the same Conservative principles we do, please don’t hesitate to confirm your support right here and right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38128%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uEML5zDhObPWG6vuUA5P%2bw&sysid=1 "My friend, Donald J.
Trump, just won Iowa and I can’t wait until he’s inaugurated as our President once
again. Do you stand with us? If you believe in the same Conservative principles we
do, please don’t hesitate to confirm your support right here and right now.")**_

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38129%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=arc4lfM1PucoGIvHZK1okg&sysid=1 "Stand with Trump and House Republicans!")
---
| | | [CONFIRM HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38120%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iYtinbX85VzfJa%2bzLv8cYA&sysid=1 "CONFIRM HERE")
---
The Radical Left thinks they speak for the American People. They believe everyone thinks the same way they do...

NOTHING could be further from the truth. And I have a hunch you’d agree with me.

President Trump won Iowa and I look forward to supporting him all the way to the White House and delivering a Conservative House Majority he can be proud of.

_**[Are you with us? Please confirm your support ASAP using any of these secure links.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38121%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IdQ7HXARxDnTTdh2zP7GgA&sysid=1 "Are you with us? Please
confirm your support ASAP using any of these secure links.")**_

Together - you, me, and President Trump - we’re going to make history.

For America,
Steve Scalise

---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38123%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rYVSEgLXw7vrjjB8m0kuow&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our team fought back against everything they threw at us last night. In spite of it all, we've got our ticket punched out of Iowa and we're moving forward!
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d72974fb9958909f10877b9baa58faac476da85407aacbdb8f9bf467af9506ae28040833f38b0c660eb450f0edcf092ea96)
---
Friend, If you saw what happened at the Iowa caucuses last night, you saw an egregious act of election interference. **They've been writing our obituary for months, and last night, they called the election before even 2% of the votes were in. Despite what they've tried to tell you, this election is YOUR CHOICE, not the media's.** Members of our team filed out when reports went out from media sources because they were told their voices and their votes would not matter. That is not the foundation of a democracy we were built on, friend. Even though the media has continued to throw everything but the kitchen sink at us, and our opponents spent almost $50 million attacking us, **we shattered expectations and got our ticket punched out of Iowa.** All we have been able to achieve is thanks to your support. And now is the time for us to continue looking forward and keep working hard. **[Help my team get ready for the New Hampshire and South Carolina primaries by chipping in $15 today!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d726544ddba12dc4cdd5b281156981f51146255d1103c546d8f6e8083a9cd877ef4c6e2d5b4dd7668dd30bcecd249095f47)** I KNOW that this team is made up of hardworking, God-fearing, patriotic people. Our supporters are the ones showing up to FIGHT to reverse the madness that's spread across our country. Those are our marching orders. If we continue to work hard and keep the faith we have in restoring America's future, we will reverse this decline that the Left has rained down and bring back the sanity that our kids deserve. _But we are counting on our team to continue to drive us forward._ **_We have a lot of work to do, but I can tell you this: as the next President of the United States, I am going to get the job done for this country. I will not let you down._**
---
| | [Chip in what you can!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d72974fb9958909f10877b9baa58faac476da85407aacbdb8f9bf467af9506ae28040833f38b0c660eb450f0edcf092ea96)
---
We thank you for your support thus far, and know we have a long battle ahead. We are going to get this done. God bless you,
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d72974fb9958909f10877b9baa58faac476da85407aacbdb8f9bf467af9506ae28040833f38b0c660eb450f0edcf092ea96)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d72974fb9958909f10877b9baa58faac476da85407aacbdb8f9bf467af9506ae28040833f38b0c660eb450f0edcf092ea96)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d721cdec00e7e847c47357ee32fe25eb4b0ff9210fc5fe1e890fb4a77a95a6edfeb4b9bb16f7e98480ca7246cbbf9a96195 "here.")**

---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d72f0a286c37420043ee86801aa9498b07f506048464e365d114bcb630bc52348009c3597c2266c3da1ef6d25481d5acfc3)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d72974fb9958909f10877b9baa58faac476da85407aacbdb8f9bf467af9506ae28040833f38b0c660eb450f0edcf092ea96)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6b6fe089f8fa4d72974fb9958909f10877b9baa58faac476da85407aacbdb8f9bf467af9506ae28040833f38b0c660eb450f0edcf092ea96)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong
# And Here's Why>>

Asked whether we're on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

"Am I worried about this? Absolutely not."

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what's happening to the US Dollar is not something you should "keep an eye on"...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.
