body:
Sadly, this is causing students to fall behind in their education.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9941596098c41d99384c860f1be19aa&_e=uJz-o_tIuqDiSkiB2dVX0yZ8saQDshOpy_VgvMEonEYCwbsfhTIg36fH4cbVv_kg8N3FPC7tmufrlF-EHGVG-i-ixzIOdk1zA8es7JvKygW263_2Vq2xbkjG3RKwOBgYEk2Fi8-yV0jUk30SnMYvRNK06pThQLkM59_T-FICj34eG94LiTfgST3F7eGPOxbOT2nZiJ1mgLli17wfg-yMOYhPu_U2goBTTb-ynaS5xgMiPult97w3A7HtN827p-QXOfXKWkhe61UZjUub2Eif_LyhaEve_f8Yye6f7bY54hY%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

Public schools are often more focused on indoctrinating students with woke ideas than teaching them the skills they need to succeed.

Sadly, this is causing students to fall behind in their education.
* Only 31% of 8th graders are proficient in reading.
* 30% are "below basic" readers - functionally illiterate
* Only 13% of 8th graders are proficient in American history!

Government schools get a failing grade no matter how you slice the data. If only there was some way for parents to provide their children with an alternative to the dumbed-down indoctrination in public schools.

**Luckily, I have a solution for parents: the Tuttle Twins!**

My name is Connor Boyack, the author of the Tuttle Twins books series. The Tuttle Twins teach children the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government.

Today, especially in the next sixty minutes, I want to reach as many people as I can with this request. I set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Every $10 we raise allows us to send a copy of a Tuttle Twins book to a school, library, or family to help turn the tide of woke indoctrination.

**If that is all you need to hear, please contribute $10 or whatever you can afford using this button:**
[Donate Today](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9941596098c41d99384c860f1be19aa&_e=uJz-o_tIuqDiSkiB2dVX0yZ8saQDshOpy_VgvMEonEYCwbsfhTIg36fH4cbVv_kg8N3FPC7tmufrlF-EHGVG-i-ixzIOdk1zA8es7JvKygW263_2Vq2xbkjG3RKwOBgY9mdj6RB5zNlk9BXQaKMOAGvncJIrUrvuNky8_NCrJWd5C7F88Z2WYvC2GUu7jBItnea1U9P2tl3lA5iaFWAgScA0Fsbs99Ia70W6BdpVvWAXo58x9j__f-fmUpTpxxAPP1PaRWDd9SOaE48HgoO4tNyYHIbS69FpEGpnIov7-xw%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I am asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because every book that finds its way into a public school provides an alternative to woke indoctrination.

$10 because the Tuttle Twins books inspired Jaiden, the kid in Colorado who was kicked out of class for wearing a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack, to stand up for his beliefs.
$10 because these books are creating a new generation of kids who are excited about the values of free markets, individual rights, liberty, true history, and personal responsibility.

[$10 because we can distribute a total of 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books this year!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9941596098c41d99384c860f1be19aa&_e=uJz-o_tIuqDiSkiB2dVX0yZ8saQDshOpy_VgvMEonEYCwbsfhTIg36fH4cbVv_kg8N3FPC7tmufrlF-EHGVG-i-ixzIOdk1zA8es7JvKygW263_2Vq2xbkjG3RKwOBgYsKCephvS4Vg0DUdvLoPQUNTFzNWn9BUIUeEHiRPoFqNyqTXLe_gJEzs10RxxMeZ4pafdYQpWIIu2Hv6HBobV3stjIwXbAGK4f3s3d49Gbcax0vtbJWOVIpGU8_QR6ZVmMUlVDLHYGFlVA3hok6gn75E30QRJkVh0nK8hmR_FxYc%3D)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9941596098c41d99384c860f1be19aa&_e=uJz-o_tIuqDiSkiB2dVX0yZ8saQDshOpy_VgvMEonEYCwbsfhTIg36fH4cbVv_kg8N3FPC7tmufrlF-EHGVG-i-ixzIOdk1zA8es7JvKygW263_2Vq2xbkjG3RKwOBgYTTqW4TdipUXXTOWq4Lf_JEqXoBgWq61fVu0TXxRasj14JRKW0TJPmhtd_IImi4nMojRmfrtg5ZHP_zWbx2zB1qERcXE1Q8-R-lN57F06dvvqsE7ajZBfDUc3cndpYC62OWOcVtxlDRIGBol1q1K7VTk0-D0ZMcu31IMUJEZY0yI%3D)

Friend - we're conducting a survey and we need our Republican
representatives to weigh in. We're looking to YOU to gather input
on the impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden. Can you complete our
critical survey as soon as you get a minute?

Thank you,

Official DeSantis Survey Team

--------Forwarded Message--------

From: Official DeSantis Survey Team

Subject: Impeachment Questionnaire*

Friend,

We're reaching out to the team to hear your thoughts on the
impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden. Where do you stand on each of
these issues?

Impeachment Questionnaire

Click 🔲 to respond

🔲 Do you believe Joe Biden has colluded with Hunter Biden?

🔲 Do you think Joe Biden's actions are worthy of impeachment?

🔲 Do you believe Congress should pursue impeaching Joe Biden?

🔲 Do you think Joe Biden has committed criminal acts against
the American people?

🔲 Do you believe Joe Biden should continue to represent the
United States of America?

We
need your answers, Friend. Please respond today and let us know
where you stand.

Thanks,

DeSantis Survey Team

Contribution rules

body:
And ‘I Was A Little Surprised’: Voters React To Vivek Ramaswamy Suspending Campaign After Iowa Loss

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680449%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f5DelJwCt7rN6mTDOT0l5Q&sysid=1 ‘The Earliest I Can Remember’: Jake Tapper Appears Shocked At How Fast His Own Network Called Trump Victory In Iowa

CNN host Jake Tapper seemed stunned when the network called former President Donald Trump’s victory in Iowa Monday evening less than an hour into the Iowa caucuses.

DES MOINES, Iowa Vivek Ramaswamy suspended his campaign after coming in fourth at the Iowa caucuses Monday night, and voters told the Daily Caller News Foundation that they were disappointed the former business mogul didn’t “push forward.”

Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is cozying up to Wall Street leaders at the World Economic Forum’s conference in Davos, Bloomberg reported on Tuesday. Zelenskyy engaged in discussions with JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon, Blackstone CEO Stephen Schwarzman and Bridgewater Associates Founder Ray Dalio on Tuesday, according to Bloomberg. name: Team Kennedy
subject: What Does It Cost To Win The Presidency?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now.

|
---
| | | **Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_16_24_email1rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Many experts are predicting that the candidates for president this year will spend $2 billion apiece to get themselves elected.
It seems that’s what it costs to convince people that you are the lesser of two evils.
But what will it cost a genuinely likable candidate like RFK Jr.? What does it cost if you’re actually discussing the issues people care about instead of slinging mud at your opponents?
That's where we come in.
Against all odds, our campaign has already made remarkable progress, having spent only around $15 million.
We’re leading both former presidents in all Americans under 45, leading with independents, and, in the battleground states, we’re just 10 points behind the two billion-dollar men.
We simply need to pull about 5 percent from each of them to secure victory.
Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now. While the media focuses on the staggering sums raised by others, we know that true power lies in the people.
**It's not about the billions;** **_it's about 100% participation from people just like you._**
**So, I humbly request that you donate now.** [**Join the ranks of the individuals who have already given $5, $10, or $24.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_16_24_email1rs_1_nd&n=2)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_16_24_email1rs_1_nd&n=9)
Every donation, big or small, matters and contributes to the groundswell of support that will propel us forward on the path to victory.
Your generosity sends a powerful message, not just to the opposition but to the world: that real change can be achieved through the collective spirit of passionate individuals like yourself.
**Remember, it's not about the billions we don't have; it's about the power of unity and the strength of your belief in our shared vision.**
_Together, we will defy expectations and herald in a new era of positive change for our great nation._
Thank you,
Team Kennedy

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: TRUMP is the right man for the job.

| |

---
| | | _BREAKING: TRUMP WINS IOWA _
**This is my first time emailing you since President Trump WON the Iowa Caucuses.**

I've said it before and I'll say it again: _TRUMP is the right man for the job._

Joe Biden can't hold a candle to the winning message of our America First movement. Even though he just bragged about having more money in his warchest than any Democrat in American history, he is failing and Conservatives are WINNING on the issues.

_**[President Trump and I share a vision for the future of America- and now that he's won Iowa, I'd like to know if you agree:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z26hnec80g87nqgg11iv1vs1gq02dv8u35g851g0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5h61p32chh2bs "President Trump and I share a vision for the future of America – and now that he’s won Iowa, I’d like to know if you agree:")**_
**WE BELIEVE:** Strong voter ID laws should be mandated nationwide.

**WE BELIEVE:** Building The Wall is the best way to secure our borders.

**WE BELIEVE:** Our schools should educate, not indoctrinate.

**WE BELIEVE:** Every American should stand for our flag.

**WE BELIEVE:** America must never become a socialist country.

**WE BELIEVE:** Sex change surgeries for minors should be banned in all 50 states.

**WE BELIEVE:** Illegal immigrants should never be prioritized over U.S. citizens - especially our veterans.
We fully understand that not everyone agrees with us. The Radical Left is plowing ahead with their plot to make America a socialist country, leave our borders open, and indoctrinate our kids and grandkids.

But no matter how hard they push, we will always hold the line when the future of America hangs in the balance.

_**[My friend, Donald J. Trump, just won Iowa and I can't wait until he's inaugurated as our President once again. Do you stand with us? If you believe in the same Conservative principles we do, please don't hesitate to confirm your support right here and right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0pg7t2a0im8o1pr0pgqg2jap1a82rkjvqihr0v0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5h61p32chh2bs "My friend, Donald J. Trump, just won Iowa and I can’t wait until he’s inaugurated as our President once again. Do you stand with us? If you believe in the same Conservative principles we do, please don’t hesitate to confirm your support right here and right now.")**_

The Radical Left thinks they speak for the American People. They believe everyone thinks the same way they do...

NOTHING could be further from the truth. And I have a hunch you'd agree with me.

President Trump won Iowa and I look forward to supporting him all the way to the White House and delivering a Conservative House Majority he can be proud of.

_**[Are you with us? Please confirm your support ASAP using any of these secure links.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2urr1enst24r0osj5m7thk8iujtp5pujg3asuu0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5h61p32chh2bs "Are you with us? Please confirm your support ASAP using any of these secure links.")**_

Steve Scalise

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juan=20Ciscomani?=
subject: It's about you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=5e9aaa3677&e=659fba240e)
---
| | Hi friend, Juan here!

It's the honor of a lifetime to serve you in Congress and represent our community.

As we look towards 2024, I'm reaching out to ask for your continued support. Our journey together has been remarkable, but there's still much to achieve for our community and #AZ06.
**[I'm excited to share our latest campaign video with you! Watch and share with your friends and neighbors – let’s keep our momentum going strong.](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=1b954e07cb&e=659fba240e)** [****](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=b293a051a5&e=659fba240e) Here's what I’m fighting for:
* A secure border and the rule of law.
* A thriving economy with more jobs and lower taxes.
* Fighting back on the record inflation we are seeing due to Washington’s failed policies.
* Honoring the contributions of our seniors and veterans, ensuring they receive the respect, care and benefits they deserve
* Holding the Biden administration accountable to the American people.
* And getting things done and representing you in the face of Washington being completely broken.

**To officially launch our 2024 campaign, we need your help.****[Please sign our petition to get on the ballot.](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=6fb042e58f&e=659fba240e)****Every signature counts – be sure to forward to friends and family! ** Thank you for your unwavering support, I’m deeply grateful you’re on this journey with me, Laura and our whole family. Your friend,
Juan
P.S. You can also support my campaign by donating **[HERE](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=81ad98eb35&e=659fba240e)** – every dollar counts to reaching every voter across our district. Thank you again for your support!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY ()
body:
2024 the year of The People

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12674182?e=25844e23a8)
https://ne.gop/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=77b359ad34-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-77b359ad34-21732365

** Good Morning Republicans,
------------------------------------------------------------
Last night was the Iowa Caucus, known as the First In The Nation #FITN, an election process to determine who Iowans want for the Republican Presidential Nominee. New Hampshire will be up next on January 23rd. Then it's Nevada on Feb. 8th as well was the Virgin Islands. Each of the 50 States and 6 Territories have an election process and are referred to as a Caucus or Primary. The State GOP's have established an election process for President of the United States and submitted that plan called a 16F plan to the Republican National Committee (RNC). Most Presidential Primaries are timed with other state races such as in Nebraska where our Primary is May 14th. For a complete list of each state's Presidential election date see HERE (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-primary-elections/calendar?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=77b359ad34-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-77b359ad34-21732365) .

As you will see, Nebraska's Primary to determine our Presidential nominee is about 40th in the Nation. Not quite as exciting as the #FITN, 1st in the nation. #40ITN probably won't become a trendy hashtag.

So, does that mean our Primary is of little to no consequence?

Absolutely NOT.

Our May 14th Primary is where Nebraska Republicans can set the stage for a November 5th, General Election BOLD statement. Remember, remember the 5th of November. How appropriate for this year, no?

On May 14th, if enough Republicans believe in the process, if enough Republicans join forces and bring their time, talents, and treasures to county parties and candidates, if enough Republicans say ENOUGH is enough with status quo politics...then you will truly see something unprecedented. Something historical.

YOU will be a part of history and will have altered the future of Republican politics in Nebraska forever.

However, to get to November 5 or even May 14, we have to understand earlier dates of importance. Starting with March 1st (https://sos.nebraska.gov/sites/sos.nebraska.gov/files/doc/elections/2024/2024%20Election%20Calendar.pdf?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=77b359ad34-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-77b359ad34-21732365) . Friday, March 1st will be the filing deadline for candidates to ALL offices (https://sos.nebraska.gov/sites/sos.nebraska.gov/files/doc/2024%20Elected%20Offices%20and%20Maps.pdf?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=77b359ad34-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-77b359ad34-21732365) from Senate to School Board. If you've ever considered running for an elected office, 2024 is the year because the volume of The People is greater than ever before.

2024 is the year because the stability within each county party is GREATER than ever before.

Let me answer the most simple questions out there...Why does a Political Party even exist?
Whom does an elected representative, whether a Chairman or a Governor, do all the work FOR?

We do it for people. All...the...People.
The source of any government's authority is “the consent of the governed.” This means that the government is NOT the ruler, but the servant or agent of the citizens; it means that the government as such, has no rights except the rights delegated to it by the citizens for a specific purpose.

For a political party, the same source of values is derived...from the people. At the very core of a party's governance is a county or political subdivision position called a DELEGATE. These delegates signup every two years to be a voice for others (or maybe just themselves). Regardless, they choose to participate in the county organizational structure known as a County Convention at which the governing body follows a set of rules and procedures to elect smaller subgroups called a Central Committee and an Executive Committee. Show up & Know the Rules. You can't know the rules if you don't show up!

March 1st is the filing deadline for becoming a county delegate (https://sos.nebraska.gov/sites/sos.nebraska.gov/files/doc/elections/2024/County%20Convention%20Delegate%20Form%202024.pdf?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=77b359ad34-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-77b359ad34-21732365) . See the form below and connect with your county party so your voice can make a difference.

https://sos.nebraska.gov/sites/sos.nebraska.gov/files/doc/elections/2024/County%20Convention%20Delegate%20Form%202024.pdf?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=77b359ad34-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-77b359ad34-21732365
At the county level, once the delegates have conducted their business, the Central and Executive Committee take the reins and are supposed to achieve the objectives of the party. The county Central Committee can meet as frequently as determined in the County Constitution but they are to meet for a purpose. The purpose is to set standards and create stability of the organization so Republicans, and those considering becoming Republicans, can see the professionalism, stability, and organization to further the principles within the community. The Central Committee can amend constitutions, draft and adopt resolutions, publicly endorse candidates, elect Executive Officers, approve budgets, and support additional committees to further the objectives.

If you'll notice so far, the purpose of the party has little to do with elected officials and should be devoid of personalities. The organizational foundation of a party HAS to be built FIRST or people simply won't participate.

The Executive Committee of each County comprised usually of a Chair, Vice-Chair, Secretary, and Treasurer, can now implement and facilitate the objectives of the party because they have a framework from which to operate. The connecting of the values of the party to the voters in the county can commence through events and meetings, training, candidate recruitment and development, parades, and of course, fundraising.

All we need next is candidates and elected representatives who will do the same, connect the values of the party to the voters. In the next email we will dive further into party formation and how that translates to the State level SCC (State Central Committee) and even on to the RNC (Republican National Committee).

It's time to get involved.
It's time to join your county party.
It's time to see the stability that is the NEW Republican Party of Nebraska
It's time for you to make a difference.

The truth shall set us free.

Blessings,
–Chairman Underwood
Donate (https://ne.gop/donate/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=77b359ad34-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-77b359ad34-21732365)

** County & Candidate Spotlight
------------------------------------------------------------

{"County & Candidate Spotlight" is an informational component of this newsletter ONLY in an effort to expand Republican relationships to our membership. "C&CS" is not a paid advertisement. "C&CS" is not an indication of financial support to any officers, governing bodies, or entities of the NEGOP. Any county's endorsement of candidates at any time are NOT subsequent endorsements by the governing bodies of the NEGOP. The order of content is based on first come and attempted to maintain chronological order to the upcoming week's events.}

name: Steve Scalise
subject: BREAKING: Trump wins Iowa!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: TRUMP is the right man for the job.

| |

---
| | | _BREAKING: TRUMP WINS IOWA _
**This is my first time emailing you since President Trump WON the Iowa Caucuses.**

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: _TRUMP is the right man for the job._

Joe Biden can’t hold a candle to the winning message of our America First movement. Even though he just bragged about having more money in his warchest than any Democrat in American history, he is failing and Conservatives are WINNING on the issues.

_**[President Trump and I share a vision for the future of America- and now that he’s won Iowa, I’d like to know if you agree:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681550%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EgwR4w27IQDmqT9V0E%2f79g&sysid=1 "President Trump and I
share a vision for the future of America – and now that he’s won Iowa, I’d
like to know if you agree:")**_
**WE BELIEVE:** Strong voter ID laws should be mandated nationwide.

**WE BELIEVE:** Building The Wall is the best way to secure our borders.

**WE BELIEVE:** Our schools should educate, not indoctrinate.

**WE BELIEVE:** Every American should stand for our flag.

**WE BELIEVE:** America must never become a socialist country.

**WE BELIEVE:** Sex change surgeries for minors should be banned in all 50 states.

**WE BELIEVE:** Illegal immigrants should never be prioritized over U.S. citizens - especially our veterans.
We fully understand that not everyone agrees with us. The Radical Left is plowing ahead with their plot to make America a socialist country, leave our borders open, and indoctrinate our kids and grandkids.

But no matter how hard they push, we will always hold the line when the future of America hangs in the balance.

_**[My friend, Donald J. Trump, just won Iowa and I can’t wait until he’s inaugurated as our President once again. Do you stand with us? If you believe in the same Conservative principles we do, please don’t hesitate to confirm your support right here and right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681551%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xk0PleypTQxQun21BfyZmA&sysid=1 "My friend, Donald J.
Trump, just won Iowa and I can’t wait until he’s inaugurated as our President once
again. Do you stand with us? If you believe in the same Conservative principles we
do, please don’t hesitate to confirm your support right here and right now.")**_

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681552%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NVRzvjx7qLgXaYPtuJMTMA&sysid=1 "Stand with Trump and House Republicans!")
---
| | | [CONFIRM HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681553%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uFckv3yZLoSUakklV1hf8A&sysid=1 "CONFIRM HERE")
---
The Radical Left thinks they speak for the American People. They believe everyone thinks the same way they do...

NOTHING could be further from the truth. And I have a hunch you’d agree with me.

President Trump won Iowa and I look forward to supporting him all the way to the White House and delivering a Conservative House Majority he can be proud of.

_**[Are you with us? Please confirm your support ASAP using any of these secure links.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681554%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6rZxlBM32A889PcgmaNcvw&sysid=1 "Are you with us? Please
confirm your support ASAP using any of these secure links.")**_

Together - you, me, and President Trump - we’re going to make history.

For America,
Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681565%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EJASNtNFCrGHgm7ty%2fSBbQ&sysid=1 "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681566%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zoavx37s3PLTokcwPum5mA&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_
---
| | | [BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/majority-leader-survey-footer/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20240116_WG-AUN.102418_t1435539-1756&ex_tid=20240116_WG-AUN.102418_t1435539-1756&utm_content=tv-au-20240116&xunv=tv-au-20240116 "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>")

subject: RESPONSE NEEDED: Will you vote for President Biden in 2024?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
we urgently need to know how many Democrats are standing united behind President Biden in the fight against GOP extremism
| | |
---
| | **_NBC News: _**
**"Early Biden vs. Trump polls signal ‘very competitive’ 2024 general election"**
---
Team Murray set a goal to get

subject: Another reason NOT to own an EV
body:
Another reason NOT to own an EV | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/783ed3897ef6/conforti-for-congress-8394508?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

As EV owners are learning - they don't work in the cold!!

Not only is driving range reduced, but the lithium batteries have a hard time starting, and even keeping their charge, in cold weather. And once you get to the charging station, often the cables are frozen themselves, making it difficult to even charge your car.

As the video from Channel 2 News shows, people in the 6th District were waiting in line for 5+ hours and then spending another 2 hours charging - only to have to return and charge again the same day.

[Click Here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=86e3cce791&e=25f4fa3311) to see the video.

Sean Casten is pushing EVs on the American people, and they are nothing more than a huge hassle in this area. Who has time to spend all day charging and re-charging their cars!!

As an Energy Consultant, I understand the importance of energy independence and achieving green initiatives in a beneficial manner. Once in Congress, I push a multi-pronged approach that supports the American people - not hurts them.

Stay Safe! Stay Strong!

If you'd like to support Conforti for Congress, you can click the link below.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=f45a468f62&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---

As our ad makes clear, Kyrsten Sinema took MILLIONS from Wall Street while protecting BILLIONS in special tax loopholes for them — and then she used their campaign contributions to foot the bill for luxury travel, fancy meals, and visits to wineries.

Meanwhile, she stood in the way of things that would actually help working Arizonans, like the minimum wage, the expanded Child Tax Credit, and lower drug prices. She also blocked abortion rights, voting rights, and more as part of “dealmaking” efforts with Republicans.
That’s why we’re holding her accountable in this campaign and with this TV ad. We need to make sure that Kyrsten Sinema’s days in office are OVER. And we also need to help Ruben Gallego win this seat and make sure that Democrats keep the U.S. Senate.
**_[Can we count on you to help keep our TV ad on the air, spread the word about Sinema’s corruption, and make sure Democrats hold onto the Senate? Every donation no matter how big or small makes a direct impact.>>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wt06PgJutgm8TI_9eKAlrSzZxOp636Am_fo7VSt4TuubyPpSjnU9WYZf01Kk0SwKVgnzW-RIM4cbo5VJvdaVfNmYA0LlMjN_Qou6fFOc6gAx36Uu0QRI8HQO-77_OC4dtxHrmB37w5kp0nqpSDazxoBYkF9GTSMJnW5nay81rhkUmR12Fw_nNQLHn50o9xrtn0P4i8Q7giLJ6H_ZftAsSR1ZwQ-qVXgTvtC8xLjRd9M3_cnqg-1yqkxXEr2d6u13d84nq6CxMvu6MFh0y-kiDejzXgq77Ae45QuqSTkg9X4ChHRZiWqxPEWhqjdu91KQIPzxRoUkwXedYqPs_w53hjkm01SZqSVivh69CMg4aWg3wcvzUGkdwxuglT_gdqmlU/431/-OcPZwqRRSKjdaF8s3D-ag/h8/bg2tbbm9sWrUAz3nHezNguo8NJKgzbAhoLUYa_L3FUo)_**
Thanks for all you’re doing,
Change for Arizona 2024 PAC & the Replace Sinema campaign

name: The Colonel
subject: I have to push back on this.
disclaimer_text: paid for and fielded
body:
Peter,

This is disturbing. Very disturbing, in fact.

One of my opponents is pushing a false narrative, misleading poll, and just blatant spin about some poll his campaign paid for and fielded. Of course, it says he's winning.

He's not. He won't. We are going to win this race and be the next congressman of the 6th Congressional District, and here is why:

_I 'm Christian Castelli, former Lieutenant Colonel in the U.S. Army, decorated Green Beret combat veteran, Inspector General and senior advisor at the Pentagon. I know what it's like to fight, and will never walk away from defending our conservative values. I will never promote a misleading narrative or poll because, simply put, integrity matters._

_I need your help to push back on the turbo-spin my opponent is pushing._

**Please make a donation of $500, $250, $100, $50, $35 or whatever you can to help stop the lies. Let 's send a conservative Green Beret to Congress.**

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

I'm a conservative who comes from a law enforcement and military family. [I wore a uniform](https://castellifornc.com/about/) throughout my career. I fought for our values then, and I am fighting for them now.

I'm not a career politician who abandoned one office so he could climb the career politician ladder. I'm not a Big Insurance lobbyist representing corporate special interests. And I don't have trust fund.

This election is too important to send the wrong person to Congress. If you want to eliminate wasteful spending and inflation, secure the border, and restore America's global reputation, I am your candidate.

**I 'm am on a mission. I will win. But I need your help to embark on a new conservative revolution. Please make a donation of $500, $250, $100, $50, $35 or whatever you can afford. **

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

****

Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives
(336) 810-8100

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=0075237f-83ab-4f3e-9077-a36331cbfdf9).

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In 2024, Arizona’s Senate campaign will end up being one of the most expensive in the country.
#

Peter:
In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to make your first online donation to my campaign here in Arizona. I’m hoping you’ll make it before our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important, on today of all days.
In 2020, Arizona’s Senate campaign was one of the most expensive in the country. In 2022, Arizona’s Senate campaign was one of the most expensive in the country, again. And in 2024, Arizona’s Senate campaign will end up being one of the most expensive in the country.
The only difference between those first two campaigns and this one is that we are raising less than they did. It’s hard to tell why. **But what isn’t hard to tell is that we are in trouble if it keeps up.**
If it does, we won’t be able to go toe to toe with Kari Lake. We won’t have the resources we need to fight off the Super PACs and outside groups that are going to throw millions of dollars in attacks against us.
If we can’t do that, we’ll see more polls showing us falling behind. If we keep missing our goals, it will become harder and harder to catch up. And if that all happens, we might lose. Really.
That is why this mid-month deadline is so important. Because this race is only getting tougher, and we’re slipping behind in our fundraising.
So I am asking you, respectfully, to help:
[**Make a $3 contribution before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight tonight. Please. I wouldn’t be asking you if this wasn’t important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=1&akid=1736%2E734936%2ELeoIV5)

clean_body: In 2024, Arizona’s Senate campaign will end up being one of the most expensive in the country. Peter: In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to make your first online donation to my campaign here in Arizona. I’m hoping you’ll make it before our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important, on today of all days. In 2020, Arizona’s Senate campaign was one of the most expensive in the country. In 2022, Arizona’s Senate campaign was one of the most expensive in the country, again. And in 2024, Arizona’s Senate campaign will end up being one of the most expensive in the country. The only difference between those first two campaigns and this one is that we are raising less than they did. It’s hard to tell why. But what isn’t hard to tell is that we are in trouble if it keeps up. If it does, we won’t be able to go toe to toe with Kari Lake. We won’t have the resources we need to fight off the Super PACs and outside groups that are going to throw millions of dollars in attacks against us. If we can’t do that, we’ll see more polls showing us falling behind. If we keep missing our goals, it will become harder and harder to catch up. And if that all happens, we might lose. Really. That is why this mid-month deadline is so important. Because this race is only getting tougher, and we’re slipping behind in our fundraising. So I am asking you, respectfully, to help: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks in advance. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: We can’t let Donald Trump take back the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If Trump takes back the White House this November, it will put all of our progress in jeopardy.
#

Team,
Last night, Donald Trump won the Iowa caucuses, putting him one step closer to becoming the 2024 Republican presidential nominee.
If Donald Trump takes back the White House this November, it will put all of the progress we’ve made to change our gun laws in jeopardy.
During Trump’s presidency, gun homicides spiked 34 percent. He campaigned with a promise to enact universal background checks in the 2020 presidential race. But instead, he spent his time in the Oval Office prioritizing the gun lobby’s wishes over the safety of our communities.
Just this month, he told victims of a shooting in Iowa they needed to “get over it.” We know what a second Trump term would look like, and it’s dangerous for our communities. So we need your help to make sure that doesn’t happen:
[**Will you please make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Help us in our work to make sure we reelect President Biden this November.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=1&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan24.FODcFH&amount=3&t=20&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jan24.jVGlch&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=21&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan24.E8Is3B&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=22&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan24.XLE5TP&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=23&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan24.3iptbJ&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=24&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan24.FODcFH&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=25&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK)**
---
****
From signing the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act into law to establishing a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention, President Biden’s action on gun safety speaks volumes.
Let’s make sure he has four more years as president to finish the job.
Thank you for supporting us in this crucial fight,
The team at GIFFORDS
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=26&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7426%2E3935704%2EaTaPAK) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: KAFO Endorses Dave Min
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e7cfa11376af/kafo-endorses-dave-min-15668584?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** January 16, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com) **Korean Americans for Organzing Fund Endorses Sen. Dave Min for CA-47** IRVINE, CA – Today, the Korean Americans for Organizing (KAFO) Fund announced its endorsement of California State Senator Dave Min for U.S. Congress. If elected to the House of Representatives in California’s 47th Congressional District, Min would be the first Korean American Democrat to represent California in Congress. The KAFO Fund Board released the following statement:

**“KAFO Fund is proud to endorse Dave Min in this historic race. If elected, he would become one of two Korean American Democrats serving in the U.S. House of Representatives. Dave is a proven leader in the California State Senate who fights back on anti-Asian hate, keeps families safe, and advocates for women's rights.

As the only Korean American in the California State Legislature, Dave proudly represents one of the largest Asian American and Pacific Islander American communities in our country, which includes a vibrant Korean American community. Dave’s steadfast leadership and Korean American representation is needed in Congress.”**

KAFO Fund’s principal mission is to elect Democratic Korean Ameicans nationally to offices on local, state, and federal levels. To learn more about Dave Min and KAFO Fund, visit [www.kafofund.org](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=180ea7ebb7&e=7017cc100e).

This endorsement continues Senator Min’s incredible momentum in his campaign to keep this seat Blue. Yesterday, [Min received the coveted endorsement of the Los Angeles Times](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=e67fd48442&e=7017cc100e). He is also endorsed by outgoing Rep. Katie Porter, as well as the California Democratic Party, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions, and received the backing of the California Labor Federation. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=22e45e7b5e&e=7017cc100e). ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _

PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616

# Weekly Update: Fundraising Drive & Upcoming Volunteer Events
I hope you are having an amazing 2024 so far. The primary election here in Maryland is only 118 days away. Can you believe it?!?!
We had some wintry weather this weekend here in Frederick. Our first snow day in two years! My ferocious watch dog Annie is loving it, she is such a snow pup. ❄️ 🐶
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=f8b729d349&e=0a12281e0e)
As we dive back into action now in the 2024 year, there's a lot on our plate, and I'm excited to share some upcoming opportunities for involvement and support. We are off to a amazing start!
**Fundraising: Your Support Matters!** Our fundraising efforts are in full swing, and your contribution can make a significant impact. Every donation means less time on the phone for me and more time connecting with voters, understanding their needs, and advocating for our community. Your support drives our campaign forward, inching us closer to our shared goals. Donate today to help get us through the finish line on the May 14th primary!
| [DONATE TODAY!](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=ab8566c1a2&e=0a12281e0e)
---
**Volunteer Event: TOMORROW Wednesday, January 17th 6-8 pm at Mission BBQ in Frederick!**
Join us for our volunteer event this week! It's a chance to meet like-minded individuals, share ideas, and contribute your time and skills to the campaign.
We'll be gathering at Mission BBQ here in Frederick, MD. Our volunteers are amazing and we always have a great time so come join us if you can!
Click the button below to RSVP via facebook so you can get a reminder, or reply back to this email to let us know you are joining us TOMORROW! ⬇️

We are trying to schedule our weekly volunteer events and want to make sure we are rotating areas. Next week we will be in Montgomery County.
We'll be gathering at Mission BBQ in Gaithersburg, MD. Our volunteers are amazing and we always have a great time so come join us if you can!

clean_body: | | | | | | | Weekly Update: Fundraising Drive & Upcoming Volunteer Events I hope you are having an amazing 2024 so far. The primary election here in Maryland is only 118 days away. Can you believe it?!?! We had some wintry weather this weekend here in Frederick. Our first snow day in two years! My ferocious watch dog Annie is loving it, she is such a snow pup. ❄️ 🐶 As we dive back into action now in the 2024 year, there's a lot on our plate, and I'm excited to share some upcoming opportunities for involvement and support. We are off to a amazing start! Fundraising: Your Support Matters! Our fundraising efforts are in full swing, and your contribution can make a significant impact. Every donation means less time on the phone for me and more time connecting with voters, understanding their needs, and advocating for our community. Your support drives our campaign forward, inching us closer to our shared goals. Donate today to help get us through the finish line on the May 14th primary! | Volunteer Event: TOMORROW Wednesday, January 17th 6-8 pm at Mission BBQ in Frederick! Join us for our volunteer event this week! It's a chance to meet like-minded individuals, share ideas, and contribute your time and skills to the campaign. We'll be gathering at Mission BBQ here in Frederick, MD. Our volunteers are amazing and we always have a great time so come join us if you can! Click the button below to RSVP via facebook so you can get a reminder, or reply back to this email to let us know you are joining us TOMORROW! ⬇️ | Volunteer Event Next Week: Wednesday, January 24th 6-8 pm at Mission BBQ in Montgomery County! Click the button below to RSVP via facebook so you can get a reminder, or reply back to this email to let us know you are joining us NEXT WEEK! ⬇️ | We are working extremely hard every day to bring Western Maryland’s voice to D.C in 2024, but I can't do it alone. Your contribution, whether through donations or volunteering, makes a significant difference in our ability to connect with voters and work to FLIP Maryland’s 6th Congressional District this November! We are going to flip Maryland’s 6th District RED this November with your support! name: Team DeSantis
subject: Nikki Haley is afraid to face you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Nikki Haley is refusing to debate in New Hampshire because she's afraid to face her record. She doesn't want to answer the tough questions in front of you because she's scared you'll see right through her. More here.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eceb0b33a0cccde955aecfbb0af5f4b9bf81df25fd53ccce06451fa323590c651eee0671d32e7cd49a8910e3e82c14bfbe776d585e95af82)
---
Friend, You may be wondering why Nikki Haley is trying to pull a Donald Trump and shy away from the CNN debate ahead of the New Hampshire primary. Well, the answer is simple, and Ron DeSantis wants you to know the truth: **_" Nikki Haley is afraid to debate because she doesn't want to answer the tough questions such as how she got rich off Boeing after giving them millions in taxpayer handouts as governor of South Carolina. The reality is that she is not running for the nomination, she's running to be Trump's VP. I won't snub New Hampshire voters like both Nikki Haley and Donald Trump, and plan to honor my commitments. I look forward to debating two empty podiums in the Granite State this week." -- Ron DeSantis_** No one deserving of your vote would hide away and refuse to own up to their record on national television. Ron DeSantis is the only candidate in this race willing to _earn_ your support. He will continue to stand firm in his record and his convictions despite every other candidate shying away. If you'd like to send in your support for the one candidate who is actually fighting for you--and will do so for EIGHT YEARS STRAIGHT in the White House-- we would appreciate your support before we take on the New Hampshire and South Carolina primaries.
---
| | [>> Donate $20 <<](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eceb0b33a0cccde93ee54c628c806faf61c86d89d0f9bf91c06a9c166a582299060c3504a4d8a7f98c579cdfc25ceb89c2fe96216734a6f8)
---
We are counting on your help to defeat the candidates who refuse to put you first. This is YOUR voice, your vote, and your future on the line, friend. Ron DeSantis understands that _earning_ your support is what matters most. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eceb0b33a0cccde955aecfbb0af5f4b9bf81df25fd53ccce06451fa323590c651eee0671d32e7cd49a8910e3e82c14bfbe776d585e95af82)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eceb0b33a0cccde923e9ee367edfaf420c46a6ad113ab1819b417ebb0ededb974abfd279473897554dc7a4e158a2b014f3b6368517e42b60 "here.")**

---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eceb0b33a0cccde9fb413aa4ca152472eccd81fea3382f38eadd0775ab00c58bb605e5743db407e72bd6c95e26ed1311c091c3aeaeed61c0)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eceb0b33a0cccde955aecfbb0af5f4b9bf81df25fd53ccce06451fa323590c651eee0671d32e7cd49a8910e3e82c14bfbe776d585e95af82)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eceb0b33a0cccde955aecfbb0af5f4b9bf81df25fd53ccce06451fa323590c651eee0671d32e7cd49a8910e3e82c14bfbe776d585e95af82)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Mom stands up to state-sanctioned discrimination
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | |
# [The state of Oregon wants to exclude people of faith from adopting or fostering. ](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDE2LWE5ZjljMTAxODQxNDQ3MTE5ZTE0Y2QwMWFlNDBjMWI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ3Y0czdtcGNkMD9zcmM9TExPNDU2NTcifQ/NoXZs-0Dxi7V2NdEYv9k9Q)
---
| | [SIGN THE STATEMENT](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDE2LWE5ZjljMTAxODQxNDQ3MTE5ZTE0Y2QwMWFlNDBjMWI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ3Y0czdtcGNkMD9zcmM9TExPNDU2NTcifQ/SCzDrcypSwGkGAw7YemOcA)
---
Friend,
Some stories are simply hard to believe. Yet Jessica Bates’s story isn’t fiction.
Jessica is a Christian and a mom of five children. A few years ago, she and her late husband were in a car crash. Her husband died.
After hearing a radio broadcast from Focus on the Family, Jessica knew the Lord was calling her to adopt children in need. She desires to open her home to children, specifically a sibling pair who need a family to call their own.
_**But the State of Oregon is excluding her from adopting or fostering.**_
| | [Sign Now](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDE2LWE5ZjljMTAxODQxNDQ3MTE5ZTE0Y2QwMWFlNDBjMWI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ3Y0czdtcGNkMD9zcmM9TExPNDU2NTcifQ/2bXaTUO_aESORtjLaKdbQQ)
---
Jessica is asking only for the chance to serve others and access a state program on an equal playing field. This is something the Constitution demands.

But Oregon disagrees.

In fact, the Oregon Department of Human Services rules state that anyone seeking to adopt must set aside their biblical beliefs to promote contrary views on gender and sexuality.

This means parents must agree to tell boys they can be girls and girls they can be boys, take children to events like _Pride parades_ , and facilitate a child’s access to interventions like _puberty blockers_ and _hormone shots_ that block a child’s natural biological development.

_**But Jessica wants to lovingly care for and accept children in need without contradicting her Christian faith.**_ Oregon says that is not an option. But do the children in Oregon’s system agree?

Oregon is refusing to allow people of faith with religiously informed views on gender and sexuality to adopt or to provide foster care, even if they seek to care for infants and newborns.

It’s a blatant act of religious discrimination.
| | [TELL JESSICA YOU’RE STANDING WITH HER](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDE2LWE5ZjljMTAxODQxNDQ3MTE5ZTE0Y2QwMWFlNDBjMWI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ3Y0czdtcGNkMD9zcmM9TExPNDU2NTcifQ/47sjSur5qT6vacJAndd-qA)
---
| | | **Last year, the Department reported having nearly 8,000 children touch Oregon’s foster care system. Many of these children are waiting for their forever homes.**
Make no mistake: Oregon officials are keeping children from loving homes to push gender ideology. _This harmful practice must end._
When the government discriminates against people of faith in adoption and foster care, children in need suffer.
That’s why Alliance Defending Freedom is representing Jessica in a lawsuit against Oregon’s Department of Human Services—to stop its religious discrimination and to help give every child a chance to find a loving home.
But the road ahead won’t be easy. Jessica is standing up so that all people of faith can open their doors to the “least of these”. _But we never want her to feel alone in this fight._
[Will you sign our statement of support and let Jessica know that you’re standing with her?](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDE2LWE5ZjljMTAxODQxNDQ3MTE5ZTE0Y2QwMWFlNDBjMWI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjciLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ3Y0czdtcGNkMD9zcmM9TExPNDU2NTcifQ/HGIvT52ySILFQNa-9_HgZA)

---
| | |
---
| | Standing together,
Alliance Defending Freedom
P.S. Christian mother Jessica Bates is not being allowed to adopt in Oregon because she won’t contradict her religious beliefs. clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | | Friend, Some stories are simply hard to believe. Yet Jessica Bates’s story isn’t fiction. Jessica is a Christian and a mom of five children. A few years ago, she and her late husband were in a car crash. Her husband died. After hearing a radio broadcast from Focus on the Family, Jessica knew the Lord was calling her to adopt children in need. She desires to open her home to children, specifically a sibling pair who need a family to call their own. But the State of Oregon is excluding her from adopting or fostering. | | Jessica is asking only for the chance to serve others and access a state program on an equal playing field. This is something the Constitution demands. But Oregon disagrees. In fact, the Oregon Department of Human Services rules state that anyone seeking to adopt must set aside their biblical beliefs to promote contrary views on gender and sexuality. This means parents must agree to tell boys they can be girls and girls they can be boys, take children to events like Pride parades , and facilitate a child’s access to interventions like puberty blockers and hormone shots that block a child’s natural biological development. But Jessica wants to lovingly care for and accept children in need without contradicting her Christian faith. Oregon says that is not an option. But do the children in Oregon’s system agree? Oregon is refusing to allow people of faith with religiously informed views on gender and sexuality to adopt or to provide foster care, even if they seek to care for infants and newborns. It’s a blatant act of religious discrimination. | | | | | Last year, the Department reported having nearly 8,000 children touch Oregon’s foster care system. Many of these children are waiting for their forever homes. Make no mistake: Oregon officials are keeping children from loving homes to push gender ideology. This harmful practice must end. When the government discriminates against people of faith in adoption and foster care, children in need suffer. That’s why Alliance Defending Freedom is representing Jessica in a lawsuit against Oregon’s Department of Human Services—to stop its religious discrimination and to help give every child a chance to find a loving home. But the road ahead won’t be easy. Jessica is standing up so that all people of faith can open their doors to the “least of these”. But we never want her to feel alone in this fight. | | | | | Standing together, Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Christian mother Jessica Bates is not being allowed to adopt in Oregon because she won’t contradict her religious beliefs. for Jessica to let her know that she’s not in this alone. | | | | | | | © 2024 Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA. Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/686bea671576/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6688970?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
**Teichert in the News**
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=134ae7752b&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Monday, January 8th, General Teichert joined [NewsNation](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=0a3df3c9f0&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss the recent Russian strikes against Ukraine. When asked about Russia’s use of North Korean arms in their offensive against Ukraine, the General said, “It shows a sign or a level of desperation from Russia that now they've got to go begging to North Korea, of all places, just to maintain their supplies and their stocks of ammunition. Certainly that's another violation of international law by Putin supporting North Korea, but really it's just a sign of desperation that Russia is struggling to maintain the industrial capacity they need to continue this war.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=13e473f93c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Sunday, January 7th, General Teichert joined John Catsimatidis on the [CATS Roundtable](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e299ee3fde&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss the Houthi attacks in the Middle East and how Iran is behind it all. The General explained of the situation, “When we look at Iran, and the fact that President Obama essentially gave Iran -the largest state sponsor of terrorism in the world- $150 billion to enter into the Nuclear Deal, that just allows them to fund this mischief that is all around the Middle East and that ultimately can bleed out into places like Europe and the United States. And unless we are there and holding their feet to the fire to be responsible individuals or nations within the world stage, and once we demonstrate weakness, then they're just going to use our weakness against us to support these groups even more.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=96f5a6b2cf&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert joined [Cats & Cosby ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=57d64fc9af&e=1b1fb1ad9f)on Tuesday, January 9th to discuss Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin’s hospitalization and the breakdown in Biden’s chain of command. The General stated, “There is rightful concern about our secretary of defense going AWOL and no one knowing about it. It’s leadership and followership 101 that you don't surprise your boss, and you keep your team in sync. And of course, our thoughts and prayers are with Secretary Austin and his prostate cancer, but the administration is lackadaisical and undisciplined in that there's a major break in the chain of command; and no one seems to care and no one knows about it.”
|
---
**ENDORSEMENT ALERT**
Over the weekend, General Teichert was honored to receive endorsements from **John Catsimatidis** , host of the CATS Roundtable, and **Denny Gillem** , host of Frontlines of Freedom.
But wait, there’s more! This week, Delegate Stu Schmidt of Anne Arundel County, Former State Senator Ed Reilly, and Delegate Todd Morgan of Calvert and St. Mary's Counties also added their names to Teichert’s list of endorsers.
Read their full statements [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=3fbe05c8a1&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

When asked about Russia’s use of North Korean arms in their offensive against Ukraine, the General said, “It shows a sign or a level of desperation from Russia that now they've got to go begging to North Korea, of all places, just to maintain their supplies and their stocks of ammunition. Certainly that's another violation of international law by Putin supporting North Korea, but really it's just a sign of desperation that Russia is struggling to maintain the industrial capacity they need to continue this war.” On Sunday, January 7th, General Teichert joined John Catsimatidis on the to discuss the Houthi attacks in the Middle East and how Iran is behind it all. The General explained of the situation, “When we look at Iran, and the fact that President Obama essentially gave Iran -the largest state sponsor of terrorism in the world- $150 billion to enter into the Nuclear Deal, that just allows them to fund this mischief that is all around the Middle East and that ultimately can bleed out into places like Europe and the United States. body:
Long story short? It's not great.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=865%2E791427%2Eu8TFsT)

We wanted to start the day off by sharing a couple of quick updates with you.
✅ **Here's the GOOD NEWS:** Last week, thanks to the incredible support of supporters like you, Ilhan filed an unprecedentedly strong fundraising report with the FEC, and the resources this movement has brought together $5, $25, and $50 at a time has put our campaign in a very strong position to win this race.
❌**Here's the BAD NEWS:** The clock doesn't stop ticking, and with January already well-underway, we're pacing behind where we need to be to keep our momentum up here in 2024. Plus, our average donation has **plummeted** by almost $9 _each_ over the past week.
We know $9 doesn't seem like it'd make a huge difference, but over the course of a month, a quarter, or an entire campaign... it adds up to a lot. _Especially_ when you fund things like we do, relying almost entirely on small-dollar, grassroots donations to keep us going.
Long story short? It's not great. But this movement has come through for Ilhan at times like these before, and we still have time to get back on track.
That's why we're asking:
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to help us close our January fundraising gap today? Every dollar goes a long way toward building the kind of campaign we need to win.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan24.NN5r_X&refcode=em240116-1-t1&t=2&akid=865%2E791427%2Eu8TFsT)**

name: Andy Kim
subject: Trump is a threat to our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Republicans who are still embracing Trump after Jan. 6 and everything he’s done are cowards.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77169570/449591689/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2U3NzAxNi04OGI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-4IP2q28DMqbUjEkY-V1LXige8tlek8nQqa-VvBTco=&emci=3b0e1c30-78b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=83e77016-88b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Last night, Trump won the Iowa Caucus, bringing him one step closer to becoming the GOP's nominee for president. **Let me be very clear when I say this: Republicans who are still embracing Trump after Jan. 6 and everything he's done are cowards.** Our democracy is under threat, and the very same Republicans who have condemned the insurrection are the ones who are still supporting Trump and his MAGA agenda. Trump has been very clear that if he's elected again, he will enact an agenda of revenge, chaos, and destruction of our institutions and democracy. **I know what it takes to win a tough election, and I've stood up to Trump before.** I've won a Trump district TWICE, and have stood up to the Trump administration's efforts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, enact tax cuts for the wealthy, gut abortion access for millions of New Jerseyans, and decimate our democracy. It's up to us to be caretakers for our democracy. That's why I'm running for Senate. [**We need someone who will stand up to the MAGA agenda and defend our democracy, and I'm running to be that Senator. clean_body: Republicans who are still embracing Trump after Jan. 6 and everything he’s done are cowards. | | | | Last night, Trump won the Iowa Caucus, bringing him one step closer to becoming the GOP's nominee for president. Let me be very clear when I say this: Republicans who are still embracing Trump after Jan. 6 and everything he's done are cowards. Our democracy is under threat, and the very same Republicans who have condemned the insurrection are the ones who are still supporting Trump and his MAGA agenda. Trump has been very clear that if he's elected again, he will enact an agenda of revenge, chaos, and destruction of our institutions and democracy. I know what it takes to win a tough election, and I've stood up to Trump before. I've won a Trump district TWICE, and have stood up to the Trump administration's efforts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, enact tax cuts for the wealthy, gut abortion access for millions of New Jerseyans, and decimate our democracy. It's up to us to be caretakers for our democracy. That's why I'm running for Senate. = = We deserve something better. TRUMP WON IA!

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=67b12de969a549e4a7c333bec38ab615&_e=NMlbW9nAjfLmerclZL-DmcHIaF2ysnAO8HGvVaXwRHj7Cyj-gQsyZqaVXx2RlbPh9oaCQU3Ox25ak-ufXPVjsz8zzVEvel0iQ7I3nvlm_toXfO7p7atUWfW6aKGGx6gheCIqQOY8xD6pqIJDBpw1h93fvQ7IF94Ph_HRkmKRSQbVObtbwCy60yLIvBxoJcW1C95MMlMYu1iB7OHFBgjWX3s0Tz6ARSa47QmAyB4OXHU3VsATLMIdB_R9PYrtyUv3Sm5tArNy4xj1nIEqtiwj8KVS2T-PprP15R_Y1iL_2CHW4LF1fnAsfnHQZp1TFfMy07zZAxVtRgs5iPFxdAxA_dtwVt82AyQPqXFLL25nlbtR0RONBJ4Y3wRyqDS-ZguBQoSZUzRmPV7V459y5UGop5Aj4H1q9vrLGNhAaoXL1nE%3D)

Friend, JD Vance here.

I wanted to make sure you were the first to see: PRESIDENT TRUMP WON THE IOWA CAUCUS!

This is the first step on his journey back to the White House, and great news to all MAGA patriots across America. But the journey is just beginning. We need to support President Trump, and we need to make sure he has the support he needs to Take Back the White House.

Now, I need to know one thing: **[will you be sticking with Trump Conservatives the rest of the way?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=67b12de969a549e4a7c333bec38ab615&_e=NMlbW9nAjfLmerclZL-DmcHIaF2ysnAO8HGvVaXwRHj7Cyj-gQsyZqaVXx2RlbPh9oaCQU3Ox25ak-ufXPVjsz8zzVEvel0iQ7I3nvlm_toXfO7p7atUWfW6aKGGx6gheCIqQOY8xD6pqIJDBpw1h93fvQ7IF94Ph_HRkmKRSQbVObtbwCy60yLIvBxoJcW1C95MMlMYu1iB7OHFBgjWX3s0Tz6ARSa47QmAyB4OXHU3VsATLMIdB_R9PYrtyUv3-VOykrMNJLuthwie-SrrodFgcRG68uJoZq4O7k-sxP6NkGDY0YNh0iA4vcp0230-WVWVClUkAACgzEuZDas4wmd7BIuY2JkKpPJ442Sngb74fLW-h90GJOCQsUrK3dlvhzpeuNY1gBZtzb_WV_D_iJzb3xjKWi4tqce-QTMprGs%3D)** November is less than a year from now and this election will be the most consequential for years to come. | [**I’M WITH TRUMP**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=67b12de969a549e4a7c333bec38ab615&_e=NMlbW9nAjfLmerclZL-DmcHIaF2ysnAO8HGvVaXwRHj7Cyj-gQsyZqaVXx2RlbPh9oaCQU3Ox25ak-ufXPVjsz8zzVEvel0iQ7I3nvlm_toXfO7p7atUWfW6aKGGx6gheCIqQOY8xD6pqIJDBpw1h93fvQ7IF94Ph_HRkmKRSQbVObtbwCy60yLIvBxoJcW1C95MMlMYu1iB7OHFBgjWXyioWxAHPNLjvEDhDS_6Qhv5oOmVqNdvgcHIwliNej0xhLR-eYCp08zFBLvA8tVvFPPZ6jgmVrlWcVdq7rV0RdGk2k0zwtUsenhOATlrJWzDViTA0GZ4hsQwm44m5PPdhc8-Jgq2jy9aEMo1iUrcsDWWXqyzzn1ZwXZDIQAP7ZF1gW7y6JBDDNjsx3kc3_N5JkXZDUjfosQwcIh_cfuHj9Y%3D)
---
[**MAGA ALL THE WAY**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=67b12de969a549e4a7c333bec38ab615&_e=NMlbW9nAjfLmerclZL-DmcHIaF2ysnAO8HGvVaXwRHj7Cyj-gQsyZqaVXx2RlbPh9oaCQU3Ox25ak-ufXPVjsz8zzVEvel0iQ7I3nvlm_toXfO7p7atUWfW6aKGGx6gheCIqQOY8xD6pqIJDBpw1h93fvQ7IF94Ph_HRkmKRSQbVObtbwCy60yLIvBxoJcW1C95MMlMYu1iB7OHFBgjWXyioWxAHPNLjvEDhDS_6Qhv5oOmVqNdvgcHIwliNej0xN38QpV_ciHfnjoVc3ld49QJy-ZtPwnt7zt-661wKTvLdVUl2Qz3u7k5PA6sKizdhiuvpo2GeQLC0S9RAGRVDd4Ov--xepXA01FKN6Sbe9ly3hhDn0pCusPZx_DPZhzBqXLFLfwUmvJnFWnD0mrpICFBJL-HP7LRbN1alS_ioH5U%3D)
---
As you know, I’m a staunch supporter of President Trump. His policies, his leadership, and his America-First mindset are the exact qualities we need in the leader of the free world. He showed us how incredible our country can become when we put the American people first; and he’ll lead us back to greatness this November.

Trump has never stopped fighting for our country and I won’t either. **[I hope you decide to confirm your support for Trump this election season.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=67b12de969a549e4a7c333bec38ab615&_e=NMlbW9nAjfLmerclZL-DmcHIaF2ysnAO8HGvVaXwRHj7Cyj-gQsyZqaVXx2RlbPh9oaCQU3Ox25ak-ufXPVjsz8zzVEvel0iQ7I3nvlm_toXfO7p7atUWfW6aKGGx6gheCIqQOY8xD6pqIJDBpw1h93fvQ7IF94Ph_HRkmKRSQbVObtbwCy60yLIvBxoJcW1C95MMlMYu1iB7OHFBgjWX3s0Tz6ARSa47QmAyB4OXHU3VsATLMIdB_R9PYrtyUv3R1Mo2bzyXmS5VoKZwV71swWyuPqGKLdqVn6uKbHNQKPreKOU6SateLAtyF7nCvVRXc979qaqc3HCE52yzBBhNWUpXErraWeqx408JmkBkDoFTRQbONyq4uVxpI7S4h3drxjK4J105PcPqw-IhEs1S0rj5AatsNbaRuQfRKfBVkw%3D)**

Thank you for your unwavering support.

_JD Vance_

Peter,
I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets:

Anthony D'Esposito just became the most vulnerable incumbent in the country, meaning Republicans will be spending millions to hold onto NY-04. When it comes to Republican extremism, Anthony D'Esposito is just like the rest of them. He voted to elect extremist Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House and just last month led efforts to launch a baseless impeachment investigation into President Biden. Make no mistake, with extremists like Mike Johnson and Anthony D'Esposito leading the GOP, they'll continue their attacks on Social Security, reproductive rights, and LGBTQ+ rights. The biggest mistake we can make right now is to sit back and watch it happen. We only need to flip five seats to retake the House majority, and this is one of them. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Can you join us for a lunch time talk on ‘How to deal with the threat from China?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571587?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**China is a strategic competitor. **Having spent decades encouraging China to take her place on the world stage, the United States now finds herself having to deal with an increasingly assertive and strident Chinese communist government.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=df4455a6d5&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to come to our lunch._
| **How should the United States respond? **

On Tuesday February 13th, MCPP and the Heritage Foundation will be hosting a lunchtime discussion with two of America’s experts on China here in Mississippi;
* **Michael Pillsbury,** a Senior Fellow at the Heritage Foundation, best-selling author and former White House adviser, and
* **Senator Roger F. Wicker,** ranking Member of the U.S. Senate Armed Services Committee and leading champion of the US military.

---
|
---
| **Under President Xi, China has snuffed out democracy in Hong Kong and is increasingly aggressive towards Taiwan.** China is throwing her weight around the world through her Belt and Road initiative. How should America react?

For many years, China enjoyed double digit growth. This led many to believe that China would one day overtake the United States to become the preeminent global economic power. **New data shows that as the Chinese communist party centralizes control, the Chinese economy has lost its dynamism.** Does economic slowdown and demographic decline make China more or less of a risk?
---
|
---
| Come and join the conversation!

**Spaces are limited, and this event is likely to be oversubscribed, so please book your ticket right away if you would like to come!** [Click here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=8ddd280975&e=5703353baa).
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=63a35c3ac9&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=47fdebc15a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=47fdebc15a).

_Copyright © 2024 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---
