name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a0688816b2e948faa8328e250d86dd0b&_e=rC5lCO5Za4zc2PIgCMpfJw7s14SMvwrI5pu3JMLw2ibMLrIZIF-KX4W9JKsZMbO9DkHuJB8kYItwJsggm0SUPmP1L5rD0yz6lK_njcMlq-u3uYQkv2t2SJeiKNwNkYdXR3srNqiY5AUsJS4MD7qtBKc4zIAwO64LVaWTt9eX-OZzmVYKY1n0eDPCBHrRK6pJLIqTqWmrQZN5_7e9I7oKg39DPxm3EavEoPWU0Jmx7KKXQNzNMDh4Nw1BjEd9h4qeuhkQPV-JbBRw8GeNd5PMGZohX0RKWtVKdCSxYhQSZATkBVOI0yfwkpwXW6JWbE4kkfAiGpE3xIafNdjBVDJXOc7y7QKxPfsUlxULuROhlmcNOXNGSyYr7xp-gn4UQ1pZ7KsHj98iDpjrsW8d7q-85w%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a0688816b2e948faa8328e250d86dd0b&_e=rC5lCO5Za4zc2PIgCMpfJw7s14SMvwrI5pu3JMLw2ibMLrIZIF-KX4W9JKsZMbO9DkHuJB8kYItwJsggm0SUPmP1L5rD0yz6lK_njcMlq-u3uYQkv2t2SJeiKNwNkYdXR3srNqiY5AUsJS4MD7qtBKc4zIAwO64LVaWTt9eX-OZzmVYKY1n0eDPCBHrRK6pJLIqTqWmrQZN5_7e9I7oKg39DPxm3EavEoPWU0Jmx7KJNkV9yrvOcdD6Ep2x_MHIlMzNoGdV3N7_xVGBiNDiHFw8xYEYerWy51oFohixXjQPG0wTT7-mTSugZQTj0ftSeJJxOucLqUwOvTCsBhRPCjth2sA8gGT2yiV57yf52seHWefP76g489oN4NOwdeZO3A0jCIyFKrmc3C25ALJ7NdQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a0688816b2e948faa8328e250d86dd0b&_e=rC5lCO5Za4zc2PIgCMpfJw7s14SMvwrI5pu3JMLw2ibMLrIZIF-KX4W9JKsZMbO9DkHuJB8kYItwJsggm0SUPmP1L5rD0yz6lK_njcMlq-u3uYQkv2t2SJeiKNwNkYdXR3srNqiY5AUsJS4MD7qtBKc4zIAwO64LVaWTt9eX-OZzmVYKY1n0eDPCBHrRK6pJLIqTqWmrQZN5_7e9I7oKg39DPxm3EavEoPWU0Jmx7KJXg3S89lq2UqZj175dRtx2jyXYZ28CH-729VIKExaPd0ERV5BPq511kAx-qhHBrR1YUGAtV0NDBmMr2U5ZOEp-Ni_eYy3nkw3IAMbkghulO8qBSOkOy4qGiha0hNuoaHNnM9Mg3iz2L4KymwGtTdKejYtzVLdUajEZEitIcVOqrw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a0688816b2e948faa8328e250d86dd0b&_e=rC5lCO5Za4zc2PIgCMpfJw7s14SMvwrI5pu3JMLw2ibMLrIZIF-KX4W9JKsZMbO9DkHuJB8kYItwJsggm0SUPmP1L5rD0yz6lK_njcMlq-u3uYQkv2t2SJeiKNwNkYdXR3srNqiY5AUsJS4MD7qtBKc4zIAwO64LVaWTt9eX-OZzmVYKY1n0eDPCBHrRK6pJLIqTqWmrQZN5_7e9I7oKg39DPxm3EavEoPWU0Jmx7KJGpRblCTzmkU1BrALWU0CwKMu-8oA1lqazZltBIXWYH-y8NTozkfJCKtX_6aS-m8DR6Sbu8wHTYybV1f7rdHQcR7pMj849zUYpvAqL6UYApUAqGd106F0c8KtTuNAKq7h0lLuMkfMtWnVY29d10Ytfvb1Ae55BoAf4lF_G2xmo3w%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a0688816b2e948faa8328e250d86dd0b&_e=rC5lCO5Za4zc2PIgCMpfJw7s14SMvwrI5pu3JMLw2ibMLrIZIF-KX4W9JKsZMbO9DkHuJB8kYItwJsggm0SUPmP1L5rD0yz6lK_njcMlq-u3uYQkv2t2SJeiKNwNkYdXR3srNqiY5AUsJS4MD7qtBKc4zIAwO64LVaWTt9eX-OZzmVYKY1n0eDPCBHrRK6pJLIqTqWmrQZN5_7e9I7oKg39DPxm3EavEoPWU0Jmx7KK3NkMkmw5CPkir1NB12tWgL4dtpiQzsv-t_Fs_LNal2h1UPcASbajFQftPuU6d6-5TL2_LPtt-68_Xkp_blZ7sEIW2uhERjV6p75jOCUiwz6AW1DJ_IULTzWSIpbafozvoeu0MbcUBgf3RQpd6zHAGmZH9M_2D-94GPFxWgm9ing%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a0688816b2e948faa8328e250d86dd0b&_e=rC5lCO5Za4zc2PIgCMpfJw7s14SMvwrI5pu3JMLw2ibMLrIZIF-KX4W9JKsZMbO9DkHuJB8kYItwJsggm0SUPmP1L5rD0yz6lK_njcMlq-u3uYQkv2t2SJeiKNwNkYdXR3srNqiY5AUsJS4MD7qtBKc4zIAwO64LVaWTt9eX-OZzmVYKY1n0eDPCBHrRK6pJLIqTqWmrQZN5_7e9I7oKg39DPxm3EavEoPWU0Jmx7KK0lAYRjt5JuHEZM39hEbOQWKPht86Tz9CEHwe0641FgZuTYK2H3IuCez65bVJMjtSjtW7-aQ_W0Efn3L3_ERVRVxHDeDmX4JjO6gAM8glnmu9nlJrnlOt_od2zL0cWdgIts1TBDGmeSPMMmSG4brTFCrileKnhFJCUxxDNkozZsA%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a0688816b2e948faa8328e250d86dd0b&_e=rC5lCO5Za4zc2PIgCMpfJ6HHel2KTiZUgBuzssNzd_1Rw1eXJH2HF5ytEQQk5m6ZNS7BI1nZBsL5EUJgxg8mbSRTUvyrKRsrly0SQ54fhhI6I6uYJwIuUmS3fcd1XIwmmsmbGHLht6JtRmqa_lWFULiGkABJkWGZJyPzBUf2hA8RAhQU_UUvJ_Yh_q589qGQm0FKk0_IsOCxNbS3lTCWhNbaGkv81RELGF5gPezu-1qAmUWubOosZaQp8fOkBP1p)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a0688816b2e948faa8328e250d86dd0b&_e=rC5lCO5Za4zc2PIgCMpfJw7s14SMvwrI5pu3JMLw2ibMLrIZIF-KX4W9JKsZMbO9cD4pN-vV97UxBYPMJhb8plnYXguLs3NdjKunfRj_II89WoK-KEmF7cH1IF2EbNi8WPw8r5wWmdjqBIlbBs0lnvoUuzKcasljEHy1ZFdx0JlSeqoVWNlT-CU-5O4QewtKMq-8JecWxokbzmPcxzgQZpDbBXEbdI-ljWYamP5r9yiw_KT4JQP9G2tErLGLpuK1A08-aDZrPZg10ApUln6tDFYpdDA2VMqOKaPfrZHY2eg%3D)

name: NRSC
subject: A gift of $41.37
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Fellow American- Senate Democrats' quarterly fundraising numbers just came out are we’re falling behind. Democrats pulled in 2x as many funds as we did, with an average gift of **$41.37.**

**Not only did they raise more per donation, but they also had more total contributions!**

**This is a fundraising crisis for the Republican Party and at the worst time imaginable.**

We have the best chance in living memory to take the presidency, take the Senate, and hold the House, giving us a united Republican Government that can act on the America First agenda.

We can’t afford to fall behind financially. Especially not now. We were so concerned when we reviewed our records and discovered that you had not yet contributed to our campaign to take back the Majority this quarter.

name: Breaking News
subject: re: Iowa caucuses >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING: Trump wins Iowa caucuses.**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17176?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=13233%2E9716520%2EP8NX__)
**We need to hear from _every_ _Democrat_ now:****Who will you vote for in November?**
| | | [Biden](https://go.dscc.org/go/17176?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=13233%2E9716520%2EP8NX__)
---
| [Trump](https://go.dscc.org/go/17176?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=13233%2E9716520%2EP8NX__)
---

Team, the results are in: **Donald Trump has officially WON the GOP Iowa caucuses.**

He's now one step closer to the White House -- which means our democracy itself is in _grave_ peril!

We need to be absolutely _sure_ that Trump won't win in November, so we’re organizing a nationwide poll to _confirm_ that Americans are backing President Biden. **But we’re checking the results at 9AM tomorrow --_and our records show you haven’t responded yet! _**

**Please, we’re short on responses from Pennsylvania:****Who will you vote for in November?**
| | [Biden](https://go.dscc.org/go/17176?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=13233%2E9716520%2EP8NX__)
---
| [Trump](https://go.dscc.org/go/17176?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240116-BreakingNews-PostIACaucusStrawPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=13233%2E9716520%2EP8NX__)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Your name on our wall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Friend, did you see this note from my team? We’re sprucing up our office by hanging up the names of every donor who commits to a monthly donation.
Monthly donations help us strategically budget and map out our plans from now until Election Day, which is why we're highlighting those donors on their own wall in our office – so my team and I can keep your support close to our hearts and we have a constant reminder of who is the centerpiece of this campaign – you.
I gave my team a challenge: I want us to cover every inch of our new office space with the names of the small-dollar donors who have committed to chipping in even $1 every month between now and the election. [**So, please, I would love if you would consider making a monthly contribution of any amount now, and we’ll add your name to our wall:](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.7ZaLga&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=1&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
**[Become a Slotkin Sustainer](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.7ZaLga&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=2&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
Thank you,
Elissa
_\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: ElissaSlotkin.org
Subject: Decorating our new headquarters
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com _

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.xK3TM4&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=3&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)

We have some exciting news: Team Slotkin has officially moved into our new campaign headquarters! We have less than ten months until the election, and we are full speed ahead on growing our team and putting in the work to reach voters.
Now that we’re all moved in, we need some help decorating our space – which is where you come in. You see this wall below? Our plan is to fill it up with the names of all of our recurring donors: what we are calling “Slotkin Sustainers”. These are those small-dollar donors who help power our campaign by chipping in month after month with a recurring donation.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.7ZaLga&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=4&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)
**[Become a Slotkin Sustainer >](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.7ZaLga&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=5&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
With ten months until Election Day, we will soon launch a robust field program, air TV ads, and begin talking to voters on digital ads. That means mapping out month after month what we need to raise – and spend – in order to be able to afford the critical investments we need to win.
Recurring contributions are especially helpful in that effort, because they help us predict our cash flow through Election Day – and decide when we can scale up our operation. Being able to count on a few dollars a month from a bunch of people helps us make the strategic decisions we need to win this race.
[**So, here’s where we ask: Will you make a commitment as a Slotkin Sustainer to chip in even $1 a month until Election Day? Doing so will help us build a winning campaign, and we’ll add your name to our Recurring Donor wall in the office!](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.7ZaLga&refcode=em240116-1-30&t=6&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
| | **[Donate $5 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1961?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.JbWbbE&c1=em240116-1-30.CYB19m&t=7&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1936?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.JdkiNN&c1=em240116-1-30.YzR_Ps&t=8&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $25 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1934?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.b8SRqB&c1=em240116-1-30.GxF9yS&t=9&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1937?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.yv-TTa&c1=em240116-1-30.e0A1qu&t=10&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
---
****
| | **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1992?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.GhYXPx&c1=em240116-1-30.Y-MLDS&t=11&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)**
---
****
Thank you! We’ll follow up soon with a photo of the completed wall.
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=12&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=13&akid=1009%2E135344%2EWVLgqp)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

subject: Re: TRUMP WINS! - time to come together
body:
President Trump is our GOP Party. It's time to come together to save America. | | | |
---

|
#### Like President Donald J. Trump, only Dan Cox can win the General Election because no other candidate has the MAGA support, and can also win the swing vote.
# Congratulations Mr. President!
"Dan Cox needs your help to win today."
---
|
---
| Re: Trump Wins! - Time to come together to save America.

Did you receive my e-mail below? This is a crucial moment for our campaign. I need your support to ensure President Trump has the Members of Congress who will stand with him unwaveringly to Make America Great Again. [Please join me now.](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=4a973049d7&e=5bb5efcda7)

\-----------------------
_Friend,_

As the only candidate for Congress in Maryland's Sixth District to have endorsed my friend President Trump, I am thrilled to see that the President won Iowa tonight overwhelmingly. Once again - those who listened to the RINOs in our Party to avoid Trump are not listening to the voices of the People. Only President Trump can win and only he deserves to win with how he has persevered to fight to save America.

We have 119 days until the Primary Election in Maryland where I hope to be elected as your nominee for Congress in the Sixth District.

Like President Trump, I am the only candidate who can win the general election because no other candidate has the MAGA support, and no other candidate can also win the swing vote.

But Biden has announced a war chest tonight to defeat President Trump and MAGA Republicans as myself, and destroy America.

Biden is actively destroying our nation in nearly every way. From the open Border to the spiking crime rates, to the deflated dollar and rising costs.

I remember the words of Ronald Reagan: "if we every forget that we are a nation under God, we will be a nation gone under."

Will you join with me in both praying for our nation and President Trump as he seeks to lead us out of disaster, and take action with me by helping me raise the necessary funds to fight the Biden machine coming to sink us?

[I need your contribution tonight to maintain my weekly fundraising goals.](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=193f483f7a&e=5bb5efcda7) [Will you chip in $47, $470, or $4700 to celebrate President Trump's victory tonight in Iowa and help me win in 119 days?](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=be03339c80&e=5bb5efcda7)

Thank you and God bless you. And may God continue to bless America.

Freedom and victory,

Fmr. Delegate Dan Cox
Candidate for U.S. Congress (R-MD-6)

name: Bill Gray
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wires is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=682a4fabf4c44d03b5fd30e05dc37d30&_e=9qvhoE0yBHJgui-rBHsDbETt8qIduP-D6OKkqum-1IPqz7iPl9fd6cmSO1yDfVg8PDH0gA8N_iJC2oDrpqLaAyRKbOb37zwC1c_8ZVrfSwhJDrmGNy61Y4YFW423qJkILd4YGaaE3XZ1Egplz_23ltLqxOdZ1GXLBKBgu-EaBtFuBcFJ3YzkuxPjPaG_iTOWRop08sNOxfMmUak1zwQeZ7DV_rmpn-6xp1NjJgo9vCvaFAoee19jpjug1SwEcyXupsT8Hu7jPtsjyEF7TN2RZL3JDoTLAgVPLx9yvId_Fc-drf7ea8eQNY87UK5Kjmg7RZ8i1HdhLboyc4vYmRd6zqywyiwxGn6VMvPfddaF5lm-8EF1vYZ4N8tXwTeM0eFPD25FJMIDcMnUvhs92YiP2w%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=682a4fabf4c44d03b5fd30e05dc37d30&_e=9qvhoE0yBHJgui-rBHsDbETt8qIduP-D6OKkqum-1IPqz7iPl9fd6cmSO1yDfVg8PDH0gA8N_iJC2oDrpqLaAyRKbOb37zwC1c_8ZVrfSwhJDrmGNy61Y4YFW423qJkILd4YGaaE3XZ1Egplz_23ltLqxOdZ1GXLBKBgu-EaBtFuBcFJ3YzkuxPjPaG_iTOWRop08sNOxfMmUak1zwQeZ7DV_rmpn-6xp1NjJgo9vCvaFAoee19jpjug1SwEcyXuop6JTr6g8PjN_rB65lHr164QB7tuMvRdVwJjPDbxTOSvx8yTYvrK77Px2Kb6_-BlkrPGW49UR8XMmR6zW5CabYQtfJiYt0bw0xgjR4vH0qogaaWM3ly84p2gKgj6hA8vHrI5OXbN-NdZh3S8pUWm9A%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=682a4fabf4c44d03b5fd30e05dc37d30&_e=9qvhoE0yBHJgui-rBHsDbETt8qIduP-D6OKkqum-1IPqz7iPl9fd6cmSO1yDfVg8PDH0gA8N_iJC2oDrpqLaAyRKbOb37zwC1c_8ZVrfSwhJDrmGNy61Y4YFW423qJkILd4YGaaE3XZ1Egplz_23ltLqxOdZ1GXLBKBgu-EaBtFuBcFJ3YzkuxPjPaG_iTOWRop08sNOxfMmUak1zwQeZ7DV_rmpn-6xp1NjJgo9vCvaFAoee19jpjug1SwEcyXuIziewI4QmDS4vOYqu1DzapcGzIeOrBvhOu3-uHQxaoNjjo2rruDiJXHBs5dRFbKDcQkPYwVvjltS8vsPd0xCE45I7pcrsAVP2kmnpdvfC348bObpcrPZALlNnezM4Xu9BUSz8ufJWfPl46Q4-hQcsw%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=682a4fabf4c44d03b5fd30e05dc37d30&_e=9qvhoE0yBHJgui-rBHsDbETt8qIduP-D6OKkqum-1IPqz7iPl9fd6cmSO1yDfVg8PDH0gA8N_iJC2oDrpqLaAyRKbOb37zwC1c_8ZVrfSwhJDrmGNy61Y4YFW423qJkILd4YGaaE3XZ1Egplz_23ltLqxOdZ1GXLBKBgu-EaBtFuBcFJ3YzkuxPjPaG_iTOWRop08sNOxfMmUak1zwQeZ7DV_rmpn-6xp1NjJgo9vCvaFAoee19jpjug1SwEcyXuSp7M1QqwB1FArrfjSLFer4Gi7jQ3q4RyzNNyBaV7lLWyIGUo_SlIz8wLjTzlEcvxYLcOQzJdXzliUYiLST5bN56wRtmxOril827yGtPKldA6iW1hrEKqiV7OiSYzY31njIwPeXs3WPN74VaTzCL09Q%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=682a4fabf4c44d03b5fd30e05dc37d30&_e=9qvhoE0yBHJgui-rBHsDbETt8qIduP-D6OKkqum-1IPqz7iPl9fd6cmSO1yDfVg8PDH0gA8N_iJC2oDrpqLaAyRKbOb37zwC1c_8ZVrfSwhJDrmGNy61Y4YFW423qJkILd4YGaaE3XZ1Egplz_23ltLqxOdZ1GXLBKBgu-EaBtFuBcFJ3YzkuxPjPaG_iTOWRop08sNOxfMmUak1zwQeZ7DV_rmpn-6xp1NjJgo9vCvaFAoee19jpjug1SwEcyXuK82NN8QbJ8gu3DFrROxlLarsOrbf_tdDv-v9BzjbFo0oOO-x1QCI5YYBKybZvt-Qht8ucu_5g2FSJ8TT2It-7k0sWrWDCDAoEosHSM41gnLXJY78XzwMMhJ30_2Ema2BKU8Z0QWvWEdJ6BGSE0Kykg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=682a4fabf4c44d03b5fd30e05dc37d30&_t=q_m7_ys_RLg78Rl9IY3oX1ME39DwZsTdykKlnvMEZP6cOvnKO8AanTJkl-uSRmD8nhpulGoSqHJjES3XHU44H0FUe4ClrSfJCc_nurrdEn2l-u1y84eF_aoWzIq-UxZi401DJYD8GF8pIVLo8C0abvMfAyIOGqfxDw1dv7S2QRc%3D)

name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd87b2ca7b8e41bebf8d27c363232060&_e=zglbs7qAtTlB2VKfeE6_xZrre2zOoozHapZunZ4mN7ULL-moAUQ6kaRFf4i0Sd67w3qharHOczwQMBU1L48gOgYhlN77uu0OVXdoqTtgtp_I1sB94uO8A9JDLgSgX9ws4s9qaF826E0gkkdrXFBiUi_8HexUrB6dvbRR8qM4_CIkaSBvpgDJEjnYqX2qcp8nMtMUIoTaqXpjm8IxBdgfgVPmk2_uUKxkfLI2EdrAlRy9u16Pp2WIOPWbadpSFwx6QuXsPc8DHLmHubX-8HNO_9NagbiNRO0ZX7JH9DQ6Yi9xni-JLS239pj-k_OUBZd0n3Xzc0KMOp8EbRV8A5Hl_7WHAt9qEgeMqOxxkBzIWYE%3D)
---
| |
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd87b2ca7b8e41bebf8d27c363232060&_e=zglbs7qAtTlB2VKfeE6_xZrre2zOoozHapZunZ4mN7ULL-moAUQ6kaRFf4i0Sd67w3qharHOczwQMBU1L48gOgYhlN77uu0OVXdoqTtgtp_I1sB94uO8A9JDLgSgX9ws4s9qaF826E0gkkdrXFBiUi_8HexUrB6dvbRR8qM4_CIkaSBvpgDJEjnYqX2qcp8nMtMUIoTaqXpjm8IxBdgfgWd3TPP2f-YQRHioK3H_d82JmrAwaDlsBND5cP8Njds6tVNOEvIFIBiTy5P06zh3sI6-hLXdJw0FrXyNABbSZZ0xUWDBC2JEerytnWfAO8veBY5QoW0eJE9yoyIUTm9fPgWOGGgQmJG5vo-zJAolx9c%3D)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd87b2ca7b8e41bebf8d27c363232060&_e=zglbs7qAtTlB2VKfeE6_xZrre2zOoozHapZunZ4mN7ULL-moAUQ6kaRFf4i0Sd67w3qharHOczwQMBU1L48gOgYhlN77uu0OVXdoqTtgtp_I1sB94uO8A9JDLgSgX9ws4s9qaF826E0gkkdrXFBiUi_8HexUrB6dvbRR8qM4_CIkaSBvpgDJEjnYqX2qcp8nMtMUIoTaqXpjm8IxBdgfgdbYZryHHUudHYS2knt-TtmWyCibXnXs81cWhHKl6U7t_h0WpS8cCfVsaG0EoPZKNz2I6Fe1CWncN2vlRufzLaaKFm_RFSlCOfa2SJrWN4wBVc1GJC5sLkLaLynSlyIr74ag2kuxjEVwuRq1vmjmzdo%3D)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

subject: We need to have Pramila’s back

body:
We spent all of last year preparing for 2024, now is the time to kick our movement into high gear.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240116-3396-footer&t=1&akid=3396%2E420207%2EA_AR5x)
Peter,
**We spent all of last year preparing for 2024, now is the time to kick our movement into high gear.**[**Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to give to help us close the gap on our $3,725 mid-month fundraising goal before midnight tonight?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240116.o9xdgb&refcode=em20240116-3396&t=2&akid=3396%2E420207%2EA_AR5x)
Republican megadonors at AIPAC have already announced their pledge to spend over $100 million to defeat progressives in 2024 — _and Pramila is on their target list._ Not only that, but No Labels is doubling down on their plan to insert a third party candidate that undermines Joe Biden and lifts up Donald Trump. **It’s a madhouse.**
**We need to have the resources and grassroots power to stand strong against impending attacks from the far-right while we fight for our progressive values in Congress.**
**Pramila will always, always root out corruption, lead with compassion, and bring true transformative change to Washington and communities like ours. But we need to have her back.**
**[Can we count on you to chip in $5, $10, $20 or whatever you’re able to give to help us close the gap on our goal and kick off 2024 in the strongest possible position?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240116.o9xdgb&refcode=em20240116-3396&t=3&akid=3396%2E420207%2EA_AR5x)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240116.o9xdgb&refcode=em20240116-3396&t=22&akid=3396%2E420207%2EA_AR5x)**
Together,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240116-3396-footer&t=23&refcode2=3396_420207_A_AR5x&akid=3396%2E420207%2EA_AR5x)**

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0kD-v2yAUxT8N3hLBBeN68JDGcodKHdonVZ3Q5Y9jKgh-gGXl21dO07eV8Xd-4hxdjGvw82Mg3WcCsHhbCADhFwLw_muPefsdv345iaRP7_JbbI8QrgSgPlb3Yb4-ObuIPhy0Gxs78NlS0biBdbQVwKWQzTLM4lOPBkTfGhTSdswIwXvJemZnzTve-AEoCMqYZFJ0jJ-N6TvXypnOLetpK4mgz54zRpe9QVbqjjmnFM8mxSYMS61reQ6bCEz7vp8Xh_kICUyWwKRdqepg_n5T6G1ROM-UHT6f0FTCx8v1jR5PUibhcn0jILcaVUlbNo7wUT_sC0Vn_RYJH3GeffBY3SswGFf0tzvh41aUuysMR6n68JR-2IOcgr8tVW9Bn2zadHCqVMw6YbbqPzvWTQdfFpeVt4SPP_75BGTZ9F_4E_P3lGKTB7vuPgRfZEcEvT1vZ1L8EwAA__8zNaD2)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0kD-v2yAUxT8N3hLBBeN68JDGcodKHdonVZ3Q5Y9jKgh-gGXl21dO07eV8Xd-4hxdjGvw82Mg3WcCsHhbCADhFwLw_muPefsdv345iaRP7_JbbI8QrgSgPlb3Yb4-ObuIPhy0Gxs78NlS0biBdbQVwKWQzTLM4lOPBkTfGhTSdswIwXvJemZnzTve-AEoCMqYZFJ0jJ-N6TvXypnOLetpK4mgz54zRpe9QVbqjjmnFM8mxSYMS61reQ6bCEz7vp8Xh_kICUyWwKRdqepg_n5T6G1ROM-UHT6f0FTCx8v1jR5PUibhcn0jILcaVUlbNo7wUT_sC0Vn_RYJH3GeffBY3SswGFf0tzvh41aUuysMR6n68JR-2IOcgr8tVW9Bn2zadHCqVMw6YbbqPzvWTQdfFpeVt4SPP_75BGTZ9F_4E_P3lGKTB7vuPgRfZEcEvT1vZ1L8EwAA__8zNaD2)
[ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0kD-v2yAUxT8N3hLBBeN68JDGcodKHdonVZ3Q5Y9jKgh-gGXl21dO07eV8Xd-4hxdjGvw82Mg3WcCsHhbCADhFwLw_muPefsdv345iaRP7_JbbI8QrgSgPlb3Yb4-ObuIPhy0Gxs78NlS0biBdbQVwKWQzTLM4lOPBkTfGhTSdswIwXvJemZnzTve-AEoCMqYZFJ0jJ-N6TvXypnOLetpK4mgz54zRpe9QVbqjjmnFM8mxSYMS61reQ6bCEz7vp8Xh_kICUyWwKRdqepg_n5T6G1ROM-UHT6f0FTCx8v1jR5PUibhcn0jILcaVUlbNo7wUT_sC0Vn_RYJH3GeffBY3SswGFf0tzvh41aUuysMR6n68JR-2IOcgr8tVW9Bn2zadHCqVMw6YbbqPzvWTQdfFpeVt4SPP_75BGTZ9F_4E_P3lGKTB7vuPgRfZEcEvT1vZ1L8EwAA__8zNaD2)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**

clean_body: | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's hear.com's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Hey do you have a minute?
body:
Just need a minute or two of your time. |
---
| | Peter, we have an _**election coming up here in Orange County in just 49 days.**_

This is our opportunity to replace liberal Katie Porter in California's 47th District not just with a Republican, but with an _America First conservative._

You'll see my name on your ballot ... so I wanted to take a moment to re-introduce myself.

**My name is Max Ukropina.** I'm a Republican. I'm an America First conservative. I'm a business owner. I was born and raised right here in Orange County.

**Most importantly, I'm not a career politician.** I'm a political outsider with a sense of real urgency running to fight for Orange County and bring real America First leadership to Washington.
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=fc4b7d9de8&e=86e91e802d)
---
| I'm running for Congress because I'm sick and tired of career politicians from both parties destroying our country.

I'm tired of Washington doing nothing while _**millions of illegal immigrants trample over our country's immigration laws**._

I'm tired of Congress _**spending trillions of dollars each year**_ and cutting do-nothing "deals" while our debt continues to skyrocket and inflation makes life feel increasingly out-of-reach.

I'm tired of pro-crime policies _**exported from liberal cities like Los Angeles or San Francisco**_ putting criminals back onto the streets and threatening our communities.

I'm tired of politicians doing nothing while our _**schools are flooded with special-interest funding and Leftist ideological agendas**._

The list goes on!

I can't sit idly by while the Democrats try to elect another radical Leftist to represent Orange County who will rubber stamp more failed liberal policies into our communities.

I'm not planning to go to Washington to be a wallflower. I plan to fight for our country and be the kind of leader that sticks to his guns and makes Orange County proud.

We have a tough primary coming up on March 5 against well-funded opponents._We don't need to out raise them, but I can't win without conservative patriots like you on my side._

[**If I can count on your vote, will you please take a moment to submit your official endorsement of my campaign?**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=9c0e0a39dc&e=86e91e802d)

Knowing I have your support will make a HUGE difference in these final weeks.

Thank you,

Max Ukropina
---
| [ENDORSE MAX FOR CONGRESS](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=7d61e2b1d5&e=86e91e802d "ENDORSE MAX FOR CONGRESS")
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=a9a81d3949&e=86e91e802d)

name: Geoff & KathyJo
subject: Why this matters
body:
This is YOUR Republican Party at stake
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j2sOUxTKfM2os6z0_PGYPSSNvpDfJPTUoOr0a3BK1fN_ctRMOGD1K097eWJTxxL0D0tEiUyuq8ir2jGumJChzLFXHtVSu9oY7dXcZkCkvNG6I_Ys5_9ebIZ0wW-d3V_yz9HmvlVqnCER0a-ZhSVbCNuiPcq8UJNGgDDdgjuL2pkJwRb6Z8peYekmyjX4_zzcVumpSZPdU7zILO_f1Bl7WA==&c=oCvP8xZVTyrcsJklmXFQWfPWkTMvrLkg_S0KMyc_KGM7m-jKQkjyfQ==&ch=hwqtUl46DnERZq7hC3ZwSLnXuRoevukAvc4J8CmWBGePdMTKopakyw==)
---
| January 16, 2024
Friend,
Yesterday was the Iowa Caucus, and Republican activists like you decided who would be their nominee for President.
On March 5th, you and other Republican voters will have the same opportunity to vote in the Presidential Primary, and there will be another race on the ballot as well: the Republican State Committee election.
The Republican State Committee is made up of 80 members, two from every state senate district, one man and one woman. We currently serve on the Republican State Committee, representing 7 cities and towns. These cities and towns are Avon, Brockton, East Bridgewater, Halifax, Hanson, Randolph, and Whitman.
As your conservative team on the Republican State Committee, we would be honored to earn your support for re-election. This race matters because we will continue to fight to make sure the Republican Party is YOUR party, and not the party of insiders and Republicans In Name Only!
But we cannot do this alone...
Our campaign is powered by the grassroots and activists like you, and never the establishment. The establishment recruited candidates against us, one of them is a convicted felon!
This race ultimately matters because this race is about you. If you want your voice heard, if you want to be represented in the Republican Party by a conservative team with a proven track record of supporting local activists and candidates, we are the right candidates for you and will be honored to earn your support.
Together, we will win this fight, and we will continue fighting for you.
As always, thank you for your support.
Geoff Diehl and KathyJo Boss
---
| | [Support our campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j2sOUxTKfM2os6z0_PGYPSSNvpDfJPTUoOr0a3BK1fN_ctRMOGD1K097eWJTxxL0D0tEiUyuq8ir2jGumJChzLFXHtVSu9oY7dXcZkCkvNG6I_Ys5_9ebIZ0wW-d3V_yz9HmvlVqnCER0a-ZhSVbCNuiPcq8UJNGgDDdgjuL2pkJwRb6Z8peYekmyjX4_zzcVumpSZPdU7zILO_f1Bl7WA==&c=oCvP8xZVTyrcsJklmXFQWfPWkTMvrLkg_S0KMyc_KGM7m-jKQkjyfQ==&ch=hwqtUl46DnERZq7hC3ZwSLnXuRoevukAvc4J8CmWBGePdMTKopakyw==)
---
| PS
Would you be willing to make a donation to our State Committee campaigns? You can make a donation by clicking here: [https://secure.winred.com/diehl-boss-for-state-committee/donate-today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j2sOUxTKfM2os6z0_PGYPSSNvpDfJPTUoOr0a3BK1fN_ctRMOGD1K097eWJTxxL0D0tEiUyuq8ir2jGumJChzLFXHtVSu9oY7dXcZkCkvNG6I_Ys5_9ebIZ0wW-d3V_yz9HmvlVqnCER0a-ZhSVbCNuiPcq8UJNGgDDdgjuL2pkJwRb6Z8peYekmyjX4_zzcVumpSZPdU7zILO_f1Bl7WA==&c=oCvP8xZVTyrcsJklmXFQWfPWkTMvrLkg_S0KMyc_KGM7m-jKQkjyfQ==&ch=hwqtUl46DnERZq7hC3ZwSLnXuRoevukAvc4J8CmWBGePdMTKopakyw==)
State Committee campaigns are not governed by OCPF, and candidates can raise unlimited funds so anything you are willing to give would be greatly appreciated. Thank you again!
---

name: Andrew Wynne
subject: it’s a shame what they did to this doctor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
And you might be next...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=241a891e7a3245b893c1d34977e2ad92&_e=9gFw21DRaRYgrPvw1cP8qXnuZ3GKn355o4mvTP9BfHckWzFnDAWVtgIkGUDU2zxVysukO3u56jKtZ6DATzDty0fghZz2D-wfHy44sd1kCpm2qoooSHOtlO0qgxtV-m6wmRxhlarYb4NSVrFv70lUG448v11m2sTBLz-Cle3hcBKhwdhSP4kEvwix1WAwv50Ac5hi__W83fzzMa0YpamP9pvvexDEUndMJqVHALIg_hkt-PoWE0bE6SJoYaKbkN9mrUTD2_yr-MT6sNzl-lBpz7Qhy_fY0OKRc4t_Kr_Cq81PDQTaisni8WT_YOTiJtMxhzanlGpPUgCCVOaC0PwkxNiNQwHtTVzb0WR_zHi3gtBw2HSvPP07FYjJsVpvYOrNDpbYdqxDtuK-A0zrxmSViQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Almost two years ago, a courageous medical resident leaked internal documents exposing Texas Children’s Hospital for continuing to run a pediatric transgender clinic ... despite publicly professing to have discontinued surgeries on minors. The information he made public didn’t just out the hospital for its deception — it swayed the vote in the Texas Legislature to officially ban transgender procedures for minors. Anonymous, vindicated by the law, and in a red state like Texas, Eithan Haim thought he was safe. **__**__Then, two federal agents knocked on his door telling him he was the target of a criminal investigation.__**__**

---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=241a891e7a3245b893c1d34977e2ad92&_e=9gFw21DRaRYgrPvw1cP8qXnuZ3GKn355o4mvTP9BfHckWzFnDAWVtgIkGUDU2zxVysukO3u56jKtZ6DATzDty0fghZz2D-wfHy44sd1kCpm2qoooSHOtlO0qgxtV-m6wmRxhlarYb4NSVrFv70lUG448v11m2sTBLz-Cle3hcBKhwdhSP4kEvwix1WAwv50Ac5hi__W83fzzMa0YpamP9pvvexDEUndMJqVHALIg_hkt-PoWE0bE6SJoYaKbkN9mL7fUD-e2BjVuWRGlZ4BblrnRAjn4NeXv3uFzFIiSf_FZ0pJ4T4xUuiGYkqOF6rI158yjd3MKRI-CJyJrtU2NhfIeML6ugcaDve7HzT5Q_F0QKdYH78AMplyPJjwWGiJcNEyGwTFneUjy38RUaFTRzQ%3D%3D)
---
Nevermind that the documents he disclosed are now publicly available, and all identifying information was stripped from them. A quick Google search makes it clear he committed no violation of patient privacy. Let’s be honest: Dr. Haim knows he did nothing illegal. The DOJ knows he did nothing illegal. _They just want to punish him for daring to question a part of the woke agenda._ He’s already faced roughly $250K in legal fees — and an influx of fake negative WebMD reviews on his page. He’s exhausted his savings and retirement to fight a charge he knows is bogus. **_It’s an outrage. And at this point, it’s a pattern._** Because we’ve seen this before. Remember when...
* _Law enforcement targeted parents who dared to speak out at school board meetings?_
* _The FBI raided the home of a pro-life dad with a 25-person SWAT team?_

Peter, It's not enough to donate to legal defense funds and cry foul at politicized law enforcement agencies.**We have to go on offense. It's time to fight the root problem: the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system. **_**[Fair Courts America exists to put a stop to all that.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=241a891e7a3245b893c1d34977e2ad92&_e=9gFw21DRaRYgrPvw1cP8qXnuZ3GKn355o4mvTP9BfHckWzFnDAWVtgIkGUDU2zxVysukO3u56jKtZ6DATzDty0fghZz2D-wfHy44sd1kCpm2qoooSHOtlO0qgxtV-m6wmRxhlarYb4NSVrFv70lUG448v11m2sTBLz-Cle3hcBKhwdhSP4kEvwix1WAwv50Ac5hi__W83fzzMa0YpamP9pvvexDEUndMJqVHALIg_hkt-PoWE0bE6SJoYaKbkN9m2oQziLKnhSSpJXu7u6AX9T5fm3tjAMNxvzWU9P2BWf0STxXVdRbWJy6bYVXA4h-WNqlzvYU6Q66Duq1e_z5fzIRKLeAzq1H94W6TYCiGJgU_YLBbEbwPSW6wKYQhbsc7W9DBBBWNJ1vgcgDHz7wuiQ%3D%3D)**_ We say NO to anyone who would use judicial powers to intimidate your political enemies. If we lose the rule of law in our country... we lose our republic. It’s as simple as that. **As the left gets bolder in their judicial overreach, we need more allies like you who will fight back. Will you join us to defend equal justice under the law, before it’s too late?**
---

clean_body: And you might be next...| | | Peter, Almost two years ago, a courageous medical resident leaked internal documents exposing Texas Children’s Hospital for continuing to run a pediatric transgender clinic ... despite publicly professing to have discontinued surgeries on minors. The information he made public didn’t just out the hospital for its deception — it swayed the vote in the Texas Legislature to officially ban transgender procedures for minors. Anonymous, vindicated by the law, and in a red state like Texas, Eithan Haim thought he was safe. Then, two federal agents knocked on his door telling him he was the target of a criminal investigation. Nevermind that the documents he disclosed are now publicly available, and all identifying information was stripped from them. A quick Google search makes it clear he committed no violation of patient privacy. Let’s be honest: Dr. Haim knows he did nothing illegal. The DOJ knows he did nothing illegal. They just want to punish him for daring to question a part of the woke agenda. He’s already faced roughly $250K in legal fees — and an influx of fake negative WebMD reviews on his page. He’s exhausted his savings and retirement to fight a charge he knows is bogus. It’s an outrage. And at this point, it’s a pattern. Because we’ve seen this before. Remember when... Law enforcement targeted parents who dared to speak out at school board meetings? The FBI raided the home of a pro-life dad with a 25-person SWAT team? Peter, It's not enough to donate to legal defense funds and cry foul at politicized law enforcement agencies.We have to go on offense. It's time to fight the root problem: the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system. We say NO to anyone who would use judicial powers to intimidate your political enemies. If we lose the rule of law in our country... we lose our republic. It’s as simple as that. As the left gets bolder in their judicial overreach, we need more allies like you who will fight back. Will you join us to defend equal justice under the law, before it’s too late? | | Thank you, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: | | | | Less than 300 Days to save America| Peter, I’ll keep this short. Here is the reality we are facing: More than 10 Republicans are in danger of losing their seats, and I could be one of them. If Democrats win just FIVE of these races, Republicans will LOSE the House. We can’t wait to start fighting until November – our Republican primary is less than 4 months away. I need your support TODAY, Peter. Our arsenal needs to be full before we get to the primary. | Your donation has the power to SAVE THE MAJORITY. I know this is a lot to put on your shoulders but as little as $5 can make all the difference. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer (Personal) 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \-

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=599b6658c2104baaa5767a9b0cfaa3cb&_e=CRRgIL8iHxqV1VfDlSxlwBbzvEHgcOrYSnSSEi9kSJUEnfOqnHDnnnUCqCIgqCwAMq2uMUsh0rx9orf2hjPpvoE6a_t7L9DVgjl-wxW-HVzX5LRyn8rPRNBsYt-11M3uWthiWst_11doOULPijzwgQyxhbyD5M3J9XnChhvyUpuvRs_7bj9yqx_Q07WXGVNRNMbiGY1dUYpsqZGh523DvuDs70fLOp-6FW6mfYcx-JRNeJKcdmcvWkBu48LuYVfokqc05zfCIjSjUlZj4zlmylGWTDpqLgiDrnzIvLzfzIvU9uthhb1jLi3hcPnhVuuZyLG_S_t5dw0nxzUdcsqDSzJdn-a9YU1G2eXKgb3A9nbHQbiMonh7upSHOt0fGP7Ud6G9a6A6O9tVR_-cmeT6CQ%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=599b6658c2104baaa5767a9b0cfaa3cb&_e=CRRgIL8iHxqV1VfDlSxlwBbzvEHgcOrYSnSSEi9kSJUEnfOqnHDnnnUCqCIgqCwAMq2uMUsh0rx9orf2hjPpvoE6a_t7L9DVgjl-wxW-HVzX5LRyn8rPRNBsYt-11M3uWthiWst_11doOULPijzwgQyxhbyD5M3J9XnChhvyUpuvRs_7bj9yqx_Q07WXGVNRNMbiGY1dUYpsqZGh523DvuDs70fLOp-6FW6mfYcx-JRNeJKcdmcvWkBu48LuYVfoDMv2vQynabB8tw0tflNs2muY-D-BCREfvgJ88vYHofX7dBTUJPbpfBwARG9t_3wPU0ysbtcGioM0vENtWwGEz6Zgu3fr4UxmcDr3js_pZAE2YMFubyjNRxLEzCaSZFuQvGEqEepFSJHtbLMFHd4k5Q%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=599b6658c2104baaa5767a9b0cfaa3cb&_e=CRRgIL8iHxqV1VfDlSxlwBbzvEHgcOrYSnSSEi9kSJUEnfOqnHDnnnUCqCIgqCwAMq2uMUsh0rx9orf2hjPpvoE6a_t7L9DVgjl-wxW-HVzX5LRyn8rPRNBsYt-11M3uWthiWst_11doOULPijzwgQyxhbyD5M3J9XnChhvyUpuvRs_7bj9yqx_Q07WXGVNRNMbiGY1dUYpsqZGh523DvuDs70fLOp-6FW6mfYcx-JRNeJKcdmcvWkBu48LuYVfo1I2bCzMRurmoBex3SN_JThiecE-5yNsUgbExHw7XcQAtGTFBWulYRwNV6e4DADdENaE9Om-Bvf0AgAuoKRbzMWHrnDRewV_DdW-kYHgNuJqxbr_h7p8KEQCYL4I-4-qYtrlr5ZHAhWQd6bZZfRLPJg%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=599b6658c2104baaa5767a9b0cfaa3cb&_e=CRRgIL8iHxqV1VfDlSxlwBbzvEHgcOrYSnSSEi9kSJUEnfOqnHDnnnUCqCIgqCwAMq2uMUsh0rx9orf2hjPpvoE6a_t7L9DVgjl-wxW-HVzX5LRyn8rPRNBsYt-11M3uWthiWst_11doOULPijzwgQyxhbyD5M3J9XnChhvyUpuvRs_7bj9yqx_Q07WXGVNRNMbiGY1dUYpsqZGh523DvuDs70fLOp-6FW6mfYcx-JRNeJKcdmcvWkBu48LuYVfo0ZGbuD8_dfUKGLi2qn4T-YNFsxBw6wy3UBtgN3a-tZivGJ320aCrsOSOVmnn3OQRSELbFbI4pZiiaG9XQE9O5jnkCvEvEddtWPlSvEESYLsoHekE15Pn0RvOtW0g7CyVcKnp5lRsmToRZgkDLZwRqQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=599b6658c2104baaa5767a9b0cfaa3cb&_e=CRRgIL8iHxqV1VfDlSxlwBbzvEHgcOrYSnSSEi9kSJUEnfOqnHDnnnUCqCIgqCwAMq2uMUsh0rx9orf2hjPpvoE6a_t7L9DVgjl-wxW-HVzX5LRyn8rPRNBsYt-11M3uWthiWst_11doOULPijzwgQyxhbyD5M3J9XnChhvyUpuvRs_7bj9yqx_Q07WXGVNRNMbiGY1dUYpsqZGh523DvuDs70fLOp-6FW6mfYcx-JRNeJKcdmcvWkBu48LuYVfoLshnY1Jlbgbge1jjFKHtRqNDpApZfpKvAdYRQelh7pHikJRKCzHjANyjWMzuh9w1_epg8dVCeVOaxFuLBzyZ3pvBAdr76EP0vF4hr7NcSpV6I0pTjqsFEI1lHcxdu0V1AGxc89AhTpQnXfNpc4g9HQ%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---

body:
We just gained access to a BIGGER refugee camp!!| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=ebf5eb4c9e5948f1859cd9c0e83a5fed&_e=p4j4B9DRVo6ttiZm3YwIjYrjScsjypsKW2hFl2qfKLkVJUxrL0aJLHQBolpHlBdoCEl2G97x8-ElPf1PRZmN8sbcm3Ph_XG5atJ6notW5OeApV0ogwGmvN304f-5NgE7KwSca0u_T5t0_rlrsetQmIW896W4Nun2-h1PBJStHuXfaD5t5vNN_c-w90Xv4ARyq9-t-6Lwu8ODAQXHYa86NrXrd_Q0YOBTwrI6as7-JD6kG1rZeDrDwesbSRUPaa7wnRqIu9lImI_XGeiZwangXF-7X1Er2Ug681Pg5ozVARM2qr5ziwoUXuJaBN7Tu2Cq)

Dear Friend,

I'm headed to Iraq! In just a few days, I leave for a refugee camp in Northern Iraq to serve Syrian refugees with our team of doctors, nurses, medical personnel and other professionals. Despite Iran's recent bombing attacks in the region, _we still feel God calling us to GO and**we will obey**_! This will be my 10th year in a row traveling to the Middle East and a nation that means so much to me! _God has opened a _**MASSIVE**_ door to a bigger camp _than we had originally planned as they are desperately asking us to help them! Right now, we are scrambling to purchase more supplies to make sure we have enough for this bigger camp— “The heart of man plans his way, but the Lord establishes his steps.” _We need to raise just over**$9,000 in the next 4 days**_ to purchase blankets, food and other supplies to arrive in time for our team to distribute! If you can help fund the last portion of our supplies, please give here: **[www.letusworship.us/iraq](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=ebf5eb4c9e5948f1859cd9c0e83a5fed&_e=p4j4B9DRVo6ttiZm3YwIjey7O0Y5Bqb_ExydUlaOU-ff9KgCwjRUIolJqU9Pk-gQiixNzohomlJoZd075dOLajO-0eZ325Sw88CuSaNcXj6XgfdT_UVou8Rz8hL6oId0NGJ_YOs-oJnebgfK2ibWTS-IU7uGPjBgxy7TNSC66MEuBzEUK6uMtNlQolD_MmAkig87upJZSqXz5tI1oG_h4yDfWrD_PhQ0jfd_jatr0AD-ldfW0oA9PMKDp4_Q3LjqEW2Pn-Owp0ttqfc6BbU6_fBM4OhWgXQwnmuqeibAqNwTzojnToq2QTyeKnwudZQqoJu1sF5sRa7y_QIWlsqkHkcjf48Vv88Ai00J465muOwoTHHXFMHA23x2jA0vf7hkSLQxwyNJCvzJeutCxwSoeRCDQrALul1KCVNhVFP-9BHY6yz2Mx2XZZsJiLLOEOOZB8F3ofZBBiobpSOLYV3n9JS4igH9vmu-2CjtlnT_1LXrUAB3D4vEGTCTKbVPRYF_YmZ_TUdZ6D2T_nZHWCHtgL5wVmbAAUNwNb5YBbOIq6qnlo25XVWvye6JC2ya33HwgsAyjMR7pG0BQgFpeckaU2gchyd3d55fT-ZTI3y4D8oNqBwTZmWLygB3HvOX9k1fXkbZIi11nvxkss1B_5SusP6co0cgrAyjil-1SrA2wW8yCAI6WiuW2pSsxwSlOXbRjVrYjOo3dL36SaPnG75SKulNDgpgP32r7WJDuwFmpSSGcuhQbDRScWMMZdVQ_GjPDfmp1tX4BFmIU8vlkcg22l0Q_JOCjDI_Y-uhsYH1734HEGw1cpa4eEpC1eFdQrV-f-xypXT-fm65oaDlR6HCKpecHS5tDzPWmKRySDFL1O_6okP_Cab1_uWLiMzTBOMAYlxJSMPw3Nhobg8lXzed-iF3RXuoa-PXhzR57sD4zwsyHMnMOxFmhyL3gZjMsRftp9wpTK20Wsgquh5JQOckNi87IW_4QXOc5Gv5ryNvPVca6BRt0rkFi5sL9vDBJPnB5G8Ty1TiTizm70ZljjX0cqqhPkXubA2PviTwx4NEPdkwAmgJxw-CbetaZ_ng94zdfKUIjCymUUERXSnZ0GbPQ6UbEXO0g_84j7OX77Gn9NVSYuXRTpftSYvP1YmMZlzDPWPyGRMxehK0oi_niVDUcff_N3WEbBJWS9efJyhp4YB91LPDyFHsTlYoZc3QTwkQTqb4mV3IHGlkZ9pixS1DT_b4Z_gc2Y6WbGDw4yqbOoVQkazu9qj0phptZv7sk0l2KPiHdD_FfkZLdTaGK82V3SRd9ZSE8XoV4gTxBtxrcScicfAMXbFkKPvn3E5dsGpz)**.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama's Revolution
body:
And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf2ku6t1vcr4fphlv9uqc5eom2em7nr8of0ncdpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5gm4ob6cph2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkengm6fcr4vrsl4cb5nujsg51fg3vaeon0h84g0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5gm4ob6cph2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S80Pczaz0dDCUKDCMyIkgw~~/AARclAA~/RgRniWEmP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplouy5pmUomv1zUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

**If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends.**

**[So please don't delay - give your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S80Pczaz0dDCUKDCMyIkgw~~/AARclAA~/RgRniWEmP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplouy5pmUomv1zUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. **They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant.

If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next.

**[Please support this critical lawsuit with your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S80Pczaz0dDCUKDCMyIkgw~~/AARclAA~/RgRniWEmP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlZG9td2F0Y2gucmV2di5jby9mYmktYXJyZXN0cy1hY3Rvci1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZmJpLWFycmVzdHMtYWN0b3ImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplouy5pmUomv1zUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: Chuck Schumer just announced a $10M+ investment benefiting my opponent in the Montana Senate race. This is BIG. | | Fellow Conservative, It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I need your attention for a few minutes today – please let me tell you why. DC Democrats purchased an additional Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are spending $700,000+ in one week trying to convince voters that I’m weak on China. This couldn’t be further from the truth. As a Navy SEAL , I led covert operations around the world to defend our freedoms and keep America safe. Then I built a Montana manufacturing business with zero supply chain dependence on China. While their claims are downright laughable, what’s not is the fact that to date, I’m the only Republican Chuck Schumer and his allies have spent money to attack. In fact, they’ve already spent $2.6 million against me, in addition to the $3.9 million Tester has spent himself. Jon Tester has been in the United States Senate since January 2007 and has done nothing to stop the rise of the Chinese Communist Party. Washington Democrats know I pose a direct threat to their majority, so they’re trying to paint me as someone I’m not. The worst part about American politics is that elected officials often believe they can lie to voters and get away with it. It’s worked for my opponent and his Party before, but Whether you live in Montana or elsewhere, the fact of the matter is that this race will determine control of the United States Senate. Do you feel comfortable sitting on the sidelines when you could and help elect a Navy SEAL who will stand up to China and put America First? to ensure Montana voters know Jon Tester is a two-faced professional politician. Jon Tester is a career politician who said the Chinese Spy Balloon did not “put our national security at risk” and then went and let President Biden and Chairman Xi off the hook after it flew over Montana and across the country, collecting valuable intelligence from sensitive U.S. military sites. Help me boot soft-on-China Jon Tester from the U.S. Senate. [[Join My Team Today]]() Jon Tester is a career politician whose open border agenda is allowing Chinese fentanyl to enter our country, killing over 70,000 Americans a year and becoming the leading cause of death in adults. Help me boot soft-on-crime Jon Tester from the U.S. Senate. [[Join My Team Today]]() On Tester’s watch, “Chinese ownership of U.S. farmland has increased fivefold over the past decade, according to U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) data, from 69,000 acres in 2011 to almost 384,000 acres in 2021.” Despite this disturbing trend, Tester waited until 2023, just before his reelection campaign kicked off, to introduce a bill to block China from buying American farmland. Weak on China, career politicians like Two-Faced Tester are all talk, no leadership. We need leaders willing to fight back, break our dependence on China, and put America First! I’ve told you since June that this race will be the most expensive race in Montana’s history, perhaps the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. If you’re tired of politicians lying to you, . For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. body:
The only way we can fight back is with grassroots supporters like you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1718%2E552475%2ES436fM)
This is urgent, Peter.
**In the first quarter since he launched his campaign, David McCormick, our mega-millionaire opponent, outraised us.**
But it doesn’t stop there. He put $1 million of his own personal fortune to flip this seat red. AND a super PAC supporting him just announced it raised a historic $18 million last year.
[**Before we go any further, we have to ask: Will you rush $5 or more right now to help our campaign compete?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240116-1&refcode2=1718_552475_S436fM&akid=1718%2E552475%2ES436fM)
We always knew this was going to be a tough race, but this is the latest sign that PA’s Senate race could cost half a billion dollars, making it one of the most competitive and expensive of the cycle.
McCormick has millions upon millions of dollars more that he can and will invest into his campaign to defeat Bob and flip PA red, on top of the super PAC support he was already promised by Mitch McConnell.
**With the Senate majority (and the White House) hinging on Pennsylvania, we simply can’t afford to be outraised.**
The best way to fight back is with grassroots support from folks like you, Peter. That’s why we’re setting a 48-hour goal to raise $75,000 to start off 2024 on the right foot.
[**Can Bob count on you to rush $5 or more right now to help us reach our goal and keep PA and the Senate blue? Every dollar makes a difference in a battleground race like this one.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240116-1&refcode2=1718_552475_S436fM&akid=1718%2E552475%2ES436fM)

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: "She's terrific"
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Trump thinks Kari Lake would make a great Senator. Not if we have anything to say about it.
#

Peter,
At his victory speech in Iowa last night, Trump called out to a politician in the crowd:
_“Kari Lake... She’s terrific. She's going to be a Senator, great Senator, I predict.”_
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240116-2-30&t=1&akid=1735%2E734936%2Eq4DhHs)
While Trump locks up the Republican presidential primary, Lake is hard at work campaigning for him. Seems like it’s paying off, because we hear that Trump is coming down to Arizona at the end of this month.
That's great news for Kari Lake, and terrible news for us. Because between Trump's endorsement, this shout-out, and his speech in Arizona, Lake will pull in thousands and thousands more of Trump's supporters. She will rake in HUGE checks and add more big endorsers to her campaign.
Trump's building her up so she can tear Ruben down.
After a few recent polls showing Ruben trailing Kari Lake we risk falling even further behind. That puts our Senate majority in danger.
So we are asking for your help.
[**We’re counting on your support right now to turn this around: Use this link to make your first donation of $3 and help us defeat Kari Lake and Donald Trump in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240116-2-30&t=2&akid=1735%2E734936%2Eq4DhHs)

body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, Ted Cruz here. I’m reaching out today about an opportunity to make a positive impact on Texas and our Nation. We’re kicking off the most high-stakes election year we’ve ever faced. We only have eleven months to STOP the Democrats from flipping Texas blue and holding on to their power in the U.S. Senate. **Now more than ever, I need your help to save Texas and take back the Senate. Will you please consider becoming a Cruz Monthly Benefactor?**
