| | Alaska is under assault by the Washington Democrats. As they enact their agenda to shut down oil, gas, and mining, it's Alaskans who are feeling the pinch—[and unfortunately, the Democrat destruction has just begun.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=b13fd3dea89d4c9aa43275f1020b64e1&_e=xpt08OwlKF7GLA75fWQ5gVw8gwasm3wZxuHZdROObMdzn3P2gW7Ne1flQMMdb-SQAmpVFkFgpmSvrVvQqlZ0k9gaPyEsjrRGkib_giur2k0YNqf6AgZBmNwwL9k09Goq-KkOut9BcIkHV-a2xRc0BoEGbmapF0fsMGx4fRYploUR6j8j3rih8TbpCQYmhie36-md5tAq2udt8E_jpZIy9u6AxQGgFeuGelXfhoHldD_fVj3USOVP6V5G6W3z0UaP) **👉 From day one of the Biden administration, their disastrous agenda has included killing the Keystone XL pipeline, rejoining the Paris Climate Accord, revoking ANWR oil & gas leases, and reinstating Obama-era crushing energy regulations.** All the while, Biden has also depleted more than 45% of our Strategic Petroleum Reserve and gas prices rose to unaffordable levels. [We've got to get America back on track to protect American families from the onslaught.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=b13fd3dea89d4c9aa43275f1020b64e1&_e=xpt08OwlKF7GLA75fWQ5gVw8gwasm3wZxuHZdROObMdzn3P2gW7Ne1flQMMdb-SQAmpVFkFgpmSvrVvQqlZ0k9gaPyEsjrRGkib_giur2k2cUdnm_UYLbczOS3ZHLxHpnBt2ZqATFLd6RhAtCLce5kaxBKg3RanG3w5nRlh378-oC3_RZFbKFBb-7QxTwQzWAYfi1hJzof8DsmXfrH8KgBC1qGN-d6VteCKtc2ehckA1YiDowqdo0bJP1392c-oY) In order to get the job done, I'm counting on supporters like you to step forward and help send me to Congress in 2024. Campaigns are expensive, and we must build a formidable operation now. clean_body: | | | | | Alaska is under assault by the Washington Democrats. As they enact their agenda to shut down oil, gas, and mining, it's Alaskans who are feeling the pinch— 👉 From day one of the Biden administration, their disastrous agenda has included killing the Keystone XL pipeline, rejoining the Paris Climate Accord, revoking ANWR oil & gas leases, and reinstating Obama-era crushing energy regulations. All the while, Biden has also depleted more than 45% of our Strategic Petroleum Reserve and gas prices rose to unaffordable levels. In order to get the job done, I'm counting on supporters like you to step forward and help send me to Congress in 2024. Campaigns are expensive, and we must build a formidable operation now. Thanks for doing your part, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-large | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59820?t=6&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59820?t=7&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59820?t=8&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last three years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59821?t=9&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59821?t=10&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12472%2E878179%2E7iI6lm)
---

subject: Debate or Dodge?
body:
Dan Crenshaw's moment of truth

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Declining forum invitations and trying to poach campaign staff are unacceptable.
This isn't just about a debate; it's about accountability and the kind of representation we deserve in Texas.

body:
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: TRUMP is the right man for the job.

| |

---
| | | _BREAKING: TRUMP WINS IOWA _
**This is my first time emailing you since President Trump WON the Iowa Caucuses.**

I've said it before and I'll say it again: _TRUMP is the right man for the job._

Joe Biden can't hold a candle to the winning message of our America First movement. Even though he just bragged about having more money in his warchest than any Democrat in American history, he is failing and Conservatives are WINNING on the issues.

_**[President Trump and I share a vision for the future of America- and now that he's won Iowa, I'd like to know if you agree:](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ab73f9db33b4e3b8b2766c5e9df343c&_e=FYC8rSwVDH8m0fjIGLV2GSt5Cwr3jenFS3iFHOw1LULsLSbPL2t-_m3v_BNIxfKgCXrSP88QSGNth2p0lDri6BUFEYEiEGRAOjm_BzdKDzy3QFLGo9F32hczxHvFDbW-xAH_a0KJ8psya7GKkO1w3eWm8-QQJxUuu_nUE8cdf2qTT8k9wjEX0V_7EECR3fGRJoblronPP_NEM5hr2T9SQrDXwbyVotMdA9BoH8PY_JJfiTQSkcq1aDtYtfDzmITGBE3gl5Ww6Lu6N5XjMt1MUAKk6KKQtejSSgx2BFcHoKu2ppWLlPehtOlUKav3Q4cLf9M8O2oITTjhvdPdy52VRHjNF2dpfpFN_3072tKZdRiWXRuzgUQR0dEx8c8zRQyWR5nqFPf01EgWiywQqWyOABu3ynzP9PYHGJA-wi72WUQsCgR4E8TfYlKd8pPho2j9r307IDau_a72WMwB-HZUtQ%3D%3D "President Trump and I share a vision for the future of America – and now that he’s won Iowa, I’d like to know if you agree:")**_
**WE BELIEVE:** Strong voter ID laws should be mandated nationwide.

**WE BELIEVE:** Building The Wall is the best way to secure our borders.

**WE BELIEVE:** Our schools should educate, not indoctrinate.

**WE BELIEVE:** Every American should stand for our flag.

**WE BELIEVE:** America must never become a socialist country.

**WE BELIEVE:** Sex change surgeries for minors should be banned in all 50 states.

**WE BELIEVE:** Illegal immigrants should never be prioritized over U.S. citizens - especially our veterans.
We fully understand that not everyone agrees with us. The Radical Left is plowing ahead with their plot to make America a socialist country, leave our borders open, and indoctrinate our kids and grandkids.

But no matter how hard they push, we will always hold the line when the future of America hangs in the balance.

_**[My friend, Donald J. Trump, just won Iowa and I can't wait until he's inaugurated as our President once again. Do you stand with us? If you believe in the same Conservative principles we do, please don't hesitate to confirm your support right here and right now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ab73f9db33b4e3b8b2766c5e9df343c&_e=FYC8rSwVDH8m0fjIGLV2GSt5Cwr3jenFS3iFHOw1LULsLSbPL2t-_m3v_BNIxfKgCXrSP88QSGNth2p0lDri6BUFEYEiEGRAOjm_BzdKDzy3QFLGo9F32hczxHvFDbW-xAH_a0KJ8psya7GKkO1w3eWm8-QQJxUuu_nUE8cdf2qTT8k9wjEX0V_7EECR3fGRJoblronPP_NEM5hr2T9SQrDXwbyVotMdA9BoH8PY_JJfiTQSkcq1aDtYtfDzmITGBE3gl5Ww6Lu6N5XjMt1MUAKk6KKQtejSSgx2BFcHoKvgNyoWOU_e_aMZX0FFyoAhqQ4tWwfONYd9CfUy0i4DxbxerWsmSIvGM6bwsMh-PB05kM83FEyAHHSgVj7K4_z-2IyK8mgS5hZHqZNqe7moMGfQiJQeTAC39q9EWtUN2x7Pddw5Hx7FlFjE7xKiZTGSmcMoow-qqCyUNsnpLtidLA%3D%3D "My friend, Donald J. If you believe in the same Conservative principles we do, please don’t hesitate to confirm your support right here and right now.")**_

The Radical Left thinks they speak for the American People. They believe everyone thinks the same way they do...

NOTHING could be further from the truth. And I have a hunch you'd agree with me.

President Trump won Iowa and I look forward to supporting him all the way to the White House and delivering a Conservative House Majority he can be proud of.

_**[Are you with us? Please confirm your support ASAP using any of these secure links.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ab73f9db33b4e3b8b2766c5e9df343c&_e=FYC8rSwVDH8m0fjIGLV2GSt5Cwr3jenFS3iFHOw1LULsLSbPL2t-_m3v_BNIxfKgCXrSP88QSGNth2p0lDri6BUFEYEiEGRAOjm_BzdKDzy3QFLGo9F32hczxHvFDbW-xAH_a0KJ8psya7GKkO1w3eWm8-QQJxUuu_nUE8cdf2qTT8k9wjEX0V_7EECR3fGRJoblronPP_NEM5hr2T9SQrDXwbyVotMdA9BoH8PY_JJfiTQSkcq1aDtYtfDzmITGBE3gl5Ww6Lu6N5XjMt1MUAKk6KKQtejSSgx2BFcHoKvoCgJy5bYGkjsXkdDtr8lLzCI79wApVQR6gmY2V_OIECSCn9eCXOHs2Gc2TZVyPuavQvkO4lpbjr5_I3RkVx3I--FLiu-0eMdYIzoIJ0wccQtrLhSotllb8xGdMBceELuYMsrg5yLG5-xyIkCas-aRlcXYD7eNqCamZIxjHDpQsA%3D%3D "Are you with us? Together - you, me, and President Trump - we're going to make history.

For America,
Steve Scalise

body:

---
| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d4b9093cbcf943f9b0a8da287570de0a&_e=772p-h5zFefPf93UFMieFuJ9TjxGJ0LnpJI2xz-Wr_i9x3COPNZI6wKgHDkLWNu66zNZ_9zgwUDY0pLpRp0CBNgG21yTE_V77OYhUElD7s23iqqWrm5Rm1VIGmBHvHHNjRYqtSSxVVBopc1oqsEc-0a-UHYcaJYr7xhTOtU2GdrZVLrDAFfkizPTlS582DQP0IvdkNGyM24GL4RWQsoJI1lFHe1m57bXNrz5ey4HqUbivQ0CL5eXsHryAscKOCpWJ4rMaa0MfZ4qfKP-a0mJucrbiZ4X5ogzjOeFvQcFLBVkueoL07PHEV5nB02SMHAn6Np69nf9dxAIB_v8AZqXLQ_e-Ag4cv5PPNouG9kM2el9EqRs-sozM463_2wFyViX)

Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. clean_body: | Friend, This is the first and last email I'll send you. I'm a little hesitant to reach out to you like this. However, my back is against the wall, and your response to this email will decide everything. My name is Rob Bresnahan. You may not know me well, but I'm a fifth-generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian who took over my family's electrical contracting business at the age of 19 years old. I graduated from the University of Scranton, and I've created life-supporting jobs for more than 150 Pennsylvanian families. After that, I started a company with the goal to reinvest in my community by rehabilitating historic buildings, breathing life back into local downtown areas, and providing innovative spaces for the next generation of entrepreneurs. I have dedicated my life to helping the community that raised me into the hard-working man that I am today. Now, I 'm also the Republican Candidate in a MUST WIN race in Northeast Pennsylvania, a district that will certainly decide who controls Washington, D.C. Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and my opponent, Matt Cartwright, are going to flood MILLIONS of Democratic money into this race. I'm the kind of guy who puts his head down and gets the work done without asking for help. Democrats won't stop doing everything in their power to stop us - regular hard-working Americans like you and me - from winning. Democrats don't like us at all. | Listen, I'm not a politician. I'm just an ordinary, hard-working guy who loves America and Northeastern Pennsylvanian. I want to see average Americans keep their lights on. I hope you'll consider helping my campaign. Rob Bresnahan Candidate for Congress (PA-08) PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA PO Box 971, Pittston, PA 18640 Copyright (C) 2024 Rob Bresnahan for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are spending $700,000+ in one week trying to convince voters that I’m weak on China. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=5a15d5ae89a74efdb6e2f0b6e8817329&_t=u9aVZysa8Tf9UOzBw95ELVpY9iZ52ILxTJiHsqbRMCo3SmJRId1p03yCb1lDzy96mf05iomH-puKLrL2kXTzXlKt8pAysIeypiMgwfz4ogg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=5a15d5ae89a74efdb6e2f0b6e8817329&_t=u9aVZysa8Tf9UOzBw95ELVpY9iZ52ILxTJiHsqbRMCo3SmJRId1p03yCb1lDzy96mf05iomH-puKLrL2kXTzXlKt8pAysIeypiMgwfz4ogg%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a15d5ae89a74efdb6e2f0b6e8817329&_e=sXkkdTNCmPFwrPrIRGJHahdzOFaWSdP7MrUPyPI8zcg29J2ZfYzumW8QjjYmNsdgzJ6jOAfxfHc3RB_yuq-iCjl4r1rQJ6V_OS_yf6EiyQPB9Grq32lnPTZdodxfYcI9Y1PbjBYpaxaEYqkUGufhXE8reBv9vX-W-Ttaj74_Jj9D0QX6B5w9-U_PBy4O7DzE6JsWSpJvVVRJzoJMfs4bx6kE8YQzvI5B4Kv4-6qhUOtgzOruTbV9IYV3EIh7s7dIv6SrT8Z0GeGunm2kfg35p2r0Q9_d04LQimMF5XGCyYn1GkGMVyaPwikYYUnT3da5b2t0KiLnUIS9kETGgDtVQxtl6FaUu-Z1KM9-wrYf-lBSXxPOkx6ofswMG9HBZxFU9ZT7RzgJbF-OfK5b6aCS0g%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I need your attention for a few minutes today – please let me tell you why.

DC Democrats purchased an additional _**[$706,000 in ads to attack me over six days.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a15d5ae89a74efdb6e2f0b6e8817329&_e=sXkkdTNCmPFwrPrIRGJHahdzOFaWSdP7MrUPyPI8zcg29J2ZfYzumW8QjjYmNsdgzJ6jOAfxfHc3RB_yuq-iCjl4r1rQJ6V_OS_yf6EiyQPB9Grq32lnPTZdodxfYcI9Y1PbjBYpaxaEYqkUGufhXE8reBv9vX-W-Ttaj74_Jj9D0QX6B5w9-U_PBy4O7DzE6JsWSpJvVVRJzoJMfs4bx6kE8YQzvI5B4Kv4-6qhUOtgzOruTbV9IYV3EIh7s7dI1RbE5ng5fjmyWRO1JUbR-PhS7G9FI23yVBFIObJJeESlWIL2WOH3Lbpj_uefY3Xdil4YQK_1JgEbMWk3S8AQFEyhsi45vtHSCb3qYm9bI_7mwDweSLFg5IPs7kFSnLMGaps-u2AMEghUvkEm-1hq5Q%3D%3D)**_

**Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are spending $700,000+ in one week trying to convince voters that I’m weak on China. **

This couldn’t be further from the truth. _**As a Navy SEAL**_ , I led covert operations around the world to defend our freedoms and keep America safe. Then I built a Montana manufacturing business with **zero supply chain dependence on China.**

While their claims are downright laughable, what’s not is the fact that to date, I’m the only Republican Chuck Schumer and his allies have spent money to attack. In fact, they’ve already spent $2.6 million against me, in addition to the $3.9 million Tester has spent himself.

Friend —

It’s easy nowadays to get lost in the madness and political chaos from my MAGA extremist colleagues.

But you know that I have always been one to stand up to the GOP. I will continue to put accountability first by calling out hypocrisy where I see it, and by bringing justice to light where it's necessary.

At the end of last year, I, along with my Democratic colleagues, did just that by ousting GOP clown George Santos. Today, I’m taking things a step further, but my team needs your help so we can make the next critical investment of this campaign.

Ahead of the November election, I’ve decided that I can’t sit back and let Americans suffer any longer. This includes the people of NY-03, who need our help electing a real, policy driven leader who will put them first.

In partnership with Progress Action Fund, I helped create TV ads that will air in the NY-03 special election next month. Because, if I can prevent another MAGA extremist from being sent to Congress, I will!

Look, we’re all fighting to protect our democracy, our rights, and our country from MAGA extremists in 2024. That’s why your donation to my campaign is an investment that is real. After all, it’s going to take all of us — no matter the district — to create an America focused on community, not chaos.

At the end of last year, I, along with my Democratic colleagues, did just that by ousting GOP clown George Santos. Today, I’m taking things a step further, but my team needs your help so we can make the next critical investment of this campaign. Ahead of the November election, I’ve decided that I can’t sit back and let Americans suffer any longer. This includes the people of NY-03, who need our help electing a real, policy driven leader who will put them first. In partnership with Progress Action Fund, I helped create TV ads that will air in the NY-03 special election next month. Because, if I can prevent another MAGA extremist from being sent to Congress, I will! Look, we’re all fighting to protect our democracy, our rights, and our country from MAGA extremists in 2024. That’s why your donation to my campaign is an investment that is real. After all, it’s going to take all of us — no matter the district — to create an America focused on community, not chaos. Can I count on a donation today so I can help protect our democracy and our rights? name: Ro Khanna
subject: We must protect affordable access to prescription drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

American drug manufacturers charge more for their products than any other country. Despite taxpayer money being used to fund research and development of lifesaving medication, over 9 million Americans [https://www.cnn.com/2023/06/02/health/prescription-drug-costs-rationing/index.html#:~:text=Most%20adults%20between%20the%20ages,according%20to%20the%20CDC%20data.] tried to save money by skipping doses in 2021. Big Pharma’s price gouging and lobbying efforts raked in $38.7 billion [https://accountable.us/analysis-drug-companies-impacted-by-biden-rx-cost-saving-effort-boasted-of-38-7b-in-profits-in-2022/] in profits the following year.

Prescription medication isn’t effective if people can’t afford it. That’s why we need to do all we can to keep its costs in check.

Sign if you agree: The federal government must take on Big Pharma. [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/take-on-big-pharma-2/?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmpu-big-pharma-petition-swap]

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1742679829789462722 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1742679829789462722]

The Biden Administration has done a lot to bring the cost of prescription drugs down, including capping the price of insulin and authorizing Medicare to negotiate lower prices. Now it has introduced a set of guidelines based on existing law that would allow the federal government to exercise “march-in rights” to lower drug costs. If a pharmaceutical company charges prices deemed too high for consumers, its manufacturing license can be transferred to another company that will provide it for less.

The Department of Commerce is holding an official comment period right now on these new guidelines, and they need to hear our support.

Tell the Department of Commerce: Take action to protect affordable access to prescription drugs. [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/take-on-big-pharma-2/?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmpu-big-pharma-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/take-on-big-pharma-2/?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmpu-big-pharma-petition-swap]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20240116-mpu-big-pharma-swap]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

I call them corporate jagoffs because they've been selling out communities like Western PA for their own profits – and extremist right-wing politicians aren't doing anything to stop them. We have a real chance to take back the Democratic House majority from extremists in the upcoming election, hold corporate jagoffs accountable, and protect the Common Good for American workers and their families. clean_body: I can't do this without your support... | | = Hi Derek – will you help me and my team start 2024 off strong? I'm running for reelection to represent PA-17 – the Western PA district that I grew up in, and now raise my family in. PA-17 is full of hard workers who have built America from the ground up. But for far too long, we've seen corporations and their political allies take advantage of American workers \- hiking up prices, shipping jobs and businesses overseas, and fighting against unions and fair contracts. I call them corporate jagoffs because they've been selling out communities like Western PA for their own profits – and extremist right-wing politicians aren't doing anything to stop them. We have a real chance to take back the Democratic House majority from extremists in the upcoming election, hold corporate jagoffs accountable, and protect the Common Good for American workers and their families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Derek, thank you for helping me power this campaign and fight against corporate jagoffs. – Chris Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. clean_body: | | = Peter, I’m doing everything I can to ensure Republican delusions never become a reality... ... we MUST pick up our fundraising pace to compete with their special-interest donors and win. Which is why I need to level with you about the choice we’re facing at this moment: – We can either let extreme MAGA Republicans rake in millions to overtake us and give up our historic chance to reclaim the House... = Hear me loud and clear: With the stakes this high and the race this close, coming even a few dollars short of our goal could impact our chances of winning the House. = | | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

| The GOP only needs to flip one more seat to take control of the Senate.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1862%2E35263%2EDLULKJ)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240116_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1862%2E35263%2EDLULKJ) Hi Peter, Senator Cory Booker here! I just wanted to take a moment to reach out to you about my good friend and colleague, Tammy Baldwin. Tammy has spent her career fighting for folks in Wisconsin and across the country: to lower costs for working families; to restore and protect abortion rights; and for every person’s right to quality, affordable health care.**We can’t afford to lose her voice in the Senate, but she’s facing what could be her toughest reelection yet.** Election experts have named Tammy one of the most vulnerable Senators on the ballot, and Republicans have made it clear that they’ll spare no expense to defeat her and flip the one seat they need to reclaim the Senate majority. Just last month, Senate Republicans confirmed that they’re throwing their support behind an extreme far-right megamillionaire who has promised to spend at least **_$20 million_** of his own personal fortune to flip Wisconsin red. Rest assured, Mitch McConnell and his allies will spend even more to tilt the scales in their favor. This will undoubtedly be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country, and Tammy will need our help to keep this seat blue. **[So I’m personally asking you today: Will you chip in a donation of any amount to reelect Tammy Baldwin and defend our Democratic Senate majority? clean_body: | | | | Her Special Election is critical to defending our Majority. Will you give her your support today? Peter, I hope you’ve heard about the important upcoming Special Election in New York. Keeping this seat red is critical to defending our House Majority, so I wanted to introduce you to our candidate and personally ask for your support in this race. Mazi Melesa Pilip is a loving mother of 7, a veteran of the Israeli Defense Force, and a county legislator. She’s ready to fight for America on day 1 by securing our border, supporting law enforcement, and slashing wasteful spending. | But this Special Election in NY-03 will be one of the closest and most expensive special elections ever! The future of our Republican Majority could rest on this race’s outcome. If we win big here, we will set the tone for conservative victories across the board in 2024 so we can defend and grow the House Majority. But Radical Left billionaires know this, and they’re pouring millions and millions into New York to try to flip this seat. That’s why it's so important for us to unite right now and keep this seat RED | Failure here is not an option. So please, Peter, join me and chip in now to support Mazi Melesa Pilip! SUPPORT MAZI IN HER CRITICAL SPECIAL ELECTION | | | | | | For America, Speaker Mike Johnson Mike Johnson 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Secure the Border! |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e134673885&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

I’ve spent the past two weeks outlining my plans for Safe Communities by focusing on national security and neighborhood crime. But even with the strongest military in the world and the revitalization of local policing, we won’t be safe in our communities until we can secure our national border.

Yesterday, Donald Trump earned a landslide victory in the Iowa Republican caucus. Although Iowa is in the middle of the USA and far from any border, eighty percent of caucusgoers said immigration and border security were extremely important to them. Those voters overwhelmingly cast their ballots for Trump, and it's a big reason why he won by such a large margin ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d7f1d485c5&e=1090c5c412)).

It's not just Republicans who are concerned about the border. The policies of Joe Biden and Susan Wild are causing a humanitarian and national security crisis that’s impacting people across the nation. Cartels and human traffickers are exploiting the weak and the vulnerable. Terrorists and criminals are moving freely back and forth. We have no idea who is coming into our country, and the risk of terrorism is higher than it’s been in years.

In Washington this week, House Republicans are pushing for meaningful policy reforms that will help get our border crisis under control. I fully support their efforts. We need stricter standards for granting asylum, tighter provisions for offering parole, and faster resolution of immigration cases. We need better physical barriers to prevent illegal entry and more serious consequences for breaking the law. And we must support our border control agents who are outmanned and demoralized by the overwhelming numbers of migrants.

I appreciate the essential contributions that immigrants make to our communities and our country. But I’m for legal immigration, not lawlessness. We must only admit immigrants in a manner that benefits Americans and with a system that is orderly, just, and fair.

When I get to Washington, I’ll apply my 28 years of experience in the National Guard to secure the border and protect our homeland. I’m the only person in the race with a background in domestic operations, physical security, and antiterrorism. And I’ll immediately be one of the most qualified Members of Congress in homeland defense.

Joe Biden could secure the border in a week if he had the will to do it. But he and Susan Wild would rather jeopardize our security than oppose the illegal immigration lobby. They are out of touch and ineffective. It’s time for them to go.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father to three sons. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=4582a3199e&e=1090c5c412)._

For additional information about upcoming events, please check the campaign [website](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c14d3b767c&e=1090c5c412) or email [michelle@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx?subject=Events).

Follow us on Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/KevinDellickerforCongress](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1f4a9fdee8&e=1090c5c412)

I addressed the Slate Belt GOP committee in East Bangor and held a Facebook Live forum from my home office. My wife Susan and I attended a very nice New Year's celebration hosted by the Lehigh Valley Tea Party in Allentown, and I did a television interview at my home in response to Joe Biden's visit to Emmaus. This week, our campaign is gearing up for petitions. To help, please email [michelle@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:michelle@dellickerforcongress.com). Thank you!

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77186815/449638494/-401216107?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1OWMxMGMtYTJiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q7a-ApYIj3rsmhL708FZcr0kaj6yhL7aoiKNq7_B1cA=)
Hi there,

With our election year in full swing, I want to thank you for your continued support. My team and I are working day and night to flip AZ-01 from red to blue – because our communities deserve better than far-right extremist David Schweikert.

So today, I want to update you on our recent grassroots work around the district. I’ve already put hundreds of miles on my car since I launched, knocked on more doors than we can count, and met with hundreds of voters who have the power to help us win this seat and bring common sense leadership to AZ-01.

I know that Arizonans are ready for courageous, truthful and dignified leadership in Congress and at home. [**Will you check out our recent highlights on the campaign trail and chip in $3 to keep our strong momentum?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77186816/449638495/-401216107?refcode=em-1.16.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1OWMxMGMtYTJiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q7a-ApYIj3rsmhL708FZcr0kaj6yhL7aoiKNq7_B1cA=)

Thank you,

Marlene
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77186817/449638496/-401216107?refcode=em-1.16.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1OWMxMGMtYTJiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q7a-ApYIj3rsmhL708FZcr0kaj6yhL7aoiKNq7_B1cA=)****
---

* * *
**Yesterday was Martin Luther King Jr Day, and I was proud to march alongside City Councilman Kevin Robinson and Mayor Kate Gallego in Phoenix.** I will never give up fighting for the civil rights of all Americans – as MLK Jr said, “we can do it with love”.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77186818/449638497/-401216107?refcode=em-1.16.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1OWMxMGMtYTJiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q7a-ApYIj3rsmhL708FZcr0kaj6yhL7aoiKNq7_B1cA=)
**This past weekend, I attended a CD1 candidate forum where I spoke about my vision for the district in front of dozens of voters.** I was glad to have the opportunity to share about how critical it is that we win this seat.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77186819/449638498/-401216107?refcode=em-1.16.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1OWMxMGMtYTJiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q7a-ApYIj3rsmhL708FZcr0kaj6yhL7aoiKNq7_B1cA=)
**I also spent hours on the campaign trail this weekend knocking on doors and meeting voters where they’re at.** Canvassing across the district is one of the best ways to spread our message and connect with our AZ-01 community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77186820/449638499/-401216107?refcode=em-1.16.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1OWMxMGMtYTJiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q7a-ApYIj3rsmhL708FZcr0kaj6yhL7aoiKNq7_B1cA=)
I’m inspired by every person I meet on the trail. Each event I attend, door I knock, and phone call I make moves us closer to flipping this seat blue.

[**If you’re with me, I hope you’ll chip in $3 or any amount to help us start 2024 off strong. Every dollar you give helps us plan these events to meet voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77186821/449638500/-401216107?refcode=em-1.16.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1OWMxMGMtYTJiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q7a-ApYIj3rsmhL708FZcr0kaj6yhL7aoiKNq7_B1cA=)

clean_body: | = Hi there, With our election year in full swing, I want to thank you for your continued support. My team and I are working day and night to flip AZ-01 from red to blue – because our communities deserve better than far-right extremist David Schweikert. So today, I want to update you on our recent grassroots work around the district. I’ve already put hundreds of miles on my car since I launched, knocked on more doors than we can count, and met with hundreds of voters who have the power to help us win this seat and bring common sense leadership to AZ-01. I know that Arizonans are ready for courageous, truthful and dignified leadership in Congress and at home. = Thank you, Marlene | **= Yesterday was Martin Luther King Jr Day, and I was proud to march alongside City Councilman Kevin Robinson and Mayor Kate Gallego in Phoenix. I will never give up fighting for the civil rights of all Americans – as MLK Jr said, “we can do it with love”. = This past weekend, I attended a CD1 candidate forum where I spoke about my vision for the district in front of dozens of voters. I was glad to have the opportunity to share about how critical it is that we win this seat. = I also spent hours on the campaign trail this weekend knocking on doors and meeting voters where they’re at. Canvassing across the district is one of the best ways to spread our message and connect with our AZ-01 community. = I’m inspired by every person I meet on the trail. Each event I attend, door I knock, and phone call I make moves us closer to flipping this seat blue. = Thank you, Marlene **=** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

Hi, Peter – Jasmine here.
After meeting with our finance team this morning, there's something you should know: **Unfortunately, we missed our first mid-month goal of the year.**
**We needed to raise $12,000 by 11:59 p.m. last night to fuel our ramp-up ahead of this year's election, and we fell just over $2,000 short. **Of course, it's not the end of the world – but with so much at stake, falling 23 percent short is a troubling sign for our future ability to invest in Democratic women's leadership.
We had the most wins of any organization in the country in 2023, but if we can't hit fundraising moments like this, our team won't have the resources to maintain that level of success in 2024.
All that said, I'm glad to share that there's still hope: **At our meeting,** **I managed to negotiate a 24-hour deadline extension on the final deadline.**
**Until 11:59 p.m. tonight, supporters like you can chip in to help make up the gap and power our work all the way to Election Day – [so please, Peter, rush $10 or more before midnight to help Emerge keep our women-led movement to transform politics going strong.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77187007/449639289/-1986725772?refcode=jtk1407-fr-nd&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0YThkMjM2LWEyYjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0JKr9_UhedS80aX5NNQbjA1LkEbqUW7DeToerg37E6c=)**

# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong

Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

“Am I worried about this? Absolutely not.”

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: [SPECIAL EDITION] #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240116wu?refcode=lpfe240116wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240116wu?refcode=lpfe240116wu]
We’re seven weeks away from the Texas primary election, and as you know, seven is a very special number for our #TX07 campaign. So today, we’re bringing you a special edition of our weekly update with seven ways you can get involved and support our campaign over the next seven weeks!
1. Sign up to join our next Day of Action [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596443/]
Our next Day of Action is January 20 with shifts from 9 to 11 a.m., 11 a.m. to 1 p.m., 1 to 3 p.m., and 3 to 5 p.m. We’re looking for volunteers to help us cover as much ground as possible as we knock on doors and help voters make their plans for casting their ballots by the March 5 primary.
2. Put up a FREE yard sign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24]
Yard signs are an easy but effective way to spread the word about our campaign. Supporters in the area can sign up to get a free yard sign.
3. Phonebank with us
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24]
We have phonebank sessions every week on Tuesdays [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596432/] and Thursdays [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596432/] from 6 to 8 p.m. CT, so you can sign up for whatever shift (or shifts!) works best for you.
4. Join one of our postcard parties [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596445/]
https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596445/ [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/596445/]
We also have postcard-writing parties on Tuesday and Thursday—another easy and meaningful way to reach voters and encourage them to turn out to the polls for the primary! You can also pick up a stack of postcards to work on at home!
5. Publicly endorse Lizzie for re-election [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2]
We’re building a list of #TeamLizzie supporters to show the strength of our ever-growing coalition, and we’d love to have your name on it.
6. Stock up on #TeamLizzie merch [https://store.lizziefletcher.com/]
https://store.lizziefletcher.com/ [https://store.lizziefletcher.com/]
Our merch store is full of shirts, stickers, mugs, and more, so get yours now and show off your #TeamLizzie pride ahead of Primary Day.
7. Forward this email!
You can also help by forwarding this email to your friends and family and encouraging them to volunteer with us and, for those in TX-07, to vote for Lizzie!
And, you know by now, that you can always contribute $7, or whatever works for you, to help us make all of this happen.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240116wu?refcode=lpfe240116wu&amount=7]
Thank you for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

name: Team Williams
subject: What would another Trump presidency mean?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | We knew this would happen, but now it’s official, Peter — **Donald Trump won the Iowa Republican caucus by a landslide.**

**It appears more likely than ever that Donald Trump will be the Republican presidential candidate going into November.** Trump will spend the coming months ramping up his extremist platform — creating chaos across _all_ levels of politics.

Another Trump presidency would be dangerous to our country. Brian is running to take back the House because he knows a Democrat-led House is the only way to keep an extremist president in check and protect our democracy.

body:
Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | |
---
Peter -- We want you to remember something before the Republican primaries really heat up. Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected president in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Whether it’s him or any other Republican...we can’t go back. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. So, please: [**Can President Biden count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today? clean_body: Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | | Peter -- We want you to remember something before the Republican primaries really heat up. Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected president in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Whether it’s him or any other Republican...we can’t go back. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you. You are securing the future of our country with your support. That’s the truth. Team Joe

I am proud to have been born and raised here in Orange County. I have spent my career giving back to our community – from my _pro bono_ legal work, to founding a women-led organization dedicated to advancing American values and ethics.

That is why I am so energized by the thousands of people that have joined Team Joanna since launching our campaign. This movement is growing at a critical time:

**CA-47 is the only competitive open seat in California, and one of the most competitive races nationwide according to the _Cook Political Report._**

This race is a must-win not only for Orange County, but to determine which party takes control of the House majority. We must restore reproductive rights, protect our coastlines, and so much more – but without a Democratic majority, the path becomes near-impossible.

With less than 50 days until our primary, we need all hands on deck to win and move forward to beating our likely far-right GOP opponent Scott Baugh.

clean_body: | = Peter, There are less than 50 days until primary Election Day! We have just a matter of weeks to show our grassroots strength and continue marching toward November. This is an important milestone, and I am honored to have you on my side as we begin our final push. = | **= I am proud to have been born and raised here in Orange County. I have spent my career giving back to our community – from my pro bono legal work, to founding a women-led organization dedicated to advancing American values and ethics. That is why I am so energized by the thousands of people that have joined Team Joanna since launching our campaign. This movement is growing at a critical time: CA-47 is the only competitive open seat in California, and one of the most competitive races nationwide according to the Cook Political Report. This race is a must-win not only for Orange County, but to determine which party takes control of the House majority. We must restore reproductive rights, protect our coastlines, and so much more – but without a Democratic majority, the path becomes near-impossible. name: Carmen Goers
subject: Honor Dr. King's Legacy: Join Us in Championing Equality and Justice
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Honor Dr. King 's Legacy: Join Us in Championing Equality and Justice**
---

Dear Peter,
As we celebrate Martin Luther King Jr. Day this week, we are reminded of the enduring impact of Dr. King's vision for equality, justice, and unity. In Washington's 8th district, we strive to uphold these principles, knowing that our community thrives when every voice is heard and every person is respected.
Our campaign is deeply committed to continuing Dr. King's legacy. We are working tirelessly to bridge divides, champion social justice, and create an inclusive community for all. But to make these aspirations a reality, we need your help.
In honor of Martin Luther King Jr. Day, would you consider supporting our cause with a donation of $20, $50, or $100?

---
| | | |
---
|
Your contribution will enable us to:

* Advocate for that promote equality and combat discrimination.
* Support educational initiatives that teach tolerance and understanding.
* Engage in community projects that embody Dr. King's spirit of service and unity.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65a6d93bf6a3deeecd09b3eb/65a6c2c9d19fa31ef0cdb75f/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=96d3a46a0c59a91e2845cffa46fda7e8c6140634d17e1c14dca9788ec4093195)
---
| | | Let us take this day to not only reflect on Dr. King's profound contributions but also to actively participate in the ongoing work of building a more equitable and just society.

Thank you for standing with us in this vital mission.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---
|

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3a95560fd7634a6a94c93ffea90b6bcd&_e=KZM4tvi14dt0HEjLD34ckux_B_rGk6YJQEG17Fmi0SxZgFC4h7m4PqLxCO3ed889BULHEDD_G5qxFa_MkeoPkB5JvgmGOhbDgfNUnd3xKoNoGHoMhuO7JIBNX237kCLltdbk-kWSZNNVW02NP-BGwsxGHUDXVBCsQyyROa-Vsq1tZvYzSffWxvnK1JwfqnM65gZuEBkpbYfamt6z0KZOc7r0EFeZwMsQoRoYFAknxVMZjylECCEchpzvGlboRJBWIrzcFEpjCduBpT5TyYBOhStkHqySRW85oQq0EHTKg8RQeeixPK5aQLQ-14S3Kue4vuTKIRxHnrR4bD7PofUO7VJEbwsQ3IJ6WGqIuajOkc8By0sfSd4ahb1GOTRoji2DrJprONJn9CzfodjIU8BbxQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I need your attention for a few minutes today – please let me tell you why.

DC Democrats purchased an additional _**[$706,000 in ads to attack me over six days.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3a95560fd7634a6a94c93ffea90b6bcd&_e=KZM4tvi14dt0HEjLD34ckux_B_rGk6YJQEG17Fmi0SxZgFC4h7m4PqLxCO3ed889BULHEDD_G5qxFa_MkeoPkB5JvgmGOhbDgfNUnd3xKoNoGHoMhuO7JIBNX237kCLltdbk-kWSZNNVW02NP-BGwsxGHUDXVBCsQyyROa-Vsq1tZvYzSffWxvnK1JwfqnM65gZuEBkpbYfamt6z0KZOc7r0EFeZwMsQoRoYFAknxVMZjylECCEchpzvGlboRJBWKX4BP68FXMn8P8GExavowePHJX3JJgKhnCvh3BniVatlF5L-5FVZQnUNBdbHVCOmMVYkiMltqD2t6ldo00TgHtdOjEcOQQUwOPYCDvb8jsenOPSWX9Cf470ynrBtc6h9_StG9Ui41BAjpNGPh2XRog%3D%3D)**_

**Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are spending $700,000+ in one week trying to convince voters that I’m weak on China. **

This couldn’t be further from the truth. _**As a Navy SEAL**_ , I led covert operations around the world to defend our freedoms and keep America safe. Then I built a Montana manufacturing business with **zero supply chain dependence on China.**

While their claims are downright laughable, what’s not is the fact that to date, I’m the only Republican Chuck Schumer and his allies have spent money to attack. In fact, they’ve already spent $2.6 million against me, in addition to the $3.9 million Tester has spent himself.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3a95560fd7634a6a94c93ffea90b6bcd&_e=KZM4tvi14dt0HEjLD34ckux_B_rGk6YJQEG17Fmi0SxZgFC4h7m4PqLxCO3ed889BULHEDD_G5qxFa_MkeoPkB5JvgmGOhbDgfNUnd3xKoNoGHoMhuO7JIBNX237kCLltdbk-kWSZNNVW02NP-BGwsxGHUDXVBCsQyyROa-Vsq1tZvYzSffWxvnK1JwfqnM65gZuEBkpbYfamt6z0KZOc7r0EFeZwMsQoRoYFAknxVMZjylECCEchpzvGlboRJBWsd_HsM2A96aqJ5BWrvllKPOmHRg0Ee0wmhRFL0EdO_oeWUq-75O90iHmsjHXwIwd37aYdddaaopbwHPU3FvdJ_8bLzpXuOw43tI0ZgHx3d6wPCiMoe2VXT3qVPGj6Wx7SdNwgbBF763ejyH1ViBrmQ%3D%3D)

[**HELP TIM FIGHT BACK
JOIN THE TEAM TODAY->** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3a95560fd7634a6a94c93ffea90b6bcd&_e=KZM4tvi14dt0HEjLD34ckux_B_rGk6YJQEG17Fmi0SxZgFC4h7m4PqLxCO3ed889BULHEDD_G5qxFa_MkeoPkB5JvgmGOhbDgfNUnd3xKoNoGHoMhuO7JIBNX237kCLltdbk-kWSZNNVW02NP-BGwsxGHUDXVBCsQyyROa-Vsq1tZvYzSffWxvnK1JwfqnM65gZuEBkpbYfamt6z0KZOc7r0EFeZwMsQoRoYFAknxVMZjylECCEchpzvGlboRJBWx9xJOvfSbyt0pTwF3Dic0CZkU1doyXU_Fe17pDpuZUXRhulo8AWpfW357wbRUWMrWhEa9H5VFH7BriTUAXqnqTwk_mcvrk8EcyAdtBXK8vuaX7VYT9MryRs-O2odaLjZ_tnHbailNsDEUF1h0Rfwiw%3D%3D)

Jon Tester has been in the United States Senate since January 2007 and has done nothing to stop the rise of the Chinese Communist Party. _**Washington Democrats know I pose a direct threat to their majority, so they’re trying to paint me as someone I’m not.**_

**The worst part about American politics** is that elected officials often believe they can lie to voters and get away with it. name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f48259f85f524643bd139f584f32c642&_e=-lLXkzF7dcTfymHeSHpALJOWZkAqL6PiJTUOL2Qz6L3yODm-8fAjYCHynuE7kxbkeeBjmOx0aDAYH1SevQZE1tnHnCn_RihOPz8aRG-s5BrtgiRsfw7uXy9Ljo7zjtvQ4spOHwLC4T8xl8KBtt3KdXRPoeOOR2JH7rDQPsvBcDYG4HMA32Uju-Eht2bhHGgiYKJxlTobAAFpfokE8OaGY-KpmnGvWAy8FIlnJuvptb43VGZhOOD63GsLiDWfLE4ylky85-bVSSFTM5jrZD0SBqzXR2DtL8eaqT7gRvBg13OgLbwvUf9GxaZ1zCxuKUHmZrV2mjhIg6TX-aDlzT9qnQB8juOh6sO1LWu7T765ZK5QtO9FHXFPfLQFlnnUSuEN)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f48259f85f524643bd139f584f32c642&_e=-lLXkzF7dcTfymHeSHpALJOWZkAqL6PiJTUOL2Qz6L3yODm-8fAjYCHynuE7kxbkeeBjmOx0aDAYH1SevQZE1tnHnCn_RihOPz8aRG-s5BrtgiRsfw7uXy9Ljo7zjtvQ4spOHwLC4T8xl8KBtt3KdXRPoeOOR2JH7rDQPsvBcDYG4HMA32Uju-Eht2bhHGgiYKJxlTobAAFpfokE8OaGY-KpmnGvWAy8FIlnJuvptb4LMUjDVSSRyk-_1SAANlXwFTKF_wbCSrAxEwP2OhuhQ3ZIVDkHiSzIcdB6_QqUIqlzWAoLcG-Eh3V_a5zwduD1zStAqL49bbrF6TrpO0TLWkrchn3DIHa1fpcf_m9Eaa3FUbj0YdLzvYDXV73q4jKQ)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f48259f85f524643bd139f584f32c642&_e=-lLXkzF7dcTfymHeSHpALJOWZkAqL6PiJTUOL2Qz6L3yODm-8fAjYCHynuE7kxbkeeBjmOx0aDAYH1SevQZE1tnHnCn_RihOPz8aRG-s5BrtgiRsfw7uXy9Ljo7zjtvQ4spOHwLC4T8xl8KBtt3KdXRPoeOOR2JH7rDQPsvBcDYG4HMA32Uju-Eht2bhHGgiYKJxlTobAAFpfokE8OaGY-KpmnGvWAy8FIlnJuvptb7UjMsjVVU9XOBCm82cRl_xsvwmbruk__NBOIi1QChiYA9oBVgcQLWn9IXcLyMgVOaKWJN8M9o53FfUPnsyobhh5UyGGz9LpW9qMZ7EY4BZRdYMmWtzyY4Tkvb2HdXqcspci5pGJj64FCACxUSr-sxh)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f48259f85f524643bd139f584f32c642&_e=-lLXkzF7dcTfymHeSHpALJOWZkAqL6PiJTUOL2Qz6L3yODm-8fAjYCHynuE7kxbkeeBjmOx0aDAYH1SevQZE1tnHnCn_RihOPz8aRG-s5BrtgiRsfw7uXy9Ljo7zjtvQ4spOHwLC4T8xl8KBtt3KdXRPoeOOR2JH7rDQPsvBcDYG4HMA32Uju-Eht2bhHGgiYKJxlTobAAFpfokE8OaGY-KpmnGvWAy8FIlnJuvptb41YeMtrLI4bFTOfJkTLFQQa8Y95CWzVOwaq87_8wrY4oZHG15tuys6_JFnHybeOrsr1i8t9UCPfStg6CoPlKD8bXATJsxm1h99QrKf0u1Ajyy4UDSuF3_2NjEZZgXVvVX5GTL49tE4lyu0kQnv_3FF)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f48259f85f524643bd139f584f32c642&_e=-lLXkzF7dcTfymHeSHpALJOWZkAqL6PiJTUOL2Qz6L3yODm-8fAjYCHynuE7kxbkeeBjmOx0aDAYH1SevQZE1tnHnCn_RihOPz8aRG-s5BrtgiRsfw7uXy9Ljo7zjtvQ4spOHwLC4T8xl8KBtt3KdXRPoeOOR2JH7rDQPsvBcDYG4HMA32Uju-Eht2bhHGgiYKJxlTobAAFpfokE8OaGY-KpmnGvWAy8FIlnJuvptb7WzggxWMPSJ1Df3lxOsLUZnFYWlUtX8y6TV_JlnBRXfoQNcSN9bQ_PDDAz_BUVGqsn-kreltVJCxmDq-4XeiTL1jjNGNhFt3JBgmUTcDy7Y3blGWSLKtbcbW5Atzicd9f0tScLh_9r4lXZN8Bkrjw-)

I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN conspiracy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight. | I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY. As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. | - With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress**

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Shaking up the system
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Shaking up the system
Friend,
I recently received a fundraising letter from Rep. Katie Porter. Yep, I get them too. Normally, I wouldn't share, but I agree and fully endorse her plan to shake up the system.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Her plan substantially changes our election process and how campaigns obtain financing. But, if we're going to make it happen, the first step is winning our primary with grassroots support. Can you chip today? [http://actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
This is Katie Porter's six-step plan. I'm on board.
1.
Ban
Federal
Lobbyist
Contributions
2.
Ban
Corporate
PAC
Donations
3.
Eliminate
Pet-project
Funding
for
Politicians,
also
known
as
Earmarks:
Congress
prohibited
it
under
President
Obama's
administration
due
to
their
tendency
to
result
in
waste
and
fraud.
4.
Ban
Congressional
Stocks
Trading
5.
Abolish
the
Filibuster
and
Ban
Singular
Holds
on
Nominations
:
6.
Increase
Transparency
It's time to shake up the system. But we need your support to do this.
Friend, I do not accept corporate PAC contributions. I reject dark money and refuse to target ultra-wealthy donors looking for political influence.
I'm the only candidate in the race who can say that most of my funds come from grassroots support, from everyday, generous people like you chipping in what they can.
In 2023, we outraised the entire field in individual contributions under $200. Nearly 75% of my funding is from small donations of $200 or less compared to my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman's 10%.
It's because of the generosity of people like you. Every dollar makes a difference.
Thank you,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

clean_body: [] Shaking up the system Friend, I recently received a fundraising letter from Rep. Katie Porter. Yep, I get them too. Normally, I wouldn't share, but I agree and fully endorse her plan to shake up the system. [] Her plan substantially changes our election process and how campaigns obtain financing. But, if we're going to make it happen, the first step is winning our primary with grassroots support. Can you chip today? [] CONTRIBUTE [] This is Katie Porter's six-step plan. I'm on board. 1. Ban Federal Lobbyist Contributions 2. Ban Corporate PAC Donations 3. Eliminate Pet-project Funding for Politicians, also known as Earmarks: Congress prohibited it under President Obama's administration due to their tendency to result in waste and fraud. 4. Ban Congressional Stocks Trading 5. Abolish the Filibuster and Ban Singular Holds on Nominations : 6. Increase Transparency It's time to shake up the system. But we need your support to do this. Friend, I do not accept corporate PAC contributions. I reject dark money and refuse to target ultra-wealthy donors looking for political influence. I'm the only candidate in the race who can say that most of my funds come from grassroots support, from everyday, generous people like you chipping in what they can. In 2023, we outraised the entire field in individual contributions under $200. Nearly 75% of my funding is from small donations of $200 or less compared to my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman's 10%. It's because of the generosity of people like you. Every dollar makes a difference. Thank you, -Dr. Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 JOIN OUR FIGHT [] shop.votedrbob.com [shop.votedrbob.com] FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

name: Harry Dunn
subject: Is this America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey team , Harry Dunn here.
This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history.
So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America?
Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America?
Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America?
That's not American to me. I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection.
If that's the American you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $10 or more to Seth Moulton and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Together,
Harry Dunn
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: DACA by the numbers
body:
I’ll break it down: | | | Peter, let me share a few numbers: **580,000.** That’s how many DACA recipients there are today. That’s how many people are waiting in limbo, while their protections are likely headed to the Supreme Court. **Over 2.5 million.** That’s how many undocumented people were eligible for DACA but never got to participate in the program due to Judge Hanen shutting it down for new applicants. **11 million.** That’s how many undocumented immigrants we’re fighting for. That’s why we say DACA was never enough — _it left over 10 million people behind._ **$10.** That’s the contribution we’re asking you to give to help keep pressure on Congress and President Biden for permanent protections for ALL undocumented immigrants. DACA was never enough on its own — _your $10 will help us fight for more._ **Can we count on you to chip in $10 today and contribute to UWDA’s work securing permanent protections for ALL undocumented people?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8JbUkD225KGoMCb-FmBF-38SnKZIc3Bx6ndnMrIm7q3U7lNBsOznIXkAOvNdnelGwgCEfY-H6O0th5A5VowpVtIav2JJ8xd3ycrbypZvsaBeBWqEqz4BwSU8GL6XUPaC1R37Y2lwV-wk5sHDXIytOV-b_LugSy-Vmb8ugToErKewbGlDWn05GKvH7YEIPyUfnlvV1YPMbs2FramCbSQE6XHXHzP0xqlk4381N0bqDGOAKfQqgK_ec4KM7OGWnOIXVm2_TSgPbbCUOebdB4G0MkPfl-1PrnjcVwom4y_6tnGoiO247an6WMYKPysVWd3Hse4qWQK_H32elsyAUMP31BhyBKxt-otphU5EzmDYqnmw/431/HAqGEiA1QFuy1-iBp7vLWQ/h0/QtjueXQ2_wq28ODy8fcQFRSZ-hmPPn04tQq2XQS1suM)

name: Breaking News Alert (via COURIER)
subject: What Fox News was doing while Trump promised to "unify the country" in Iowa
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77189569/449648074/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzc4ODdjZTYtYTliNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bWEfweoUJ0bynilgN0ACcz-8a6A6mI5TqhmkoTieEC4=&emci=9b68177b-9cb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c7887ce6-a9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
**Peter, the 2024 presidential election is in full swing.**
**[In a moment, we'll tell you what Fox News was doing while Trump promised to "unify the country" in Iowa, but if you're as fired up as we are to stop Trump and Fox News in 2024, please contribute anything you can to support COURIER's work today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77189579/449648081/-1672447260?refcode=em20240116&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzc4ODdjZTYtYTliNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bWEfweoUJ0bynilgN0ACcz-8a6A6mI5TqhmkoTieEC4=)**
Last night, Donald Trump won the Iowa Republican Caucus by a massive margin.
In a relatively measured victory speech, Trump attempted to appeal to moderate voters with the (hilarious) claim that he was ready to “unify the country.”
**While Trump signaled he was already thinking about a general election match-up against President Biden, Fox News was on the air pushing Trump’s stolen election lies and conspiracy theories to its right-wing audience.**
On more than one occasion, Fox hosts shared a poll result showing that two-thirds of Iowa Republicans _still_ believe the 2020 election was stolen by Joe Biden. Rather than fact-check the false claim, Fox just left the poll there, leaving viewers with the impression that the election may have actually been stolen.
**Gee, Fox News, I wonder why so many Republicans _still_ believe the 2020 election was stolen? 🙄**
While Trump’s message moderates as he pivots to the general election, last night is clear evidence that Fox News will keep fanning the anti-democratic flames of conspiracy, division, and hate at all costs.
That terrible reality makes COURIER’s mission of stopping right-wing misinformation campaigns more urgent than ever.
We rely on grassroots supporters like you to make our factual reporting freely available to the communities who are vulnerable to Fox’s lies and that’s why we’re asking for your support today.

clean_body: Peter, the 2024 presidential election is in full swing. = Last night, Donald Trump won the Iowa Republican Caucus by a massive margin. In a relatively measured victory speech, Trump attempted to appeal to moderate voters with the (hilarious) claim that he was ready to “unify the country.” While Trump signaled he was already thinking about a general election match-up against President Biden, Fox News was on the air pushing Trump’s stolen election lies and conspiracy theories to its right-wing audience. On more than one occasion, Fox hosts shared a poll result showing that two-thirds of Iowa Republicans still believe the 2020 election was stolen by Joe Biden. Rather than fact-check the false claim, Fox just left the poll there, leaving viewers with the impression that the election may have actually been stolen. Gee, Fox News, I wonder why so many Republicans still believe the 2020 election was stolen? 🙄 While Trump’s message moderates as he pivots to the general election, last night is clear evidence that Fox News will keep fanning the anti-democratic flames of conspiracy, division, and hate at all costs. That terrible reality makes COURIER’s mission of stopping right-wing misinformation campaigns more urgent than ever. We rely on grassroots supporters like you to make our factual reporting freely available to the communities who are vulnerable to Fox’s lies and that’s why we’re asking for your support today. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you! COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

subject: Short of hitting our very first goal of the year

body:
This election is going to be one of the toughest yet, and we need to start it off strong. We can’t afford to come up short on our very first deadline of the year.
| Peter,

Tonight marks our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the election year, and we’re still a bit short of our goal. This election is going to be one of the toughest yet, and we need to start it off strong. **We can’t afford to come up short on our very first deadline of the year.**

Meeting this goal is not just about numbers; it’s about ensuring we have the resources to navigate the challenges of one of the most competitive races in the entire country. PA-08 is a battleground, and we need to be well-prepared for the fight.

With outside groups already pouring money into flipping this seat, we’re counting on our team to come through in important moments like this.

That’s why it’s so important to hit our end-of-year fundraising goal. By contributing today, you can help show that our grassroots movement is strong, resilient, and ready to face the challenges that lie ahead in 2024.

Peter, I'm asking: will you chip in any amount before our midnight deadline? Every dollar we raise goes directly toward countering baseless attacks, reaching voters, and securing a victory for PA-08 >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-cartwright-q1-2024**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77189672/449648222/-235138156?refcode=em24_240116_mm3_fnd_gq_act___mcp_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240112_mm3_fnd_gq_act___mcp_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=c1887ce6-a9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTg4N2NlNi1hOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhh73y8FKnO6bmGMJYXcDzqCYkahsuVePB8ot1jNAEY=)
