name: The EMILYs List Campaigns Team
subject: Everything you need to know about Florida's Senate race >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
This race could be the key to SAVING our Senate majority |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77189938/449649049/1237601583?sourceid=1052701&refcode=WTEFEM25_20240116_DMPDiveRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg4N2NlNi1hOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uo6vYro0S1bGGXT67mfSJh-fmP5iKZiwhaCfvGefr9c=) Peter, as an EMILYs List supporter, you know that the Senate majority is a BIG 2024 battleground — and this year, all eyes are on Florida. Here's why.

As a reminder, Democrats currently have a 51-49 majority in the Senate. But Democrats also currently hold **23** of the **34** Senate seats up for grabs this cycle. That means we're playing defense nationwide. But when Sen. Joe Manchin (D-WV) announced his retirement, essentially giving his seat to the Republicans, the stakes got a _lot_ higher. Now, we _have_ to pick up a seat just to _maintain_ our existing majority.

But here's the good news: experts agree that Florida is our _best shot_ to gain a Senate seat in 2024, and we've endorsed the _best_ woman for the job: **Debbie Mucarsel-Powell**. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77189939/449649050/1237601583?sourceid=1052701&refcode=WTEFEM25_20240116_DMPDiveRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg4N2NlNi1hOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uo6vYro0S1bGGXT67mfSJh-fmP5iKZiwhaCfvGefr9c=) Former U.S. Rep. **Debbie Mucarsel-Powell** is the perfect challenger in the race for Sen. Rick Scott's Florida seat for a few reasons:
1. **Sen. Scott has never won an election by more than 1.2% of the vote.**__ As a first-term incumbent, this makes him vulnerable. And in contrast, Debbie won her Republican-leaning Congressional district by _1.8%_ in 2018.
2. **Scott has never run in a presidential election year.** And in Florida, Republicans typically perform _worse_ in presidential election years than they do during midterm elections.
3. **More than 60% of Floridians want to enshrine abortion access in their state constitution.** In spite of this, Scott has said he would __ proudly vote __ to pass a _national abortion ban._ Debbie is the pro-choice champion Floridians need to uphold their values in the Senate.

As a former member of Congress, Debbie has a history of public service and advocacy on behalf of Floridians — and she's ready to bring her passion and experience to the Senate. Control of the Senate could _easily_ come down to Florida this November, and Debbie will need the _full support_ of this community to flip this vulnerable seat. ****Democratic pro-choice women saved our Senate majority in 2022,_and they can do it again this year._ Donate now to help support fierce pro-choice Senate candidates like Debbie in must-win races across the country:**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77189940/449649051/1237601583?expresslane=true&amount=15&sourceid=1052701&refcode=WTEFEM25_20240116_DMPDiveRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg4N2NlNi1hOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uo6vYro0S1bGGXT67mfSJh-fmP5iKZiwhaCfvGefr9c=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77189941/449649052/1237601583?expresslane=true&amount=35&sourceid=1052701&refcode=WTEFEM25_20240116_DMPDiveRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg4N2NlNi1hOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uo6vYro0S1bGGXT67mfSJh-fmP5iKZiwhaCfvGefr9c=)

clean_body: This race could be the key to SAVING our Senate majority | = Peter, as an EMILYs List supporter, you know that the Senate majority is a BIG 2024 battleground — and this year, all eyes are on Florida. Here's why. As a reminder, Democrats currently have a 51-49 majority in the Senate. But Democrats also currently hold 23 of the 34 Senate seats up for grabs this cycle. That means we're playing defense nationwide. But when Sen. Joe Manchin (D-WV) announced his retirement, essentially giving his seat to the Republicans, the stakes got a lot higher. Now, we have to pick up a seat just to maintain our existing majority. But here's the good news: experts agree that Florida is our best shot to gain a Senate seat in 2024, and we've endorsed the best woman for the job: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. = Former U.S. Rep. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is the perfect challenger in the race for Sen. Rick Scott's Florida seat for a few reasons: 1. Sen. Scott has never won an election by more than 1.2% of the vote. As a first-term incumbent, this makes him vulnerable. And in contrast, Debbie won her Republican-leaning Congressional district by 1.8% in 2018. 2. Scott has never run in a presidential election year. And in Florida, Republicans typically perform worse in presidential election years than they do during midterm elections. 3. More than 60% of Floridians want to enshrine abortion access in their state constitution. In spite of this, Scott has said he would proudly vote to pass a national abortion ban. Debbie is the pro-choice champion Floridians need to uphold their values in the Senate. As a former member of Congress, Debbie has a history of public service and advocacy on behalf of Floridians — and she's ready to bring her passion and experience to the Senate. Control of the Senate could easily come down to Florida this November, and Debbie will need the full support of this community to flip this vulnerable seat. **Democratic pro-choice women saved our Senate majority in 2022,and they can do it again this year. Donate now to help support fierce pro-choice Senate candidates like Debbie in must-win races across the country:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: The TRUTH movement isn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
We have a country to save
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=4e86ad450c564ea2844765076d6efdf2&_t=IkXfxzG1YJzxWttUdYwQ0fYSIlQozjWpDXVdqnvs8sbk3xZ8oCxYLii8iuPzJuXbuVAi4ZT3nYVfgp7LyIP0c2Aouq2ybbQuIYa6fXgI2Ik%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=4e86ad450c564ea2844765076d6efdf2&_t=IkXfxzG1YJzxWttUdYwQ0fYSIlQozjWpDXVdqnvs8sbk3xZ8oCxYLii8iuPzJuXbuVAi4ZT3nYVfgp7LyIP0c2Aouq2ybbQuIYa6fXgI2Ik%3D)

|

Fellow American,

This was a campaign founded on speaking the **TRUTH.** Not just when it’s easy but also when it is hard. Holding not just the Democrat party accountable but also the Republican party. Taking on the Establishment and the mainstream media at every step. Whether you were with me at the beginning or joined just a week ago:

**I cannot thank you enough.**
Unfortunately, I did not achieve the surprise I was hoping for in the Iowa caucus. I will be suspending my 2024 Presidential campaign.

Another **TRUTH** , we need an America-First patriot in the White House to right the wrongs of the Biden administration. The people spoke loud and clear about who they want. I will be endorsing Donald J. Trump and will do everything I can to make sure he is the next U.S. President. It’s time for our other candidates to unite behind him as well.

I cannot thank my wife, Apoorva, enough for allowing me to follow and pursue this dream. My team and I fought hard and I am so proud of them. I am humbled by the people I met on the campaign trail and their stories on why the American Dream needs to live on.

Fellow American, thank you for being part of this mission, our American revival, and I hope you’ll continue to support its next chapter.

While this is the end of my campaign, it’s only the beginning of our movement.

We have a country to save,

Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** | Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **

---

body:
Here’s everything you need to know about the Left’s 2024 plan to retake the seats they lost in 2022:

---
| Fellow Conservative,

Here’s everything you need to know about the Left’s 2024 plan to retake the seats they lost in 2022:

* Use a Leftist State Court to redraw favorable Congressional seats.
* **Spend over $45 million** to spread lies about New York Republicans in battleground seats.
* Lean on their disgraced Hollywood megadonors to raise millions to line their candidates’ bank accounts.

_**Fellow Conservative, my good friend and colleague Marc Molinaro, is at the top of their target list.**_

[**Marc is facing his first Mid-Month fundraising deadline of the year.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f99054972f97476a8d28e9b92b50a359&_e=A1K_6Wlk5OFiUNaFhCJ8gXQ0urUn-l6VrehoOYGyjDJLTGgjisyB2nJLFLgpeAUg09_82dahYnRjvFZmaokFZEdC_nGC8hcNzrjXmZOPaHJM2BFfIOZK8UKlmZrH_OByS5WPij-61JN7Has0mxaf7Hlqa12n6s2pjnOlRwqPAl4tF3a5MJCC7uVXN_XyjFahJqU7Kxt8dw9KeRZMtH4d3MQZd1QZBPXFVXpC6_laAKx69vZeMbS1_7A6TJY5QcSMXpMcOmb9vvAtXWC5kzu9uNsA3NsHwyKMs3YwVA4v7aoPP24gCdfn5F30mOpWB0nF4AsbaTcQCG6T-CKwlsx-tbn9sa02Mu6eZuUkcrAmaCDpD4bToiI-TIleGnvkaPqgugjbcT-hZYg8Xy9vPBOfH3MT7v_CWFHSsMhuSqMxtrs%3D) Marc’s race will be one of the toughest fights in 2024. What he raises in these first two weeks of 2024 will lay the groundwork for Marc to wage an aggressive campaign to defend this MUST-WIN seat.

clean_body: Here’s everything you need to know about the Left’s 2024 plan to retake the seats they lost in 2022: | Fellow Conservative, Here’s everything you need to know about the Left’s 2024 plan to retake the seats they lost in 2022: Use a Leftist State Court to redraw favorable Congressional seats. Spend over $45 million to spread lies about New York Republicans in battleground seats. Lean on their disgraced Hollywood megadonors to raise millions to line their candidates’ bank accounts. Fellow Conservative, my good friend and colleague Marc Molinaro, is at the top of their target list. Marc’s race will be one of the toughest fights in 2024. What he raises in these first two weeks of 2024 will lay the groundwork for Marc to wage an aggressive campaign to defend this MUST-WIN seat. Marc’s a pugnacious Conservative fighter who overcame the odds to take back NY-19 for Republicans, but if the Democrats keep pouring money into this race, he could be in serious jeopardy. Thank you, Elise Stefanik -- BEFORE DEADLINE EXPIRES --** | | Paid for by Marc for US

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: Let’s talk about the elephant in the room.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We can’t afford to sit idly by.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77190824/449652336/2121881312?refcode=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYjdjMTQ0LWFjYjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r6r3XC_K-cgySeMU58doBAPPjvaLOZvKD5u9Q5dPVYU=)
---
| **JANE PAC's MOST WANTED:** We've compiled a list of our country’s worst climate villains.

**Our Goal:** Expose and derail their anti-climate agenda.

**🔥In the Hot Seat Today:** Winner of the Iowa Republican Presidential Caucus, Donald Trump

**_[Rush a $5 donation to help us elect climate champions at every level of government who are committed to standing up to Trump’s dangerous influence and leadership>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77190825/449652337/2121881312?amount=5&refcode=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYjdjMTQ0LWFjYjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r6r3XC_K-cgySeMU58doBAPPjvaLOZvKD5u9Q5dPVYU=)_**
---
Folks, the results are in from the Iowa Republican Presidential Caucus, and as we anticipated, Donald Trump has emerged at the forefront.
**Here's why Donald Trump's momentum poses a serious threat to our planet in 2024 (and beyond):**
**🤥 Spreading Falsehoods:** Trump has consistently peddled outrageous anti-climate misinformation, denied science-based evidence, and undermined the urgency of the climate crisis.

**⚠️ Anti-Climate Policies:** Trump’s previous term was marked by rollbacks of crucial environmental protections and the rejection of global climate initiatives, setting us back in the fight against Big Oil. And that’s just a glimpse into what’s to come with a second Trump term. 👎

**🗳️ Power and Influence:** Trump's anti-climate stance isn't just his own – it's becoming the _Republican Party standard_. This alarming trend means that down-ballot candidates are more likely to adopt anti-climate policies, pushing forward Trump's dangerous anti-climate agenda. It's a ripple effect that threatens to undermine our environmental progress at all levels of government.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77190826/449652338/2121881312?refcode=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYjdjMTQ0LWFjYjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r6r3XC_K-cgySeMU58doBAPPjvaLOZvKD5u9Q5dPVYU=)
---
And that’s why we need YOUR support to elect pro-climate champions at every level of the ballot, all across the country.

**_[We need leaders who will stand up to Donald Trump& his Big Fossil Fuel backers. It's time for us to come together and take action. Can we count on you to chip in any amount toward our Most Wanted Fund to stand up to Donald Trump and save our planet?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77190827/449652339/2121881312?refcode=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYjdjMTQ0LWFjYjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r6r3XC_K-cgySeMU58doBAPPjvaLOZvKD5u9Q5dPVYU=)_**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77190828/449652340/2121881312?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3ab7c144-acb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYjdjMTQ0LWFjYjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r6r3XC_K-cgySeMU58doBAPPjvaLOZvKD5u9Q5dPVYU=)

clean_body: We can’t afford to sit idly by. | = | JANE PAC's MOST WANTED: We've compiled a list of our country’s worst climate villains. Our Goal: Expose and derail their anti-climate agenda. 🔥In the Hot Seat Today: Winner of the Iowa Republican Presidential Caucus, Donald Trump = Folks, the results are in from the Iowa Republican Presidential Caucus, and as we anticipated, Donald Trump has emerged at the forefront. Here's why Donald Trump's momentum poses a serious threat to our planet in 2024 (and beyond): 🤥 Spreading Falsehoods: Trump has consistently peddled outrageous anti-climate misinformation, denied science-based evidence, and undermined the urgency of the climate crisis. ⚠️ Anti-Climate Policies: Trump’s previous term was marked by rollbacks of crucial environmental protections and the rejection of global climate initiatives, setting us back in the fight against Big Oil. And that’s just a glimpse into what’s to come with a second Trump term. 👎 🗳️ Power and Influence: Trump's anti-climate stance isn't just his own – it's becoming the Republican Party standard. This alarming trend means that down-ballot candidates are more likely to adopt anti-climate policies, pushing forward Trump's dangerous anti-climate agenda. It's a ripple effect that threatens to undermine our environmental progress at all levels of government. = And that’s why we need YOUR support to elect pro-climate champions at every level of the ballot, all across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = We appreciate your support, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This week in Texas - Jan. 16
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here’s what Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Abbott’s escalating cruelty at the border

Last week, Abbott ordered Texas troopers to [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60891?t=1001&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]unconstitutionally seize
control of a miles-long stretch of the border in Eagle Pass, barring
Border Patrol from doing their job to apprehend migrants and deliver
emergency aid to those in distress.

Within 48 hours, a [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60892?t=1002&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]mother and her two children drowned in the Rio
Grande after the Texas Military Department [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60893?t=1003&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]blocked Border Patrol agents
from accessing that stretch of the border.

This tragedy is an expected consequence of Abbott’s actions, and it comes
just days after the governor made headlines for [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60894?t=1004&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]saying he’d shoot
migrants and asylum seekers if it weren’t for the fact that he would be
charged with murder.

As Abbott escalates his deadly and illegal border operations, I hope you
will join me in calling on the Biden Administration to stop Abbott and
enforce the federal government’s clear supremacy on matters of
immigration.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Immigration negotiations in Congress

For weeks, Congressional Republicans have been holding $14 billion in
border security funding hostage in an effort to force Democrats to pass
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60895?t=1005&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]draconian anti-immigrant legislation that would gut asylum access,
build another 900 miles of Trump’s border wall, and increase deportations
in our communities.

But now, U.S. Speaker Mike Johnson is [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60896?t=1006&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]urging his colleagues to reject
all border reforms “until Trump is elected or a Republican is back in the
White House” — making it clear that the GOP only wants to exploit the
crisis at our border for their own political gain.

To drive home the point, when asked why the GOP is withholding DHS funding
and stonewalling reforms, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60897?t=1007&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]Texas Rep. Troy Nehls (R) said: “Let me tell
you, I'm not willing to do too damn much right now to help a Democrat and
to help Joe Biden’s approval rating.”

As the GOP works to worsen the chaos at the border, Democrats must boldly
lead on this issue and provide voters with a clear alternative. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60898?t=1008&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]This is
a great piece that outlines how they can do that in this moment.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ken Paxton’s upcoming trials

After years of dodging accountability for his corruption and abuse of
public office, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton will finally [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60899?t=1009&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]be forced
to take the stand in a civil whistleblower lawsuit outlining his misdeeds.

On Friday, the Texas Supreme Court [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60900?t=1010&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]denied Paxton’s appeal to avoid
testimony and end the lawsuit, ruling that he must sit for deposition on
February 9th. In addition to this case, Paxton will face a separate
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60901?t=1011&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]securities fraud trial in criminal court on April 15th.

Both trials serve as a long-overdue opportunity to hold Paxton accountable
after the Texas Senate [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60902?t=1012&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]voted to acquit him on all impeachment charges
last year. We’ll keep you updated as the cases move forward.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Winning elections in Texas

With so much at stake right now, Powered by People is training thousands
of volunteers to register and organize the voters we need to win elections
in Texas.

If you live in Texas, sign up for a Volunteer Deputy Registrar (VDR)
training to register voters in your community:

Sign up for a VDR training:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60903?t=1013&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]Tuesday, Jan. 16 at 6:00 PM
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60904?t=1014&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]Thursday, Jan. 18 at 12:00 PM
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60905?t=1015&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]Sunday, Jan. 21 at 1:00 PM

If you live outside of Texas, sign up for a Texting Team training to help
us contact unregistered Texas voters:

Sign up for a Texting Team training:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60906?t=1016&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]Wednesday, Jan. 17 at 12:00 PM

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240116.B3hpFX&refcode=ema20240116-237978&t=1017&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]If you can’t make a training, please consider chipping in
$3 today to help us recruit volunteers and register more
voters across Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240116.B3hpFX&refcode=ema20240116-237978&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1036&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv ]DONATE $3

I hope it’s a great week for you.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1037&akid=237978%2E444211%2EHLgKRv

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

body:

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qjlPNUKFJQn0cvuCC7WTAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRniXhaP0SqaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3N1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNTY4TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zdXByZW1lY291cnRzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTZXA3NwY0IKZaHB5aZl-g4ms1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qjlPNUKFJQn0cvuCC7WTAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRniXhaP0SqaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3N1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNTY4TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zdXByZW1lY291cnRzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTZXA3NwY0IKZaHB5aZl-g4ms1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) [NO](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qjlPNUKFJQn0cvuCC7WTAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRniXhaP0SqaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3N1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNTY4TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zdXByZW1lY291cnRzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTZXA3NwY0IKZaHB5aZl-g4ms1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qjlPNUKFJQn0cvuCC7WTAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRniXhaP0SqaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3N1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNTY4TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zdXByZW1lY291cnRzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTZXA3NwY0IKZaHB5aZl-g4ms1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qjlPNUKFJQn0cvuCC7WTAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRniXhaP0SqaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3N1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtc3VydmV5P3NjPTAwNTY4TjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zdXByZW1lY291cnRzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTZXA3NwY0IKZaHB5aZl-g4ms1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WTuTsFCT49NM1Nn8NuvUOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRniXhaP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWhweWmZfoOJrNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tc3L0XzCaY1nllhz3XBv_A~~/AARclAA~/RgRniXhaP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplocHlpmX6DiazUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Justice Democrats
subject: No mention of Palestinians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Over the weekend, we surpassed the 100th day of the Israeli military’s
assault on Palestinians. At this point, at least 24,000 Palestinians have
died, with more than 61,000 injured and missing, and 85% of the population
displaced from their homes.

And yet, the Biden Administration completely failed to mention
Palestinians in their official statement marking 100 days of war in Gaza.

This omission is disturbing, but not surprising, given President Biden has
spent the last 100 days willfully ignoring the Palestinian people while
funding their ethnic cleansing. Though he claims to be “running out of
patience” with Netanyahu’s human rights abuses, Biden continues to
bankroll this genocide.

That’s why we must continue to keep up the pressure for an immediate,
permanent ceasefire. Justice Democrats incumbents like Cori Bush, Rashida
Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Summer Lee, and Jamaal Bowman are leading this fight in
Congress, but they’re facing relentless attacks from right-wing groups
like AIPAC ahead of their competitive primary elections this spring and
summer.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240116.Xw_Fth&refcode=em20240116-32852&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32852%2E1203867%2E0fDf3D ]Will you support the Squad as they continue to stand up for peace and
human rights for Palestinians by chipping in $3 or more to
help us re-elect them this year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240116.Xw_Fth&refcode=em20240116-32852&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=32852%2E1203867%2E0fDf3D ]Contribute $3

We can’t afford to lose their courage and leadership in Congress in a time
like this. Thanks for anything you can give to fuel our work to protect
the Squad.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=32852%2E1203867%2E0fDf3D ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=32852%2E1203867%2E0fDf3D ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240116-32852-footer&t=1023&refcode2=32852_1203867_0fDf3D&akid=32852%2E1203867%2E0fDf3D

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=32852%2E1203867%2E0fDf3D

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Dr. Paul Gosar
subject: our resolve must be steeled
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | darkest hours faced by our forebears | [](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-22-40-30-7a49ec6c26-3pcaa6af20)
---
**Dear Fellow Patriot,**

In the midst of these tumultuous times, I write to you not just as a Congressman but as a fellow citizen deeply concerned about the course of our great nation.

_We stand at a crossroads, where the decisions we make and the actions we take will echo in the annals of history._

**The Conflict in Israel and Gaza:**

The recent events in Gaza, sparked by the heinous attacks of Hamas, have led to catastrophic consequences. As Israel responds to this grave threat, we are reminded of the harsh realities of war. The destruction wrought in Gaza is a direct result of Hamas's unprovoked aggression. In this hour of trial, our stance must be unyielding in the support of Israel’s right to defend itself against existential threats.

Let us not be swayed by the revisionist narratives that seek to distort the historical truths of this region. The land, known by many names through the ages - Judea, Samaria, Israel - has been the crux of much contention, but we must recognize the deep-seated roots of this conflict. **_Our policies, which currently extend aid to both sides of this conflict, demand rigorous scrutiny and immediate reassessment_.**

**The Yemeni Quagmire:**

In Yemen, a land of strategic significance, a complex war rages on. The involvement of factions like the Houthis, Al Qaeda, and the Islamic State present a convoluted tableau. Our nation's indirect support for factions against whom we have previously waged war is a matter of grave concern._**The recent military actions undertaken by the current administration, devoid of Congressional consent, are a stark departure from our constitutional directives**_.

_Amidst these global crises, we must also turn our gaze homeward, where our own**economic landscape is marred by distressing indicators**_ :

The average price rise of **17.3%** since the current administration.
A staggering **20.2%** increase in food prices.
Rent soaring by **19%.**
Electricity costs escalating by **25%.**
The average American paycheck diminished by **2.5%.**
**62%** of our citizens, including those with substantial earnings, grappling with financial precarity.
**27%** of our people compelled to encroach upon their retirement funds.
**60% f** inding it arduous to afford basic sustenance.
Furthermore, the alarming **$2.4 trillion economic loss,** the unprecedented $**1 trillion credit card debt** , and the heart-wrenching fact that **99% of Americans are worse off than before the pandemic** , are clear indicators of the dire state of our economy.

__In this moment, akin to the darkest hours faced by our forebears, our resolve must be steeled__.

**[I, Congressman Paul Gosar, pledge to confront these challenges with the tenacity and rigor they demand. But in this endeavor, I am not alone – for your support is the bastion upon which our success rests](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-22-40-30-7a49ec6c26-3pcaa6af20)**.

Your contribution, both in spirit and in resources, is the lifeblood of our campaign. Together, we shall embark on a journey to restore the greatness and prosperity of our nation. We shall strive not only for economic recovery but for a steadfast and judicious approach to the global conflicts that test our values and resolve.

**In unity, there is strength._

[Together, we shall rise to meet these challenges, unwavering in our commitment to the principles that define us. Your support is not merely a contribution; it is an affirmation of our shared ideals and a testament to the indomitable spirit of our great nation](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-22-40-30-7a49ec6c26-3pcaa6af20)_**.

Yours in service,

Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S. P.S. **[In these trying times, the measure of our character is tested. Let us rise to the occasion, as our forefathers did, with courage and conviction. Your support is not just needed; it is imperative](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-22-40-30-7a49ec6c26-3pcaa6af20)**. | [ DONATE >> ](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-22-40-30-7a49ec6c26-3pcaa6af20)

clean_body: | | | | darkest hours faced by our forebears | Dear Fellow Patriot, In the midst of these tumultuous times, I write to you not just as a Congressman but as a fellow citizen deeply concerned about the course of our great nation. We stand at a crossroads, where the decisions we make and the actions we take will echo in the annals of history. The Conflict in Israel and Gaza: The recent events in Gaza, sparked by the heinous attacks of Hamas, have led to catastrophic consequences. As Israel responds to this grave threat, we are reminded of the harsh realities of war. The destruction wrought in Gaza is a direct result of Hamas's unprovoked aggression. In this hour of trial, our stance must be unyielding in the support of Israel’s right to defend itself against existential threats. Let us not be swayed by the revisionist narratives that seek to distort the historical truths of this region. The land, known by many names through the ages - Judea, Samaria, Israel - has been the crux of much contention, but we must recognize the deep-seated roots of this conflict. Our policies, which currently extend aid to both sides of this conflict, demand rigorous scrutiny and immediate reassessment. The Yemeni Quagmire: In Yemen, a land of strategic significance, a complex war rages on. The involvement of factions like the Houthis, Al Qaeda, and the Islamic State present a convoluted tableau. Our nation's indirect support for factions against whom we have previously waged war is a matter of grave concern.The recent military actions undertaken by the current administration, devoid of Congressional consent, are a stark departure from our constitutional directives. Amidst these global crises, we must also turn our gaze homeward, where our owneconomic landscape is marred by distressing indicators : The average price rise of 17.3% since the current administration. A staggering 20.2% increase in food prices. Rent soaring by 19%. Electricity costs escalating by 25%. The average American paycheck diminished by 2.5%. 62% of our citizens, including those with substantial earnings, grappling with financial precarity. 27% of our people compelled to encroach upon their retirement funds. 60% f inding it arduous to afford basic sustenance. Furthermore, the alarming $2.4 trillion economic loss, the unprecedented $1 trillion credit card debt , and the heart-wrenching fact that 99% of Americans are worse off than before the pandemic , are clear indicators of the dire state of our economy. In this moment, akin to the darkest hours faced by our forebears, our resolve must be steeled. . Your contribution, both in spirit and in resources, is the lifeblood of our campaign. Together, we shall embark on a journey to restore the greatness and prosperity of our nation. We shall strive not only for economic recovery but for a steadfast and judicious approach to the global conflicts that test our values and resolve. In unity, there is strength. . Yours in service, Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S. P.S. . | View as a Web Page PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS Copyright © 2023 Gosar For Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
Union leadership in Missouri is exposing Hawley as a fraud and a phony
#
Peter — January 6th wasn’t the only time Josh Hawley was exposed as a fraud.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42644?refcode=em20240116-4621&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4621%2E614464%2EX-SdLp)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42644?refcode=em20240116-4621&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4621%2E614464%2EX-SdLp)**
**Hawley’s hypocrisy about his support for workers has drawn serious coverage from several in-state and national news outlets.**
_Business Insider_ reported on Hawley’s opposition to the PRO Act. _The Intercept_ exposed him for accepting campaign contributions from the Big Three Automakers. And the _St. Louis Post-Dispatch_ found that Hawley’s most recent agreement rating on the UAW’s Labor Union scorecard is 0%.
**Even union workers are calling out Hawley’s BS:**
> _There’s a stark difference between staging a photo op with unions...and taking real votes in the Senate to fight for us..._
> _We know [Hawley]’s only changed his tune because of polling and the fact that he’s up for re-election next year._
> _This isn’t my first rodeo. I know a fraud when I see one. And working people are sick and tired of it._
**It’s about time working Missourians had someone actually fighting for them in the U.S. Senate — not a fraud and a phony like Josh Hawley.** That’s why Lucas Kunce is running to replace him, with support from the Missouri AFL-CIO and dozens more statewide and local unions across the state.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Records Show Joe Biden Used Email Alias in Correspondence which Included Hunter Biden and James Biden; Signed Off on Brief Cessation of Secret Service Protection for Hunter and Natalie Biden
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it received 426 pages of records in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit from the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) that show then-Vice President Joe Biden’s use of an email alias to correspond with family members, including son Hunter and brother James; and that Joe Biden signed off on the cessation of Secret Service protection for Hunter Biden and Beau Biden’s daughter Natalie during an August 2016 trip to Kosovo.

| | |

| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 16, 2024

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: We must put a stop to gun violence. Period.
body:
|
#
Peter, A couple weeks ago, former president Donald Trump was asked about a recent school shooting in Iowa. Do you know what he had to say about it? _“It’s horrible, but we need to get over it.”_ **Get over it?** No, we don’t need to get over it. _We need to stop it._ We need to stop this cycle of violence and protect our children, communities, families, and every single person in this country from senseless, preventable gun violence in our schools, grocery stores, mass transit, places of worship, and public spaces that should be safe for everyone. But for too long, NRA-backed Republican lawmakers who put power and money over the lives of their constituents, have blocked us from addressing this crisis. **To defeat the gun lobby and finally pass common sense gun safety legislation, we _must_ defend every single Senate seat this November, including mine. That’s the only way we will have a fighting chance at protecting our razor-thin majority and pushing past GOP obstruction.** **[**Our mid-month fundraising deadline is just hours away, Peter, and I’m counting on your support. So please, pitch in $10 or any other amount today to help me protect this seat and continue the fight for common-sense gun safety reforms. clean_body: | Peter, A couple weeks ago, former president Donald Trump was asked about a recent school shooting in Iowa. Do you know what he had to say about it? “It’s horrible, but we need to get over it.” Get over it? No, we don’t need to get over it. We need to stop it. We need to stop this cycle of violence and protect our children, communities, families, and every single person in this country from senseless, preventable gun violence in our schools, grocery stores, mass transit, places of worship, and public spaces that should be safe for everyone. But for too long, NRA-backed Republican lawmakers who put power and money over the lives of their constituents, have blocked us from addressing this crisis. To defeat the gun lobby and finally pass common sense gun safety legislation, we must defend every single Senate seat this November, including mine. That’s the only way we will have a fighting chance at protecting our razor-thin majority and pushing past GOP obstruction. = | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** ** Thank you, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

clean_body: | = Peter, before you close this email, please read my note to you. My campaign launched its first mid-month goal of 2024 a few days back, and tonight is our midnight deadline. This is the benchmark point we've set to determine whether we have enough fuel in the tank to keep January going strong. As of 3:00 PM today, we have $2,781 left to raise. I know we have it in us to get it done. Folks across the Lowcountry are counting on our campaign to defeat Nancy Mace and restore honest, sensible leadership to the district. Reaching our fundraising goals is the only way we'll be able to deliver that to them. So I'm asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I can't thank you enough for your support, \- Michael B. Your early investment is a sign of strength that signals to everyone that we have the support, resources, and determination to win next year.

name: Taylor Hawkins
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q)
Hi Peter, it’s Taylor, Bob’s Finance Director, here with a crucial update on our race: **in the last fundraising quarter of 2024, we were outraised.**
These were the first fundraising numbers we’ve seen from David McCormick’s campaign this cycle, and here are the unfortunate truths:
— McCormick is already starting to self-fund his race by writing himself a **$1 million** check.
— A super PAC supporting him just announced that it raised **nearly $18 million** – a record-breaking amount. _
_
[**As finance director, it’s my job to ensure that we have the resources to compete. That’s why our team set a goal to raise $75,000 in 48 hours.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240116-2&refcode2=1722_552475_5Wxw2Q&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q)
But it isn’t all bad news, Peter. Here’s what gives me hope in the grassroots support we’re building:
— Last quarter, 92% of contributions to our campaign were **under $100.**
— We received more than **59,000 contributions** from over **36,000 donors.**
[**So I have to ask: Can Bob count on your support? Whatever you can donate today will help us fight back against the wall of GOP money and keep PA and the Senate blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240116-2&refcode2=1722_552475_5Wxw2Q&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240116-2-el&refcode2=1722_552475_5Wxw2Q&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240116-2-el&refcode2=1722_552475_5Wxw2Q&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240116-2-el&refcode2=1722_552475_5Wxw2Q&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240116-2-el&refcode2=1722_552475_5Wxw2Q&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240116-2-el&refcode2=1722_552475_5Wxw2Q&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240116-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240116-2&refcode2=1722_552475_5Wxw2Q&akid=1722%2E552475%2E5Wxw2Q)
---
Thank you so much for your support.
Taylor
Finance Director, Bob Casey for Senate

Hi friend,
We hope you’ve had a great start to 2024.
As the new year begins, we’re getting ready to set our agenda for the year. But before we do that, Michael wants to hear from you.
We put together a 2024 issue survey, so you can tell us what you want to see Michael focus on in the new year. Whether it’s reproductive rights, democracy reforms, climate action, or more, your feedback matters >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/supporter-priorities-survey-2024]
TAKE OUR 2024 SUPPORTER PRIORITIES SURVEY [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/supporter-priorities-survey-2024]
TAKE OUR 2024 SUPPORTER PRIORITIES SURVEY [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/supporter-priorities-survey-2024]
In 2023, Michael made it a point to travel to all four corners of our state and connect with Coloradans from all walks of life. He believes that government must be by the people, for the people — and he knows that hearing directly from constituents is a critical part of his job.
Your feedback shapes the issues Michael talks about, works on, and fights for.
We created a unique link to our Supporter Priorities Survey just for you. Will you take less than five minutes to fill it out now?

Team Bennet

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
“As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That’s why I just announced that I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – and he needs yours as well if we’re going to win. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=3d15d39e48944a9fabdb9e1315adc5fe&_t=DCkOO5NfrUkGV6FXFE_v0AU5vB46cc71vx7d5jCBu2g75175zWyVSi4AqetNID0TSBWAIPyzxrWvGhFtCnJoHg9RfiupPG7l-E9-5rHdWEs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=3d15d39e48944a9fabdb9e1315adc5fe&_t=DCkOO5NfrUkGV6FXFE_v0AU5vB46cc71vx7d5jCBu2g75175zWyVSi4AqetNID0TSBWAIPyzxrWvGhFtCnJoHg9RfiupPG7l-E9-5rHdWEs%3D)

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3d15d39e48944a9fabdb9e1315adc5fe&_e=VkdrNhh5bGU0daWpOmH6ZtxFvxDOXUFimfmth1LqXu5Sen-sRCYE14crj3ShfZnTOQuqQjbEKXTljCdIiDhLRFru0FVr5turwhzbQxwgyIaossWw4NppGTIHcRINwu493XQpwZsUMUHBn3Ulk4fDDEmMdFSZ6lSmUkyI25eucc8blSO8PnWNpxPmzT4IcTrWqZFt2j1tTmmNpBKt0Vr4I1tWPtAJ_9KB-oW5wg1ZYeAP0EasNnSaBkJewD8mCeFK23MP73PE1_d_5kmahympi2JRFiFYZ9UngUhScwZOFaOJ4aAYjCRUNnOtfiLZCNOJQ5q9jFo2mtX90xfvgGeV1ceidN7khfBn85SKi8EGggkCT9Bz_0iQWSsOtpxq0jRPFioKfFlmBx2UvOYJFAaYJg%3D%3D)

Fellow patriot,

There’s an old adage in politics: “As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That statement has never been truer than in 2024.

Yes, we’ve had important elections in the past, but I think you will agree that we are at a point we’ve never seen in American history. So, let me cut to the chase: _I believe the outcome of Ohio’s US Senate race will determine the future of our country._

That’s why I just announced that **I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno** for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – [**and he needs yours as well if we’re going to win.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3d15d39e48944a9fabdb9e1315adc5fe&_e=VkdrNhh5bGU0daWpOmH6ZtxFvxDOXUFimfmth1LqXu5Sen-sRCYE14crj3ShfZnTOQuqQjbEKXTljCdIiDhLRFru0FVr5turwhzbQxwgyIaossWw4NppGTIHcRINwu493XQpwZsUMUHBn3Ulk4fDDEmMdFSZ6lSmUkyI25eucc8blSO8PnWNpxPmzT4IcTrWqZFt2j1tTmmNpBKt0Vr4I1tWPtAJ_9KB-oW5wg1ZYeAsEIXrgSPMUGspe6iDjTXyLr_agc3_wHfxjEY6PdwdFgMPNFdCOaYQDQn_ff1ConpOph9Tjlw91FCWrjktbtMZO33JgRZpfMXKdlMmeis6--TGQov5_OHsniohKEuiMQUKZrVKyYcKmNVPviQnkldBXp8H7Jq56eNXVaBZkaqZQQ%3D%3D)

**This will be THE TOP U.S. SENATE RACE in America in 2024** – one that we simply cannot afford to lose if we’re going to save our great country.

[**Will you step up now with a donation to support Bernie’s campaign in this highly competitive and critical race?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3d15d39e48944a9fabdb9e1315adc5fe&_e=VkdrNhh5bGU0daWpOmH6ZtxFvxDOXUFimfmth1LqXu5Sen-sRCYE14crj3ShfZnTOQuqQjbEKXTljCdIiDhLRFru0FVr5turwhzbQxwgyIaossWw4NppGTIHcRINwu493XQpwZsUMUHBn3Ulk4fDDEmMdFSZ6lSmUkyI25eucc8blSO8PnWNpxPmzT4IcTrWqZFt2j1tTmmNpBKt0Vr4I1tWPtAJ_9KB-oW5wg1ZYeDN24wM4mfzOLWYT8Ghdr9DxcIR6Y5-LQennueMhKhBq2vPWIZs5JP1_VZeWvlSul2AP2ihcnkLGxGlGbCUKAMZE6OdrW9YrBYHCYdkoaQCSrVWNBHj4udg6d4jidQ7NvhVdUBNwytO0iU0WghPL_uzvKRE0Ejem33f7-G3ddXHcQ%3D%3D)

[ ** Support Bernie Moreno for U.S. Senate **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3d15d39e48944a9fabdb9e1315adc5fe&_e=VkdrNhh5bGU0daWpOmH6ZtxFvxDOXUFimfmth1LqXu5Sen-sRCYE14crj3ShfZnTOQuqQjbEKXTljCdIiDhLRFru0FVr5turwhzbQxwgyIaossWw4NppGTIHcRINwu493XQpwZsUMUHBn3Ulk4fDDEmMdFSZ6lSmUkyI25eucc8blSO8PnWNpxPmzT4IcTrWqZFt2j1tTmmNpBKt0Vr4I1tWPtAJ_9KB-oW5wg1ZYeDFMUoVfdJ7vpclB9zIEkLgcQb0M5FDzwB0vs8kSRZvjEWi6J8yDyEAvf29z0fowFwkPq7vvtVe9K4FBN_KyXA8GdF0irFUxg5iT6smRNY9EgHiHg8Ch0ryRUhTLNpor8TbqI87tdElWWEH4XolnY0JF0GxKYtV4sZu8bAIFEVgfA%3D%3D)
Bernie is a businessman and political outsider with a record of success in the face of adversity. He is an optimist, and a fierce supporter of our America First principles. He is the type of leader we need to end the Left’s corrupt crusade against President Trump once and for all.

**I’m joining President Trump and other conservative leaders in announcing my endorsement of Bernie Moreno for the U.S. Senate.** [**I’m asking you to join us and rush your critical support for Bernie Moreno’s campaign by chipping in $15, $25, $35, or even more today.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3d15d39e48944a9fabdb9e1315adc5fe&_e=VkdrNhh5bGU0daWpOmH6ZtxFvxDOXUFimfmth1LqXu5Sen-sRCYE14crj3ShfZnTOQuqQjbEKXTljCdIiDhLRFru0FVr5turwhzbQxwgyIaossWw4NppGTIHcRINwu493XQpwZsUMUHBn3Ulk4fDDEmMdFSZ6lSmUkyI25eucc8blSO8PnWNpxPmzT4IcTrWqZFt2j1tTmmNpBKt0Vr4I1tWPtAJ_9KB-oW5wg1ZYeCcI5tuHO392Ji517lW1_1kyucl07ordggkMvzR-398qCA7hN0lfOQL6Vl2bxEpyYuqeoBpk9szryeA5QnvkjFuv0mXVU57mRhObVbqpswJaOWm_qhRAuD24qFkG0AeSLN0MI39DWYsw6VgdyQ4aZSmBBf40T94jGMPDXyOlDwgfA%3D%3D)

[ ** Support Bernie Moreno for U.S. Senate **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3d15d39e48944a9fabdb9e1315adc5fe&_e=VkdrNhh5bGU0daWpOmH6ZtxFvxDOXUFimfmth1LqXu5Sen-sRCYE14crj3ShfZnTOQuqQjbEKXTljCdIiDhLRFru0FVr5turwhzbQxwgyIaossWw4NppGTIHcRINwu493XQpwZsUMUHBn3Ulk4fDDEmMdFSZ6lSmUkyI25eucc8blSO8PnWNpxPmzT4IcTrWqZFt2j1tTmmNpBKt0Vr4I1tWPtAJ_9KB-oW5wg1ZYeCCd7CDq5V7NFfPPODfUDeVT5FUbS1JtrgAkWUysiXbu_uNxAPksVI5AOAxWA7WlNKo4w5cgYw66ftfgDkcTEOUM1AoDypYmmNQndlAd6l-b-czzdZA6X7qjKCew8IFTKN8ISsaHadrq-H5m9_1_SFh6ddhrKYTSluPWqQ9khDFbQ%3D%3D)
Thank you,

**Jim Jordan**
U.S. Congressman [OH-04]

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: “As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That’s why I just announced that I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – and he needs yours as well if we’re going to win. | | Fellow patriot, There’s an old adage in politics: “As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That statement has never been truer than in 2024. Yes, we’ve had important elections in the past, but I think you will agree that we are at a point we’ve never seen in American history. So, let me cut to the chase: I believe the outcome of Ohio’s US Senate race will determine the future of our country. That’s why I just announced that I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – This will be THE TOP U.S. SENATE RACE in America in 2024 – one that we simply cannot afford to lose if we’re going to save our great country. Bernie is a businessman and political outsider with a record of success in the face of adversity. He is an optimist, and a fierce supporter of our America First principles. He is the type of leader we need to end the Left’s corrupt crusade against President Trump once and for all. I’m joining President Trump and other conservative leaders in announcing my endorsement of Bernie Moreno for the U.S. Senate. Thank you, Jim Jordan U.S. Congressman [OH-04] Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. We honored Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. yesterday with a day of contemplation, service and renewal of hope. When we think about all Dr. King stood for, and what he faced to bring his vision of a more just America to light, we stand a bit taller and are more determined than ever to continue his work.
**So we’ve made the following resolutions for 2024:
**
1. We will defend democracy in Georgia by fighting for equal access to the ballot box. It’s our Constitutional right as Americans.
2. We will work every day [to make our agenda a reality,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77192077/449657538/-509195635?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDg0MzI0Ni1iMmI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CZo4VX1GDsmzJOAjSdSJCFwrxlTj2jKoHHNXm7Rdo5M=&emci=0a650e0b-a7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=bd843246-b2b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=16273785) including protecting reproductive freedom and keeping Georgians safe from gun violence.

| | Hi Peter, The folks who call Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District home deserve someone who will fight for their priorities in Congress and deliver real results **_–_**** _[that fighter is Raquel Terán.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77192452/449658000/-58528819?refcode=X_011624_raquelfights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUxODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk4NDMyNDYtYjJiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XPiLY76OhZWuJV_DLfYUeLbj8mL8vyuzLCf63kiv8bw=)_** **Why?** Whether as a grassroots organizer, a state legislator, or chair of the Arizona Democratic Party, Raquel has fought for working Arizonans for nearly two decades. When corporate Republicans in Arizona tried to prevent minimum wage increases and limit access to healthcare, Raquel fought back _– and won!_ When far-right extremists like Joe Arpaio and Kari Lake attacked immigrants and tried to undermine our democracy, Raquel helped build the coalition that _defeated them_ at the ballot box. Peter, it’s Maxwell. I just wanted to reach out with a quick update before the end of the day.

We’re only $2,916 short of my Mid-Month fundraising goal. I just did the math on my phone, and that means I only need 195 more folks to chip in just $15.

And listen, the money matters, but it’s really about what it can DO – power organizing, fight back against fascism, and keep me in Congress fighting for us. We’re not done here, not by a long shot.

So please – I know we can get there, but we only have 8 more hours until my deadline at midnight. Can you chip in $15 before the night ends?

Peter,
George Santos may be expelled from Congress, but his “amazing friend” is running to replace him, and, like Santos, she refuses to answer simple questions about what she stands for.
Santos’ corruption and lies were disgraceful, and that’s why he was the first House member in years to be expelled! But now, Mazi Pilip, who called Santos an “amazing friend,” is running to replace him in Congress in the Special Election on February 13.
Mazi is hiding from the press, refusing to do debates, and making sure that nobody in NY-03 knows where she stands on the important issues. We can’t let her win.
So, Peter, we need to win this crucial TOSS-UP special election in just a few weeks. Rush a split donation with Fight for Progress to NY-03 and help make sure that Santos ally Mazi Pilip gets nowhere near Congress! subject: Call for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77193248/449660747/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2M1ZDM3YTktYjNiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T6oSIkAiIy3rDm83nQTw9UZMjW2CpbT4tRZAalLKn6A=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77193249/449660748/1973090705?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2M1ZDM3YTktYjNiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T6oSIkAiIy3rDm83nQTw9UZMjW2CpbT4tRZAalLKn6A=) Adrian Fontes here, your Arizona Secretary of State. My team has a fundraising goal coming up at the end of this month, so after work, I’ve been doing the classic dial-for-dollars thing. The catch is, I can’t call _everyone_ in the next few days, so I’m hoping you’ll forgive me for reaching out via email this time instead. But if we _were_ on the phone right now, here’s how our conversation may go: **There are lots of Democrats asking me for a donation right now.**
**Why should I donate to your campaign specifically?** I’m one of a handful of Democrats elected statewide in Arizona. In 2022, I defeated a Trump-endorsed QAnon conspiracy theorist and January 6 attendee, and I need your help to be ready to defend this seat. **Oh, well good job.**
**But that crazy guy wouldn’t have actually won right?** It’s disturbing to think about, but he could have. MAGA extremists poured money into his campaign — he spent over $2 million against me and claimed not only that the 2020 election was rigged but that *I* had been rigging elections. **...were you rigging elections?** NO! Come on, you know me better than _that_. I’ve actually upgraded our state’s election security so we can prevent cyberattacks. I’ve also been working to expand secure mail-in-voting options so _everyone_ can participate in our elections, and am _aggressively_ fighting disinformation that’s hurting voters' confidence in our Democracy. **Alright, I believe you. And you need the donation soon?** If you can afford to chip in a grassroots donation today, I’d really appreciate it. My team says I need to raise $2,600 more before the end of January to hit this month's goal. name: Stop Funding Netanyahu's War via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie is forcing a vote to end aid to Israel TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, Bernie is
forcing a vote in the Senate as early as tonight that could end U.S.
funding for Israel’s war in Gaza. Bernie is saying NO to Congress sending
$10 billion more to fund Netanyahu’s bombing campaign. And the vote
tonight is part of Bernie’s stand against more violence in Gaza. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13435?source=email-20240116&t=1011&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Will
you add your name to stand with Bernie and urge the Senate to vote for
Bernie’s resolution to investigate Israeli human rights abuses against
Palestinians?

-----Forwarded Message-----
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Sent: Saturday, January 13, 2024
Subject: Add your name: Bernie’s call to end funding for Israel’s bombing
campaigns

Peter Willis,

Bernie has been calling for an end to unconditional aid to Israel for
weeks — after Netanyahu began the illegal, immoral, brutal, and grossly
disproportionate war against the Palestinian people.

With Congress working on a funding bill to send Israel another $10 billion
in unconditional aid, Bernie is saying NO — and calling on other members
of Congress to oppose more U.S. funding for the bombing of civilians in
Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13435?source=email-20240116&t=1012&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Stand with Bernie: Add your name to urge members of Congress to oppose
$10 billion in funding for Israel's war in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13435?source=email-20240116&t=1013&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]ADD YOUR NAME

Over 23,000 Palestinians have now been killed by Israel's war in Gaza, and
women and children have accounted for two-thirds of those killed. It would
be unconscionable for Congress to go ahead and send another $10 billion to
Netanyahu during this horrific war on the people of Gaza.

Bernie recently said, “We must understand that Israel’s war against the
Palestinian people has been significantly waged with U.S. bombs, artillery
shells, and other forms of weaponry. And the results have been
catastrophic.”

In an all-out effort to stop funding this war, Bernie is using all of the
legislative maneuvers he can. He’s even invoking section 502b of the
Foreign Assistance Act, which would force the Senate to vote on a State
Department investigation into Israeli human rights abuses, which would
then force a vote on finally conditioning any aid sent to Israel.

The lawmakers in Congress willing to speak out in support of a ceasefire
and call for peace has been slowly growing — with Progressive champions of
peace like Reps. Barbara Lee and Rashida Tlaib bravely taking a stand for
an end to violence at the beginning of the conflict.

Now is a critical time to join Bernie, Lee, Tlaib, and other peace
champions to urge Congress to stop supporting Netanyahu’s war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13435?source=email-20240116&t=1014&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Add your name: The U.S. cannot keep sending billions to Israel as
Netanyahu continues the relentless bombing campaign in Gaza. Stand with
Bernie and demand Congress say NO to this $10 billion in aid to Israel.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20240116.rIdPSU&t=1007&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240116.bQrG4p&t=1008&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20240116.wX9eZ4&t=1009&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-20240116._bP5tk&t=1010&akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=5194%2E5885482%2Ed1lxrN

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for

name: Team Rick
subject: Scott Perry's Worst Nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
When 10th District MAGA Rep. Scott Perry is not committing treason, he’s studying the field of Democrats in the race to replace him. No doubt he has a dream opponent to run against in the fall.

Perry’s dream Democrat is someone who doesn’t live in the district, has never run for office, has never voted in a Democratic primary, has never established a Democratic base, has never won as a Democrat in a Republican district, has never served our country in uniform, has never run a small business, has no understanding of foreign relations or economics, has no experience with rural life, doesn’t have the listening and learning skills of a teacher, and has already been beaten once before.

**Rick Coplen has none of those liabilities** , which makes him Scott Perry’s worst nightmare. That’s exactly what makes Rick the best candidate to confront him and beat him.

On January 23, 10th District _Democrats can sign just one petition_ to put the strongest possible Democrat on the ballot in November. **That’s Rick Coplen.**

Don’t make Scott Perry’s dream come true. Bless him with a nightmare and _sign Rick Coplen’s petition._

Name recognition can be bought. Qualifications to serve our people and communities can’t.

_Help Rick now:_
* **Forward this to every Democrat you know.**
* [Donate to drive Rick’s campaign forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77193814/449662750/616904455?amount=10&source=RC_EM_EN_WL_240116_1_1&refcode2=7e055254-b6b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=QMDT2/5/bKzTw5IlC8g/yNvJKBLftviT60Gdygmrvn07gwZ3aDudpWcvjX2Gwc3/&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTA1NTI1NC1iNmI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jf90X4edU4j2OKn2_Qua96_fPO0---WQsuF0EDWUqio=)

Thanks for everything.

No doubt he has a dream opponent to run against in the fall. Perry’s dream Democrat is someone who doesn’t live in the district, has never run for office, has never voted in a Democratic primary, has never established a Democratic base, has never won as a Democrat in a Republican district, has never served our country in uniform, has never run a small business, has no understanding of foreign relations or economics, has no experience with rural life, doesn’t have the listening and learning skills of a teacher, and has already been beaten once before. Rick Coplen has none of those liabilities , which makes him Scott Perry’s worst nightmare. That’s exactly what makes Rick the best candidate to confront him and beat him. On January 23, 10th District Democrats can sign just one petition to put the strongest possible Democrat on the ballot in November. That’s Rick Coplen. Don’t make Scott Perry’s dream come true. Bless him with a nightmare and sign Rick Coplen’s petition. Name recognition can be bought. Qualifications to serve our people and communities can’t. They're watching us| | | Peter,
Joe Biden and the Democrats will do whatever it takes to control everything you do.

They want to control your children with woke propaganda in education, they want to control who you vote for by removing candidates from the ballot, they want to control what news you watch, and they even want to control what kind of stove you use.

Peter, we’re EXTREMELY worried about the future of America.

November’s election may be our last chance. We can’t let Democrats take away our freedom. And we need to protect our kids and grandkids from Democrats’ agenda of control. We MUST turn things around in November before it’s too late.

[**Your contribution will help us take back a Republican Senate Majority and bring FREEDOM and LIBERTY back to our great country.
