name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759f9c48ec9d44c4893e04c5882f84e0&_e=V_Uqjn1pk6Hi3BLzSN-05FEZiFZi6-T9YzxkVk2QZK5X5yedUlESR77RZL3mSqdFo3shZC3KQMFHJGkFejNefL4CRhmWekYvsttzAINLJhkPEb8O5PY0Vi9z_m6YCgMHzwXw1oYy9gUfyoz3Eo718ZnQKP_U465HUpB83HWaYrA55aieuyg_-v64gXBqVzQAuI_P_rGEL8izSR_hScdjKBK9x0d0k4bMIQJ484ZxjFDbb1FBQcuJgV_kOFWG-hx076e_AgdaZNJFxHE4q8tzx1ec_pgqDXyGf5zLojc9980rj-Cy6EQlVX33kpFeX4tIVHi7gQp2QSqK5-ol2KngiFApWxdZhHpZMrdJfBlbIBXZ6lzlTIEXFkrxFpR_hS2UF7Mr8nd7MvmJqoBsQgLyAg%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759f9c48ec9d44c4893e04c5882f84e0&_e=V_Uqjn1pk6Hi3BLzSN-05FEZiFZi6-T9YzxkVk2QZK5X5yedUlESR77RZL3mSqdFo3shZC3KQMFHJGkFejNefL4CRhmWekYvsttzAINLJhkPEb8O5PY0Vi9z_m6YCgMHzwXw1oYy9gUfyoz3Eo718ZnQKP_U465HUpB83HWaYrA55aieuyg_-v64gXBqVzQAuI_P_rGEL8izSR_hScdjKBK9x0d0k4bMIQJ484ZxjFDbb1FBQcuJgV_kOFWG-hx08l80y7kbnmLcY-NOlTmOXUVRIolIU_j7YLUd-0uEW4LJeP_pAMnsd98YASNjzM08u7sdtNiIc4eEmaORAhTxzV-Bn0mYZ3dGgyB1tliqq50yubQcHaDDQIRrquaO9x4mWyhh1VyYzGWsnsHmWkc68g%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.

clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: Never has, never will
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The super PACs and their right-wing donors are watching us closely.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=864%2E791427%2ECXjTji)

Friend,
We know we've reached out a bit more than usual today. Our hope is you don't take these messages as an annoyance, but a signal of how important they are to this movement.
The simple truth is that all the texts and emails like this one that we send drive the overwhelming majority — over 99.7% — of donations to this campaign. So yes, we send a good number of them, and that's why.
Unlike some, Ilhan doesn't waste her time chasing checks from corporate lobbyists or rubbing elbows with billionaires at black-tie fundraising galas.
She never has, she never will — and we think we can all agree we wouldn't have it any other way.
But the thing is, because of the way this campaign is powered, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas.

Fellow Conservative, There is nothing quite like the Iowa caucuses. As I've said in the past, it's a process that I know intimately well and one that I have immense respect and appreciation for. Tonight I say congratulations to President Trump on his well-deserved, decisive victory in Iowa. It is clear that he will be our party's nominee and standard bearer this November. _**I am endorsing Donald J. Trump for President**_**. ** As patriotic Americans, **now is the time for us to unite** **as one** to oust Joe Biden, win back the Senate, hold the House, and save our country from the ceaseless series of disasters we have suffered since Joe Biden and the Democrats took control of Washington, DC. **_[**_To help us win this fight, please make a donation right now to support me and President Trump as we work together to defeat Joe Biden and Save America. clean_body: | | | Fellow Conservative, There is nothing quite like the Iowa caucuses. As I've said in the past, it's a process that I know intimately well and one that I have immense respect and appreciation for. Tonight I say congratulations to President Trump on his well-deserved, decisive victory in Iowa. It is clear that he will be our party's nominee and standard bearer this November. I am endorsing Donald J. Trump for President. As patriotic Americans, now is the time for us to unite as one to oust Joe Biden, win back the Senate, hold the House, and save our country from the ceaseless series of disasters we have suffered since Joe Biden and the Democrats took control of Washington, DC. name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: What I told House Ways & Means today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
It's time for Consumer Tax Relief
| | |
---
| | Derek, I wanted to share with you below my introductory testimony for the Consumer Tax Relief Act that I delivered to House Ways and Means earlier today. Best regards, Joe Sweeney \--- _To the Members of the House Ways and Means Committee,_
_Today, I speak before you to introduce House Bill 1422, the Consumer Tax Relief Act, a crucial piece of legislation that not only reflects our commitment to fiscal responsibility but also addresses the pressing needs of Granite Staters in these challenging economic times. This bill is more than a fiscal adjustment; it is a beacon of hope and a testament to our vision for New Hampshire – a vision that positions our state as a leader in freedom and prosperity in the Northeast._
_In the current economic climate, marked by inflation and escalating costs of living, the people of New Hampshire are facing unprecedented financial pressures. The policies emanating from Washington D.C. have contributed to a surge in the cost of goods, affecting the daily lives of our citizens. Month after month, Granite Staters are grappling with the rising expenses that are stretching their budgets to the breaking point. In these times, when factors beyond our control are making life harder for our people, it is imperative that we take decisive action to provide relief where we can. One of the most effective ways we can do this is by cutting taxes here in New Hampshire, and that is precisely what the Consumer Tax Relief Act aims to achieve._
_In New Hampshire we have found great success by lowering our taxes on employers and our economy and we’ve seen the economic boon that has come from previously passed relief. We’ve lowered our business taxes and we’re in the final year of our Interest & Dividends Tax, an income tax that was placed on Granite Staters that is finally coming to an end. But, we cannot rest on our laurels and get comfortable with our tax structure where it is now. We must be even more aggressive and efficient at identifying future tax cuts and our options to provide relief to Granite Staters._
_The Consumer Tax Relief Act is a direct response to the economic hardships faced by our citizens. By proposing significant tax reductions, we are not only easing the financial burden on our residents but also sending a clear message that we are here to support them in tangible ways. Lowering the Business Profits Tax (BPT) and the Business Enterprise Tax (BET) aligns with the original vision of these taxes, fostering a more business-friendly environment and encouraging economic growth. This growth is crucial for providing job opportunities and stability for our citizens._
_Moreover, the elimination of the Communications Services Tax (CST) and the reduction of the Meals and Rooms (M &R) Tax below Massachusetts' rates are strategic moves to enhance our state's appeal and competitiveness. These reductions will directly benefit consumers by lowering the cost of essential services and dining out, helping to mitigate the impact of inflation on everyday expenses._
_Furthermore, by increasing the distribution rate to the Meals and Rooms Municipal Revenue Fund, we are ensuring that funds our municipalities are expecting under the current budget and rate are not affected by cuts to the Meals and Rooms Tax rate._ _The Consumer Tax Relief Act is a proactive step towards alleviating the financial strain faced by Granite Staters due to external economic pressures. It is a bill that not only offers immediate tax relief but also lays the groundwork for long-term economic resilience. I urge my fellow Representatives and all stakeholders to support this bill, recognizing it as a necessary measure to support our citizens in these challenging times and to secure a prosperous future for New Hampshire._
_Thank you for your attention and consideration in this matter._
_Best,_ _Representative Joseph Sweeney_ _Rockingham 25 | Salem_

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What Trump’s win in Iowa means for Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1031%2E135344%2EMJlxFF)

Friends -
Last night, Donald Trump won the Iowa Caucus, cementing him as the frontrunner and probable Republican nominee for president in 2024.
If you woke up with a feeling of deep unease that another Trump term in office is possible, you are not alone.
Next up for the Republicans is New Hampshire, then Nevada and South Carolina.
Then, on February 27th, it's Michigan. That means not only will our state be decisive in determining the outcome of the presidency and the Senate, it may first be decisive in crowning Trump as the Republican nominee.
So what does that mean for us? It may mean lots of visits from Republican candidates and surrogates rallying and organizing their supporters in the next few weeks. It may mean ads on the air. In our race, we’re already seeing TV ads go up from self-funders and a GOP super PAC.
All of this gives Republicans, and by extension our eventual opponent, a bit of a head-start in campaigning. And with a race as close as ours is sure to be, that's something we can't afford.
So while Republicans get set to rally in Michigan, I need your help to start a bit of a rally of our own:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, directly to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan? All of us will have a role to play in making sure Trump loses the presidency and Democrats hold the Senate.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240116-2-30&t=2&akid=1031%2E135344%2EMJlxFF)**

name: Schiff HQ
subject: When our democracy was in danger, Adam stood up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5085%2E5257348%2Ele7Val ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — With
Donald Trump’s win last night in Iowa, he is the clear frontrunner to be
the GOP nominee. Which means our democracy is once again facing an
existential threat.

And we need Adam Schiff in the Senate to stand up to him — just as he has
for years.

body:
Stay safe!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77194463/449665181/-849459103?refcode=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzMTQ2Mi1iOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvRqu5Wv2LX7VO_xkkAufcbgX8Hyc-QLrBgGyOhM7sQ=&emci=dacc7824-a7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)
---
Hey y’all, I just wanted to take a brief moment to say that I hope all of you are staying safe and warm as we navigate through this winter storm, and share a few tips and community resources across the state with y’all, in case of emergency: **_[https://www.tn.gov/tema/news/2024/1/15/flash-report--1-extreme-winter-weather.html](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77194464/449665182/-832580325?refcode=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzMTQ2Mi1iOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvRqu5Wv2LX7VO_xkkAufcbgX8Hyc-QLrBgGyOhM7sQ=&emci=dacc7824-a7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)_** If power outages occur, here is how you can best protect yourself and others:
* Wear layers of loose-fitting, lightweight, warm clothing as well as hats, mittens, and blankets.
* Close blinds or curtains to keep in some heat.
* Close off rooms to avoid wasting heat.
* Place towels or rags in cracks under doors.
* Practice portable generator safety: use outdoors and at least 20 feet away from doors, windows, and garages to avoid carbon monoxide poisoning. Follow instructions on proper use.
* Once your family is safe, check on your neighbors and the vulnerable to make sure they are okay.

Try to stay off the roads, but if you have to travel, make sure to keep the following items in your vehicle:
* Mobile phone and charger
* Blankets and sleeping bags
* Flashlight with extra batteries
* First-aid kit
* High-calorie, non-perishable food
* Extra clothing to keep dry
* Small can and waterproof matches to melt snow for drinking water
* Sack of sand or cat litter for traction
* Shovel
* Windshield scraper and brush
* Tool kit
* Tow rope
* Battery booster cables
* Candle and lighter to provide light in an emergency.

I am so very thankful for the road crews, doctors, nurses, shelters, and other emergency workers for working overtime to provide essential services for our communities. Take care, and let’s keep each other safe out there! — Gloria Johnson
| **Follow along:** | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77194465/449665183/1975306500?refcode=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzMTQ2Mi1iOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvRqu5Wv2LX7VO_xkkAufcbgX8Hyc-QLrBgGyOhM7sQ=&emci=dacc7824-a7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)**| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77194466/449665184/1927029700?refcode=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzMTQ2Mi1iOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvRqu5Wv2LX7VO_xkkAufcbgX8Hyc-QLrBgGyOhM7sQ=&emci=dacc7824-a7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)**| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77194467/449665185/1311047781?refcode=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzMTQ2Mi1iOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvRqu5Wv2LX7VO_xkkAufcbgX8Hyc-QLrBgGyOhM7sQ=&emci=dacc7824-a7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f7431462-b9b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)**

Peter, Last week, we kicked off another state legislative session under the Republican supermajority. As we both know, Indiana is facing immense challenges. We have a lagging higher education rate, rural hospital services are closing, our education system is stressed, and families can’t find reliable, affordable healthcare or childcare. However, instead of working on those challenges, the Republican supermajority wants to talk about ‘gender’ and attack the right to vote for thousands of Hoosiers. _**[This year, we need just four seats to break the Republican supermajority, and return the conversation to sanity. clean_body: | Peter, Last week, we kicked off another state legislative session under the Republican supermajority. As we both know, Indiana is facing immense challenges. We have a lagging higher education rate, rural hospital services are closing, our education system is stressed, and families can’t find reliable, affordable healthcare or childcare. However, instead of working on those challenges, the Republican supermajority wants to talk about ‘gender’ and attack the right to vote for thousands of Hoosiers. = These bills are just more attacks on hardworking Hoosier families, including military families and transportation-challenged Hoosiers who would be impacted by these new requirements. Hoosiers don’t want to see us return to the same old culture wars every single session; they want to see real results for their communities and families. = Thanks, INDems | | | = | = [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Glenn says he hasn't heard from you yet, my friend. Our team is compiling responses to our 2024 Voter Survey, and we know Glenn will want your opinion. In November, we have a huge opportunity to expand our majority, fire Joe Biden and take back the U.S. Senate. With success on Election Day, we can finally get America back on track. We're finalizing our 2024 strategy, but we want to hear from you before finalizing our campaign plans. **[Please take 1-3 minutes to submit your 2024 Voter Survey response.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=c2b81bdc75904fb1ab9a36fb9dcdbe55&_e=RFXFL6vMJtn1TyLHuVcayoGuWX91xctyz52EFTl2jUg97DsdwxjVjS9IZUvAa5UfYZcwZhCfsCyrVOh8zMSNMQGJj_LerBqaNIIELTdG4Y5_iuXcXTVkx4-ZlnHGlgLT9RZj1JpvcO3_6148SuCZFTPHJHdl5OkIxYQPAmXIYxIvlRPjs-JFkJRmVyvZmHTkTGvgAUAoSXYTxFj3iXNIsa9HrMwHhl_I6PCgmadjHS8FUo0ii8bF18HwoqTmq_ZT)**

On January 13th, the voters of Taiwan elected [Lai Ching-te of the Democratic Progressive Party](https://substack.com/redirect/12983b69-fccb-4a1f-a880-250c0c630fdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (DPP) as their next president of the island nation. Lai successfully defeated Hou Yu-ih of the Nationalist Party (also known as the Kuomintang or KMT) and Ko Wen-je of the upstart Taiwan's People Party (TPP). [The DPP won with 40.1% of the vote, compared to 33.5% for the KMT and 26.5% for the TPP](https://substack.com/redirect/4bad0f1a-7318-482c-b899-611f70dde291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
## [Hou, Ko, Gou or Lai? ](https://substack.com/redirect/baf6da15-4d56-437f-a4dc-5781433db6c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| October 31, 2023
[](https://substack.com/redirect/baf6da15-4d56-437f-a4dc-5781433db6c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[On January 13, the Republic of China (also known as Taiwan) will hold its next presidential election. The outcome of that election will impact Taipei's relationship with Beijing and could lead to a m...](https://substack.com/redirect/baf6da15-4d56-437f-a4dc-5781433db6c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/baf6da15-4d56-437f-a4dc-5781433db6c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In late October last year, I wrote a piece about the Taiwan election (pasted above). In it, I laid out what various outcomes might imply and suggested that a Lai victory would lead to greater tensions with Beijing, including a possible escalation that led to armed conflict. I also noted at the time that a Hou victory would potentially de-escalate tensions as the prospects of peaceful reunification would increase with Beijing-friendly leaders in Taipei and that a Ko win would be a statement that the voters wanted to improve relations with Beijing and focus on economics and domestic issues.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e04902c4-4553-4a07-989e-679f1d30e086?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |

---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 7
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/e04902c4-4553-4a07-989e-679f1d30e086?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8p3fHMmOm8OJ4adQ9R7FV19r1lN7fK7IDHqFe3XWQ64?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=140721682)
The other development I noted in October was the possibility of the TPP and KMT forming a coalition that combined forces to increase their chances of winning. [Such an attempt was indeed made but quickly collapsed](https://substack.com/redirect/daca8887-52f9-4436-bd58-bab3e77e1c08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), leading to a [splintering of the opposition support](https://substack.com/redirect/66516996-8ce3-424d-9d0c-243a7f346b89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bd4ed8f3-5702-41a6-b64f-eb453c48b24c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The one aspect of the election that I did not previously explore was the "down-ballot" impact of the election outcome. And from that perspective, the ruling DPP lost its majority in the legislature, a development which will make it necessary to work with others. Lai's party lost 10 seats while the KMT gained 14 and the TPP picked up 3. No party has a majority.
The implications of this divided government are many. To begin, Lai's governing agenda is now at risk of dilution as he must develop a useful relationship with folks in the TPP or the KMT in order to accomplish his goals. One of the most contentious domains in which Lai will face challenges is defense spending. And given Taiwan procures much of its armaments from the United States, this may in fact de-escalate tensions with Beijing.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e04902c4-4553-4a07-989e-679f1d30e086?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [Vikram's New Book: Order Your Copy Now!](https://substack.com/redirect/e04902c4-4553-4a07-989e-679f1d30e086?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 7
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/e04902c4-4553-4a07-989e-679f1d30e086?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8p3fHMmOm8OJ4adQ9R7FV19r1lN7fK7IDHqFe3XWQ64?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=140721682)
Despite the muddled message voters sent to Beijing, President-elect Lai used the unprecedented third consecutive victory for his Democratic Progressive Party to announce "[This is a night that belongs to Taiwan. We managed to keep Taiwan on the map of the world](https://substack.com/redirect/42793aa1-d3cf-4a1b-afa7-04c946f0947f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)...[We are telling the international community that between democracy and authoritarianism, we will stand on the side of democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/f8f59e59-55b0-4b6e-8ac6-9648018dfa8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
US Secretary of State Anthony Blinken agreed, congratulating the citizens of Taiwan for "[demonstrating the strength of their robust democratic system and electoral process](https://substack.com/redirect/4400e5dd-85db-47d1-a758-13023ad458ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." (Incidentally, when asked for a reaction to the election, President Joe Biden simply replied with "[We do not support independence](https://substack.com/redirect/750aff7f-c113-4215-a0fb-3b6600d36b36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).") British foreign minister David Cameron joined the chorus of support for democracy, saying "[The elections today are testament to Taiwan's vibrant democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/805c9b8f-a4d5-4e21-9c15-b8fba415b9fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" while former UK Prime Minister Liz Truss added "[We must do all we can to ensure Taiwan is able to defend itself](https://substack.com/redirect/429fdb0c-88ba-45f4-be90-d66b0379efac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
Unsurprisingly, Russia's Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova simply stated that Moscow continues to view Taiwan as an integral part of China. She even went on to cite a 2021 statement of cooperation between Moscow and Beijing:
> _[The Russian side reaffirms that the principled stand on the Taiwan issue as expounded in the political documents signed and adopted by the heads of state of the two countries from 1992 to 2000 remain unchanged. The Russian side acknowledges that there is only one China, that the People's Republic of China is the sole legal government representing the whole of China and that Taiwan is an inalienable part of China. The Russian side opposes any form of Taiwan's independence.](https://substack.com/redirect/0851d8b7-7ce8-4ef6-aa47-128a3feefda5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e04902c4-4553-4a07-989e-679f1d30e086?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |

---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 7
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/e04902c4-4553-4a07-989e-679f1d30e086?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8p3fHMmOm8OJ4adQ9R7FV19r1lN7fK7IDHqFe3XWQ64?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=140721682)
On the surface, the election looks like it may be a recipe for heightened tensions and possible escalation of China's saber-rattling at Taipei. It's worth remembering that, according to _Time_ , "[in 2023, China sent 1,709 warplanes through Taiwan's air defense identification zone, on top of waging trade embargo, disinformation campaigns, and other coercive measures](https://substack.com/redirect/32fe7214-6eac-4e59-9563-a8dca84153da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." The election outcome was also described as "[a blunt rejection: a spurning of China's strong-arm tactics--including diplomatic, economic, and military coercion--that had sought to squeeze the self-ruled island of 23 million in the run-up to the vote.](https://substack.com/redirect/32fe7214-6eac-4e59-9563-a8dca84153da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
It's not shocking, then, that some analysts are now expecting intensified military drills, new tariffs or trade restrictions on Taiwanese companies, heightened cyber attacks on Taiwanese infrastructure, etc. And while all of that is possible (maybe even likely), I can't help but think about Bejing's reaction to the election. China's [Taiwan Affairs Office spokesperson Chen Binhua noted the election would not change the nature of cross-strait relations](https://substack.com/redirect/4400e5dd-85db-47d1-a758-13023ad458ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), noting [the results showed the Democratic Progressive Party "does not represent the mainstream view on the island."](https://substack.com/redirect/42793aa1-d3cf-4a1b-afa7-04c946f0947f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The underlying data supports this view. As noted in an article titled "[Taiwan's election isn't a disaster for Xi Jinping](https://substack.com/redirect/32fe7214-6eac-4e59-9563-a8dca84153da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," the math (40% for DPP, 70% turnout) seems to suggest that "[a majority of Taiwan voters disagree with the DPP's China-skeptic approach but just couldn't agree on the best pro-rapprochement alternative](https://substack.com/redirect/32fe7214-6eac-4e59-9563-a8dca84153da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8p3fHMmOm8OJ4adQ9R7FV19r1lN7fK7IDHqFe3XWQ64?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=140721682)
### So What?
Despite all the headlines, the message Taiwanese voters sent to Beijing was mixed. Perhaps they are seeking a democratic Taipei that de-escalates tensions and maintains the status quo. Perhaps the divided legislature is a call for political gridlock, one in which the proverbial boat is not rocked. Or perhaps the opposite, namely that Beijing successfully intimidated voters to vote against the DPP and now has a narrative whereby they can dismiss any policy emerging from Taipei as "non-representative" of the people's will.
China may interpret this election as a "non-negative" for Beijing. After all, almost 60% of the votes cast were for better relations with the mainland and a frustration with the incumbents led to significant shifts in the legislature. Going forward, it's worth watching Beijing. Will it continue its "stick-oriented" approach of ice-cold relations and aggressive military pressure towards Taipei, focusing on traditional displays of hard power? Or might CCP leadership move towards a "carrot-oriented" approach with increased educational, cultural, tourist, or business exchanges to show the benefits of closer ties with Beijing, adopting a "soft power" influence strategy?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e04902c4-4553-4a07-989e-679f1d30e086?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8p3fHMmOm8OJ4adQ9R7FV19r1lN7fK7IDHqFe3XWQ64?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=140721682)
The United States and our democratic allies need to understand that the status quo does not mean all is well across the Taiwan Strait. Beijing has referred to Mr. Lai as a "destroyer of peace" and views his democratic proclivities with suspicion. Further, the Chinese economic slowdown may be weighing heavily on leaders in Beijing, whetting their appetite to execute plans to reintegrate Taiwan immediately as a means to distract a restive domestic population eager for wins. And of course, Xi and his colleagues are closely watching the US presidential election and a change in the White House might worry Beijing.
We need to make sure that the status quo doesn't create complacency. While headlines may suggest that Taiwan's democracy and independence are alive and well, the mixed messages under the surface point to a potentially different story. And just as baby steps towards integration and beliefs about one country with two systems dampened resistance within Hong Kong, Beijing's increasing focus on popular opinion in Taiwan may ultimately reveal China's aggressive tendencies.

A status quo president now leads a divided legislature | | | Jan 16 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- On January 13th, the voters of Taiwan elected (DPP) as their next president of the island nation. Lai successfully defeated Hou Yu-ih of the Nationalist Party (also known as the Kuomintang or KMT) and Ko Wen-je of the upstart Taiwan's People Party (TPP). . | | | | ---|---|--- | October 31, 2023 | In late October last year, I wrote a piece about the Taiwan election (pasted above). In it, I laid out what various outcomes might imply and suggested that a Lai victory would lead to greater tensions with Beijing, including a possible escalation that led to armed conflict. I also noted at the time that a Hou victory would potentially de-escalate tensions as the prospects of peaceful reunification would increase with Beijing-friendly leaders in Taipei and that a Ko win would be a statement that the voters wanted to improve relations with Beijing and focus on economics and domestic issues. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 7 | The other development I noted in October was the possibility of the TPP and KMT forming a coalition that combined forces to increase their chances of winning. , leading to a . The one aspect of the election that I did not previously explore was the "down-ballot" impact of the election outcome. And from that perspective, the ruling DPP lost its majority in the legislature, a development which will make it necessary to work with others. Lai's party lost 10 seats while the KMT gained 14 and the TPP picked up 3. No party has a majority. The implications of this divided government are many. To begin, Lai's governing agenda is now at risk of dilution as he must develop a useful relationship with folks in the TPP or the KMT in order to accomplish his goals. One of the most contentious domains in which Lai will face challenges is defense spending. And given Taiwan procures much of its armaments from the United States, this may in fact de-escalate tensions with Beijing. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 7 | Despite the muddled message voters sent to Beijing, President-elect Lai used the unprecedented third consecutive victory for his Democratic Progressive Party to announce "." US Secretary of State Anthony Blinken agreed, congratulating the citizens of Taiwan for "." (Incidentally, when asked for a reaction to the election, President Joe Biden simply replied with ".") British foreign minister David Cameron joined the chorus of support for democracy, saying "" while former UK Prime Minister Liz Truss added "." Unsurprisingly, Russia's Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova simply stated that Moscow continues to view Taiwan as an integral part of China. She even went on to cite a 2021 statement of cooperation between Moscow and Beijing: | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 7 | On the surface, the election looks like it may be a recipe for heightened tensions and possible escalation of China's saber-rattling at Taipei. It's worth remembering that, according to Time , "." The election outcome was also described as "" It's not shocking, then, that some analysts are now expecting intensified military drills, new tariffs or trade restrictions on Taiwanese companies, heightened cyber attacks on Taiwanese infrastructure, etc. And while all of that is possible (maybe even likely), I can't help but think about Bejing's reaction to the election. China's , noting The underlying data supports this view. As noted in an article titled "," the math (40% for DPP, 70% turnout) seems to suggest that "." So What? Despite all the headlines, the message Taiwanese voters sent to Beijing was mixed. Perhaps they are seeking a democratic Taipei that de-escalates tensions and maintains the status quo. Perhaps the divided legislature is a call for political gridlock, one in which the proverbial boat is not rocked. Or perhaps the opposite, namely that Beijing successfully intimidated voters to vote against the DPP and now has a narrative whereby they can dismiss any policy emerging from Taipei as "non-representative" of the people's will. China may interpret this election as a "non-negative" for Beijing. After all, almost 60% of the votes cast were for better relations with the mainland and a frustration with the incumbents led to significant shifts in the legislature. Going forward, it's worth watching Beijing. Will it continue its "stick-oriented" approach of ice-cold relations and aggressive military pressure towards Taipei, focusing on traditional displays of hard power? Or might CCP leadership move towards a "carrot-oriented" approach with increased educational, cultural, tourist, or business exchanges to show the benefits of closer ties with Beijing, adopting a "soft power" influence strategy? | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 7 | The United States and our democratic allies need to understand that the status quo does not mean all is well across the Taiwan Strait. Beijing has referred to Mr. Lai as a "destroyer of peace" and views his democratic proclivities with suspicion. Further, the Chinese economic slowdown may be weighing heavily on leaders in Beijing, whetting their appetite to execute plans to reintegrate Taiwan immediately as a means to distract a restive domestic population eager for wins. And of course, Xi and his colleagues are closely watching the US presidential election and a change in the White House might worry Beijing. We need to make sure that the status quo doesn't create complacency. While headlines may suggest that Taiwan's democracy and independence are alive and well, the mixed messages under the surface point to a potentially different story. And just as baby steps towards integration and beliefs about one country with two systems dampened resistance within Hong Kong, Beijing's increasing focus on popular opinion in Taiwan may ultimately reveal China's aggressive tendencies. About Vikram | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books, and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 7 | Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Navigating Uncertainty, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Kelan Publishing, LLC PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Don’t delay | Hey there Fellow Patriot, My finance team just let me know that we’re $3,230 short of hitting our January mid-month goal. I didn’t pull myself up by my bootstraps, survive being homeless, become a Congresswoman, and challenge the radical left every day for the past 3 years just to come up short now. Please, join me in this fight – because together we can win. | | | | | | | Thank you, | | Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03 | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

Make no mistake: Early money makes all the difference in hyper-competitive races like this one.

But with just 11 months until Election Day, this campaign will be over before we know it.

In a race as competitive as this one, we can’t afford to play it safe. **_We have to leave it all on the field if we want to win and ensure Southwest Ohio’s children and families have a champion in Congress._**

That means we must continue building out our campaign infrastructure, investing in voter outreach, and mobilizing folks on the ground each and every day until this election is over.

So if you’ve been waiting for the right day to chip in today is that day.

clean_body: it’s time to kick in to high gear | = Team, we’re just a few weeks into 2024. But one thing is already abundantly clear: OH-01 is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country. = | = = Make no mistake: Early money makes all the difference in hyper-competitive races like this one. But with just 11 months until Election Day, this campaign will be over before we know it. In a race as competitive as this one, we can’t afford to play it safe. We have to leave it all on the field if we want to win and ensure Southwest Ohio’s children and families have a champion in Congress. That means we must continue building out our campaign infrastructure, investing in voter outreach, and mobilizing folks on the ground each and every day until this election is over. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

subject: Why Ohio is critical

body:
“As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That’s why I just announced that I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – and he needs yours as well if we’re going to win. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=55e4fd16aa704a569a9a74d0db23322d&_t=07YrZrWkvMl7D7EWtM_W-1VnpSbx9o9sFTa18UVNlAnsZySqWK7Q7JDJeGjeq6vdkBTnfIDZ5t2ck8tk5E_FnHHqTRyMB00TNLuBg5c0f9A%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=55e4fd16aa704a569a9a74d0db23322d&_t=07YrZrWkvMl7D7EWtM_W-1VnpSbx9o9sFTa18UVNlAnsZySqWK7Q7JDJeGjeq6vdkBTnfIDZ5t2ck8tk5E_FnHHqTRyMB00TNLuBg5c0f9A%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55e4fd16aa704a569a9a74d0db23322d&_e=Cej2HG9wEjhyDworaB5UJJyAqzVm-EAuBaYCx6O4hJblzkXS-rN88JwZ978IJMHhBAY-QpoQZKIrB7w3N1iEti3gcnTTxCMB_4Jn8AYZxN5wBU4tMZzWPlc5TIUR1T4RDvC1_ZZf-0CBc5lgDP9_g7fIq9Hdptb5YBtBmYf_k7pr0mHajUZ_Tzid5ZWCLMrFG7nztIe78OymnlTEJ-YYDiq8CByGFZTDHVx_fMLSXl0fGuHUe8rHRQI6W4iAcoays4ftiWyeG9M7TIrHG_MZm2RH5Noe1u0qIkiHiSKiWHR7O31Rzzuj93fCsHotYwzagjgHJVvKwzJfA5FLkuShTjniAFF7EyQfOm8G9-LJYrZeJ1Gkq4_vs_SiVnZlOq19Zvq15c4jUPSsleuennQkEQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

There’s an old adage in politics: “As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That statement has never been truer than in 2024.

Yes, we’ve had important elections in the past, but I think you will agree that we are at a point we’ve never seen in American history. So, let me cut to the chase: _I believe the outcome of Ohio’s US Senate race will determine the future of our country._

That’s why I just announced that **I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno** for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – [**and he needs yours as well if we’re going to win.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55e4fd16aa704a569a9a74d0db23322d&_e=Cej2HG9wEjhyDworaB5UJJyAqzVm-EAuBaYCx6O4hJblzkXS-rN88JwZ978IJMHhBAY-QpoQZKIrB7w3N1iEti3gcnTTxCMB_4Jn8AYZxN5wBU4tMZzWPlc5TIUR1T4RDvC1_ZZf-0CBc5lgDP9_g7fIq9Hdptb5YBtBmYf_k7pr0mHajUZ_Tzid5ZWCLMrFG7nztIe78OymnlTEJ-YYDiq8CByGFZTDHVx_fMLSXl0fGuHUe8rHRQI6W4iAcoayh7XPm-LNxL0DtC2bWw5Cc--AlgRr2a12cCgJMzwwbwyC6Vtg4ydi6XAPlTYAyN91LKjV5EdW6RRBuBfQQEN3x4H-JdAgVSU1JrhWNoB-RdgoBaylyZpC2KFBw8NtHYrUjwC8-kMi6iOjYpXT6JDiQQ%3D%3D)

**This will be THE TOP U.S. SENATE RACE in America in 2024** – one that we simply cannot afford to lose if we’re going to save our great country.

name: Katie Porter
subject: I know banning corporate PAC money won’t be easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I count on supporters like you because I don’t take any money from corporate PACs. But even taking that pledge doesn’t go far enough to counter the influence corporate money has on our government.
I count on supporters like you because I don’t take any money from corporate PACs. But even taking that pledge doesn’t go far enough to counter the influence corporate money has on our government.
**I’m the only person in this race who supports banning corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money.** I’m the only person in this race who doesn't take money from executives who work for Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Big Banks.
These are simple solutions to countering the absurd level of influence corporations have over policy. Democrats should be leading the way here, but too many of my colleagues have been all too willing to cash these checks decade after decade. So it’s no wonder loopholes appear in bills, or we fail to make real progress altogether.
**I know it’s not going to be easy to ban corporate PAC money. But it starts with electing leaders willing to fight for bold change.**
That’s why I’m asking for your support. Can you make your first donation of $17 today? **This is a personal link you can use:** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240116-2?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240116-2?refcode=em20240116-36557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36557_3422442_q0_YPP&akid=36557%2E3422442%2Eq0_YPP)
Thank you SO much, Derek. I really can’t do this without you.
Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Mondaire Jones (personal)
subject: Midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our first fundraising deadline of the 2024 election is just hours away, and I want to ensure we hit our first goal in this election year. Team—It’s our first mid-month fundraiser of the 2024 election year, and I want to reach out to make sure we hit our $20,000 goal at this critical milestone in our campaign.

If we’re going to defeat Mike Lawler and retake our House majority—all without the help of corporate PACs and Big Oil and Big Pharma—we need to make sure we start the year off strong.

Will you pitch in any amount to help me close our fundraising gap so I have the resources to defeat Mike Lawler and flip this key seat? Here’s a personal link to donate right away: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-q1-24-email?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77195404/449668526/-460793036?refcode=em24_240116_mm3_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240116_mm3_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=501f4415-bbb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDFmNDQxNS1iYmI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqcnYX3gKzPwJ0Qtlw7AX4KlwiaLgYWONc6EkQiBxUc=)

Every fundraising goal we hit helps us strategize, organize, and run more ads to get my message to voters across the district. As Mike Lawler turns to shady corporate PACs and Trump advisors to power his campaign, having the funds to combat his lies and attacks will be critical to running a winning grassroots campaign. Right now Lawler has a massive stockpile of cash from special interest donors and we have to close that gap.

There’s too much on the line to slow down in a race as important as ours. That’s why I’m asking: Will you chip in any amount you can before our midnight deadline so I have what it takes to defeat Mike Lawler, flip NY-17, and retake our majority?

Here’s that link once more: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-q1-24-email?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77195405/449668527/-460793036?refcode=em24_240116_mm3_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240116_mm3_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=501f4415-bbb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDFmNDQxNS1iYmI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqcnYX3gKzPwJ0Qtlw7AX4KlwiaLgYWONc6EkQiBxUc=)

Onward,

—Mondaire

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Nothing is off the table during a Trump Presidency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends,
Last night, Donald Trump unsurprisingly won the coveted and critical Iowa Caucus by a landslide.
This shows us a few things:
1. Donald Trump is the most likely Republican nominee.
2. Our democracy continues to be in danger of MAGA extremists.
3. The fight to protect the White House is on.

We don't need to imagine what a Trump White House will look like. We’ve already had to live it.
We’ve seen the court get packed with Republican politicians in robes who will do everything they can to promote their personal agendas.
We’ve seen a pandemic run rampant across our country and claim the lives of millions due to poor leadership.
We’ve seen migrant children be separated from their families and kept in cages at the border.
And we’ve seen the degradation of the oath of office when Trump profited off the Presidency by taking bribes from foreign nationals and used his power to incite an insurrection on our nation’s sacred Capitol.
Nothing is off the table when it comes to a Trump Administration — he made that crystal clear in his four years in office.
And under no circumstance can we give him the chance to inflict any more damage.
We need to do everything we can to ensure Trump gets nowhere close to taking the White House this November — **and the path to keeping the White House blue goes right through Wisconsin.**
We know we have the power to win if we have your support. So we are asking: [**Can you please contribute $3 to the Long Run today? We have the power to win Wisconsin and protect our democracy.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240116-1-t2&t=1&akid=5154%2E196590%2Ei6JkYH)

Thank you,
Mandela

clean_body: Friends, Last night, Donald Trump unsurprisingly won the coveted and critical Iowa Caucus by a landslide. This shows us a few things: 1. Donald Trump is the most likely Republican nominee. 2. Our democracy continues to be in danger of MAGA extremists. 3. The fight to protect the White House is on. We don't need to imagine what a Trump White House will look like. We’ve already had to live it. We’ve seen the court get packed with Republican politicians in robes who will do everything they can to promote their personal agendas. We’ve seen a pandemic run rampant across our country and claim the lives of millions due to poor leadership. We’ve seen migrant children be separated from their families and kept in cages at the border. And we’ve seen the degradation of the oath of office when Trump profited off the Presidency by taking bribes from foreign nationals and used his power to incite an insurrection on our nation’s sacred Capitol. Nothing is off the table when it comes to a Trump Administration — he made that crystal clear in his four years in office. And under no circumstance can we give him the chance to inflict any more damage. We need to do everything we can to ensure Trump gets nowhere close to taking the White House this November — and the path to keeping the White House blue goes right through Wisconsin. We know we have the power to win if we have your support. So we are asking: If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: The future lies in our hands. Thank you, Mandela

Friend, In a clear example of ethnic cleansing, top Israeli officials are openly calling to push millions of Palestinians out of Gaza—and advocating for replacing them with Israeli settlers. Many Israeli politicians have demanded a “second Nakba,” referring to the catastrophe of 1948, when Zionist militias violently expelled 750,000 Palestinians from their lands, destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages, and massacred about 15,000 Palestinians. A member of Prime Minister Netanyahu’s cabinet said: _“We are now rolling out the Gaza Nakba.”_ Some survivors of 1948’s Nakba fled to Gaza. Along with Palestinians in exile outside of Palestine, they were denied the right to return home. Now they and their descendants have become refugees once more, forced to flee multiple locations in just three months. Dropping tens of thousands of U.S. bombs on the tiny Gaza Strip, the Israeli military has already forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians—90% of Gaza’s population. [**Sign the petition to the Biden administration: End this campaign of ethnic cleansing now. No more forced displacement of Palestinians, and no forced migration out of Palestine!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QA9BJBpadG4kQx10lcYsQunpI5jk71L4LaETxXPrxPeyv5W2DBAT502anVip7YrD6c9Wr75evhi_2-0DFU4-tqkMIvCxbTo4Oq7gewiL_1nmijR5WpMba_pRDm74itCCeOjq7Y9xTh96Er1H1Clm0458Sbzj9ue95AaUYXVnO8YRCBgwW7at9t7WYvg2SOOcT783q5WzlZDcKyBlrFxN1k4klyh5cVdu7JrjWY-xQgmjuHRgL-yRBGdTYFtbDBFS0ULrVY210qDe0oS-kn4U_4qobfCsHnXOmsdrACi5k1BHI4gVKLaQ0_UG8ZnYIuFoUWmwOXJ9iCqTInCiJ-bIWzc2dUhBMw6nNBdPujL968a9VkDi-Als1SoT5VwBfDNXGaDuOeTbAhJRMLEbtNeyr4tXED77CvIskv0qC_DosS3mZanSrXaxkiWDVChJ7hCTPkNbjQy1SJKeVMwct2vn3lfEae9CRpO6fLJMeDDiXjf6g-mpErxmb-GC3l5MC0yGhBI8_Pqz_INwubDggLH5FZczUrR6zv4o8gaQOBjhjiTH05UJBPne1G44WxATdBK47B4pnDMy5HsHZRkOQTLvOJQ/431/D9x53QL-QrCrmyddFMoL7w/h1/Vm-qVVss8sly4z_wP1D_IHugZmlzz8o3dKnXUAelhjQ) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QA9BJBpadG4kQx10lcYsQunpI5jk71L4LaETxXPrxPeyv5W2DBAT502anVip7YrD6c9Wr75evhi_2-0DFU4-tqkMIvCxbTo4Oq7gewiL_1nmijR5WpMba_pRDm74itCCeOjq7Y9xTh96Er1H1Clm0458Sbzj9ue95AaUYXVnO8YRCBgwW7at9t7WYvg2SOOcT783q5WzlZDcKyBlrFxN1k4klyh5cVdu7JrjWY-xQgmjuHRgL-yRBGdTYFtbDBFS0ULrVY210qDe0oS-kn4U_4qobfCsHnXOmsdrACi5k1BHI4gVKLaQ0_UG8ZnYIuFoUWH9G88NA2qknUUFpM8F10CPNDJ5h3jdvbyPpBwQ1UQtQS-r_OWeCl2TyTAWX7UjKkHQ5YQpnp7uGiW5h3DlaTRQbgrIp9wHzrS3eaEvsetXFhrUfuOdFsvRjeqgBBu-LRSwZNr5RS0xMs0Au4l_gqpe5Z8wCMS9qOyrIxuP5qe26203PPeS_ciG10xYDStpBrVDs8o8YIMfXZxjmaAdSaLrLEydw9BDN5FabxTkV_vsEDLcEZZNr4czGibCgjRBWQx9gp-jtw_D3pM0iK1dytQ/431/D9x53QL-QrCrmyddFMoL7w/h2/bgFNUp2Eg1HvC2j0D0Ck9NFUFvtxwKrzhP6Bg7g86A4)

Razing entire neighborhoods to the ground and destroying a majority of buildings, Israel’s government has rapidly made much of Gaza uninhabitable.
Meanwhile, the Israeli military continues to bomb areas it designated as “safe” for Palestinian civilians.
Along with this brutal destruction, Israel’s government is depriving Palestinians in Gaza of food, water, shelter, medical assistance, and other basic needs.
**What’s happening now is ethnic cleansing, which is a war crime.**
**But many Israeli politicians want to go even further, openly calling to permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza.**
Prime Minister Netanyahu’s Intelligence Minister has openly recommended the transfer of all Palestinians in Gaza to Egypt. Other senior officials in Netanyahu’s cabinet have made it clear that forced expulsion and resettlement is their goal.
Netanyahu has been trying to push countries to take displaced Palestinians, calling his plan “voluntary migration.” Of course, there’s nothing “voluntary” about bombing people to make them flee.
**Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject forced displacement of Palestinians.**
**But their actions show otherwise:** They are continuing to arm and fund Israel’s military as it commits these war crimes, while shielding Israel’s government from accountability.

clean_body: Israeli leaders want to permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza. | | | Friend, In a clear example of ethnic cleansing, top Israeli officials are openly calling to push millions of Palestinians out of Gaza—and advocating for replacing them with Israeli settlers. Many Israeli politicians have demanded a “second Nakba,” referring to the catastrophe of 1948, when Zionist militias violently expelled 750,000 Palestinians from their lands, destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages, and massacred about 15,000 Palestinians. A member of Prime Minister Netanyahu’s cabinet said: “We are now rolling out the Gaza Nakba.” Some survivors of 1948’s Nakba fled to Gaza. Along with Palestinians in exile outside of Palestine, they were denied the right to return home. Now they and their descendants have become refugees once more, forced to flee multiple locations in just three months. Dropping tens of thousands of U.S. bombs on the tiny Gaza Strip, the Israeli military has already forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians—90% of Gaza’s population. | Razing entire neighborhoods to the ground and destroying a majority of buildings, Israel’s government has rapidly made much of Gaza uninhabitable. Meanwhile, the Israeli military continues to bomb areas it designated as “safe” for Palestinian civilians. Along with this brutal destruction, Israel’s government is depriving Palestinians in Gaza of food, water, shelter, medical assistance, and other basic needs. What’s happening now is ethnic cleansing, which is a war crime. But many Israeli politicians want to go even further, openly calling to permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza. Prime Minister Netanyahu’s Intelligence Minister has openly recommended the transfer of all Palestinians in Gaza to Egypt. Other senior officials in Netanyahu’s cabinet have made it clear that forced expulsion and resettlement is their goal. Netanyahu has been trying to push countries to take displaced Palestinians, calling his plan “voluntary migration.” Of course, there’s nothing “voluntary” about bombing people to make them flee. Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject forced displacement of Palestinians. But their actions show otherwise: They are continuing to arm and fund Israel’s military as it commits these war crimes, while shielding Israel’s government from accountability. We cannot allow our government to continue enabling the bombing or the blockade on Gaza, which has already killed at least 23,000 Palestinians. That’s 1 in every 100 people in Gaza! Thank you for speaking up against our government’s complicity in oppression. May we continue building a better world together. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: The closest race I've ever had
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Hi there, it's Marcy.
Can you believe we're halfway through January already? I suppose time flies when you're busy — and my team and I have truly hit the ground running in the New Year.
We're doing everything we can to win in November. This is shaping up to be the closest race we have faced, and Election Day is approaching us fast.
Friend, so much hangs in the balance: our Great Lakes environment, our investments in rebuilding the Heartland, our work to lower healthcare costs and prescription drug prices, and our fight to finally create an economy that puts working people first.
**Keeping up our momentum right now is so important, friend. If you can chip in to support this work, it would mean so much to me, and to everyone on our team. Hey there,
[**Today, we’re asking you to make a $5 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240116-2-30&t=1&akid=7427%2E3935704%2E_VOKUx)

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: 🚨 BREAKING: Kari Lake Attack Ad
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kari Lake is up on television with her FIRST ATTACK AD of the campaign.
#

Peter: BAD NEWS out of Arizona.
Kari Lake just went up on television with her **FIRST ATTACK AD** of the campaign. We need to fight back.
We knew attack ads like this would come, but we didn’t expect them this early. And if we don’t mobilize quickly to respond, the Super PACs and outside groups that have been lining up behind Kari Lake could jump in with more advertising.
So we’re setting a 48 hour fundraising goal of $100,000. We can’t let her run up the score, especially after several recent polls show her beating Ruben.
[**If you care about this race, please chip in $3 as quickly as you can. Don’t wait. We would not be asking you if this was not extremely important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240116-3-30&t=1&akid=1739%2E734936%2EK65GRZ)

The stakes of this election year cannot be understated. With the White House, Senate, and the House (not to mention _countless_ state and local seats) up for grabs, the outcome of this election year has the potential to impact every aspect of our lives – from reproductive freedom to the gun violence epidemic.
And while I'm helping Democrats fight to maintain control as best I can, I'm also working tirelessly to ensure that, if Republicans take the White House and Senate, New Yorkers will _remain_ protected. State elected officials are the last line of defense, and I am working to ensure that I have the tools to defend the voiceless and the vulnerable, regardless of the outcome of the elections.
**But I can only do so much by myself. That's why I'm counting on this powerful grassroots team to help power my work. But Peter, I need to raise at least $7,500 before midnight tonight, and I'm still missing your donation. So please:**

#
Derek,
After the result in Iowa last night, Trump advances. He’s closer to becoming his party’s nominee.
Much closer to the White House than he has any right to be.
Far too close to a reality that would be disastrous for our country and for the women and men who serve it in uniform.

body:
it won’t take long

Hey, Fellow American,

We need some help **ASAP.** 2024 is in full swing, and we have to get ** BACK TO WORK** raising money TO DEFEND THE HOUSE MAJORITY. 2023 was a successful year, but the work does **NOT** end there. We finished the year strong, but we have **BIGGER** goals for 2024!
| [ **HELP CRUSH OUR FIRST GOAL OF 2024** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b00dbac8786c49b282c086d9959fff75&_e=GCsTsEk177lVnFPOXfqsnKqUT2bhNw_4g63RFSw9QNhygzp6iTeMRXnrr--2ioseBgIZASucmVLgx2sTvKvRj4qO6LN5Xdxuuh-RsQjYJjACxHyHOg8PINujTC_NUO4BUP4hyUAro4qf3rG8spbdMP-ti4BJ54--f3bzRD6pjrM5Or6fyOq3KfsEDCPUQE2M8XoOzLhCbEWBRW9l1i7IrvEIp-lhJtymTLh3z921mdQYhYtZQqfZZ-2oBC1N6qI6npoI4fj0bqjyoK6hVfHWkqNE9aERcRSV9m-tpx-4Z77CxNGvMu_w6JbXTtVMJ0vyrXNKqz_8QmEp6w2QcgA6QFJnTmFU4KOX50G9UGW3s1qgJWvn7L2Ye0sBRmglyoL64b4ANK74AkzzAARbtLSP3A%3D%3D)
---

We want to prove that we are ready to ** MAKE SOME MOVES** in the first quarter. **[Can you pitch in?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b00dbac8786c49b282c086d9959fff75&_e=GCsTsEk177lVnFPOXfqsnKqUT2bhNw_4g63RFSw9QNhygzp6iTeMRXnrr--2ioseBgIZASucmVLgx2sTvKvRj4qO6LN5Xdxuuh-RsQjYJjACxHyHOg8PINujTC_NUO4BUP4hyUAro4qf3rG8spbdMP-ti4BJ54--f3bzRD6pjrM5Or6fyOq3KfsEDCPUQE2MvUmsVDVeM4fRa4C8xsnSZzDY3TEXHWDkboiWLZ-spdoKsXHQW7XEr8vAKW_QmKV3B7tLhQ-e2BVRU923v79zh8kPDFNrzrNBFSw4m_XHXfT6DR-M5HJPyuuVjJAL5zv9XW0IoivGdq5QjMDFG2i1a9lL8dAF6YlhCjUHy2xXqGhYDe_lz3HTczMTFpk3vShNvXjH7N395Ff47eD7bwTgpw%3D%3D)** 2023 was a good baseline, but 2024 is going to ** knock it out of the park!!!**

**[It takes loyal supporters like YOU to help us go ALL IN this first quarter. That is why we are reaching out to YOU. Not all people understand the IMPORTANCE of making a mark this early, but we know YOU DO!!!](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b00dbac8786c49b282c086d9959fff75&_e=GCsTsEk177lVnFPOXfqsnKqUT2bhNw_4g63RFSw9QNhygzp6iTeMRXnrr--2ioseBgIZASucmVLgx2sTvKvRj4qO6LN5Xdxuuh-RsQjYJjACxHyHOg8PINujTC_NUO4BUP4hyUAro4qf3rG8spbdMP-ti4BJ54--f3bzRD6pjrM5Or6fyOq3KfsEDCPUQE2MvUmsVDVeM4fRa4C8xsnSZzDY3TEXHWDkboiWLZ-spdoKsXHQW7XEr8vAKW_QmKV3K_is1xCIVjwyroT7hGL8wE5EkP9v2YKURkPTeh3MUPnC2dNHlz5JG6MLY26MmkbWRUzijzWWkvFVIw4j2VzzzZgSGMIIpcFaMUxqqGsYM1AnK3c-wwOBa0feBtLTFiPt6a_PHTMcluCVG4OB6W3rAw%3D%3D)**

What we can raise this first quarter ** SETS THE PACE** for the rest of the year. If we can get a **STRONG START,** the rest of the year will follow suit!!! Don’t let the momentum drop!!!
**[LET’S SET THE RHYTHM TOGETHER](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b00dbac8786c49b282c086d9959fff75&_e=GCsTsEk177lVnFPOXfqsnKqUT2bhNw_4g63RFSw9QNhygzp6iTeMRXnrr--2ioseBgIZASucmVLgx2sTvKvRj4qO6LN5Xdxuuh-RsQjYJjACxHyHOg8PINujTC_NUO4BUP4hyUAro4qf3rG8spbdMP-ti4BJ54--f3bzRD6pjrM5Or6fyOq3KfsEDCPUQE2MvUmsVDVeM4fRa4C8xsnSZzDY3TEXHWDkboiWLZ-spdoKsXHQW7XEr8vAKW_QmKV3dOzCmFimVIBomkYBr8gPJLgUiY-uEhfgrvqMR7Nx3AFd-vsmkTL6SFXuzWlyIQyeHObcPFAx6bo2Bw1ds3it1Lm9yiLXPyG0RSKCkjVjZmIHSlBnmBFZc-lAL_WOLnFYD4m4rgYTYYNDzeLUFI3EyA%3D%3D)**
Thank you again for all your support, and we look forward to continuing this journey for a better Texas.

-McCaul Finance Team

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Why Don’t They Fear Nuclear War?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The potential ramifications of such a conflict are catastrophic.

|
---
| | | **The potential ramifications of such a conflict are catastrophic.
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_16_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_16_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_16_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
People are actually talking about using nuclear weapons now for the first time in my life since I was a kid.
There was a 13-Day period during the Cuban missile crisis when we were the closest in human history that we had ever come to global annihilation.
I remember the U.S. Marshalls coming to our house to take myself and my elder brother Joe to an underground city in the Blue Ridge Mountains in West Virginia — a place for the whole government to weather a thermonuclear cataclysm.
But my father called us and said we can’t go because it would send the nation into a panic. He told us to be good soldiers and show up at school. He also said that if there was a nuclear exchange, the ones that die would be better off than the people who are left.
Leaders like my father and uncle, John F. Kennedy, had a healthy fear of nuclear conflict during that period in American history. This is not so today.
What we are seeing from the anonymous men in lanyards, men and women in the White House, who are now making these calls is a reckless, cavalier approach to nuclear war.
**_In other words, the Biden administration’s lack of caution is putting our future at risk._**
Just as my uncle and father before me, I will bring a heightened sobriety to the White House when it comes to matters of nuclear war. The stakes couldn’t be any higher!
The potential ramifications of such a conflict are catastrophic, and it is our duty to pursue all avenues that promote peace, diplomacy, and strategic decision-making.
[Join me so we can ensure that our nation remains at the forefront of protecting humanity.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_16_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4)
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_16_24_email_1_1_nd&n=5)
|
