name: Nikki Haley
subject: America deserves better!
body:
At one point in this campaign, there were 14 of us running.

| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=278974a53e4f440f89ab101b5c2c53db&_t=LqUi3n8v-a0HaAHhdlOVRzjSsdX7bS-1nEi_giESqmhFhCrHROHbKxGM2EZM-3_qltBLqQa6plnqI9s1p2m7G8bnoKMmaWF7Wdpk56EjbXw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=278974a53e4f440f89ab101b5c2c53db&_t=LqUi3n8v-a0HaAHhdlOVRzjSsdX7bS-1nEi_giESqmhFhCrHROHbKxGM2EZM-3_qltBLqQa6plnqI9s1p2m7G8bnoKMmaWF7Wdpk56EjbXw%3D)

Friend,

At one point in this campaign, there were 14 of us running.

I was at two percent in the polls.

But last night, Iowa did what Iowa does so well.

And when you look at how we are doing in New Hampshire, in South Carolina, and beyond, I think we can safely say . . .

Iowa made this Republican primary a _two_ -person race!

Make no mistake, this is a contest between Donald Trump and me. The question that every American must now answer is, do you want more of the same, or do you want a new generation of conservative leadership?

When I ask, "do you want more of the same," you know what I'm talking about. It's both Donald Trump and Joe Biden. It's about whether you want to stay stuck in the past or move into a better future.

Donald Trump and Joe Biden have so much in common. _-> Seventy percent of Americans don't want another Trump-Biden rematch.
-> Most Americans disapprove of both.
-> Trump and Biden are both about 80 years old.
-> Trump and Biden both put our country trillions of dollars deeper in debt.
-> And Trump and Biden both lack a vision for our country's future . . . because both are consumed by the past, by investigations, and by vendettas and grievances._
**America deserves better!**

We deserve a new direction under new conservative leadership.

We deserve a president who will focus on the needs of our people, not on themselves.

We deserve a president who will rebuild our economy, close our border, and stand up to our enemies.

_**And most importantly, we deserve a president who will stop our self-loathing, end the division and fear, and make America strong and proud!**_

**Our campaign is the last best hope of stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare.** I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone. I need every American who knows that we can be better as a country to join me. **[Will YOU join me before it's too late?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=278974a53e4f440f89ab101b5c2c53db&_e=f0LtHLrkHZ0CeXcG68X-MniQ7b29e6Bpg-RRfS7atlv5FeQ6UjilD0xAM-WSewQzNRxE45ZnEIa_CFEuD0BfIhqXnR27Omlu4pON6v1KDB5dwww0EjSRGt_JSU_h1yZnlBqBVOm7sWyTd16BCqXXILT-3BVYuv4okXWPMPnd0VIpYIPaSoHGIK95gqldWSg8do5XuDn8i2k9u7YJHUHvE_jQ-JOS_o3PboRNeUZXAl56UendgPhMLfybEi3zPFQZ_QbUSKxn58RUgNfwRyKnvOWDDHdOeBIPZEGMstEXlX4l5mmDRlUvahYTlJ19ZvH3oqo69D5JzxIIGQGalWdbA55ksx1VRy5ap2ZQ-i2sPU8%3D)**

Republicans have lost the popular vote in seven of the last eight presidential elections. That is nothing to be proud of. We should want to earn the support of a majority of Americans.

All the evidence shows that if it's a Trump-Biden rematch, it's going to be another tossup election. It could go either way. We could have more disputes over election interference. And Joe Biden could win again, with Kamala Harris waiting in the wings.

Every recent poll shows that when I go head-to-head against Biden we win in a landslide. **It 's not even close. **

_That means no recounts, no lawsuits, and no doubts._ It means no more Chuck Schumer leading the Senate. No more endless votes for House Speaker because we'll have a huge House majority. We'll term limit the do-nothing Washington politicians. We'll rebuild our economy and secure our border. And make no mistake, we will restore our national pride. **We are blessed to live in America, and it 's time we remembered that.**

As we head into New Hampshire, I have one more thing to say: _" Underestimate Me. That's Always Fun."_

I have never lost a race and I don't intend to start now. I am in this to win, and I hope that I can count on having you by my side.

We don't have to go backwards. We are not destined to a repeat of Trump-Biden, but I need your help. **[Please chip in whatever you can today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=278974a53e4f440f89ab101b5c2c53db&_e=f0LtHLrkHZ0CeXcG68X-MniQ7b29e6Bpg-RRfS7atlv5FeQ6UjilD0xAM-WSewQzNRxE45ZnEIa_CFEuD0BfIhqXnR27Omlu4pON6v1KDB5dwww0EjSRGt_JSU_h1yZnlBqBVOm7sWyTd16BCqXXILT-3BVYuv4okXWPMPnd0VIpYIPaSoHGIK95gqldWSg8do5XuDn8i2k9u7YJHUHvE1SJrgE8QHzRGZChvGu4ykAUde8u5HfXgHDlvYPUmV8fZkNZfbnw6GrbJhU5gs1nLj4FAVxtycf_3HA1k5pbWAjuDottdT7Asmj_uaYVWNZc46D2zTw4XQyHR4jq9jclIzEFYAkzeUi3O6000xpBWxc%3D)**

Together, we will make America strong and proud!

Let's do this!

My very best,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=278974a53e4f440f89ab101b5c2c53db&_e=f0LtHLrkHZ0CeXcG68X-MniQ7b29e6Bpg-RRfS7atlv5FeQ6UjilD0xAM-WSewQzNRxE45ZnEIa_CFEuD0BfIhqXnR27Omlu4pON6v1KDB5dwww0EjSRGt_JSU_h1yZnlBqBVOm7sWyTd16BCqXXILT-3BVYuv4okXWPMPnd0VIpYIPaSoHGIK95gqldWSg8do5XuDn8i2k9u7YJHUHvE2qcVK5EMlbnO4vyAE9swkmIhlCpv_qkM0FAh7mgt-1rLeTBmKeVrRSO_vq_YGmQli_ANprZWJRyWmY1isJlyWQ9boKHojqCkkH2CZDAWOtgJxJk73FPnO971pn9zEZuVWiAgWyXzfbRl1sSJN675fc%3D)
Nikki Haley

| [DONATE](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=278974a53e4f440f89ab101b5c2c53db&_e=f0LtHLrkHZ0CeXcG68X-MniQ7b29e6Bpg-RRfS7atlv5FeQ6UjilD0xAM-WSewQzNRxE45ZnEIa_CFEuD0BfIhqXnR27Omlu4pON6v1KDB5dwww0EjSRGt_JSU_h1yZnlBqBVOm7sWyTd16BCqXXILT-3BVYuv4okXWPMPnd0VIpYIPaSoHGIK95gqldWSg8do5XuDn8i2k9u7YJHUHvE_f2agSiyCohQLn89os895BV7rLqMrO1wU0ShLR6LKi4z4LVd-8xFEk5OUqyHhA_cJqEvtvvjMiMlK-7BAmk_brG3cm1Do746KeEqlufeME-dlOyBrRTswDRd4N_2Uje30sZKHArvy73qoAyeaXVYE4%3D)

clean_body: At one point in this campaign, there were 14 of us running. | | | | | Friend, At one point in this campaign, there were 14 of us running. I was at two percent in the polls. But last night, Iowa did what Iowa does so well. And when you look at how we are doing in New Hampshire, in South Carolina, and beyond, I think we can safely say . . . Iowa made this Republican primary a two -person race! Make no mistake, this is a contest between Donald Trump and me. The question that every American must now answer is, do you want more of the same, or do you want a new generation of conservative leadership? When I ask, "do you want more of the same," you know what I'm talking about. It's both Donald Trump and Joe Biden. It's about whether you want to stay stuck in the past or move into a better future. Donald Trump and Joe Biden have so much in common. -> Seventy percent of Americans don't want another Trump-Biden rematch. -> Most Americans disapprove of both. -> Trump and Biden are both about 80 years old. -> Trump and Biden both put our country trillions of dollars deeper in debt. -> And Trump and Biden both lack a vision for our country's future . . . because both are consumed by the past, by investigations, and by vendettas and grievances. America deserves better! We deserve a new direction under new conservative leadership. We deserve a president who will focus on the needs of our people, not on themselves. We deserve a president who will rebuild our economy, close our border, and stand up to our enemies. And most importantly, we deserve a president who will stop our self-loathing, end the division and fear, and make America strong and proud! Our campaign is the last best hope of stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone. I need every American who knows that we can be better as a country to join me. Republicans have lost the popular vote in seven of the last eight presidential elections. That is nothing to be proud of. We should want to earn the support of a majority of Americans. All the evidence shows that if it's a Trump-Biden rematch, it's going to be another tossup election. It could go either way. We could have more disputes over election interference. And Joe Biden could win again, with Kamala Harris waiting in the wings. Every recent poll shows that when I go head-to-head against Biden we win in a landslide. It 's not even close. That means no recounts, no lawsuits, and no doubts. It means no more Chuck Schumer leading the Senate. No more endless votes for House Speaker because we'll have a huge House majority. We'll term limit the do-nothing Washington politicians. We'll rebuild our economy and secure our border. And make no mistake, we will restore our national pride. We are blessed to live in America, and it 's time we remembered that. As we head into New Hampshire, I have one more thing to say: " Underestimate Me. That's Always Fun." I have never lost a race and I don't intend to start now. I am in this to win, and I hope that I can count on having you by my side. We don't have to go backwards. We are not destined to a repeat of Trump-Biden, but I need your help. Together, we will make America strong and proud! Let's do this! My very best, Nikki Haley | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. name: Josh Harder
subject: Trump won big (big trouble!)
body:
My thoughts on the Iowa Caucus

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77197713/449676456/1806212802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4YjdhODMtYzRiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xXFzMcekHm4mhrTqdMA8P0DPleQ_Cg_6CSDIXTBUTbw=) | Peter, I want to talk with you today about what the pundits are missing about the Iowa Caucus. You’re hearing lots of noise about what yesterday’s results mean for Republican candidates. But I want to talk about what the pundits are missing: what this means for _our country._ In case you haven’t dug into the numbers, Donald Trump won by a landslide beating DeSantis and Haley by over 30 pts. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77197714/449676457/753479076?&refcode=E5988-20240116-IowaCaucus-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4YjdhODMtYzRiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xXFzMcekHm4mhrTqdMA8P0DPleQ_Cg_6CSDIXTBUTbw=) [DONATE NOW TO FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77197715/449676458/753479076?&refcode=E5988-20240116-IowaCaucus-SB-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4YjdhODMtYzRiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xXFzMcekHm4mhrTqdMA8P0DPleQ_Cg_6CSDIXTBUTbw=) **Trump, with his energized MAGA base and his 91 criminal charges, is almost certainly going to be the Republican nominee. It is very unlikely that DeSantis or Haley catch him. And this has severe consequences for our country.** Donald Trump, the man who came incredibly close to overthrowing the 2020 election, is back. The Republican establishment has endorsed him. Billionaire donors are raising him money. Caucus goers in Iowa just gave him the largest win margin in history. Let me be very clear: Just the action of letting Trump back into the political arena is a wound to our democracy. We cannot for one second take our democracy and this upcoming election for granted. We all remember how we felt in 2016. We are headed for another trainwreck if we don’t all lean in, _right now,_ and get up off the sidelines. Please don’t ignore what happened yesterday. clean_body: My thoughts on the Iowa Caucus | = | Peter, I want to talk with you today about what the pundits are missing about the Iowa Caucus. You’re hearing lots of noise about what yesterday’s results mean for Republican candidates. But I want to talk about what the pundits are missing: what this means for our country. In case you haven’t dug into the numbers, Donald Trump won by a landslide beating DeSantis and Haley by over 30 pts. = = Trump, with his energized MAGA base and his 91 criminal charges, is almost certainly going to be the Republican nominee. It is very unlikely that DeSantis or Haley catch him. And this has severe consequences for our country. Donald Trump, the man who came incredibly close to overthrowing the 2020 election, is back. The Republican establishment has endorsed him. Billionaire donors are raising him money. Caucus goers in Iowa just gave him the largest win margin in history. Let me be very clear: Just the action of letting Trump back into the political arena is a wound to our democracy. We cannot for one second take our democracy and this upcoming election for granted. We all remember how we felt in 2016. We are headed for another trainwreck if we don’t all lean in, right now, and get up off the sidelines. Please don’t ignore what happened yesterday. The momentum is building for a MAGA wave and we have to stop it. = Apologies for the depressing email, but we have to take this seriously! \- Josh *

This is going to be a long email about our January 6th trauma.

[If you’re not ready to talk about it or don’t have time to read the whole email, I understand. But if you could still chip in a split donation between my campaign and Defeat Republicans to help me jumpstart this race, I’d appreciate it »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77197748/449676494/-1538229440?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240116_1_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZjA0YzZlLWM0YjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l8A1GNLxbWCd_0KSXYrAEXflBZOCzYDTgdS64GCvbzU=)

If you’re still reading this, I’m assuming you’re ready. Let’s talk about our trauma. _You and me._

Ask yourself, what has our nation been arguing about for the last 3 years? What conversation has been dominating the media, the government, occupying our courts, and our daily conversations? And even separating friends and families?

**January 6, 2021.**

The ripples from that day still threaten our democracy. The lives of election workers – the backbone of our electoral systems – are being threatened online via hundreds of messages on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram by those who would disrupt our elections:

_**“Watch your back.” “I know where you sleep.” “Be afraid.”**_

Because I speak out about these challenges to our democracy, I get the same threatening messages. “We know where you live.”

_Yet MAGA representatives in Congress continue to claim our elections are being rigged._

The only difference between your January 6th trauma and mine is where we were when we experienced it.

I was at the Capitol immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, fear, blood, death, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism.

Capitol and Washington Police officers fought for our lives, the lives of fellow police officers, and the nation's elected leaders – it didn’t matter if they were a Republican, Democrat or an Independent. They were the men and women we sent to Washington to govern our nation.

**It was our duty to protect them. And our democracy.**

While Donald Trump, then our nation’s Commander in Chief, did nothing to help us for three hours after inciting the violence himself – we were beaten bloody. And some of us died.

Even though my experience looks different from yours,_I am first an American citizen. A girl dad. A football lover. A voter. This is my country**– our country.**_

That day was a stain on our nation. And we need to fight like hell to make sure we NEVER repeat a day like that. I’ll continue to use my voice to protect this country. I’ll stand up to the lies, hate, and bigotry. I will always stand my ground to make sure democracy exists.

[So I’m asking you to stand with me. We will get through this trauma – we will get through this nightmare – but only if we stand together. Can I count on you to contribute a split donation between Defeat Republicans and my campaign today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77197750/449676497/-1538229440?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240116_1_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZjA0YzZlLWM0YjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l8A1GNLxbWCd_0KSXYrAEXflBZOCzYDTgdS64GCvbzU=)

subject: Critical National Security Survey enclosed

body:
As we kick off the election year, we need to know where you stand on some critical national security issues. Please complete your personally assigned survey as soon as possible.
We need your help to answer these critical questions Peter.

[**Your personally assigned Survey to Secure America is available at this link.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1d10e728f3664d5b832ffec04aa465c8&_e=it6_izvyh2lmSpRFrozM1FD4c6GeLkVmiJ9pGqxKw2qqNrANl3SOZPALq_7RooZdYYi4l-ZJ2EgBA1E2O9d8ImUVHBDTJ9hYc8abL2HBp36qSAYQH64P2GireXB6TFRYFJiMuV3fAO7_TEXxZX5x5XqZjgAU-TOn3nE1TNDN3I9-8MeSiyletKgvYqd9mTl1eibXSu2z-JM8rU0CYoC1N7dXXC5QdUCVqqS16htSHpw5Qcpf64ZSkYJklIPtRhpJ5yFzNrttHtYRnY-gKllbsgMSzTERWzAURWoxHmC-fR734-N8TCfNCCTXpnx4j6RJy5jP4zIVlIBMBsCFewcTnnqn6AeZu5ugeBf5dTlCFfIK4gP78AjXCkJkMTmNvGZSugbdLfWOFx-MSaa1UoVWvdHcU6t3VDyTVZKqiQNYk44YQ14D-44_O7ECYl586D0pPY2dNpBrxf71h9ZEn8lR8w%3D%3D)

Please complete your Survey to Secure America today so we can tabulate results and act on the critical information we gain from your time taking the survey.

We can’t do this alone, Peter. We need your help to ensure our efforts align with the current Republican Party, and we will never know where you stand if you don’t tell us.

So please be as accurate as possible when selecting your answers to our essential Survey to Secure America questions.

Your answers will inform our efforts as we campaign to take back the Senate Majority for Republicans. We need to know where you stand so we can campaign on the issues that matter most to our loyal supporters.

[**Please complete your personally assigned Survey to Secure America today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1d10e728f3664d5b832ffec04aa465c8&_e=it6_izvyh2lmSpRFrozM1FD4c6GeLkVmiJ9pGqxKw2qqNrANl3SOZPALq_7RooZdYYi4l-ZJ2EgBA1E2O9d8ImUVHBDTJ9hYc8abL2HBp36qSAYQH64P2GireXB6TFRYFJiMuV3fAO7_TEXxZX5x5XqZjgAU-TOn3nE1TNDN3I9-8MeSiyletKgvYqd9mTl1eibXSu2z-JM8rU0CYoC1N7dXXC5QdUCVqqS16htSHpw5Qcpf64ZSkYJklIPtRhpJ5yFzNrttHtYRnY-gKllbsgMSzTERWzAURWoxHmC-fR734-N8TCfNCCTXpnx4j6RJFur1DKse92EvTUGYw5j_aqyYZdt8JPCukMyMTpiA2Hq5mXk4OoBq3bZKA_2K1n45Xf4LMG32OUozGMQSiYq9U82-laBVT4DM5OYfdV6dP7wC6K-OP9xgQ9yi7kxU8DHwI6XPDJh4tNPK2XU53_Iayg%3D%3D)

clean_body: As we kick off the election year, we need to know where you stand on some critical national security issues. Please complete your personally assigned survey as soon as possible. We need your help to answer these critical questions Peter. Please complete your Survey to Secure America today so we can tabulate results and act on the critical information we gain from your time taking the survey. We can’t do this alone, Peter. We need your help to ensure our efforts align with the current Republican Party, and we will never know where you stand if you don’t tell us. So please be as accurate as possible when selecting your answers to our essential Survey to Secure America questions. Your answers will inform our efforts as we campaign to take back the Senate Majority for Republicans. We need to know where you stand so we can campaign on the issues that matter most to our loyal supporters. Thank you, Mike Pompeo If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Friend,

We have achieved a great victory in the last election, securing a Republican majority in Congress. However, our work is far from over. Now, we must ensure that we flip the Senate in 2024. We must remain vigilant in defending our conservative values and stopping the Radical Left’s failed policies. With your help, we have what it takes to stop the Democrats’ woke ideology.

body:
Wisconsin, Georgia, Louisiana...
|
---

[**Join All On The Line’s first virtual volunteer meeting of 2024 to get the latest on our fight for fair maps and how you can get involved →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77198517/449678728/684926256?utm_campaign=20240116_AOTL_Undecided_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjOTFmNzM4LWM3YjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WmTsyzTaFaXUrg3U7l3Em-tkBiwzy47HEMnqQDkqKu8=&emci=e0c4d06d-8fb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8c91f738-c7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=8431045) **In the meantime, see below for some quick updates!** 🔻🔻🔻
---
Team: It’s an election year, and yet congressional and state legislative districts still hang in the balance in several states. There’s a lot at stake with multiple ongoing legal challenges to unfair maps — including cases led by All On The Line’s affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation.
Keeping our fingers on the pulse of these cases can be tough, even for lawyers. The best way for you to get up to date is to[**join our first virtual volunteer meeting of 2024 on Wednesday, January 17th.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77198518/449678735/684926256?utm_campaign=20240116_AOTL_Undecided_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjOTFmNzM4LWM3YjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WmTsyzTaFaXUrg3U7l3Em-tkBiwzy47HEMnqQDkqKu8=&emci=e0c4d06d-8fb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8c91f738-c7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=8431045) But let’s take a quick spin through where things stand in a few key states:
**Wisconsin:** Last month, Wisconsin’s Supreme Court struck down state legislative maps that would have continued to give Republicans an unfair advantage. This decision requires lawmakers or the court to draw up new maps in which each district is a “contiguous territory” rather than broken up into different parts. New constitutional maps need to be in place, likely before April.
**Georgia:** Last fall, a federal court ordered state lawmakers to redraw congressional and state legislative maps to comply with Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, following a successful challenge initiated by the National Redistricting Foundation, an All On The Line affiliate. Many experts believe lawmakers’ revised maps fall well short, papering over one issue by introducing unfairness in another form. Nevertheless, a U.S. District judge approved them. There’s a lot of work to do here because the fight for fair maps in Georgia is far from over.
**Louisiana:** Last year, a federal judge ruled that congressional maps drawn by the Republican-led state legislature diluted the power of Black voters and ordered new maps to be drawn by the end of January 2024. AOTL and its affiliates are tracking the case closely and are prepared to take action to ensure every voter is represented fairly.
**New York:** In a victory for New Yorkers, the New York State Court of Appeals struck down the state’s Congressional maps and ordered the state’s Independent Redistricting Commission to redraw district lines in time for the 2024 election. As with the pending redraw in Louisiana, All On The Line and our affiliates are keeping a watchful eye on the Empire State.
There’s a lot still up in the air, and I wouldn’t blame anyone for feeling nervous about how much is at stake. [**But the best antidote for anxiety is action.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77198519/449678736/684926256?utm_campaign=20240116_AOTL_Undecided_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjOTFmNzM4LWM3YjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WmTsyzTaFaXUrg3U7l3Em-tkBiwzy47HEMnqQDkqKu8=&emci=e0c4d06d-8fb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8c91f738-c7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=8431045) All On The Line and our affiliates are tracking each one of these cases closely and are poised to take action to protect fair maps — and you have a role to play in this fight.
[**Get started by signing up for All On The Line’s first virtual volunteer meeting of 2024 — we’ll pass along crucial updates on our work (including the latest in these states) and tell you how to best take action to fight for fair maps, no matter where you live.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77198520/449678737/684926256?utm_campaign=20240116_AOTL_Undecided_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjOTFmNzM4LWM3YjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WmTsyzTaFaXUrg3U7l3Em-tkBiwzy47HEMnqQDkqKu8=&emci=e0c4d06d-8fb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8c91f738-c7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=8431045)
[Sign Up Here →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77198521/449678738/684926256?utm_campaign=20240116_AOTL_Undecided_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjOTFmNzM4LWM3YjQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WmTsyzTaFaXUrg3U7l3Em-tkBiwzy47HEMnqQDkqKu8=&emci=e0c4d06d-8fb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8c91f738-c7b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=8431045)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
Congressman Eric Burlison to attend Bill Eigel Campaign Event in Nixa on Friday | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/special-announcement-congressman-eric-burlison-to-attend-eigel-campaign-event-in-nixa?e=c00a6982d2)

---
| [Support Bill Eigel](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=6ebabd3d81&e=c00a6982d2 "Support Bill Eigel")

| [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=760f7138cf&e=c00a6982d2)
---
| | **🚨SPECIAL ANNOUNCEMENT🚨
__Congressman Eric Burlison__ to attend Eigel Campaign Event in Nixa**
* * *
**We are excited to announce that __Congressman Eric Burlison__** _ _**will be speaking at our upcoming event on Friday night along with Attorney General Candidate and Trump Attorney Will Scharf!**

***[RSVP](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=14e3e99ecd&e=c00a6982d2) here.***
**We can't wait to see you at the Ozarks Event Center!**
**Address: 842 Guin, Nixa, MO 65714 **
**Event Starts: 6:30pm, Doors Open @ 6:00pm **

**Join us for live bluegrass by _The Farnum Family,_ a silent action, and delicious food. This is a catered event, so if you are planning on attending please *[RSVP](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=0401665dba&e=c00a6982d2) here.* You can pay at the door, or pay online ahead of time [here](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=1188f10e65&e=c00a6982d2).

Have any questions? Reply to this email and a member of our team will reach out to you immediately. **
---
| | **Join me for a meet & greet in Joplin on Thursday, January 18 at 6:30 (doors open at 6)**
---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for your support! If you want to be a part of this historic effort to elect a bold conservative leader as Governor of Missouri, you can sign up to volunteer [here](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=f20d43f103&e=c00a6982d2). We are looking for volunteers to make phone calls, display yard signs, help in the campaign office, host an event, walk in a parade, knock on doors, and donate. With your support, we will drain the swamp and Make Missouri Great Again!
---
| | [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=a658810b95&e=c00a6982d2)

Friend,
Thanks to the generosity of grassroots donors like you, this people-powered team was able to finish 2023 strong. **But now that it’s officially the election year – and to ensure that we keep Andrea in Congress – we’re going to need the full strength of this grassroots team to step up once again.** **[To strengthen our grassroots operation and move full steam ahead into 2024, our team has set a goal of recruiting 250 Founding Donors to kick off the year strong. Can we count on you to step up and become a 2024 Founding Donor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77198810/449679700/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.16_b1_shq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWQ4OTEwZC1jOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YHSTsNL6IsLDzOjT467mjWJNABTePXnzQk5jJcnnNs=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77198811/449679701/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.16_b1_shq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWQ4OTEwZC1jOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YHSTsNL6IsLDzOjT467mjWJNABTePXnzQk5jJcnnNs=) With every week that passes, Washington Republicans are doubling down on their efforts to flip this seat. That’s why we need you on our team now – to get a head start on securing the resources we need to win this competitive seat once again. **Everything we do on this campaign is made possible by your grassroots support.** So in a race as competitive as this and in a district as crucial to taking back the House as OR-06, your support goes a long way. And look, we’re no stranger to tough races. clean_body: Thanks to the generosity of grassroots donors like you, this people-powered team was able to finish 2023 strong. But now that it’s officially election year – and to ensure that we keep Andrea in Congress – we’re going to need the full strength of this grassroots team to step up once again. = Friend, Thanks to the generosity of grassroots donors like you, this people-powered team was able to finish 2023 strong. But now that it’s officially the election year – and to ensure that we keep Andrea in Congress – we’re going to need the full strength of this grassroots team to step up once again. = = With every week that passes, Washington Republicans are doubling down on their efforts to flip this seat. That’s why we need you on our team now – to get a head start on securing the resources we need to win this competitive seat once again. Everything we do on this campaign is made possible by your grassroots support. So in a race as competitive as this and in a district as crucial to taking back the House as OR-06, your support goes a long way. And look, we’re no stranger to tough races. We fended off millions of dollars in GOP dark money and defeated a self-funded millionaire, winning one of the most competitive races in the nation last year. So trust us when we say: It’s only possible with early investment from our grassroots team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Salinas HQ | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

We have good and bad news to share. **Good News:** Sarah returned to LegHall this week ready to dive into the details and bring people together. Here is a photo 📸 of her first day back in the legislative session. ⤵️ | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77198826/449679745/1954656641?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20240116_fr_mm1_team_kw_act_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTZlMzAzMi1jOWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=olPEgBRx1ZfEdoL-htT5Krr3uEYOF0yJggJBMZWyPC0=)

[Our first mid-month deadline of the year is tonight. clean_body: | = We have good and bad news to share. Good News: Sarah returned to LegHall this week ready to dive into the details and bring people together. Here is a photo 📸 of her first day back in the legislative session. ⤵️ | = Now here’s the bad news: While Sarah is hard at work fighting for us, she doesn’t have as much time to focus on one of the critical parts of the campaign: fundraising. That’s why we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to get us back on track so we can stay ahead on all of our fundraising benchmarks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being part of our historic campaign. Team McBride | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = | Paid for by Friends of Sarah McBride Friends of Sarah McBride P.O. body:
Honest answers only | | | On January 7, 2023, I made a promise. I promised to commit—every single day—to representing the great people of New Jersey with integrity, determination, and grit. Today, I can proudly say that I have delivered on that promise by: **→ Demanding Biden Secure Our Border** **→ Advocating for Veteran-Owned Small Businesses****→ Improving commuter rail transportation****→ Affirming strong US support for Ukraine** **→ Supporting mental health for school children** And we are just getting started. Friend, I am curious to know how you think we’re doing. _**[Would you mind sparing a moment of your time today to fill out our report card?](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=9a22383cb68a4a45ac274d037ad9524f&_e=K-rjBD5-SffIrKOgjUAhONbkRU4jWyJDV9hxcVmoP287ZnZsBREVdY2Mohqwmi_uVixBwIe8S4ArO-kGmRTioSkINM_pXOBleDUoJy5iCDXzS1KQrmvxPYJ7pUPoRZ-BF6th9fkZnZglWANrT0W--IpQVVzo3IDFcs_3Fcb3iP6YkGiG7MUv-r9Ixygj2FrSSDhlrfI1HT99JpX6dBD5LkYYqWVI8XYat7UOoqmv7m7WvWOgapFEInGD0HbQ4wv4wkNRucr152M7c7yjv0z09-rl5TtUa995WTEdYfwRb7Q8wQ9tueMhsUF977wV3SKuzTp9-6cdKVwy40G6Y-2pbupTQYizyxPHa2u4ezgTWg3wgjuEeOOVIktYZFlP1Z6Q)**_ **GRADE OUR TOP PRIORITIES.**

Tom is the proud husband to Rhonda and the proud father to two beautiful daughters. Their family resides in the wonderful city of Westfield, New Jersey. Tom's commitment to the people of New Jersey has been inspired by a legacy of **dedicated public service** from his grandfather, former U.S. Representative Robert Kean, to his father, former Governor Thomas H. Kean Sr. Kean has always understood and recognized the importance of civic engagement and is honored to **represent the people of New Jersey's 7th Congressional District** in Congress. From his early days in the Environmental Protection Agency during the George H.W. Bush Administration (where he met his incredible wife Rhonda), to serving as a volunteer firefighter and an emergency medical technician in Washington, D.C. — Tom has always had a heart for making our world a better, freer, safer place. Determined to answer the call to public service again, Tom Kean Jr. believed he, personally, could turn ideas into action and make a lasting difference in people’s lives. In 2001, Tom was elected to the New Jersey General Assembly, and two years later, was named to the upper house of the state legislature after his tireless work in ethics reform. Then in 2008, his peers unanimously elected him Republican Leader in the New Jersey Senate. Shortly thereafter, he unveiled his caucus’ job creation package, **“Common-Sense Plan for a More Affordable New Jersey,”** which ultimately reversed the course that previous administrations were quickly leading the state down. To this day, Tom continues to build upon his proven track record of delivering for the people of New Jersey in Congress:
* **Passed legislation advocating for Veteran-Owned small businesses**
* **Passed legislation to improve commuter rail transportation**
* **Passed a resolution affirming strong US support for Ukraine**
* **Passed legislation to support mental health for school children**

And with your continued support today, Tom Kean will be able to defeat Nancy Pelosi’s hand-picked opponents that want to take the House Majority in 2024. **_We cannot let Pelosi prevail._**__ Please consider chipping in just a few dollars to help Tom continue the fight for NJ-7! **[Chip in $2, $3, or $5 now >>>](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=9a22383cb68a4a45ac274d037ad9524f&_e=K-rjBD5-SffIrKOgjUAhONbkRU4jWyJDV9hxcVmoP29Nf0ZFmluNYpSO6rn30NQ_twIgHnxhrVQZG20yTqk5Me1HQn6t7Jq4zYEwwgZbaHNtF0WnIU_JCJN82zo3ixGNL0sVZpzQlZcrxp9vlUba1SnSxJwGogc1To9F98TTTF0oMzq4WDhLNowelN0Xk3e_FviHp05tyXoCcBDk6jdn-F-bq7pQgVJihn_IgqV7YSv8Esit1jR-OQ2eK_KIuM7WJpXTByDWnpb6ZQmTuvp-gRVXnt8PQkeHMxHhcX4dnxt2tzR7tWgnOtfYU8BluOFvc41fetsCpnjlfNukcTxybzvO9vPEwq2pQSYfkFI126pO0a6IdLP0bumutBCkjipj)**

Even though Trump prevailed – despite 91 felony charges across four criminal indictments – every single Republican running for president has spewed an extreme agenda. | | |

Last night’s results in Iowa prove what we’ve known all along: that this isn’t the Republican Party – **this is Trump’s party.** Even though Trump prevailed – despite 91 felony charges across four criminal indictments – _every single Republican running for president_ has spewed an extreme agenda rooted in exclusion, hate, and harm. name: Team AOC
subject: Trump's second term
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Donald Trump just said he was ‘proud’ that he took away women’s reproductive rights.
Trump has done some tap dancing around the abortion issue, now that Republicans have seen how unpopular their position is. But at his Fox News Town Hall, Trump took full credit and made very clear how he’ll govern if re-elected.
Make no mistake: **women’s rights are at stake in 2024.**
[ We must be ready to fight back. Will you make a contribution of $5 today to power our movement against Trump's extremism?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240116.2vur6m&refcode=em20240116-5649-P_FND_MMF_HDL&t=1&akid=5649%2E2526796%2E8bcsol)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240116.2vur6m&refcode=em20240116-5649-P_FND_MMF_HDL&t=2&akid=5649%2E2526796%2E8bcsol)**
After his win in Iowa last night, he will likely be the Republican nominee for President. If you want to know what a second Trump term would mean for women, just take a look at Texas.
In West Texas, some counties have successfully banned people seeking an abortion from traveling on certain roads, or through certain cities, in order to reach neighboring states where abortion access is legally protected.
The Texas Attorney General is going to extreme lengths to enforce the state's six-week abortion ban — threatening hospitals, doctors, and other judges with legal action if they perform or grant legal access to an abortion — and encourages private citizens to help enforce the ban by suing anyone who ‘aids and abets’ an abortion.
This is what the MAGA movement wants more of. **We cannot let that happen.**
[Will you chip in $5 today to help power our grassroots campaign for progress against the bigotry of the MAGA movement?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240116.2vur6m&refcode=em20240116-5649-P_FND_MMF_HDL&t=3&akid=5649%2E2526796%2E8bcsol)
From all of us here on the campaign, we thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240116?refcode=em20240116-5649-P_FND_MMF_HDL&t=4&refcode2=5649_2526796_8bcsol&akid=5649%2E2526796%2E8bcsol)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240116-5649-P_FND_MMF_HDL&t=5&akid=5649%2E2526796%2E8bcsol)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=5649%2E2526796%2E8bcsol) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=5649%2E2526796%2E8bcsol) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=5649%2E2526796%2E8bcsol)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
